"},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"expression"},{"elements":[],"content":"."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":[],"content":"The use of assignments in expressions is free."}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\scripts\\verify-issues.mjs"},"span":[1843,1875],"sourceCode":"#!/usr/bin/env node\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Issue Verification Script\r\n * ==========================\r\n * Pr├╝ft ob alle Akzeptanzkriterien eines Issues oder aller Issues erfuellt sind.\r\n *\r\n * Verwendung:\r\n *   node scripts/verify-issues.mjs <issue-number>\r\n *   node scripts/verify-issues.mjs all\r\n *\r\n * Umgebungsvariablen:\r\n *   GITHUB_TOKEN   - GitHub Personal Access Token\r\n *   REPO           - Repository (default: xxammaxx/Positron)\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { execSync } from 'node:child_process';\r\nimport { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs';\r\nimport { join, dirname } from 'node:path';\r\nimport { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';\r\n\r\nconst __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));\r\nconst REPO = process.env.REPO || 'xxammaxx/Positron';\r\nconst BRANCH = execSync('git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD', { encoding: 'utf8' }).trim();\r\nconst COMMIT = execSync('git rev-parse HEAD', { encoding: 'utf8' }).trim();\r\nconst REPORTS_DIR = join(__dirname, '..', 'reports');\r\n\r\nfunction gh(args) {\r\n  try {\r\n    const result = execSync(`gh ${args} --repo ${REPO} 2>&1`, {\r\n      encoding: 'utf8',\r\n      maxBuffer: 10 * 1024 * 1024,\r\n    });\r\n    return result.trim();\r\n  } catch (e) {\r\n    console.error(`gh command failed: gh ${args}`);\r\n    console.error(e.stderr || e.message);\r\n    return null;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction verifyIssue(issueNumber) {\r\n\r\n  // Issue-Daten laden\r\n  const issueJson = gh(\r\n    `issue view ${issueNumber} --json number,title,body,state,labels,closedAt`\r\n  );\r\n  if (!issueJson) {\r\n    console.error(`ÔØî Issue #${issueNumber} konnte nicht geladen werden`);\r\n    return null;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const issue = JSON.parse(issueJson);\r\n  const body = issue.body || '';\r\n\r\n  // Akzeptanzkriterien extrahieren (Checkboxen)\r\n  const checkboxRegex = /- \\[([ x])\\] (.+)/gi;\r\n  const criteria = [];\r\n  let match;\r\n  while ((match = checkboxRegex.exec(body)) !== null) {\r\n    criteria.push({\r\n      checked: match[1] === 'x',\r\n      text: match[2].trim(),\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (criteria.length === 0) {\r\n    // Fallback: Pr├╝fe auf Known-Phrases im Body\r\n    const knownSections = [\r\n      /(?:acceptance criteria|akzeptanzkriterien)[:\\s]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)(?:\\n##|\\n---|$)/i,\r\n      /(?:definition of done|dod)[:\\s]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)(?:\\n##|\\n---|$)/i,\r\n    ];\r\n\r\n    for (const pattern of knownSections) {\r\n      const sectionMatch = pattern.exec(body);\r\n      if (sectionMatch) {\r\n        const lines = sectionMatch[1]\r\n          .split('\\n')\r\n          .map((l) => l.trim())\r\n          .filter((l) => l.startsWith('-') || l.startsWith('*') || /^\\d+\\./.test(l));\r\n        lines.forEach((l) =>\r\n          criteria.push({ checked: false, text: l.replace(/^[-*\\d]+\\.?\\s*/, '').trim() })\r\n        );\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (criteria.length === 0) {\r\n    return {\r\n      issue,\r\n      criteria: [],\r\n      result: 'NO_CRITERIA',\r\n      details: 'Issue hat keine definierten Akzeptanzkriterien',\r\n    };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // Suche nach zugeh├Ârigen Commits\r\n  const commitMatches = execSync(\r\n    `git log --all --oneline --grep=\"#${issueNumber}\"`,\r\n    { encoding: 'utf8', maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024 }\r\n  ).trim();\r\n\r\n  // Pr├╝fe auf to live in src/\r\n  const _srcDir = join(__dirname, '..', 'apps');\r\n  let codeMatches = 0;\r\n\r\n  // Extrahiere Keywords aus den Kriterien\r\n  const keywords = criteria\r\n    .flatMap((c) =>\r\n      c.text\r\n        .toLowerCase()\r\n        .replace(/[^a-z0-9\\s]/g, '')\r\n        .split(/\\s+/)\r\n        .filter((w) => w.length > 3 && !['dass', 'nach', 'ohne', 'wird', 'eine', 'einen', 'einer', 'eines', 'diese', 'dieser', 'dieses', 'durch', '├╝ber', 'unter', 'davon', 'daran', 'darin', 'dabei', 'damit', 'daf├╝r', 'dagegen', 'sowie', 'oder', 'aber', 'auch', 'noch', 'schon', 'erst', 'sehr', 'alle', 'zwei', 'drei'].includes(w))\r\n    );\r\n\r\n  const uniqueKeywords = [...new Set(keywords)].slice(0, 8);\r\n\r\n  for (const kw of uniqueKeywords) {\r\n    try {\r\n      // Cross-platform grep: ripgrep first, then fallback\r\n      let grepResult;\r\n      try {\r\n        grepResult = execSync(\r\n          `rg -l \"${kw}\" apps/ packages/ 2>&1`,\r\n          { encoding: 'utf8', maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024, timeout: 5000 }\r\n        ).trim();\r\n      } catch {\r\n        try {\r\n          grepResult = execSync(\r\n            `grep -rl \"${kw}\" apps/ packages/ 2>&1`,\r\n            { encoding: 'utf8', maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024, timeout: 5000 }\r\n          ).trim();\r\n        } catch {\r\n          grepResult = '';\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n      if (grepResult) {\r\n        codeMatches += grepResult.split('\\n').length;\r\n      }\r\n    } catch {\r\n      // ignore\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const results = criteria.map((c) => {\r\n    // Vereinfachte Pruefung: Checkbox bereits gecheckt = erfuellt\r\n    if (c.checked) {\r\n      return { text: c.text, status: 'Ô£à ERFUELLT', detail: 'Checkbox im Issue bereits markiert' };\r\n    }\r\n    return { text: c.text, status: '­ƒöì UNGEprueft', detail: 'Manuelle Pruefung erforderlich' };\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  const fulfilled = results.filter((r) => r.status === 'Ô£à ERFUELLT').length;\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    issue,\r\n    criteria: results,\r\n    result: fulfilled === criteria.length ? 'PARTIAL').length,\r\n      noCriteria: allResults.filter((r) => r.result === 'NO_CRITERIA').length,\r\n      error: allResults.filter((r) => r.result === 'ERROR').length,\r\n    },\r\n  };\r\n\r\n node\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Issue Verification Script\r\n * ==========================\r\n * Pr├╝ft ob alle Akzeptanzkriterien eines Issues oder aller Issues erfuellt sind.\r\n *\r\n * Verwendung:\r\n *   node scripts/verify-issues.mjs <issue-number>\r\n *   node scripts/verify-issues.mjs all\r\n *\r\n * Umgebungsvariablen:\r\n *   GITHUB_TOKEN   - GitHub Personal Access Token\r\n *   REPO           - Repository (default: xxammaxx/Positron)\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { execSync } from 'node:child_process';\r\nimport { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs';\r\nimport { join, dirname } from 'node:path';\r\nimport { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';\r\n\r\nconst __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));\r\nconst REPO = process.env.REPO || 'xxammaxx/Positron';\r\nconst BRANCH = execSync('git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD', { encoding: 'utf8' }).trim();\r\nconst COMMIT = execSync('git rev-parse HEAD', { encoding: 'utf8' }).trim();\r\nconst REPORTS_DIR = join(__dirname, '..', 'reports');\r\n\r\nfunction gh(args) {\r\n  try {\r\n    const result = execSync(`gh ${args} --repo ${REPO} 2>&1`, {\r\n      encoding: 'utf8',\r\n      maxBuffer: 10 * 1024 * 1024,\r\n    });\r\n    return result.trim();\r\n  } catch (e) {\r\n    console.error(`gh command failed: gh ${args}`);\r\n    console.error(e.stderr || e.message);\r\n    return null;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction verifyIssue(issueNumber) {\r\n\r\n  // Issue-Daten laden\r\n  const issueJson = gh(\r\n    `issue view ${issueNumber} --json number,title,body,state,labels,closedAt`\r\n  );\r\n  if (!issueJson) {\r\n    console.error(`ÔØî Issue #${issueNumber} konnte nicht geladen werden`);\r\n    return null;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const issue = JSON.parse(issueJson);\r\n  const body = issue.body || '';\r\n\r\n  // Akzeptanzkriterien extrahieren (Checkboxen)\r\n  const checkboxRegex = /- \\[([ x])\\] (.+)/gi;\r\n  const criteria = [];\r\n  let match;\r\n  while ((match = checkboxRegex.exec(body)) !== null) {\r\n    criteria.push({\r\n      checked: match[1] === 'x',\r\n      text: match[2].trim(),\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (criteria.length === 0) {\r\n    // Fallback: Pr├╝fe auf Known-Phrases im Body\r\n    const knownSections = [\r\n      /(?:acceptance criteria|akzeptanzkriterien)[:\\s]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)(?:\\n##|\\n---|$)/i,\r\n      /(?:definition of done|dod)[:\\s]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)(?:\\n##|\\n---|$)/i,\r\n    ];\r\n\r\n    for (const pattern of knownSections) {\r\n      const sectionMatch = pattern.exec(body);\r\n      if (sectionMatch) {\r\n        const lines = sectionMatch[1]\r\n          .split('\\n')\r\n          .map((l) => l.trim())\r\n          .filter((l) => l.startsWith('-') || l.startsWith('*') || /^\\d+\\./.test(l));\r\n        lines.forEach((l) =>\r\n          criteria.push({ checked: false, text: l.replace(/^[-*\\d]+\\.?\\s*/, '').trim() })\r\n        );\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (criteria.length === 0) {\r\n    return {\r\n      issue,\r\n      criteria: [],\r\n      result: 'NO_CRITERIA',\r\n      details: 'Issue hat keine definierten Akzeptanzkriterien',\r\n    };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // Suche nach zugeh├Ârigen Commits\r\n  const commitMatches = execSync(\r\n    `git log --all --oneline --grep=\"#${issueNumber}\"`,\r\n    { encoding: 'utf8', maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024 }\r\n  ).trim();\r\n\r\n  // Pr├╝fe auf to live in src/\r\n  const _srcDir = join(__dirname, '..', 'apps');\r\n  let codeMatches = 0;\r\n\r\n  // Extrahiere Keywords aus den Kriterien\r\n  const keywords = criteria\r\n    .flatMap((c) =>\r\n      c.text\r\n        .toLowerCase()\r\n        .replace(/[^a-z0-9\\s]/g, '')\r\n        .split(/\\s+/)\r\n        .filter((w) => w.length > 3 && !['dass', 'nach', 'ohne', 'wird', 'eine', 'einen', 'einer', 'eines', 'diese', 'dieser', 'dieses', 'durch', '├╝ber', 'unter', 'davon', 'daran', 'darin', 'dabei', 'damit', 'daf├╝r', 'dagegen', 'sowie', 'oder', 'aber', 'auch', 'noch', 'schon', 'erst', 'sehr', 'alle', 'zwei', 'drei'].includes(w))\r\n    );\r\n\r\n  const uniqueKeywords = [...new Set(keywords)].slice(0, 8);\r\n\r\n  for (const kw of uniqueKeywords) {\r\n    try {\r\n      // Cross-platform grep: ripgrep first, then fallback\r\n      let grepResult;\r\n      try {\r\n        grepResult = execSync(\r\n          `rg -l \"${kw}\" apps/ packages/ 2>&1`,\r\n          { encoding: 'utf8', maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024, timeout: 5000 }\r\n        ).trim();\r\n      } catch {\r\n        try {\r\n          grepResult = execSync(\r\n            `grep -rl \"${kw}\" apps/ packages/ 2>&1`,\r\n            { encoding: 'utf8', maxBuffer: 1024 * 1024, timeout: 5000 }\r\n          ).trim();\r\n        } catch {\r\n          grepResult = '';\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n      if (grepResult) {\r\n        codeMatches += grepResult.split('\\n').length;\r\n      }\r\n    } catch {\r\n      // ignore\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const results = criteria.map((c) => {\r\n    // Vereinfachte Pruefung: Checkbox bereits gecheckt = erfuellt\r\n    if (c.checked) {\r\n      return { text: c.text, status: 'Ô£à ERFUELLT', detail: 'Checkbox im Issue bereits markiert' };\r\n    }\r\n    return { text: c.text, status: '­ƒöì UNGEprueft', detail: 'Manuelle Pruefung erforderlich' };\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  const fulfilled = results.filter((r) => r.status === 'Ô£à ERFUELLT').length;\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    issue,\r\n    criteria: results,\r\n    result: fulfilled === criteria.length ? 'PASS' : 'PARTIAL',\r\n    details: `${fulfilled}/${criteria.length} Kriterien erfuellt`,\r\n    commits: commitMatches || 'Keine Commits gefunden',\r\n    codeMatches,\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction generateReport(allResults, mode) {\r\n  const report = {\r\n    repository: REPO,\r\n    branch: BRANCH,\r\n    commit: COMMIT,\r\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    mode,\r\n    total: allResults.length,\r\n    results: allResults,\r\n    summary: {\r\n      pass: allResults.filter((r) => r.result === 'PASS').length,\r\n      partial: allResults.filter((r) => r.result === 'PARTIAL').length,\r\n      noCriteria: allResults.filter((r) => r.result === 'NO_CRITERIA').length,\r\n      error: allResults.filter((r) => r.result === 'ERROR').length,\r\n    },\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  // Bericht speichern\r\n  if (!existsSync(REPORTS_DIR)) {\r\n    mkdirSync(REPORTS_DIR, { recursive: true });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const filename = join(REPORTS_DIR, `issue-verification-${Date.now()}.json`);\r\n  writeFileSync(filename, JSON.stringify(report, null, 2), 'utf8');\r\n\r\n  return report;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction printSummary(_report) {\r\n}\r\n\r\n// --- MAIN ---\r\nconst args = process.argv.slice(2);\r\nconst mode = args[0] || 'all';\r\nconst results = [];\r\n\r\nif (mode === 'all') {\r\n\r\n  // Alle Issues laden\r\n  const issuesJson = gh(`issue list --state all --limit 1000 --json number --jq '.[].number'`);\r\n  if (!issuesJson) {\r\n    console.error('ÔØî Konnte Issues nicht laden');\r\n    process.exit(1);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const issueNumbers = issuesJson.split('\\n').map(Number).filter(Boolean);\r\n\r\n  for (const num of issueNumbers) {\r\n    const result = verifyIssue(num);\r\n    if (result) {\r\n      results.push(result);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n} else if (/^\\d+$/.test(mode)) {\r\n  // Einzelnen Issue pruefen\r\n  const result = verifyIssue(Number.parseInt(mode));\r\n  if (result) {\r\n    results.push(result);\r\n  }\r\n} else {\r\n  console.error('Verwendung: node scripts/verify-issues.mjs <issue-number|all>');\r\n  process.exit(1);\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst report = generateReport(results, mode);\r\nprintSummary(report);\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/style/noNonNullAssertion","severity":"warning","description":"Forbidden non-null CLI ÔÇö Command-line interface for Positron\r\n//\r\n// Usage:\r\n//   positron run --issueNumber 42 --repoId repo-1 --autonomyLevel 2\r\n//   positron run --help\r\n//\r\n// The CLI calls the Positron REST API to start runs.\r\n// Requires the server to be running (start with `npm run dev` or `npm start`).\r\n\r\nimport process from 'node:process';\r\n\r\ninterface RunCommandArgs {\r\n  issueNumber: number;\r\n  repoId?: string;\r\n  autonomyLevel?: number;\r\n  serverUrl?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction printHelp(): void {\r\n}\r\n\r\ntype ParseResult = { kind: 'ok'; args: RunCommandArgs } | { kind: 'help' } | { kind: 'error'; message: string };\r\n\r\nfunction parseArgs(argv: string[]): ParseResult {\r\n  const args: RunCommandArgs = {\r\n    issueNumber: 0,\r\n    repoId: undefined,\r\n    autonomyLevel: 2,\r\n    serverUrl: 'http://localhost:3000',\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  let i = 2; // Skip \"node\" and script path\r\n  const cmd = argv[i];\r\n  if (!cmd) {\r\n    return { kind: 'error', message: 'Kein Befehl angegeben. Verwende \"positron run --help\" f├╝r Hilfe.' };\r\n  }\r\n  if (cmd !== 'run') {\r\n    if (cmd === '--help' || cmd === '-h') {\r\n      return { kind: 'help' };\r\n    }\r\n    return { kind: 'error', message: `Unbekannter Befehl: \"${cmd}\". Verwende \"positron run --help\" f├╝r Hilfe.` };\r\n  }\r\n  i++;\r\n\r\n  while (i < argv.length) {\r\n    const key = argv[i];\r\n    const val = argv[i + 1];\r\n\r\n    switch (key) {\r\n      case '--issueNumber':\r\n        if (val) {\r\n          args.issueNumber = Number.parseInt(val, 10);\r\n          if (Number.isNaN(args.issueNumber) || args.issueNumber < 1) {\r\n            return { kind: 'error', message: '--issueNumber muss eine positive Zahl sein' };\r\n          }\r\n          i += 2;\r\n        } else {\r\n          return { kind: 'error', message: '--issueNumber ben├Âtigt einen Wert' };\r\n        }\r\n        break;\r\n      case '--repoId':\r\n        if (val) {\r\n          args.repoId = val;\r\n          i += 2;\r\n        } else {\r\n          i++;\r\n        }\r\n        break;\r\n      case '--autonomyLevel':\r\n        if (val) {\r\n          args.autonomyLevel = Number.parseInt(val, 10);\r\n          if (Number.isNaN(args.autonomyLevel!) || args.autonomyLevel! < 0 || args.autonomyLevel! > 2) {\r\n            return { kind: 'error', message: '--autonomyLevel muss 0, 1 oder 2 sein' };\r\n          }\r\n          i += 2;\r\n        } else {\r\n          i++;\r\n        }\r\n        break;\r\n      case '--serverUrl':\r\n        if (val) {\r\n          args.serverUrl = val;\r\n          i += 2;\r\n        } else {\r\n          i++;\r\n        }\r\n        break;\r\n      case '--help':\r\n      case '-h':\r\n        return { kind: 'help' };\r\n      default:\r\n        return { kind: 'error', message: `Unbekannte Option: ${key}` };\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!args.issueNumber) {\r\n    return { kind: 'error', message: '--issueNumber ist erforderlich' };\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return { kind: 'ok', args };\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** Prints an error and returns false (for use with process.exit) */\r\nfunction printError(message: string): void {\r\n  console.error(`Fehler: ${message}`);\r\n  console.error('Verwende \"positron run --help\" f├╝r Hilfe.');\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function runCommand(args: RunCommandArgs): Promise<void> {\r\n  const serverUrl = args.serverUrl ?? 'http://localhost:3000';\r\n  const repoId = args.repoId ?? 'repo-1';\r\n\r\n  try {\r\n    const response = await fetch(`${serverUrl}/api/repos/${repoId}/runs`, {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify({\r\n        issueNumber: args.issueNumber,\r\n        autonomyLevel: args.autonomyLevel ?? 2,\r\n      }),\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    if (!response.ok) {\r\n      const errorBody = await response.text().catch(() => 'Unbekannter Fehler');\r\n      console.error(`ÔØî Server-Fehler (${response.status}): ${errorBody}`);\r\n      process.exit(1);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Pr├╝fe Content-Type auf JSON ÔÇö verhindert Crash bei non-JSON 2xx\r\n    const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type') ?? '';\r\n    if (!contentType.includes('json')) {\r\n      const body = await response.text().catch(() => '');\r\n      console.error(`ÔØî Server antwortete mit ${contentType} statt JSON`);\r\n      console.error(`   Body: ${body.slice(0, 500)}`);\r\n      process.exit(1);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const _data = await response.json() as {\r\n      run: { id: string; phase: string; status: string };\r\n      eventCount: number;\r\n    };\r\n  } catch (err) {\r\n    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);\r\n    console.error(`ÔØî Verbindungsfehler: ${message}`);\r\n    console.error(`   Stelle sicher, dass der Server unter ${serverUrl} l├ñuft.`);\r\n    process.exit(1);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Main entry when called as CLI\r\nasync function main(): Promise<void> {\r\n  const result = parseArgs(process.argv);\r\n  switch (result.kind) {\r\n    case 'help':\r\n      printHelp();\r\n      process.exit(0);\r\n      return;\r\n    case 'error':\r\n      printError(result.message);\r\n      process.exit(1);\r\n      return;\r\n    case 'ok':\r\n      await runCommand(result.args);\r\n      return;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Auto-execute when run directly (via `positron` bin or `node dist/cli.js`)\r\nconst isDirectRun = process.argv[1] && (\r\n  process.argv[1].endsWith('/cli.js') ||\r\n  process.argv[1].endsWith('/cli.ts') ||\r\n  process.argv[1].endsWith('/positron') ||\r\n  process.argv[1].includes('/bin/positron') ||\r\n  process.argv[1].includes('\\\\bin\\\\positron')\r\n);\r\nif (isDirectRun) {\r\n  main().catch(err => {\r\n    console.error('ÔØî CLI-Fehler:', err);\r\n    process.exit(1);\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport type { RunCommandArgs };\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/style/noNonNullAssertion","severity":"warning","description":"Forbidden non-null assertion.","message":[{"elements":[],"content":"Forbidden non-null (err) {\r\n\t\tlog(\"ERROR\", `Cannot enqueue: ${err.message}`);\r\n\t\tif (queue) await queue.close().catch(() => {});\r\n\t\tprocess.exit(1);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// Wait for server's collectQueueStats queue.\r\n\t// We need to check if drill queue metrics are reported.\r\n\t// Since the server code only checks positron-pipeline, we need to\r\n\t// read BullMQ directly.\r\n\r\n\tlet drillWaiting = 0;\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst { Queue: Q2 } = await import(\"bullmq\");\r\n\t\tconst checkQueue = new Queue(DRILL_QUEUE, {\r\n\t\t\tconnection: { url: REDIS_URL, connectTimeout: 5000 },\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\tconst counts = await checkQueue.getJobCounts(\"waiting\");\r\n\t\tdrillWaiting = counts.waiting ?? 0;\r\n\t\tawait checkQueue.close();\r\n\t\tlog(\"INFO\", `Drill queue waiting (via BullMQ): ${drillWaiting}`);\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tlog(\"ERROR\", `Cannot check drill queue: ${err.message}`);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// Re-fetch metrics to see if drill queue shows up\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst res = await httpGet(`${SERVER_URL}/metrics`);\r\n\t\tmetricText = res.body;\r\n\t\tconst _afterBacklog =\r\n\t\t\tgetMetricValue(\r\n\t\t\t\tmetricText,\r\n\t\t\t\t\"positron_queue_jobs_waiting\",\r\n\t\t\t\t'queue=\"positron-pipeline\"',\r\n\t\t\t) ?? 0;\r\n\r\n\t\tif (afterPipelineBacklog > beforePipelineBacklog) {\r\n\t\t\tlog(\r\n\t\t\t\t\"ERROR\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"PIPELINE QUEUE AFFECTED! This is a bug ÔÇö pipeline queue should not be affected by drill.\",\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t} catch {\r\n\t\t/* silent */\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tif (promOk) {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst res = await httpGet(`${PROMETHEUS_URL}/api/v1/alerts`);\r\n\t\t\tconst data = JSON.parse(res.body);\r\n\r\n\t\t\tif (data?.data?.alerts) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst drillAlerts = data.data.alerts.filter(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t(a) => a?.labels?.alertname === \"QueueBacklogCriticalDrill\",\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst productionAlerts = data.data.alerts.filter(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t(a) => a?.labels?.alertname === \"QueueBacklogCritical\",\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tif (drillAlerts.length > 0) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlog(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"INFO\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t`QueueBacklogCriticalDrill ALERT: ${drillAlerts[0].state}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlog(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"WARN\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"QueueBacklogCriticalDrill NOT firing yet (waiting for Prometheus scrape)\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tif (productionAlerts.length > 0) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlog(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"WARN\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t`QueueBacklogCritical (production) is firing! state=${productionAlerts[0].state}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlog(\"INFO\", \"QueueBacklogCritical (production) NOT firing ÔÇö correct\");\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tlog(\"WARN\", `Cannot parse Prometheus alerts: ${err.message}`);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t} else {\r\n\t\tlog(\"WARN\", \"Prometheus not reachable ÔÇö alert check skipped\");\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tif (mockOk) {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst res = await httpGet(`${MOCK_URL}/alerts/warning`);\r\n\t\t\tconst data = JSON.parse(res.body);\r\n\t\t\tconst drillWebhooks = (data?.alerts ?? []).filter(\r\n\t\t\t\t(a) => a?.data?.alertname === \"QueueBacklogCriticalDrill\",\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\tif (drillWebhooks.length > 0) {\r\n\t\t\t\tlog(\"INFO\", \"Drill alert received by webhook mock\");\r\n\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\tlog(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"WARN\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"Drill alert not yet received by webhook mock (may need Alertmanager dispatch)\",\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tlog(\"WARN\", `Cannot check webhook mock: ${err.message}`);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t} else {\r\n\t\tlog(\"WARN\", \"Webhook mock not reachable\");\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\t// Drain all waiting jobs\r\n\t\tawait queue.drain();\r\n\t\tlog(\"INFO\", \"Drained drill queue\");\r\n\r\n\t\t// Clean completed/failed jobs\r\n\t\tawait queue.clean(0, 2000, \"completed\");\r\n\t\tawait queue.clean(0, 2000, \"failed\");\r\n\t\tawait queue.clean(0, 2000, \"wait\");\r\n\t\tawait queue.clean(0, 2000, \"delayed\");\r\n\t\tlog(\"INFO\", \"Cleaned all drill queue job states\");\r\n\r\n\t\t// Obliterate the test queue to remove it from Redis entirely\r\n\t\tawait queue.obliterate({ force: true });\r\n\t\tlog(\"INFO\", `Queue \"${DRILL_QUEUE}\" obliterated`);\r\n\r\n\t\tawait queue.close();\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tlog(\"ERROR\", `Cleanup failed: ${err.message}`);\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tawait queue?.close();\r\n\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\t/* best effort */\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tprocess.exit(0);\r\n}\r\n\r\nmain().catch((err) => {\r\n\tconsole.error(`${RED}Drill crashed:${RESET} ${err.message}`);\r\n\tprocess.exit(1);\r\n});\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/correctness/noUnusedVariables","severity":"warning","description":"This variable is * Positron Queue Backlog Drill (QA-018)\r\n *\r\n * Safely simulates QueueBacklogCritical by enqueuing jobs into an isolated\r\n * test queue (positron-observability-drill). Never touches the production\r\n * pipeline queue.\r\n *\r\n * Usage:\r\n *   node scripts/queue-backlog-drill.mjs [--jobs=60] [--server=http://localhost:3000]\r\n *   npm run observability:queue-backlog\r\n *\r\n * Prerequisites:\r\n *   1. Redis running (localhost:6379 or POSITRON_REDIS_URL)\r\n *   2. Positron server running (metrics endpoint)\r\n *   3. Prometheus scraping the server\r\n *   4. Optional: webhook mock on port 5001\r\n *\r\n * Exit codes:\r\n *   0 ÔÇö Drill completed, alert fired and resolved\r\n *   1 ÔÇö Prerequisites not met or drill failed\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport http from \"node:http\";\r\n\r\n// ÔöÇÔöÇ Configuration ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ\r\nconst SERVER_URL = process.env.POSITRON_SERVER_URL ?? Number.parseFloat(match[1]) : null;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\tconst match = metricText.match(regex);\r\n\treturn match ? Number.parseFloat(match[1]) : null;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction log(level, _message) {\r\n\tconst _prefix =\r\n\t\tlevel === \"ERROR\"\r\n\t\t\t? `${RED}ÔØî`\r\n\t\t\t: level === \"WARN\"\r\n\t\t\t\t? `${YELLOW}!`\r\n\t\t\t\t: `${GREEN}Ô£à`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction sleep(ms) {\r\n\treturn new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, ms));\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ÔöÇÔöÇ Main Drill Date.now(),\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t{\r\n\t\t\t\t\tremoveOnComplete: { count: 1000 },\r\n\t\t\t\t\tremoveOnFail: { count: 1000 },\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\tqueuedCount++;\r\n\t\t\tif (i % 20 === 0 && i > 0) {\r\n\t\t\t\tprocess.stdout.write(`  Enqueued ${i}/${jobCount}...\\r`);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tlog(\"INFO\", `${queuedCount} jobs enqueued to \"${DRILL_QUEUE}\"`);\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tlog(\"ERROR\", `Cannot enqueue: ${err.message}`);\r\n\t\tif (queue) await queue.close().catch(() => {});\r\n\t\tprocess.exit(1);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// Wait for server's collectQueueStats 0;\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst { Queue: Q2 } = await import(\"bullmq\");\r\n\t\tconst checkQueue = new Queue(DRILL_QUEUE, {\r\n\t\t\tconnection: { url: REDIS_URL, connectTimeout: 5000 },\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\tconst counts = await checkQueue.getJobCounts(\"waiting\");\r\n\t\tdrillWaiting = counts.waiting ?? 0;\r\n\t\tawait checkQueue.close();\r\n\t\tlog(\"INFO\", `Drill queue waiting {\r\n\t\tconst res = await httpGet(`${SERVER_URL}/metrics`);\r\n\t\tmetricText = res.body;\r\n\t\tconst _afterBacklog WHERE id = ? AND status IN ('active', 'blocked')`).run(now, id);\r\n\r\n    if (result && result.changes === 0) {\r\n      res.status(409).json({ error: 'Run status changed before cancellation could complete', runId: id });\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    deps.storeEvent({\r\n      id: crypto.randomUUID(),\r\n      runId: id,\r\n      phase: current.phase,\r\n      level: 'HUMAN',\r\n      message: 'Run cancelled by operator',\r\n      payload: null,\r\n      createdAt: now,\r\n    });\r\n    deps.broadcastSSE(id, 'run-cancelled', {\r\n      runId: id, phase: current.phase, status: 'cancelled', { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" } : {},\r\n\t\t\ttimeout: 5000,\r\n\t\t};\r\n\t\tconst req = http.request(options, (res) => {\r\n\t\t\tlet data = \"\";\r\n\t\t\tres.on(\"data\", (chunk) => (data += chunk));\r\n\t\t\tres.on(\"end\", () => {\r\n\t\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tresolve({ status: res.statusCode, body: JSON.parse(data) });\r\n\t\t\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tresolve({ status: res.statusCode, body: data });\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\treq.on(\"error\", (err) => reject(err));\r\n\t\treq.on(\"timeout\", () => {\r\n\t\t\treq.destroy();\r\n\t\t\treject(new Error(\"Request timeout\"));\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\tif (body) req.write(JSON.stringify(body));\r\n\t\treq.end();\r\n\t});\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function check(_name, fn) {\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tawait fn();\r\n\t\tchecksPassed++;\r\n\t\treturn true;\r\n\t} catch (_err) {\r\n\t\tchecksFailed++;\r\n\t\treturn false;\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function checkSkip(_name, _reason) {\r\n\tchecksSkipped++;\r\n\treturn false;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getMetricValue(metricText, name) {\r\n\tconst regex = new RegExp(`^${name}(?:\\\\{[^}]*\\\\})?\\\\s+([\\\\d.e+]+)`, \"m\");\r\n\tconst match = metricText.match(regex);\r\n\treturn match ? Number.parseFloat(match[1]) : null;\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ÔöÇÔöÇ Drill Steps function main() {\r\n\r\n\tawait check(\"Positron Server /api/health\", async () => {\r\n\t\tconst res = await httpRequest(\"GET\", `${SERVER_URL}/api/health`);\r\n\t\tif (res.status !== 200 || res.body?.status !== \"ok\") {\r\n\t\t\tthrow new Error(\r\n\t\t\t\t`Server returned status=${res.status}, body=${JSON.stringify(res.body).slice(0, 100)}`,\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tawait check(\"Positron Server /metrics\", async () => {\r\n\t\tconst res = await httpRequest(\"GET\", `${SERVER_URL}/metrics`);\r\n\t\tif (res.status !== 200) throw new Error(`/metrics returned ${res.status}`);\r\n\t\tconst text =\r\n\t\t\ttypeof res.body === \"string\" ? res.body : JSON.stringify(res.body);\r\n\t\tif (!text.includes(\"positron_server_uptime_seconds\")) {\r\n\t\t\tthrow new { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" } : {},\r\n\t\t\ttimeout: 5000,\r\n\t\t};\r\n\t\tconst req = http.request(options, (res) => {\r\n\t\t\tlet data = \"\";\r\n\t\t\tres.on(\"data\", (chunk) => (data += chunk));\r\n\t\t\tres.on(\"end\", () => {\r\n\t\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tresolve({ status: res.statusCode, body: JSON.parse(data) });\r\n\t\t\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tresolve({ status: res.statusCode, body: data });\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\treq.on(\"error\", (err) => reject(err));\r\n\t\treq.on(\"timeout\", () => {\r\n\t\t\treq.destroy();\r\n\t\t\treject(new Error(\"Request timeout\"));\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\tif (body) req.write(JSON.stringify(body));\r\n\t\treq.end();\r\n\t});\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function check(_name, fn) {\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tawait fn();\r\n\t\tchecksPassed++;\r\n\t\treturn true;\r\n\t} catch (_err) {\r\n\t\tchecksFailed++;\r\n\t\treturn false;\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function checkSkip(_name, _reason) {\r\n\tchecksSkipped++;\r\n\treturn false;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getMetricValue(metricText, name) {\r\n\tconst regex = new RegExp(`^${name}(?:\\\\{[^}]*\\\\})?\\\\s+([\\\\d.e+]+)`, \"m\");\r\n\tconst match = metricText.match(regex);\r\n\treturn match ? { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" } : {},\r\n\t\t\ttimeout: 5000,\r\n\t\t};\r\n\t\tconst req = http.request(options, (res) => {\r\n\t\t\tlet data = \"\";\r\n\t\t\tres.on(\"data\", (chunk) => (data += chunk));\r\n\t\t\tres.on(\"end\", () => {\r\n\t\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tresolve({ status: res.statusCode, body: JSON.parse(data) });\r\n\t\t\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tresolve({ status: res.statusCode, body: data });\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\treq.on(\"error\", (err) => reject(err));\r\n\t\treq.on(\"timeout\", () => {\r\n\t\t\treq.destroy();\r\n\t\t\treject(new Error(\"Request timeout\"));\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\tif (body) req.write(JSON.stringify(body));\r\n\t\treq.end();\r\n\t});\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function check(_name, fn) {\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tawait fn();\r\n\t\tchecksPassed++;\r\n\t\treturn true;\r\n\t} catch (_err) {\r\n\t\tchecksFailed++;\r\n\t\treturn false;\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function checkSkip(_name, _reason) {\r\n\tchecksSkipped++;\r\n\treturn false;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getMetricValue(metricText, name) {\r\n\tconst regex = new RegExp(`^${name}(?:\\\\{[^}]*\\\\})?\\\\s+([\\\\d.e+]+)`, \"m\");\r\n\tconst match = metricText.match(regex);\r\n\treturn match ? type React from 'react';\nimport { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { api } from '../api.js';\r\nimport type { Artifact } from '../types.js';\r\n\r\ninterface ArtifactPanelProps {\r\n  runId: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\ntype ArtifactKind = 'spec' | 'plan' | 'tasks' | 'diff';\r\n\r\nconst TABS: Array<{ kind: ArtifactKind; label: string }> = [\r\n  { kind: 'spec', label: 'Spec' },\r\n  { kind: 'plan', label: 'Plan' },\r\n  { kind: 'tasks', label: 'Tasks' },\r\n  { kind: 'diff', label: 'Diff' },\r\n];\r\n\r\nfunction highlightDiffLine(line: string): string {\r\n  if (line.startsWith('+') && !line.startsWith('+++')) {\r\n    return `<span class=\"text-green-400\">${line}</span>`;\r\n  }\r\n  if (line.startsWith('-') && !line.startsWith('---')) {\r\n    return `<span class=\"text-red-400\">${line}</span>`;\r\n  }\r\n  if (line.startsWith('@@')) {\r\n    return `<span class=\"text-slate-500\">${line}</span>`;\r\n  }\r\n  return line;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function ArtifactPanel({\r\n  runId,\r\n}: ArtifactPanelProps): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<ArtifactKind>('spec');\r\n  const [artifact, setArtifact] = useState<Artifact | null>(null);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const fetchArtifact = useCallback(async (kind: ArtifactKind) => {\r\n    setLoading(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getArtifact(runId, kind);\r\n      setArtifact(data);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : `Konnte ${kind} nicht laden`,\r\n      );\r\n      setArtifact(null);\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [runId]);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchArtifact(activeTab);\r\n  }, [activeTab, fetchArtifact]);\r\n\r\n  function handleDownload(): void {\r\n    if (!artifact) return;\r\n    const blob = new Blob([artifact.content], { type: 'text/plain' });\r\n    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\r\n    const a = document.createElement('a');\r\n    a.href = url;\r\n    a.download = `${activeTab}-${runId.slice(0, 8)}.md`;\r\n    a.click();\r\n    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  function renderContent(): string {\r\n    if (!artifact) return '';\r\n    if (activeTab === 'diff') {\r\n      return artifact.content\r\n        .split('\\n')\r\n        .map(highlightDiffLine)\r\n        .join('\\n');\r\n    }\r\n    return artifact.content;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div className=\"card\">\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\r\n        <h3 className=\"text-sm font-medium text-slate-300\">Artefakte</h3>\r\n        {artifact && (\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={handleDownload}\r\n            className=\"text-xs text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300 transition-colors\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô¼ç Download\r\n          </button>\r\n        )}\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Tabs */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex gap-1 mb-3\">\r\n        {TABS.map(tab => (\r\n          <button\r\n            key={tab.kind}\r\n            onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.kind)}\r\n            className={`px-2.5 py-1 text-xs rounded-md transition-colors ${\r\n              activeTab === tab.kind\r\n                ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'\r\n                : 'bg-slate-700 text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-600'\r\n            }`}\r\n          >\r\n            {tab.label}\r\n          </button>\r\n        ))}\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Content */}\r\n      {loading ? type React from 'react';\nimport { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { api } from '../api.js';\r\nimport type { Artifact } from '../types.js';\r\n\r\ninterface ArtifactPanelProps {\r\n  runId: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\ntype ArtifactKind = 'spec' | 'plan' | 'tasks' | 'diff';\r\n\r\nconst TABS: Array<{ kind: ArtifactKind; label: string }> = [\r\n  { kind: 'spec', default function ArtifactPanel({\r\n  runId,\r\n}: ArtifactPanelProps): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<ArtifactKind>('spec');\r\n  const [artifact, setArtifact] = (kind: ArtifactKind) => {\r\n    setLoading(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getArtifact(runId, kind);\r\n      setArtifact(data);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n        </button>\r\n        )}\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Tabs */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex gap-1 mb-3\">\r\n        {TABS.map(tab => (\r\n          <button\r\n            key={tab.kind}\r\n            onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.kind)}\r\n            className={`px-2.5 py-1 text-xs rounded-md transition-colors ${\r\n              activeTab === tab.kind\r\n                ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'\r\n                : 'bg-slate-700 text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-600'\r\n            }`}\r\n          >\r\n            {tab.label}\r\n          </button>\r\n        ))}\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Content */}\r\n      {loading ?   </div>\r\n      )}\r\n    </div>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/security/noDangerouslySetInnerHtml","severity":"error","description":"Avoid passing content using the err.message : 'Fehler bei Genehmigung');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function handleRevise(): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (reviseReason.trim().length < 20) {\r\n      setError('Bitte mindestens 20 Zeichen eingeben');\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    setLoading(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      await api.reviseGate(runId, reviseReason);\r\n      setSuccess(true);\r\n      setShowReviseForm(false);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Fehler bei ├£berarbeitung');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div className=\"card\">\r\n      <h3 className=\"text-sm font-medium text-amber-400 mb-2\">\r\n        ÔÜí Gate-Entscheidung erforderlich\r\n      </h3>\r\n      <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 mb-4\">\r\n        Der Run wartet auf deine Entscheidung, bevor er fortgesetzt wird.\r\n      </p>\r\n\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-3 p-2 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded text-xs text-red-200\">\r\n          {error}\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {success ? (\r\n        <div className=\"p-3 bg-green-900/50 border border-green-700 rounded-lg text-center\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-green-300 text-sm font-medium\">Ô£ô Entscheidung gespeichert</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\r\n          {/* Approve Button */}\r\n          {!showApproveConfirm && !showReviseForm && (\r\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={() => setShowApproveConfirm(true)}\r\n                className=\"btn-success flex-1 text-sm\"\r\n              >\r\n                Ô£ô Genehmigen\r\n              </button>\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={() => setShowReviseForm(true)}\r\n                className=\"btn-secondary flex-1 text-sm\"\r\n              >\r\n                Ôå║ ├£berarbeitung\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n          )}\r\n\r\n          {/* Approve Confirmation */}\r\n          {showApproveConfirm && (\r\n            <div className=\"p-3 bg-slate-700 rounded-lg space-y-3\">\r\n              <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-300\">\r\n                Bist du sicher? err.message : 'Fehler bei Genehmigung');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function handleRevise(): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (reviseReason.trim().length < 20) {\r\n      setError('Bitte mindestens 20 Zeichen eingeben');\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    setLoading(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      await api.reviseGate(runId, reviseReason);\r\n      setSuccess(true);\r\n      setShowReviseForm(false);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ?
