{ useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\r\nimport { api } from '../api.js';\r\nimport PhaseBadge from './PhaseBadge.jsx';\r\nimport type { Run, Phase } from '../types.js';\r\nimport { ALL_PHASES } from '../types.js';\r\n\r\nfunction formatDuration(ms: number): string {\r\n  if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;\r\n  const seconds = Math.floor(ms / 1000);\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours > 0) return `${hours}h ${minutes % 60}m`;\r\n  if (minutes > 0) return `${minutes}m ${seconds % 60}s`;\r\n  return `${seconds}s`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);\r\n  if (minutes < 1) return 'gerade eben';\r\n  if (minutes < 60) return `vor ${minutes} Minuten`;\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours < 24) return `vor ${hours} Stunden`;\r\n  return `vor ${Math.floor(hours / 24)} Tagen`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function Dashboard(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n  const [runs, setRuns] = useState<Run[]>([]);\r\n  const [totalRuns, setTotalRuns] = useState(0);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState<string>('all');\r\n  const [isNewRunModalOpen, setIsNewRunModalOpen] = useState(false);\r\n  const [selectedRepo, setSelectedRepo] = useState<string>('');\r\n  const [issueNumber, setIssueNumber] = useState('');\r\n  const [autonomyLevel, setAutonomyLevel] = useState(2);\r\n  const [startingRun, setStartingRun] = useState(false);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [successRate, setSuccessRate] = useState(0);\r\n\r\n  const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRuns({ limit: 100 });\r\n      setRuns(data.runs);\r\n      setTotalRuns(data.total);\r\n      const completed = data.runs.filter(\r\n        r => r.status === 'done' || r.phase === 'DONE',\r\n      );\r\n      setSuccessRate(\r\n        completed.length > 0\r\n          ? Math.round(\r\n              (completed.filter(r => r.phase === 'DONE').length /\r\n                completed.length) *\r\n                100,\r\n            )\r\n          : 0,\r\n      );\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load runs');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRuns();\r\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRuns, 5000);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\r\n  }, [fetchRuns]);\r\n\r\n  const filteredRuns = runs.filter(run => {\r\n    if (\r\n      searchTerm &&\r\n      !run.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) &&\r\n      !String(run.issueNumber).includes(searchTerm)\r\n    ) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n    if (phaseFilter !== 'all' && run.phase !== phaseFilter) return false;\r\n    return true;\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  const activeRuns = runs.filter(r => r.status === 'active').length;\r\n\r\n  const avgDurationMs =\r\n    runs.length > 0\r\n      ? runs.reduce((sum, r) => {\r\n          if (!r.finishedAt || !r.startedAt) return sum;\r\n          return sum + (new Date(r.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(r.startedAt).getTime());\r\n        }, 0) / runs.length\r\n      : 0;\r\n\r\n  async function handleStartRun(): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (!selectedRepo || !issueNumber) return;\r\n    setStartingRun(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      const { run: startedRun } = await api.startRun(\r\n        selectedRepo,\r\n        Number.parseInt(issueNumber, 10),\r\n        autonomyLevel,\r\n      );\r\n      setIsNewRunModalOpen(false);\r\n      setIssueNumber('');\r\n      navigate(`/runs/${startedRun.id}`);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setStartingRun(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">ÔÜí Positron Dashboard</h1>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm mt-1\">\r\n            Evidence-Gated GitHub Issue Execution\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + New Run\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Metrics Cards */}\r\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Total Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : totalRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Success Rate\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-green-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : `${successRate}%`}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Active Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-blue-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : activeRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Avg. Time\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : formatDuration(avgDurationMs)}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Filters */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-4\">\r\n        <input\r\n          type=\"text\"\r\n          placeholder=\"Suche nach Run-ID oder Issue-Nr...\"\r\n          value={searchTerm}\r\n          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-xs\"\r\n        />\r\n        <select\r\n          value={phaseFilter}\r\n          onChange={e => setPhaseFilter(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-[200px]\"\r\n        >\r\n          <option value=\"all\">Alle Phasen</option>\r\n          {ALL_PHASES.map(p => (\r\n            <option key={p} value={p}>\r\n              {p}\r\n            </option>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </select>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Runs Table */}\r\n      {loading ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Lade Runs...</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : filteredRuns.length === 0 ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôï</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg\">\r\n            {runs.length === 0\r\n              ? 'Noch keine Runs ÔÇö erstelle deinen ersten Run'\r\n              : 'Keine Runs gefunden, die den Filtern entsprechen'}\r\n          </p>\r\n          {runs.length === 0 && (\r\n            <button\r\n              onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n              className=\"btn-primary mt-4\"\r\n            >\r\n              Ersten Run erstellen\r\n            </button>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"card p-0 overflow-hidden\">\r\n          <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\r\n            <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\r\n              <thead>\r\n                <tr className=\"border-b border-slate-700 text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase\">\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">ID</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Phase</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Status</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Repository</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Issue</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Dauer</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Gestartet</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-right px-4 py-3 font-medium\">\r\n                    Aktionen\r\n                  </th>\r\n                </tr>\r\n              </thead>\r\n              <tbody className=\"divide-y divide-slate-700\">\r\n                {filteredRuns.map(run => {\r\n                  const duration =\r\n                    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n                      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() -\r\n                        new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n                      : 0;\r\n                  return (\r\n                    <tr\r\n                      key={run.id}\r\n                      className=\"hover:bg-slate-700/50 transition-colors\"\r\n                    >\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-blue-400\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"hover:underline\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} size=\"xs\" />\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span\r\n                          className={`text-xs font-medium ${\r\n                            run.status === 'active'\r\n                              ? 'text-blue-400'\r\n                              : run.status === 'done'\r\n                                ? 'text-green-400'\r\n                                : run.status === 'failed'\r\n                                  ? 'text-red-400'\r\n                                  : 'text-slate-400'\r\n                          }`}\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.status}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-300 text-xs\">\r\n                        {run.repoId}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span className=\"text-blue-400 text-xs font-mono\">\r\n                          #{run.issueNumber}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {duration > 0 ? formatDuration(duration) : '-'}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {relativeTime(run.startedAt)}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"btn-secondary text-xs py-1 px-3\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          Details\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                    </tr>\r\n                  );\r\n                })}\r\n              </tbody>\r\n            </table>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* New Run Modal */}\r\n      {isNewRunModalOpen && (\r\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center\">\r\n          <div\r\n            className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm\"\r\n            onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n          />\r\n          <div className=\"relative bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 p-6 w-full max-w-md mx-4 shadow-2xl\">\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-4\">\r\n              <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-white\">Neuen Run starten</h2>\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n                className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-white text-xl\"\r\n              >\r\n                Ô£ò\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Repository\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"text\"\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. Positron\"\r\n                  value={selectedRepo}\r\n                  onChange={e => setSelectedRepo(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Issue-Nummer\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"number\"\r\n                  min={1}\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. 42\"\r\n                  value={issueNumber}\r\n                  onChange={e => setIssueNumber(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-2\">\r\n                  Autonomie-Level\r\n                </label>\r\n                <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\r\n                  {[\r\n                    { value: 0, label: 'Full' },\r\n                    { value: 1, label: 'Semi' },\r\n                    { value: 2, label: 'Manual' },\r\n                  ].map(option => (\r\n                    <label\r\n                      key={option.value}\r\n                      className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border cursor-pointer transition-colors text-sm ${\r\n                        autonomyLevel === option.value\r\n                          ? 'bg-blue-600 border-blue-500 text-white'\r\n                          : 'bg-slate-700 border-slate-600 text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-600'\r\n                      }`}\r\n                    >\r\n                      <input\r\n                        type=\"radio\"\r\n                        name=\"autonomy\"\r\n                        value={option.value}\r\n                        checked={autonomyLevel === option.value}\r\n                        onChange={() => setAutonomyLevel(option.value)}\r\n                        className=\"sr-only\"\r\n                      />\r\n                      {option.label}\r\n                    </label>\r\n                  ))}\r\n                </div>\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={handleStartRun}\r\n                disabled={!selectedRepo || !issueNumber || startingRun}\r\n                className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\r\n              >\r\n                {startingRun ? (\r\n                  <span className=\"flex items-center justify-center gap-2\">\r\n                    <span className=\"w-4 h-4 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\" />\r\n                    Starte...\r\n                  </span>\r\n                ) : (\r\n                  'ÔûÂ Run starten'\r\n                )}\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n    </div>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/a11y/noLabelWithoutControl","severity":"warning","description":"A form label must be associated with an input.","message":[{"elements":[],"content":"A form label must be associated with an input."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":[],"content":"Consider adding a `for` or `htmlFor` attribute to the label element or moving the input element to inside the label element."}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\apps\\web\\src\\components\\Dashboard.tsx"},"span":[12615,12724],"sourceCode":"import type React from 'react';\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\r\nimport { api } from '../api.js';\r\nimport PhaseBadge from './PhaseBadge.jsx';\r\nimport type { Run, Phase } from '../types.js';\r\nimport { ALL_PHASES } from '../types.js';\r\n\r\nfunction formatDuration(ms: number): string {\r\n  if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;\r\n  const seconds = Math.floor(ms / 1000);\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours > 0) return `${hours}h ${minutes % 60}m`;\r\n  if (minutes > 0) return `${minutes}m ${seconds % 60}s`;\r\n  return `${seconds}s`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);\r\n  if (minutes < 1) return 'gerade eben';\r\n  if (minutes < 60) return `vor ${minutes} Minuten`;\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours < 24) return `vor ${hours} Stunden`;\r\n  return `vor ${Math.floor(hours / 24)} Tagen`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function Dashboard(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n  const [runs, setRuns] = useState<Run[]>([]);\r\n  const [totalRuns, setTotalRuns] = useState(0);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState<string>('all');\r\n  const [isNewRunModalOpen, setIsNewRunModalOpen] = useState(false);\r\n  const [selectedRepo, setSelectedRepo] = useState<string>('');\r\n  const [issueNumber, setIssueNumber] = useState('');\r\n  const [autonomyLevel, setAutonomyLevel] = useState(2);\r\n  const [startingRun, setStartingRun] = useState(false);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [successRate, setSuccessRate] = useState(0);\r\n\r\n  const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRuns({ limit: 100 });\r\n      setRuns(data.runs);\r\n      setTotalRuns(data.total);\r\n      const completed = data.runs.filter(\r\n        r => r.status === 'done' || r.phase === 'DONE',\r\n      );\r\n      setSuccessRate(\r\n        completed.length > 0\r\n          ? Math.round(\r\n              (completed.filter(r => r.phase === 'DONE').length /\r\n                completed.length) *\r\n                100,\r\n            )\r\n          : 0,\r\n      );\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load runs');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRuns();\r\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRuns, 5000);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\r\n  }, [fetchRuns]);\r\n\r\n  const filteredRuns = runs.filter(run => {\r\n    if (\r\n      searchTerm &&\r\n      !run.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) &&\r\n      !String(run.issueNumber).includes(searchTerm)\r\n    ) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n    if (phaseFilter !== 'all' && run.phase !== phaseFilter) return false;\r\n    return true;\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  const activeRuns = runs.filter(r => r.status === 'active').length;\r\n\r\n  const avgDurationMs =\r\n    runs.length > 0\r\n      ? runs.reduce((sum, r) => {\r\n          if (!r.finishedAt || !r.startedAt) return sum;\r\n          return sum + (new Date(r.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(r.startedAt).getTime());\r\n        }, 0) / runs.length\r\n      : 0;\r\n\r\n  async function handleStartRun(): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (!selectedRepo || !issueNumber) return;\r\n    setStartingRun(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      const { run: startedRun } = await api.startRun(\r\n        selectedRepo,\r\n        Number.parseInt(issueNumber, 10),\r\n        autonomyLevel,\r\n      );\r\n      setIsNewRunModalOpen(false);\r\n      setIssueNumber('');\r\n      navigate(`/runs/${startedRun.id}`);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setStartingRun(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">ÔÜí Positron Dashboard</h1>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm mt-1\">\r\n            Evidence-Gated GitHub Issue Execution\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + New Run\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Metrics Cards */}\r\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Total Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : totalRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Success Rate\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-green-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : `${successRate}%`}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Active Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-blue-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : activeRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Avg. Time\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : formatDuration(avgDurationMs)}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Filters */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-4\">\r\n        <input\r\n          type=\"text\"\r\n          placeholder=\"Suche nach Run-ID oder Issue-Nr...\"\r\n          value={searchTerm}\r\n          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-xs\"\r\n        />\r\n        <select\r\n          value={phaseFilter}\r\n          onChange={e => setPhaseFilter(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-[200px]\"\r\n        >\r\n          <option value=\"all\">Alle Phasen</option>\r\n          {ALL_PHASES.map(p => (\r\n            <option key={p} value={p}>\r\n              {p}\r\n            </option>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </select>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Runs Table */}\r\n      {loading ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Lade Runs...</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : filteredRuns.length === 0 ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôï</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg\">\r\n            {runs.length === 0\r\n              ? 'Noch keine Runs ÔÇö erstelle deinen ersten Run'\r\n              : 'Keine Runs gefunden, die den Filtern entsprechen'}\r\n          </p>\r\n          {runs.length === 0 && (\r\n            <button\r\n              onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n              className=\"btn-primary mt-4\"\r\n            >\r\n              Ersten Run erstellen\r\n            </button>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"card p-0 overflow-hidden\">\r\n          <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\r\n            <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\r\n              <thead>\r\n                <tr className=\"border-b border-slate-700 text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase\">\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">ID</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Phase</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Status</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Repository</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Issue</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Dauer</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Gestartet</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-right px-4 py-3 font-medium\">\r\n                    Aktionen\r\n                  </th>\r\n                </tr>\r\n              </thead>\r\n              <tbody className=\"divide-y divide-slate-700\">\r\n                {filteredRuns.map(run => {\r\n                  const duration =\r\n                    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n                      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() -\r\n                        new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n                      : 0;\r\n                  return (\r\n                    <tr\r\n                      key={run.id}\r\n                      className=\"hover:bg-slate-700/50 transition-colors\"\r\n                    >\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-blue-400\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"hover:underline\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} size=\"xs\" />\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span\r\n                          className={`text-xs font-medium ${\r\n                            run.status === 'active'\r\n                              ? 'text-blue-400'\r\n                              : run.status === 'done'\r\n                                ? 'text-green-400'\r\n                                : run.status === 'failed'\r\n                                  ? 'text-red-400'\r\n                                  : 'text-slate-400'\r\n                          }`}\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.status}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-300 text-xs\">\r\n                        {run.repoId}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span className=\"text-blue-400 text-xs font-mono\">\r\n                          #{run.issueNumber}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {duration > 0 ? formatDuration(duration) : '-'}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {relativeTime(run.startedAt)}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"btn-secondary text-xs py-1 px-3\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          Details\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                    </tr>\r\n                  );\r\n                })}\r\n              </tbody>\r\n            </table>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* New Run Modal */}\r\n      {isNewRunModalOpen && (\r\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center\">\r\n          <div\r\n            className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm\"\r\n            onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n          />\r\n          <div className=\"relative bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 p-6 w-full max-w-md mx-4 shadow-2xl\">\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-4\">\r\n              <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-white\">Neuen Run starten</h2>\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n                className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-white text-xl\"\r\n              >\r\n                Ô£ò\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Repository\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"text\"\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. Positron\"\r\n                  value={selectedRepo}\r\n                  onChange={e => setSelectedRepo(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Issue-Nummer\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"number\"\r\n                  min={1}\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. 42\"\r\n                  value={issueNumber}\r\n                  onChange={e => setIssueNumber(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-2\">\r\n                  Autonomie-Level\r\n                </label>\r\n                <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\r\n                  {[\r\n                    { value: 0, label: 'Full' },\r\n                    { value: 1, label: 'Semi' },\r\n                    { value: 2, label: 'Manual' },\r\n                  ].map(option => (\r\n                    <label\r\n                      key={option.value}\r\n                      className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border cursor-pointer transition-colors text-sm ${\r\n                        autonomyLevel === option.value\r\n                          ? 'bg-blue-600 border-blue-500 text-white'\r\n                          : 'bg-slate-700 border-slate-600 text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-600'\r\n                      }`}\r\n                    >\r\n                      <input\r\n                        type=\"radio\"\r\n                        name=\"autonomy\"\r\n                        value={option.value}\r\n                        checked={autonomyLevel === option.value}\r\n                        onChange={() => setAutonomyLevel(option.value)}\r\n                        className=\"sr-only\"\r\n                      />\r\n                      {option.label}\r\n                    </label>\r\n                  ))}\r\n                </div>\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={handleStartRun}\r\n                disabled={!selectedRepo || !issueNumber || startingRun}\r\n                className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\r\n              >\r\n                {startingRun ? (\r\n                  <span className=\"flex items-center justify-center gap-2\">\r\n                    <span className=\"w-4 h-4 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\" />\r\n                    Starte...\r\n                  </span>\r\n                ) : (\r\n                  'ÔûÂ Run starten'\r\n                )}\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n    </div>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/a11y/noLabelWithoutControl","severity":"warning","description":"A form label must be associated with an input.","message":[{"elements":[],"content":"A form label must be associated with an input."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":[],"content":"Consider adding a `for` or `htmlFor` attribute to the label element or moving the input element to inside the label element."}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\apps\\web\\src\\components\\Dashboard.tsx"},"span":[13053,13164],"sourceCode":"import type React from 'react';\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\r\nimport { api } from '../api.js';\r\nimport PhaseBadge from './PhaseBadge.jsx';\r\nimport type { Run, Phase } from '../types.js';\r\nimport { ALL_PHASES } from '../types.js';\r\n\r\nfunction formatDuration(ms: number): string {\r\n  if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;\r\n  const seconds = Math.floor(ms / 1000);\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours > 0) return `${hours}h ${minutes % 60}m`;\r\n  if (minutes > 0) return `${minutes}m ${seconds % 60}s`;\r\n  return `${seconds}s`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);\r\n  if (minutes < 1) return 'gerade eben';\r\n  if (minutes < 60) return `vor ${minutes} Minuten`;\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours < 24) return `vor ${hours} Stunden`;\r\n  return `vor ${Math.floor(hours / 24)} Tagen`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function Dashboard(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n  const [runs, setRuns] = useState<Run[]>([]);\r\n  const [totalRuns, setTotalRuns] = useState(0);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState<string>('all');\r\n  const [isNewRunModalOpen, setIsNewRunModalOpen] = useState(false);\r\n  const [selectedRepo, setSelectedRepo] = useState<string>('');\r\n  const [issueNumber, setIssueNumber] = useState('');\r\n  const [autonomyLevel, setAutonomyLevel] = useState(2);\r\n  const [startingRun, setStartingRun] = useState(false);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [successRate, setSuccessRate] = useState(0);\r\n\r\n  const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRuns({ limit: 100 });\r\n      setRuns(data.runs);\r\n      setTotalRuns(data.total);\r\n      const completed = data.runs.filter(\r\n        r => r.status === 'done' || r.phase === 'DONE',\r\n      );\r\n      setSuccessRate(\r\n        completed.length > 0\r\n          ? Math.round(\r\n              (completed.filter(r => r.phase === 'DONE').length /\r\n                completed.length) *\r\n                100,\r\n            )\r\n          : 0,\r\n      );\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load runs');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRuns();\r\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRuns, 5000);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\r\n  }, [fetchRuns]);\r\n\r\n  const filteredRuns = runs.filter(run => {\r\n    if (\r\n      searchTerm &&\r\n      !run.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) &&\r\n      !String(run.issueNumber).includes(searchTerm)\r\n    ) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n    if (phaseFilter !== 'all' && run.phase !== phaseFilter) return false;\r\n    return true;\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  const activeRuns = runs.filter(r => r.status === 'active').length;\r\n\r\n  const avgDurationMs =\r\n    runs.length > 0\r\n      ? runs.reduce((sum, r) => {\r\n          if (!r.finishedAt || !r.startedAt) return sum;\r\n          return sum + (new Date(r.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(r.startedAt).getTime());\r\n        }, 0) / runs.length\r\n      : 0;\r\n\r\n  async function handleStartRun(): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (!selectedRepo || !issueNumber) return;\r\n    setStartingRun(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      const { run: startedRun } = await api.startRun(\r\n        selectedRepo,\r\n        Number.parseInt(issueNumber, 10),\r\n        autonomyLevel,\r\n      );\r\n      setIsNewRunModalOpen(false);\r\n      setIssueNumber('');\r\n      navigate(`/runs/${startedRun.id}`);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setStartingRun(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">ÔÜí Positron Dashboard</h1>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm mt-1\">\r\n            Evidence-Gated GitHub Issue Execution\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + New Run\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Metrics Cards */}\r\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Total Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : totalRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Success Rate\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-green-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : `${successRate}%`}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Active Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-blue-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : activeRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Avg. Time\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : formatDuration(avgDurationMs)}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Filters */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-4\">\r\n        <input\r\n          type=\"text\"\r\n          placeholder=\"Suche nach Run-ID oder Issue-Nr...\"\r\n          value={searchTerm}\r\n          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-xs\"\r\n        />\r\n        <select\r\n          value={phaseFilter}\r\n          onChange={e => setPhaseFilter(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-[200px]\"\r\n        >\r\n          <option value=\"all\">Alle Phasen</option>\r\n          {ALL_PHASES.map(p => (\r\n            <option key={p} value={p}>\r\n              {p}\r\n            </option>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </select>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Runs Table */}\r\n      {loading ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Lade Runs...</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : filteredRuns.length === 0 ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôï</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg\">\r\n            {runs.length === 0\r\n              ? 'Noch keine Runs ÔÇö erstelle deinen ersten Run'\r\n              : 'Keine Runs gefunden, die den Filtern entsprechen'}\r\n          </p>\r\n          {runs.length === 0 && (\r\n            <button\r\n              onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n              className=\"btn-primary mt-4\"\r\n            >\r\n              Ersten Run erstellen\r\n            </button>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"card p-0 overflow-hidden\">\r\n          <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\r\n            <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\r\n              <thead>\r\n                <tr className=\"border-b border-slate-700 text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase\">\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">ID</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Phase</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Status</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Repository</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Issue</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Dauer</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Gestartet</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-right px-4 py-3 font-medium\">\r\n                    Aktionen\r\n                  </th>\r\n                </tr>\r\n              </thead>\r\n              <tbody className=\"divide-y divide-slate-700\">\r\n                {filteredRuns.map(run => {\r\n                  const duration =\r\n                    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n                      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() -\r\n                        new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n                      : 0;\r\n                  return (\r\n                    <tr\r\n                      key={run.id}\r\n                      className=\"hover:bg-slate-700/50 transition-colors\"\r\n                    >\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-blue-400\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"hover:underline\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} size=\"xs\" />\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span\r\n                          className={`text-xs font-medium ${\r\n                            run.status === 'active'\r\n                              ? 'text-blue-400'\r\n                              : run.status === 'done'\r\n                                ? 'text-green-400'\r\n                                : run.status === 'failed'\r\n                                  ? 'text-red-400'\r\n                                  : 'text-slate-400'\r\n                          }`}\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.status}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-300 text-xs\">\r\n                        {run.repoId}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span className=\"text-blue-400 text-xs font-mono\">\r\n                          #{run.issueNumber}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {duration > 0 ? formatDuration(duration) : '-'}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {relativeTime(run.startedAt)}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"btn-secondary text-xs py-1 px-3\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          Details\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                    </tr>\r\n                  );\r\n                })}\r\n              </tbody>\r\n            </table>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* New Run Modal */}\r\n      {isNewRunModalOpen && (\r\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center\">\r\n          <div\r\n            className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm\"\r\n            onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n          />\r\n          <div className=\"relative bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 p-6 w-full max-w-md mx-4 shadow-2xl\">\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-4\">\r\n              <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-white\">Neuen Run starten</h2>\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n                className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-white text-xl\"\r\n              >\r\n                Ô£ò\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Repository\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"text\"\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. Positron\"\r\n                  value={selectedRepo}\r\n                  onChange={e => setSelectedRepo(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Issue-Nummer\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"number\"\r\n                  min={1}\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. 42\"\r\n                  value={issueNumber}\r\n                  onChange={e => setIssueNumber(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-2\">\r\n                  Autonomie-Level\r\n                </label>\r\n                <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\r\n                  {[\r\n                    { value: 0, label: 'Full' },\r\n                    { value: 1, label: 'Semi' },\r\n                    { value: 2, label: 'Manual' },\r\n                  ].map(option => (\r\n                    <label\r\n                      key={option.value}\r\n                      className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border cursor-pointer transition-colors text-sm ${\r\n                        autonomyLevel === option.value\r\n                          ? 'bg-blue-600 border-blue-500 text-white'\r\n                          : 'bg-slate-700 border-slate-600 text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-600'\r\n                      }`}\r\n                    >\r\n                      <input\r\n                        type=\"radio\"\r\n                        name=\"autonomy\"\r\n                        value={option.value}\r\n                        checked={autonomyLevel === option.value}\r\n                        onChange={() => setAutonomyLevel(option.value)}\r\n                        className=\"sr-only\"\r\n                      />\r\n                      {option.label}\r\n                    </label>\r\n                  ))}\r\n                </div>\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={handleStartRun}\r\n                disabled={!selectedRepo || !issueNumber || startingRun}\r\n                className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\r\n              >\r\n                {startingRun ? new Date(dateStr).getTime();\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);\r\n  if (minutes < 1) return 'gerade eben';\r\n  if (minutes < 60) return `vor ${minutes} Minuten`;\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours < 24) return `vor ${hours} Stunden`;\r\n  return `vor ${Math.floor(hours / 24)} Tagen`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function Dashboard(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n  const [runs, setRuns] = useState<Run[]>([]);\r\n  const [totalRuns, setTotalRuns] = useState(0);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState<string>('all');\r\n  const [isNewRunModalOpen, setIsNewRunModalOpen] = useState(false);\r\n  const [selectedRepo, setSelectedRepo] = useState<string>('');\r\n  const [issueNumber, setIssueNumber] = useState('');\r\n  const [autonomyLevel, setAutonomyLevel] = useState(2);\r\n  const [startingRun, setStartingRun] = useState(false);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [successRate, setSuccessRate] = useState(0);\r\n\r\n  const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRuns({ limit: 100 });\r\n      setRuns(data.runs);\r\n      setTotalRuns(data.total);\r\n      const completed = data.runs.filter(\r\n        r => r.status === 'done' || r.phase === 'DONE',\r\n      );\r\n      setSuccessRate(\r\n        completed.length > 0\r\n          ? Math.round(\r\n              (completed.filter(r => r.phase === 'DONE').length /\r\n                completed.length) *\r\n                100,\r\n            )\r\n          : 0,\r\n      );\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load runs');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRuns();\r\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRuns, 5000);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\r\n  }, [fetchRuns]);\r\n\r\n  const filteredRuns = runs.filter(run => {\r\n    if (\r\n      searchTerm &&\r\n      !run.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) &&\r\n      !String(run.issueNumber).includes(searchTerm)\r\n    ) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n    if (phaseFilter !== 'all' && run.phase !== phaseFilter) return false;\r\n    return true;\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  const activeRuns = runs.filter(r => r.status === 'active').length;\r\n\r\n  const avgDurationMs =\r\n    runs.length > 0\r\n      ? runs.reduce((sum, r) => {\r\n          if (!r.finishedAt || !r.startedAt) return sum;\r\n          return sum + (new Date(r.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(r.startedAt).getTime());\r\n        }, 0) / runs.length\r\n      : 0;\r\n\r\n  async function handleStartRun(): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (!selectedRepo || !issueNumber) return;\r\n    setStartingRun(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      const { run: startedRun } = await api.startRun(\r\n        selectedRepo,\r\n        Number.parseInt(issueNumber, 10),\r\n        autonomyLevel,\r\n      );\r\n      setIsNewRunModalOpen(false);\r\n      setIssueNumber('');\r\n      navigate(`/runs/${startedRun.id}`);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setStartingRun(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">ÔÜí Positron Dashboard</h1>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm mt-1\">\r\n            Evidence-Gated GitHub Issue Execution\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + New Run\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Metrics Cards */}\r\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Total Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : totalRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Success Rate\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-green-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : `${successRate}%`}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Active Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-blue-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : activeRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Avg. Time\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : formatDuration(avgDurationMs)}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Filters */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-4\">\r\n        <input\r\n          type=\"text\"\r\n          placeholder=\"Suche nach Run-ID oder Issue-Nr...\"\r\n          value={searchTerm}\r\n          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-xs\"\r\n        />\r\n        <select\r\n          value={phaseFilter}\r\n          onChange={e => setPhaseFilter(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-[200px]\"\r\n        >\r\n          <option value=\"all\">Alle Phasen</option>\r\n          {ALL_PHASES.map(p => (\r\n            <option key={p} value={p}>\r\n              {p}\r\n            </option>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </select>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Runs Table */}\r\n      {loading ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Lade Runs...</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : filteredRuns.length === 0 ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôï</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg\">\r\n            {runs.length === 0\r\n              ? 'Noch keine Runs ÔÇö erstelle deinen ersten Run'\r\n              : 'Keine Runs gefunden, die den Filtern entsprechen'}\r\n          </p>\r\n          {runs.length === 0 && (\r\n            <button\r\n              onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n              className=\"btn-primary mt-4\"\r\n            >\r\n              Ersten Run erstellen\r\n            </button>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"card p-0 overflow-hidden\">\r\n          <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\r\n            <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\r\n              <thead>\r\n                <tr className=\"border-b border-slate-700 text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase\">\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">ID</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Phase</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Status</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Repository</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Issue</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Dauer</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Gestartet</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-right px-4 py-3 font-medium\">\r\n                    Aktionen\r\n                  </th>\r\n                </tr>\r\n              </thead>\r\n              <tbody className=\"divide-y divide-slate-700\">\r\n                {filteredRuns.map(run => {\r\n                  const duration =\r\n                    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n                      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() -\r\n                        new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n                      : 0;\r\n                  return (\r\n                    <tr\r\n                      key={run.id}\r\n                      className=\"hover:bg-slate-700/50 transition-colors\"\r\n                    >\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-blue-400\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"hover:underline\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} size=\"xs\" />\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span\r\n                          className={`text-xs font-medium ${\r\n                            run.status === 'active'\r\n                              ? 'text-blue-400'\r\n                              : run.status === 'done'\r\n                                ? 'text-green-400'\r\n                                : run.status === 'failed'\r\n                                  ? 'text-red-400'\r\n                                  : 'text-slate-400'\r\n                          }`}\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.status}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-300 text-xs\">\r\n                        {run.repoId}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span className=\"text-blue-400 text-xs font-mono\">\r\n                          #{run.issueNumber}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {duration > 0 ? formatDuration(duration) : '-'}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {relativeTime(run.startedAt)}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"btn-secondary text-xs py-1 px-3\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          Details\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                    </tr>\r\n                  );\r\n                })}\r\n              </tbody>\r\n            </table>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* New Run Modal */}\r\n      {isNewRunModalOpen && (\r\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center\">\r\n          <div\r\n            className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm\"\r\n            onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n          />\r\n          <div className=\"relative bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 p-6 w-full max-w-md mx-4 shadow-2xl\">\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-4\">\r\n              <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-white\">Neuen Run starten</h2>\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n                className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-white text-xl\"\r\n              >\r\n                Ô£ò\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Repository\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"text\"\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. Positron\"\r\n                  value={selectedRepo}\r\n                  onChange={e => setSelectedRepo(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Issue-Nummer\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"number\"\r\n                  min={1}\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. 42\"\r\n                  value={issueNumber}\r\n                  onChange={e => setIssueNumber(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-2\">\r\n                  Autonomie-Level\r\n                </label>\r\n                <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\r\n                  {[\r\n                    { value: 0, label: 'Full' },\r\n                    { value: 1, label: 'Semi' },\r\n                    { value: 2, label: 'Manual' },\r\n                  ].map(option => (\r\n                    <label\r\n                      key={option.value}\r\n                      className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border cursor-pointer transition-colors text-sm ${\r\n                        autonomyLevel === option.value\r\n                          ? 'bg-blue-600 border-blue-500 text-white'\r\n                          : 'bg-slate-700 border-slate-600 text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-600'\r\n                      }`}\r\n                    >\r\n                      <input\r\n                        type=\"radio\"\r\n                        name=\"autonomy\"\r\n                        value={option.value}\r\n                        checked={autonomyLevel === option.value}\r\n                        onChange={() => setAutonomyLevel(option.value)}\r\n                        className=\"sr-only\"\r\n                      />\r\n                      {option.label}\r\n                    </label>\r\n                  ))}\r\n                </div>\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={handleStartRun}\r\n                disabled={!selectedRepo || !issueNumber || startingRun}\r\n                className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\r\n              >\r\n                {startingRun ? (\r\n                  <span className=\"flex items-center justify-center gap-2\">\r\n                    <span className=\"w-4 h-4 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\" />\r\n                    Starte...\r\n                  </span>\r\n                ) : (\r\n                  'ÔûÂ Run starten'\r\n                )}\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n    </div>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/a11y/useButtonType","severity":"warning","description":"Provide an explicit type prop for the button element.","message":[{"elements":[],"content":"Provide an explicit "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"type"},{"elements":[],"content":" prop for the "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"button"},{"elements":[],"content":" element."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":[],"content":"The default "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"type"},{"elements":[],"content":" of a button is "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"submit"},{"elements":[],"content":", which causes the submission of a form when placed inside a `form` element. This is likely not the behaviour that you want inside a React application."}]]},{"log":["info",[{"elements":[],"content":"Allowed button types are: "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"submit"},{"elements":[],"content":", "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"button"},{"elements":[],"content":" or "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"reset"},{"elements":[],"content":""}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\apps\\web\\src\\components\\Dashboard.tsx"},"span":[4327,4434],"sourceCode":"import type React from 'react';\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\r\nimport { api } from '../api.js';\r\nimport PhaseBadge from './PhaseBadge.jsx';\r\nimport type { Run, Phase } from '../types.js';\r\nimport { ALL_PHASES } from '../types.js';\r\n\r\nfunction formatDuration(ms: number): string {\r\n  if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;\r\n  const seconds = Math.floor(ms / 1000);\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours > 0) return `${hours}h ${minutes % 60}m`;\r\n  if (minutes > 0) return `${minutes}m ${seconds % 60}s`;\r\n  return `${seconds}s`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);\r\n  if (minutes < 1) return 'gerade eben';\r\n  if (minutes < 60) return `vor ${minutes} Minuten`;\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours < 24) return `vor ${hours} Stunden`;\r\n  return `vor ${Math.floor(hours / 24)} Tagen`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function Dashboard(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n  const [runs, setRuns] = useState<Run[]>([]);\r\n  const [totalRuns, setTotalRuns] = useState(0);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState<string>('all');\r\n  const [isNewRunModalOpen, setIsNewRunModalOpen] = useState(false);\r\n  const [selectedRepo, setSelectedRepo] = useState<string>('');\r\n  const [issueNumber, setIssueNumber] = useState('');\r\n  const [autonomyLevel, setAutonomyLevel] = useState(2);\r\n  const [startingRun, setStartingRun] = useState(false);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [successRate, setSuccessRate] = useState(0);\r\n\r\n  const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRuns({ limit: 100 });\r\n      setRuns(data.runs);\r\n      setTotalRuns(data.total);\r\n      const completed = data.runs.filter(\r\n        r => r.status === 'done' || r.phase === 'DONE',\r\n      );\r\n      setSuccessRate(\r\n        completed.length > 0\r\n          ? err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setStartingRun(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">ÔÜí Positron Dashboard</h1>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm mt-1\">\r\n            Evidence-Gated GitHub Issue Execution\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + New Run\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Metrics Cards */}\r\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Total Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ?
