(\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôï</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg\">\r\n            {runs.length === 0\r\n              ? 'Noch keine Runs ÔÇö erstelle deinen ersten Run'\r\n              : 'Keine Runs gefunden, die den Filtern entsprechen'}\r\n          </p>\r\n          {runs.length === 0 && (\r\n            <button\r\n              onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n              className=\"btn-primary mt-4\"\r\n            >\r\n              Ersten Run erstellen\r\n            </button>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"card p-0 overflow-hidden\">\r\n          <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\r\n            <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\r\n              <thead>\r\n                <tr className=\"border-b border-slate-700 text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase\">\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">ID</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Phase</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Status</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Repository</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Issue</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Dauer</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Gestartet</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-right px-4 py-3 font-medium\">\r\n                    Aktionen\r\n                  </th>\r\n                </tr>\r\n              </thead>\r\n              <tbody className=\"divide-y divide-slate-700\">\r\n                {filteredRuns.map(run => {\r\n                  const duration =\r\n                    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n                      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() -\r\n                        new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n                      : 0;\r\n                  return (\r\n                    <tr\r\n                      key={run.id}\r\n                      className=\"hover:bg-slate-700/50 transition-colors\"\r\n                    >\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-blue-400\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"hover:underline\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} size=\"xs\" />\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span\r\n                          className={`text-xs font-medium ${\r\n                            run.status === 'active'\r\n                              ? 'text-blue-400'\r\n                              : run.status === 'done'\r\n                                ? 'text-green-400'\r\n                                : run.status === 'failed'\r\n                                  ? 'text-red-400'\r\n                                  : 'text-slate-400'\r\n                          }`}\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.status}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-300 text-xs\">\r\n                        {run.repoId}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span className=\"text-blue-400 text-xs font-mono\">\r\n                          #{run.issueNumber}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {duration > 0 ? formatDuration(duration) : '-'}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {relativeTime(run.startedAt)}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"btn-secondary text-xs py-1 px-3\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          Details\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                    </tr>\r\n                  );\r\n                })}\r\n              </tbody>\r\n            </table>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* New Run Modal */}\r\n      {isNewRunModalOpen && (\r\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center\">\r\n          <div\r\n            className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm\"\r\n            onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n          />\r\n          <div className=\"relative bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 p-6 w-full max-w-md mx-4 shadow-2xl\">\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-4\">\r\n              <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-white\">Neuen Run starten</h2>\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n                className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-white text-xl\"\r\n              >\r\n                Ô£ò\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Repository\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"text\"\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. Positron\"\r\n                  value={selectedRepo}\r\n                  onChange={e => setSelectedRepo(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Issue-Nummer\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"number\"\r\n                  min={1}\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. 42\"\r\n                  value={issueNumber}\r\n                  onChange={e => setIssueNumber(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-2\">\r\n                  Autonomie-Level\r\n                </label>\r\n                <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\r\n                  {[\r\n                    { value: 0, label: 'Full' },\r\n                    { value: 1, label: 'Semi' },\r\n                    { value: 2, label: 'Manual' },\r\n                  ].map(option => (\r\n                    <label\r\n                      key={option.value}\r\n                      className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border cursor-pointer transition-colors text-sm ${\r\n                        autonomyLevel === option.value\r\n                          ? 'bg-blue-600 border-blue-500 text-white'\r\n                          : 'bg-slate-700 border-slate-600 text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-600'\r\n                      }`}\r\n                    >\r\n                      <input\r\n                        type=\"radio\"\r\n                        name=\"autonomy\"\r\n                        value={option.value}\r\n                        checked={autonomyLevel === option.value}\r\n                        onChange={() => setAutonomyLevel(option.value)}\r\n                        className=\"sr-only\"\r\n                      />\r\n                      {option.label}\r\n                    </label>\r\n                  ))}\r\n                </div>\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={handleStartRun}\r\n                disabled={!selectedRepo || !issueNumber || startingRun}\r\n                className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\r\n              >\r\n                {startingRun ? (\r\n                  <span className=\"flex items-center justify-center gap-2\">\r\n                    <span className=\"w-4 h-4 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\" />\r\n                    Starte...\r\n                  </span>\r\n                ) : (\r\n                  'ÔûÂ Run starten'\r\n                )}\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n    </div>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/a11y/useButtonType","severity":"warning","description":"Provide an explicit type prop for the button element.","message":[{"elements":[],"content":"Provide an explicit "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"type"},{"elements":[],"content":" prop for the "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"button"},{"elements":[],"content":" element."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":[],"content":"The default "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"type"},{"elements":[],"content":" of a button is "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"submit"},{"elements":[],"content":", which causes the submission of a form when placed inside a `form` element. This is likely not the behaviour that you want inside a React application."}]]},{"log":["info",[{"elements":[],"content":"Allowed button types are: "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"submit"},{"elements":[],"content":", "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"button"},{"elements":[],"content":" or "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"reset"},{"elements":[],"content":""}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\apps\\web\\src\\components\\Dashboard.tsx"},"span":[12313,12467],"sourceCode":"import type React from 'react';\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\r\nimport { api } from '../api.js';\r\nimport PhaseBadge from './PhaseBadge.jsx';\r\nimport type { Run, Phase } from '../types.js';\r\nimport { ALL_PHASES } from '../types.js';\r\n\r\nfunction formatDuration(ms: number): string {\r\n  if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;\r\n  const seconds = Math.floor(ms / 1000);\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours > 0) return `${hours}h ${minutes % 60}m`;\r\n  if (minutes > 0) return `${minutes}m ${seconds % 60}s`;\r\n  return `${seconds}s`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);\r\n  if (minutes < 1) return 'gerade eben';\r\n  if (minutes < 60) return `vor ${minutes} Minuten`;\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours < 24) return `vor ${hours} Stunden`;\r\n  return `vor ${Math.floor(hours / 24)} Tagen`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function Dashboard(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n  const [runs, setRuns] = useState<Run[]>([]);\r\n  const [totalRuns, setTotalRuns] = useState(0);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState<string>('all');\r\n  const [isNewRunModalOpen, setIsNewRunModalOpen] = useState(false);\r\n  const [selectedRepo, setSelectedRepo] = useState<string>('');\r\n  const [issueNumber, setIssueNumber] = useState('');\r\n  const [autonomyLevel, setAutonomyLevel] = useState(2);\r\n  const [startingRun, setStartingRun] = useState(false);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [successRate, setSuccessRate] = useState(0);\r\n\r\n  const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRuns({ limit: 100 });\r\n      setRuns(data.runs);\r\n      setTotalRuns(data.total);\r\n      const completed = data.runs.filter(\r\n        r => r.status === 'done' || r.phase === 'DONE',\r\n      );\r\n      setSuccessRate(\r\n        completed.length > 0\r\n          ? Math.round(\r\n              (completed.filter(r => r.phase === 'DONE').length /\r\n                completed.length) *\r\n                100,\r\n            )\r\n          : 0,\r\n      );\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load runs');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRuns();\r\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRuns, 5000);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\r\n  }, [fetchRuns]);\r\n\r\n  const filteredRuns = runs.filter(run => {\r\n    if (\r\n      searchTerm &&\r\n      !run.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) &&\r\n      !String(run.issueNumber).includes(searchTerm)\r\n    ) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n    if (phaseFilter !== 'all' && run.phase !== phaseFilter) return false;\r\n    return true;\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  const activeRuns = runs.filter(r => r.status === 'active').length;\r\n\r\n  const avgDurationMs =\r\n    runs.length > 0\r\n      ? runs.reduce((sum, r) => {\r\n          if (!r.finishedAt || !r.startedAt) return sum;\r\n          return sum + (new Date(r.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(r.startedAt).getTime());\r\n        }, 0) / runs.length\r\n      : 0;\r\n\r\n  async function handleStartRun(): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (!selectedRepo || !issueNumber) return;\r\n    setStartingRun(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      const { run: startedRun } = await api.startRun(\r\n        selectedRepo,\r\n        Number.parseInt(issueNumber, 10),\r\n        autonomyLevel,\r\n      );\r\n      setIsNewRunModalOpen(false);\r\n      setIssueNumber('');\r\n      navigate(`/runs/${startedRun.id}`);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setStartingRun(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">ÔÜí Positron Dashboard</h1>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm mt-1\">\r\n            Evidence-Gated GitHub Issue Execution\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + New Run\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Metrics Cards */}\r\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Total Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : totalRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Success Rate\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-green-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : `${successRate}%`}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Active Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-blue-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : activeRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Avg. Time\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : formatDuration(avgDurationMs)}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Filters */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-4\">\r\n        <input\r\n          type=\"text\"\r\n          placeholder=\"Suche nach Run-ID oder Issue-Nr...\"\r\n          value={searchTerm}\r\n          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-xs\"\r\n        />\r\n        <select\r\n          value={phaseFilter}\r\n          onChange={e => setPhaseFilter(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-[200px]\"\r\n        >\r\n          <option value=\"all\">Alle Phasen</option>\r\n          {ALL_PHASES.map(p => (\r\n            <option key={p} value={p}>\r\n              {p}\r\n            </option>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </select>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Runs Table */}\r\n      {loading ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Lade Runs...</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : filteredRuns.length === 0 ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôï</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg\">\r\n            {runs.length === 0\r\n              ? 'Noch keine Runs ÔÇö erstelle deinen ersten Run'\r\n              : 'Keine Runs gefunden, die den Filtern entsprechen'}\r\n          </p>\r\n          {runs.length === 0 && (\r\n            <button\r\n              onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n              className=\"btn-primary mt-4\"\r\n            >\r\n              Ersten Run erstellen\r\n            </button>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"card p-0 overflow-hidden\">\r\n          <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\r\n            <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\r\n              <thead>\r\n                <tr className=\"border-b border-slate-700 text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase\">\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">ID</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Phase</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Status</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Repository</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Issue</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Dauer</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium\">Gestartet</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-right px-4 py-3 font-medium\">\r\n                    Aktionen\r\n                  </th>\r\n                </tr>\r\n              </thead>\r\n              <tbody className=\"divide-y divide-slate-700\">\r\n                {filteredRuns.map(run => {\r\n                  const duration =\r\n                    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n                      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() -\r\n                        new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n                      : 0;\r\n                  return (\r\n                    <tr\r\n                      key={run.id}\r\n                      className=\"hover:bg-slate-700/50 transition-colors\"\r\n                    >\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs text-blue-400\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"hover:underline\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} size=\"xs\" />\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span\r\n                          className={`text-xs font-medium ${\r\n                            run.status === 'active'\r\n                              ? 'text-blue-400'\r\n                              : run.status === 'done'\r\n                                ? 'text-green-400'\r\n                                : run.status === 'failed'\r\n                                  ? 'text-red-400'\r\n                                  : 'text-slate-400'\r\n                          }`}\r\n                        >\r\n                          {run.status}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-300 text-xs\">\r\n                        {run.repoId}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3\">\r\n                        <span className=\"text-blue-400 text-xs font-mono\">\r\n                          #{run.issueNumber}\r\n                        </span>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {duration > 0 ? formatDuration(duration) : '-'}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-slate-400 text-xs\">\r\n                        {relativeTime(run.startedAt)}\r\n                      </td>\r\n                      <td className=\"px-4 py-3 text-right\">\r\n                        <button\r\n                          onClick={() => navigate(`/runs/${run.id}`)}\r\n                          className=\"btn-secondary text-xs py-1 px-3\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          Details\r\n                        </button>\r\n                      </td>\r\n                    </tr>\r\n                  );\r\n                })}\r\n              </tbody>\r\n            </table>\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* New Run Modal */}\r\n      {isNewRunModalOpen && (\r\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center\">\r\n          <div\r\n            className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm\"\r\n            onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n          />\r\n          <div className=\"relative bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 p-6 w-full max-w-md mx-4 shadow-2xl\">\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-4\">\r\n              <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-white\">Neuen Run starten</h2>\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(false)}\r\n                className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-white text-xl\"\r\n              >\r\n                Ô£ò\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Repository\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"text\"\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. Positron\"\r\n                  value={selectedRepo}\r\n                  onChange={e => setSelectedRepo(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Issue-Nummer\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"number\"\r\n                  min={1}\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. 42\"\r\n                  value={issueNumber}\r\n                  onChange={e => setIssueNumber(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-2\">\r\n                  Autonomie-Level\r\n                </label>\r\n                <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\r\n                  {[\r\n                    { value: 0, label: 'Full' },\r\n                    { value: 1, label: 'Semi' },\r\n                    { value: 2, label: 'Manual' },\r\n                  ].map(option => (\r\n                    <label\r\n                      key={option.value}\r\n                      className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border cursor-pointer transition-colors text-sm ${\r\n                        autonomyLevel === option.value\r\n                          ? 'bg-blue-600 border-blue-500 text-white'\r\n                          : 'bg-slate-700 border-slate-600 text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-600'\r\n                      }`}\r\n                    >\r\n                      <input\r\n                        type=\"radio\"\r\n                        name=\"autonomy\"\r\n                        value={option.value}\r\n                        checked={autonomyLevel === option.value}\r\n                        onChange={() => setAutonomyLevel(option.value)}\r\n                        className=\"sr-only\"\r\n                      />\r\n                      {option.label}\r\n                    </label>\r\n                  ))}\r\n                </div>\r\n              </div>\r\n\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={handleStartRun}\r\n                disabled={!selectedRepo || !issueNumber || startingRun}\r\n                className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\r\n              >\r\n                {startingRun ? This is likely not the behaviour that you want inside a React application."}]]},{"log":["info",[{"elements":[],"content":"Allowed button types are: "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"submit"},{"elements":[],"content":", "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"button"},{"elements":[],"content":" or "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"reset"},{"elements":[],"content":""}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\apps\\web\\src\\components\\Dashboard.tsx"},"span":[14893,15080],"sourceCode":"import type React from 'react';\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\r\nimport { api } from '../api.js';\r\nimport PhaseBadge from './PhaseBadge.jsx';\r\nimport type { Run, Phase } from '../types.js';\r\nimport { ALL_PHASES } from '../types.js';\r\n\r\nfunction formatDuration(ms: number): string {\r\n  if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;\r\n  const seconds = Math.floor(ms / 1000);\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours > 0) return `${hours}h ${minutes % 60}m`;\r\n  if (minutes > 0) return `${minutes}m ${seconds % 60}s`;\r\n  return `${seconds}s`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction relativeTime(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();\r\n  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);\r\n  if (minutes < 1) return 'gerade eben';\r\n  if (minutes < 60) return `vor ${minutes} Minuten`;\r\n  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);\r\n  if (hours < 24) return `vor ${hours} Stunden`;\r\n  return `vor ${Math.floor(hours / 24)} Tagen`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function Dashboard(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n  const [runs, setRuns] = useState<Run[]>([]);\r\n  const [totalRuns, setTotalRuns] = useState(0);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState<string>('all');\r\n  const [isNewRunModalOpen, setIsNewRunModalOpen] = useState(false);\r\n  const [selectedRepo, setSelectedRepo] = useState<string>('');\r\n  const [issueNumber, setIssueNumber] = useState('');\r\n  const [autonomyLevel, setAutonomyLevel] = useState(2);\r\n  const [startingRun, setStartingRun] = useState(false);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [successRate, setSuccessRate] = useState(0);\r\n\r\n  const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRuns({ limit: 100 });\r\n      setRuns(data.runs);\r\n      setTotalRuns(data.total);\r\n      const completed = data.runs.filter(\r\n        r => r.status === 'done' || r.phase === 'DONE',\r\n      );\r\n      setSuccessRate(\r\n        completed.length > 0\r\n          ? Math.round(\r\n              (completed.filter(r => r.phase === 'DONE').length /\r\n                completed.length) *\r\n                100,\r\n            )\r\n          : 0,\r\n      );\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load runs');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRuns();\r\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRuns, 5000);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\r\n  }, [fetchRuns]);\r\n\r\n  const filteredRuns = runs.filter(run => {\r\n    if (\r\n      searchTerm &&\r\n      !run.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) &&\r\n      !String(run.issueNumber).includes(searchTerm)\r\n    ) {\r\n      return false;\r\n    }\r\n    if (phaseFilter !== 'all' && run.phase !== phaseFilter) return false;\r\n    return true;\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  const activeRuns = runs.filter(r => r.status === 'active').length;\r\n\r\n  const avgDurationMs =\r\n    runs.length > 0\r\n      ? err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setStartingRun(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">ÔÜí Positron Dashboard</h1>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm mt-1\">\r\n            Evidence-Gated GitHub Issue Execution\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsNewRunModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + New Run\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Metrics Cards */}\r\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Total Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : totalRuns}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Success Rate\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-green-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '...' : `${successRate}%`}\r\n          </p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide\">\r\n            Active Runs\r\n          </p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-blue-400 mt-1\">\r\n            {loading ? '../types.js';\r\n\r\ninterface LogViewerProps {\r\n  events: RunEvent[];\r\n  maxHeight?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst MAX_VISIBLE_EVENTS = 500;\r\n\r\nconst levelColors: Record<LogLevel, string> = {\r\n  INFO: 'text-slate-300',\r\n  WARN: 'text-yellow-400',\r\n  ERROR: 'text-red-400',\r\n  DEBUG: 'text-slate-500',\r\n};\r\n\r\nconst levelBadgeColors: Record<LogLevel, string> = {\r\n  INFO: 'bg-slate-600 text-slate-200',\r\n  WARN: 'bg-yellow-600 text-white',\r\n  ERROR: 'bg-red-600 text-white',\r\n  DEBUG: 'bg-slate-700 text-slate-400',\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction formatTime(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const d = new Date(dateStr);\r\n  return d.toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', {\r\n    hour: '2-digit',\r\n    minute: '2-digit',\r\n    second: '2-digit',\r\n    fractionalSecondDigits: 3,\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function LogViewer({\r\n  events,\r\n  maxHeight = '600px',\r\n}: LogViewerProps): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [autoScroll, setAutoScroll] = useState(true);\r\n  const [filter, setFilter] = useState<LogLevel | 'ALL'>('ALL');\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const scrollRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\r\n  const _isUserScrollingRef = useRef(false);\r\n\r\n  const filteredEvents = events\r\n    .filter(e => filter === 'ALL' || e.level === filter)\r\n    .filter(\r\n      e =>\r\n        !searchTerm ||\r\n        e.message.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),\r\n    )\r\n    .slice(-MAX_VISIBLE_EVENTS);\r\n\r\n  // Auto-scroll logic\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    if (autoScroll && scrollRef.current) {\r\n      scrollRef.current.scrollTop = scrollRef.current.scrollHeight;\r\n    }\r\n  }, [filteredEvents.length, autoScroll]);\r\n\r\n  function handleScroll(): void {\r\n    if (!scrollRef.current) return;\r\n    const { scrollTop, scrollHeight, clientHeight } = scrollRef.current;\r\n    const isAtBottom = scrollHeight - scrollTop - clientHeight < 50;\r\n    setAutoScroll(isAtBottom);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div className=\"card p-0 overflow-hidden\">\r\n      {/* Filters */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 p-3 border-b border-slate-700 flex-wrap\">\r\n        <div className=\"flex gap-1\">\r\n          {(['ALL', 'INFO', 'WARN', 'ERROR', 'DEBUG'] as const).map(l => (\r\n            <button\r\n              key={l}\r\n              onClick={() => setFilter(l)}\r\n              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded-md transition-colors ${\r\n                filter === l\r\n                  ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'\r\n                  : 'bg-slate-700 text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-600'\r\n              }`}\r\n            >\r\n              {l}\r\n            </button>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </div>\r\n        <input\r\n          type=\"text\"\r\n          placeholder=\"­ƒöì Suchen...\"\r\n          value={searchTerm}\r\n          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input flex-1 min-w-[120px] text-xs py-1\"\r\n        />\r\n        <label className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-slate-400 cursor-pointer select-none\">\r\n          <input\r\n            type=\"checkbox\"\r\n            checked={autoScroll}\r\n            onChange={e => setAutoScroll(e.target.checked)}\r\n            className=\"rounded bg-slate-600 border-slate-500\"\r\n          />\r\n          Auto-scroll\r\n        </label>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Log List */}\r\n      <div\r\n        ref={scrollRef}\r\n        onScroll={handleScroll}\r\n        className=\"overflow-y-auto font-mono text-xs\"\r\n        style={{ maxHeight }}\r\n      >\r\n        {filteredEvents.length === 0 ? useRef, useEffect, useState } from 'react';\r\nimport type { RunEvent, LogLevel } from '../types.js';\r\n\r\ninterface LogViewerProps {\r\n  events: RunEvent[];\r\n  maxHeight?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst MAX_VISIBLE_EVENTS = 500;\r\n\r\nconst levelColors: Record<LogLevel, string> = {\r\n  INFO: 'text-slate-300',\r\n  WARN: 'text-yellow-400',\r\n  ERROR: 'text-red-400',\r\n  DEBUG: 'text-slate-500',\r\n};\r\n\r\nconst levelBadgeColors: Record<LogLevel, string> = {\r\n  INFO: 'bg-slate-600 text-slate-200',\r\n  WARN: 'bg-yellow-600 text-white',\r\n  ERROR: 'bg-red-600 text-white',\r\n  DEBUG: 'bg-slate-700 text-slate-400',\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction formatTime(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const d = new Date(dateStr);\r\n  return d.toLocaleTimeString('de-DE', {\r\n    hour: '2-digit',\r\n    minute: '2-digit',\r\n    second: '2-digit',\r\n    fractionalSecondDigits: 3,\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function LogViewer({\r\n  events,\r\n  maxHeight = '600px',\r\n}: LogViewerProps): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [autoScroll, setAutoScroll] = useState(true);\r\n  const [filter, setFilter] = useState<LogLevel | 'ALL'>('ALL');\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const scrollRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\r\n  const _isUserScrollingRef = useRef(false);\r\n\r\n  const filteredEvents = events\r\n    .filter(e => filter === 'ALL' || e.level === filter)\r\n    .filter(\r\n      e =>\r\n        !searchTerm ||\r\n        e.message.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()),\r\n    )\r\n    .slice(-MAX_VISIBLE_EVENTS);\r\n\r\n  // Auto-scroll logic\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    if (autoScroll && scrollRef.current) {\r\n      scrollRef.current.scrollTop = scrollRef.current.scrollHeight;\r\n    }\r\n  }, [filteredEvents.length, autoScroll]);\r\n\r\n  function handleScroll(): void {\r\n    if (!scrollRef.current) return;\r\n    const { scrollTop, scrollHeight, clientHeight } = scrollRef.current;\r\n    const isAtBottom = scrollHeight - scrollTop - clientHeight < 50;\r\n    setAutoScroll(isAtBottom);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div className=\"card p-0 overflow-hidden\">\r\n      {/* Filters */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 p-3 border-b border-slate-700 flex-wrap\">\r\n        <div className=\"flex gap-1\">\r\n          {(['ALL', 'INFO', 'WARN', 'ERROR', 'DEBUG'] as const).map(l => (\r\n            <button\r\n              key={l}\r\n              onClick={() => setFilter(l)}\r\n              className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded-md transition-colors ${\r\n                filter === l\r\n                  ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'\r\n                  : 'bg-slate-700 text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-600'\r\n              }`}\r\n            >\r\n              {l}\r\n            </button>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </div>\r\n        <input\r\n          type=\"text\"\r\n          placeholder=\"­ƒöì Suchen...\"\r\n          value={searchTerm}\r\n          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input flex-1 min-w-[120px] text-xs py-1\"\r\n        />\r\n        <label className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-slate-400 cursor-pointer select-none\">\r\n          <input\r\n            type=\"checkbox\"\r\n            checked={autoScroll}\r\n            onChange={e => setAutoScroll(e.target.checked)}\r\n            className=\"rounded bg-slate-600 border-slate-500\"\r\n          />\r\n          Auto-scroll\r\n        </label>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Log List */}\r\n      <div\r\n        ref={scrollRef}\r\n        onScroll={handleScroll}\r\n        className=\"overflow-y-auto font-mono text-xs\"\r\n        style={{ maxHeight }}\r\n      >\r\n        {filteredEvents.length === 0 ? (\r\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-12 text-slate-500\">\r\n            {events.length === 0 ? (\r\n              <div className=\"text-center\">\r\n                <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-5 h-5 border-2 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full mb-2\" />\r\n                <p>Warte auf Events...</p>\r\n              </div>\r\n            ) : (\r\n              <p>Keine Events gefunden (Filter: {filter})</p>\r\n            )}\r\n          </div>\r\n        ) : (\r\n          <div className=\"divide-y divide-slate-800\">\r\n            {filteredEvents.map(event => (\r\n              <div\r\n                key={event.id}\r\n                className=\"flex items-start gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 hover:bg-slate-800/50\"\r\n              >\r\n                <span className=\"text-slate-500 shrink-0 w-[90px]\">\r\n                  {formatTime(event.createdAt)}\r\n                </span>\r\n                <span\r\n                  className={`shrink-0 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-medium ${\r\n                    levelBadgeColors[event.level]\r\n                  }`}\r\n                >\r\n                  {event.level}\r\n                </span>\r\n                <span className=\"text-slate-500 shrink-0 w-[80px]\">\r\n                  {event.phase}\r\n                </span>\r\n                <span\r\n                  className={`break-words ${\r\n                    levelColors[event.level] ?? border: string; text: string; icon: string }> = {\r\n  pending:    { bg: 'bg-slate-800',   border: 'border-slate-700', text: 'text-slate-600',      icon: 'Ôùï' },\r\n  current:    { bg: 'bg-sky-500/10', border: 'border-sky-400',   text: 'text-sky-400',         icon: 'Ôùë' },\r\n  completed:  { bg: 'bg-green-500/10', border: 'border-green-700', text: 'text-green-400',     icon: 'Ô£ô' },\r\n  failed:     { bg: 'bg-red-500/10',  border: 'border-red-800',   text: 'text-red-400',        icon: 'Ô£ù' },\r\n  blocked:    { bg: 'bg-amber-500/10', border: 'border-amber-800', text: 'text-amber-400',     icon: '!' },\r\n  human:      { bg: 'bg-purple-500/10', border: 'border-purple-800', text: 'text-purple-400',  icon: '­ƒæñ' },\r\n};\r\n\r\n/** K├╝rzel f├╝r Phasen-Namen (28 Phasen) */\r\nconst PHASE_SHORT: Record<Phase, string> = {\r\n  QUEUED: 'Q', CLAIMED: 'C', REPO_SYNC: 'RS', ISSUE_CONTEXT: 'IC',\r\n  WEB_RESEARCH: 'WR', SPECIFY: 'SP', CLARIFY_OPTIONAL: 'CO', PLAN: 'PL',\r\n  TASKS: 'TK', ANALYZE: 'AN', REVIEW: 'RV', IMPLEMENT: 'IM',\r\n  TEST: 'TE', VERIFY: 'VE', COMMIT: 'CM', PR_CREATE: 'PR',\r\n  MERGE: 'MG', DONE: 'OK',\r\n  FAILED: 'FL', FAILED_TRANSIENT: 'FT', FAILED_BLOCKED: 'FB', FAILED_UNSAFE: 'FU',\r\n  BLOCKED_PUSH: 'BP', BLOCKED_MERGE: 'BM', GATE_APPROVE: 'GA', GATE_REVISE: 'GR',\r\n  RESUME_PENDING: 'RP', CLEANUP: 'CL',\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction PhaseNode({ phase, status, onClick }: { phase: Phase; status: PhaseStatus; onClick?: (p: Phase) => void }) {\r\n  const colors = phaseStatusColors[status];\r\n  const short = PHASE_SHORT[phase] ?? phase.slice(0, 2);\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <button\r\n      onClick={() => onClick?.(phase)}\r\n      title={phase}\r\n      className={`\r\n        flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-14 rounded-lg border\r\n        ${colors.bg} ${colors.border} ${colors.text}\r\n        transition-all duration-200 ease-out cursor-pointer\r\n        hover:scale-105 hover:border-sky-400 focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-sky-400\r\n        ${status === 'current' ? 'ring-1 ring-sky-400/50' : ''}\r\n      `}\r\n      aria-label={`Phase ${phase}: ${status}`}\r\n      aria-current={status === 'current' ? 'step' : undefined}\r\n    >\r\n      <span className=\"text-xs font-mono font-bold leading-none\">{short}</span>\r\n      <span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium mt-0.5 leading-none opacity-70\">{status}</span>\r\n    </button>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function PhasePipeline({\r\n  currentPhase,\r\n  completedPhases = [],\r\n  failedPhases = [],\r\n  blockedPhases = [],\r\n  humanPhases = [],\r\n  onPhaseClick,\r\n}: PhasePipelineProps): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const terminalPhases: Phase[] = ['DONE', 'FAILED', 'FAILED_BLOCKED', 'FAILED_UNSAFE', 'CLEANUP'];\r\n\r\n  function getStatus(phase: Phase): PhaseStatus {\r\n    if (phase === currentPhase) return 'current';\r\n    if (failedPhases.includes(phase)) return 'failed';\r\n    if (blockedPhases.includes(phase)) return 'blocked';\r\n    if (humanPhases.includes(phase)) return 'human';\r\n    if (completedPhases.includes(phase)) return 'completed';\r\n    if (terminalPhases.includes(phase)) return 'pending';\r\n    return 'pending';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const _isCurrentPhaseIndex = currentPhase ? ALL_PHASES.indexOf(currentPhase) : -1;\r\n  const hasRunStarted = currentPhase !== undefined || completedPhases.length > 0;\r\n\r\n  // Zeige alle Phasen + Terminal-Phasen (semantisch, nicht hartcodiert)\r\n  const terminalMainIndex = ALL_PHASES.indexOf('DONE');\r\n  const mainPhases = terminalMainIndex >= 0 ? ALL_PHASES.slice(0, terminalMainIndex + 1) : ALL_PHASES;\r\n  const errorPhases = terminalMainIndex >= 0 ? ALL_PHASES.slice(terminalMainIndex + 1) : [];\r\n  const hasErrorActivity = failedPhases.length > 0 || blockedPhases.length > 0 || humanPhases.length > 0;\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div className=\"card panel-stagger\">\r\n      <h3 className=\"text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 mb-4 font-['Space_Grotesk']\">\r\n        28-Phase Pipeline\r\n        <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 font-['IBM_Plex_Sans'] ml-2\">\r\n          {currentPhase ? `Current: ${currentPhase}` : hasRunStarted ? 'Completed' : 'Not started'}\r\n        </span>\r\n      </h3>\r\n\r\n      {/* Main Pipeline */}\r\n      <div className=\"overflow-x-auto pb-2 -mx-2 px-2\">\r\n        <ol className=\"flex items-start gap-1 min-w-max\" aria-label=\"Pipeline phases\">\r\n          {mainPhases.map((phase, i) => (\r\n            <React.Fragment key={phase}>\r\n              <li aria-label={`Phase ${phase}: ${getStatus(phase)}`}>\r\n                <PhaseNode phase={phase} status={getStatus(phase)} onClick={onPhaseClick} />\r\n              </li>\r\n              {/* Connector zwischen Phasen */}\r\n              {i < mainPhases.length - 1 && (\r\n                <div className={`w-2 h-px mt-7 shrink-0 ${completedPhases.includes(phase) ? 'bg-green-400' : 'bg-slate-700'}`} />\r\n              )}\r\n            </React.Fragment>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </ol>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error/Blockade/Recovery Phasen */}\r\n      {hasErrorActivity && (\r\n        <div className=\"mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-slate-800\">\r\n          <h4 className=\"text-[10px] font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 font-['IBM_Plex_Sans']\">\r\n            State / Recovery Phases\r\n          </h4>\r\n          <div className=\"flex items-start gap-1 flex-wrap\">\r\n            {errorPhases.map((phase) => {\r\n              const status = getStatus(phase);\r\n              if (status === 'pending') return null;\r\n              return (\r\n                <PhaseNode key={phase} phase={phase} status={status} onClick={onPhaseClick} />\r\n              );\r\n            })}\r\n          </div>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Phase Status Legend */}\r\n      <div className=\"mt-4 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-['IBM_Plex_Sans']\">\r\n        <span className=\"flex items-center gap-1\"><span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-slate-600\" /> Pending</span>\r\n        <span className=\"flex items-center gap-1\"><span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-sky-400\" /> Current</span>\r\n        <span className=\"flex items-center gap-1\"><span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-green-400\" /> Completed</span>\r\n        <span className=\"flex items-center gap-1\"><span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-red-400\" /> Failed</span>\r\n        <span className=\"flex items-center gap-1\"><span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-amber-400\" /> Blocked</span>\r\n        <span className=\"flex items-center gap-1\"><span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-purple-400\" /> Human</span>\r\n      </div>\r\n    </div>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/a11y/useKeyWithClickEvents","severity":"warning","description":"Enforce to have the onClick mouse event with the onKeyUp, the onKeyDown, or the '../types.js';\r\n\r\nexport default function Repositories(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n  const [repos, setRepos] = useState<Repository[]>([]);\r\n  const [loading, const [loadingIssues, setLoadingIssues] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\r\n\r\n  const fetchRepos = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRepos();\r\n      setRepos(data.repos);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load repositories',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRepos();\r\n  }, [fetchRepos]);\r\n\r\n  async function handleAddRepo(): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (!newOwner || setNewName('');\r\n      await fetchRepos();\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to add repository',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setAdding(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function handleLoadIssues(repoId: string): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (issuesMap.has(repoId)) return;\r\n    setLoadingIssues(prev => new setIssuesMap(prev => new Map(prev).set(repoId, []));\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoadingIssues(prev => {\r\n        const next = new Set(prev);\r\n        next.delete(repoId);\r\n        return next;\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function handleStartRun(\r\n    repoId: string,\r\n    issueNumber: number,\r\n  ): Promise<void> {\r\n    try {\r\n      const { run: startedRun } = run',\r\n      );\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Repo List */}\r\n      {loading ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôé</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg mb-4\">\r\n            Keine Repositories registriert\r\n          </p>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(true)}\r\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n          >\r\n            Repository hinzuf├╝gen\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n          {repos.map(repo => {\r\n            const issues = issuesMap.get(repo.id);\r\n            return (\r\n              <div key={repo.id} className=\"card\">\r\n                <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\r\n                  <div>\r\n                    <h3 className=\"text-base font-medium text-white\">\r\n                      {repo.owner}/{repo.name}\r\n                    </h3>\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5\">\r\n                      Erstellt:{' '}\r\n                      {new Date(repo.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}\r\n                    </p>\r\n                  </div>\r\n                  <button\r\n                    onClick={() => handleLoadIssues(repo.id)}\r\n                    disabled={loadingIssues.has(repo.id)}\r\n                    className=\"btn-secondary text-xs\"\r\n                  >\r\n                    {loadingIssues.has(repo.id)\r\n                      ? err.message : 'Failed to add repository',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setAdding(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function handleLoadIssues(repoId: string): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (issuesMap.has(repoId)) return;\r\n    setLoadingIssues(prev => new Set(prev).add(repoId));\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRepoIssues(repoId);\r\n      setIssuesMap(prev => new Map(prev).set(repoId, data.issues));\r\n    } catch {\r\n      setIssuesMap(prev => new Map(prev).set(repoId, []));\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoadingIssues(prev => {\r\n        const next = new Set(prev);\r\n        next.delete(repoId);\r\n        return next;\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function handleStartRun(\r\n    repoId: string,\r\n    issueNumber: number,\r\n  ): Promise<void> {\r\n    try {\r\n      const { run: startedRun } = await api.startRun(repoId, issueNumber);\r\n      navigate(`/runs/${startedRun.id}`);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">­ƒôü Repositories</h1>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + Add Repository\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Repo List */}\r\n      {loading ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Lade Repositories...</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : repos.length === 0 ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôé</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg mb-4\">\r\n            Keine Repositories registriert\r\n          </p>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(true)}\r\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n          >\r\n            Repository hinzuf├╝gen\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n          {repos.map(repo => {\r\n            const issues = issuesMap.get(repo.id);\r\n            return (\r\n              <div key={repo.id} className=\"card\">\r\n                <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\r\n                  <div>\r\n                    <h3 className=\"text-base font-medium text-white\">\r\n                      {repo.owner}/{repo.name}\r\n                    </h3>\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5\">\r\n                      Erstellt:{' '}\r\n                      {new Date(repo.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}\r\n                    </p>\r\n                  </div>\r\n                  <button\r\n                    onClick={() => handleLoadIssues(repo.id)}\r\n                    disabled={loadingIssues.has(repo.id)}\r\n                    className=\"btn-secondary text-xs\"\r\n                  >\r\n                    {loadingIssues.has(repo.id)\r\n                      ? 'Lade...'\r\n                      : issues\r\n                        ? `${issues.length} Issues`\r\n                        : 'Issues laden'}\r\n                  </button>\r\n                </div>\r\n\r\n                {issues && issues.length > 0 && (\r\n                  <div className=\"border-t border-slate-700 pt-3 mt-3\">\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 mb-2\">\r\n                      Offene Issues:\r\n                    </p>\r\n                    <div className=\"space-y-1\">\r\n                      {issues.slice(0, 10).map(issue => (\r\n                        <div\r\n                          key={issue.id}\r\n                          className=\"flex items-center justify-between py-1 px-2 rounded hover:bg-slate-700/50\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          <span className=\"text-sm text-slate-300\">\r\n                            <span className=\"text-blue-400 font-mono mr-2\">\r\n                              #{issue.number}\r\n                            </span>\r\n                            {issue.title}\r\n                          </span>\r\n                          <button\r\n                            onClick={() =>\r\n                              handleStartRun(repo.id, issue.number)\r\n                            }\r\n                            className=\"text-xs text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300\"\r\n                          >\r\n                            ÔûÂ Run starten\r\n                          </button>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                      ))}\r\n                      {issues.length > 10 && (\r\n                        <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 text-center pt-1\">\r\n                          ... und {issues.length - err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">­ƒôü Repositories</h1>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + Add Repository\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Repo List */}\r\n      {loading ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Lade Repositories...</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : repos.length === 0 ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôé</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg mb-4\">\r\n            Keine Repositories registriert\r\n          </p>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(true)}\r\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n          >\r\n            Repository hinzuf├╝gen\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n          {repos.map(repo => {\r\n            const issues = issuesMap.get(repo.id);\r\n            return (\r\n              <div key={repo.id} className=\"card\">\r\n                <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\r\n                  <div>\r\n                    <h3 className=\"text-base font-medium text-white\">\r\n                      {repo.owner}/{repo.name}\r\n                    </h3>\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5\">\r\n                      Erstellt:{' '}\r\n                      {new Date(repo.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}\r\n                    </p>\r\n                  </div>\r\n                  <button\r\n                    onClick={() => handleLoadIssues(repo.id)}\r\n                    disabled={loadingIssues.has(repo.id)}\r\n                    className=\"btn-secondary text-xs\"\r\n                  >\r\n                    {loadingIssues.has(repo.id)\r\n                      ? 'Lade...'\r\n                      : issues\r\n                        ? `${issues.length} Issues`\r\n                        : 'Issues laden'}\r\n                  </button>\r\n                </div>\r\n\r\n                {issues && issues.length > 0 && (\r\n                  <div className=\"border-t border-slate-700 pt-3 mt-3\">\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 mb-2\">\r\n                      Offene Issues:\r\n                    </p>\r\n                    <div className=\"space-y-1\">\r\n                      {issues.slice(0, 10).map(issue => (\r\n                        <div\r\n                          key={issue.id}\r\n                          className=\"flex items-center justify-between py-1 px-2 rounded hover:bg-slate-700/50\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          <span className=\"text-sm text-slate-300\">\r\n                            <span className=\"text-blue-400 font-mono mr-2\">\r\n                              #{issue.number}\r\n                            </span>\r\n                            {issue.title}\r\n                          </span>\r\n                          <button\r\n                            onClick={() =>\r\n                              handleStartRun(repo.id, issue.number)\r\n                            }\r\n                            className=\"text-xs text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300\"\r\n                          >\r\n                            ÔûÂ Run starten\r\n                          </button>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                      ))}\r\n                      {issues.length > 10 && (\r\n                        <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 text-center pt-1\">\r\n                          ... und {issues.length - (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôé</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg mb-4\">\r\n            Keine Repositories registriert\r\n          </p>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(true)}\r\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n          >\r\n            Repository hinzuf├╝gen\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n          {repos.map(repo => {\r\n            const issues = issuesMap.get(repo.id);\r\n            return (\r\n              <div key={repo.id} className=\"card\">\r\n                <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\r\n                  <div>\r\n                    <h3 className=\"text-base font-medium text-white\">\r\n                      {repo.owner}/{repo.name}\r\n                    </h3>\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5\">\r\n                      Erstellt:{' '}\r\n                      {new Date(repo.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}\r\n                    </p>\r\n                  </div>\r\n                  <button\r\n                    onClick={() => handleLoadIssues(repo.id)}\r\n                    disabled={loadingIssues.has(repo.id)}\r\n                    className=\"btn-secondary text-xs\"\r\n                  >\r\n                    {loadingIssues.has(repo.id)\r\n                      ? 'Lade...'\r\n                      : issues\r\n                        ? `${issues.length} Issues`\r\n                        : 'Issues laden'}\r\n                  </button>\r\n                </div>\r\n\r\n                {issues && issues.length > 0 && (\r\n                  <div className=\"border-t border-slate-700 pt-3 mt-3\">\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 mb-2\">\r\n                      Offene Issues:\r\n                    </p>\r\n                    <div className=\"space-y-1\">\r\n                      {issues.slice(0, 10).map(issue => (\r\n                        <div\r\n                          key={issue.id}\r\n                          className=\"flex items-center justify-between py-1 px-2 rounded hover:bg-slate-700/50\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          <span className=\"text-sm text-slate-300\">\r\n                            <span className=\"text-blue-400 font-mono mr-2\">\r\n                              #{issue.number}\r\n                            </span>\r\n                            {issue.title}\r\n                          </span>\r\n                          <button\r\n                            onClick={() =>\r\n                              handleStartRun(repo.id, issue.number)\r\n                            }\r\n                            className=\"text-xs text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300\"\r\n                          >\r\n                            ÔûÂ Run starten\r\n                          </button>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                      ))}\r\n                      {issues.length > 10 && (\r\n                        <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 text-center pt-1\">\r\n                          ... und {issues.length - 10} weitere\r\n                        </p>\r\n                      )}\r\n                    </div>\r\n                  </div>\r\n                )}\r\n              </div>\r\n            );\r\n          })}\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Add Repository Modal */}\r\n      {isAddModalOpen && (\r\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center\">\r\n          <div\r\n            className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm\"\r\n            onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(false)}\r\n          />\r\n          <div className=\"relative bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 p-6 w-full max-w-md mx-4 shadow-2xl\">\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-4\">\r\n              <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-white\">\r\n                Repository hinzuf├╝gen\r\n              </h2>\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(false)}\r\n                className=\"text-slate-400 hover:text-white text-xl\"\r\n              >\r\n                Ô£ò\r\n              </button>\r\n            </div>\r\n\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Owner\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"text\"\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. xxammaxx\"\r\n                  value={newOwner}\r\n                  onChange={e => setNewOwner(e.target.value)}\r\n                  className=\"input\"\r\n                />\r\n              </div>\r\n              <div>\r\n                <label className=\"block text-sm text-slate-300 mb-1\">\r\n                  Repository-Name\r\n                </label>\r\n                <input\r\n                  type=\"text\"\r\n                  placeholder=\"z.B. err.message : 'Failed to load repositories',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRepos();\r\n  }, [fetchRepos]);\r\n\r\n  async function handleAddRepo(): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (!newOwner || !newName) return;\r\n    setAdding(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      await api.createRepo(newOwner, newName);\r\n      setIsAddModalOpen(false);\r\n      setNewOwner('');\r\n      setNewName('');\r\n      await fetchRepos();\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to add repository',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setAdding(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function handleLoadIssues(repoId: string): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (issuesMap.has(repoId)) return;\r\n    setLoadingIssues(prev => new Set(prev).add(repoId));\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRepoIssues(repoId);\r\n      setIssuesMap(prev => new Map(prev).set(repoId, data.issues));\r\n    } catch {\r\n      setIssuesMap(prev => new Map(prev).set(repoId, []));\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoadingIssues(prev => {\r\n        const next = new Set(prev);\r\n        next.delete(repoId);\r\n        return next;\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function handleStartRun(\r\n    repoId: string,\r\n    issueNumber: number,\r\n  ): Promise<void> {\r\n    try {\r\n      const { run: startedRun } = await api.startRun(repoId, issueNumber);\r\n      navigate(`/runs/${startedRun.id}`);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">­ƒôü Repositories</h1>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + Add Repository\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Repo List */}\r\n      {loading ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôé</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg mb-4\">\r\n            Keine Repositories registriert\r\n          </p>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(true)}\r\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n          >\r\n            Repository hinzuf├╝gen\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n          {repos.map(repo => {\r\n            const issues = issuesMap.get(repo.id);\r\n            return (\r\n              <div key={repo.id} className=\"card\">\r\n                <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\r\n                  <div>\r\n                    <h3 className=\"text-base font-medium text-white\">\r\n                      {repo.owner}/{repo.name}\r\n                    </h3>\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5\">\r\n                      Erstellt:{' '}\r\n                      {new Date(repo.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}\r\n                    </p>\r\n                  </div>\r\n                  <button\r\n                    onClick={() => handleLoadIssues(repo.id)}\r\n                    disabled={loadingIssues.has(repo.id)}\r\n                    className=\"btn-secondary text-xs\"\r\n                  >\r\n                    {loadingIssues.has(repo.id)\r\n                      ? 'Lade...'\r\n                      : issues\r\n                        ? `${issues.length} Issues`\r\n                        : 'Issues laden'}\r\n                  </button>\r\n                </div>\r\n\r\n                {issues && issues.length > 0 && (\r\n                  <div className=\"border-t border-slate-700 pt-3 mt-3\">\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 mb-2\">\r\n                      Offene Issues:\r\n                    </p>\r\n                    <div className=\"space-y-1\">\r\n                      {issues.slice(0, 10).map(issue => (\r\n                        <div\r\n                          key={issue.id}\r\n                          className=\"flex items-center justify-between py-1 px-2 rounded hover:bg-slate-700/50\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          <span className=\"text-sm text-slate-300\">\r\n                            <span className=\"text-blue-400 font-mono mr-2\">\r\n                              #{issue.number}\r\n                            </span>\r\n                            {issue.title}\r\n                          </span>\r\n                          <button\r\n                            onClick={() =>\r\n                              handleStartRun(repo.id, issue.number)\r\n                            }\r\n                            className=\"text-xs text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300\"\r\n                          >\r\n                            ÔûÂ Run starten\r\n                          </button>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                      ))}\r\n                      {issues.length > 10 && (\r\n                        <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 text-center pt-1\">\r\n                          ... und {issues.length - err.message : 'Failed to load repositories',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRepos();\r\n  }, [fetchRepos]);\r\n\r\n  async function handleAddRepo(): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (!newOwner || !newName) return;\r\n    setAdding(true);\r\n    setError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      await api.createRepo(newOwner, newName);\r\n      setIsAddModalOpen(false);\r\n      setNewOwner('');\r\n      setNewName('');\r\n      await fetchRepos();\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to add repository',\r\n      );\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setAdding(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function handleLoadIssues(repoId: string): Promise<void> {\r\n    if (issuesMap.has(repoId)) return;\r\n    setLoadingIssues(prev => new Set(prev).add(repoId));\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRepoIssues(repoId);\r\n      setIssuesMap(prev => new Map(prev).set(repoId, data.issues));\r\n    } catch {\r\n      setIssuesMap(prev => new Map(prev).set(repoId, []));\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoadingIssues(prev => {\r\n        const next = new Set(prev);\r\n        next.delete(repoId);\r\n        return next;\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  async function handleStartRun(\r\n    repoId: string,\r\n    issueNumber: number,\r\n  ): Promise<void> {\r\n    try {\r\n      const { run: startedRun } = await api.startRun(repoId, issueNumber);\r\n      navigate(`/runs/${startedRun.id}`);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(\r\n        err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to start run',\r\n      );\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6\">\r\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-white\">­ƒôü Repositories</h1>\r\n        <button\r\n          onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(true)}\r\n          className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n        >\r\n          + Add Repository\r\n        </button>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error */}\r\n      {error && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm\">\r\n          {error}\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setError(null)}\r\n            className=\"ml-2 text-red-300 hover:text-red-100\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Repo List */}\r\n      {loading ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Lade Repositories...</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : repos.length === 0 ? (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒôé</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-slate-400 text-lg mb-4\">\r\n            Keine Repositories registriert\r\n          </p>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => setIsAddModalOpen(true)}\r\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\r\n          >\r\n            Repository hinzuf├╝gen\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      ) : (\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\r\n          {repos.map(repo => {\r\n            const issues = issuesMap.get(repo.id);\r\n            return (\r\n              <div key={repo.id} className=\"card\">\r\n                <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\r\n                  <div>\r\n                    <h3 className=\"text-base font-medium text-white\">\r\n                      {repo.owner}/{repo.name}\r\n                    </h3>\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 mt-0.5\">\r\n                      Erstellt:{' '}\r\n                      {new Date(repo.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}\r\n                    </p>\r\n                  </div>\r\n                  <button\r\n                    onClick={() => handleLoadIssues(repo.id)}\r\n                    disabled={loadingIssues.has(repo.id)}\r\n                    className=\"btn-secondary text-xs\"\r\n                  >\r\n                    {loadingIssues.has(repo.id)\r\n                      ? 'Lade...'\r\n                      : issues\r\n                        ? `${issues.length} Issues`\r\n                        : 'Issues laden'}\r\n                  </button>\r\n                </div>\r\n\r\n                {issues && issues.length > 0 && (\r\n                  <div className=\"border-t border-slate-700 pt-3 mt-3\">\r\n                    <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-400 mb-2\">\r\n                      Offene Issues:\r\n                    </p>\r\n                    <div className=\"space-y-1\">\r\n                      {issues.slice(0, 10).map(issue => (\r\n                        <div\r\n                          key={issue.id}\r\n                          className=\"flex items-center justify-between py-1 px-2 rounded hover:bg-slate-700/50\"\r\n                        >\r\n                          <span className=\"text-sm text-slate-300\">\r\n                            <span className=\"text-blue-400 font-mono mr-2\">\r\n                              #{issue.number}\r\n                            </span>\r\n                            {issue.title}\r\n                          </span>\r\n                          <button\r\n                            onClick={() =>\r\n                              handleStartRun(repo.id, issue.number)\r\n                            }\r\n                            className=\"text-xs text-blue-400 hover:text-blue-300\"\r\n                          >\r\n                            ÔûÂ Run starten\r\n                          </button>\r\n                        </div>\r\n                      ))}\r\n                      {issues.length > 10 && (\r\n                        <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 text-center pt-1\">\r\n                          ... und {issues.length -
