'');\r\n  const { events, evidence, isConnected, runStatus: sseRunStatus, error: sseError } = useSSE(id ?? null);\r\n  const [errorBanner, setErrorBanner] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [showCancelConfirm, setShowCancelConfirm] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelling, setCancelling] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelError, setCancelError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  // Merged status: SSE takes priority, then DB run status\r\n  const effectiveStatus = sseRunStatus ?? run?.status ?? 'unknown';\r\n\r\n  const isRunning = effectiveStatus === 'active';\r\n  const isCancelled = effectiveStatus === 'cancelled';\r\n  const isTerminal = effectiveStatus === 'done' || effectiveStatus === 'failed' || isCancelled;\r\n\r\n  const handleCancel = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    if (!id) return;\r\n    setCancelling(true);\r\n    setCancelError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      await api.cancelRun(id);\r\n      setShowCancelConfirm(false);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setCancelError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Cancel failed');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setCancelling(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [id]);\r\n\r\n  const handleCopyRunId = useCallback(() => {\r\n    if (run?.id) {\r\n      navigator.clipboard.writeText(run.id).catch((err) => {\r\n        console.warn('[RunDetail] Clipboard write failed:', err);\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }, [run?.id]);\r\n\r\n  if (!id) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400\">No Run ID provided</p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (isLoading) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n        <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Loading Run...</p>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!run) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400 text-lg\">\r\n          {runError ?? 'Run not found'}\r\n        </p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const duration =\r\n    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n      : Date.now() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime();\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Breadcrumb */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400 mb-4\">\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Dashboard</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <Link to=\"/runs\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Runs</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <span className=\"text-slate-200 font-mono\">{run.id.slice(0, 8)}</span>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {(errorBanner || run.lastError || cancelError) && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm flex items-center justify-between\">\r\n          <span>{cancelError ?? run.lastError ?? errorBanner}</span>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => { setErrorBanner(null); setCancelError(null); }}\r\n            className=\"text-red-300 hover:text-red-100 ml-2\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* SSE Error Banner */}\r\n      {sseError && !isTerminal && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-yellow-900/30 border border-yellow-700 rounded-lg text-yellow-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yellow-500 animate-pulse shrink-0\" />\r\n          <span>{sseError}</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Cancelled Banner */}\r\n      {isCancelled && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-amber-900/30 border border-amber-700 rounded-lg text-amber-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"text-amber-400 font-bold\">!</span>\r\n          <span>This run was cancelled. '');\r\n  const { events, evidence, isConnected, runStatus: sseRunStatus, error: sseError } = useSSE(id ?? null);\r\n  const [errorBanner, setErrorBanner] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [showCancelConfirm, setShowCancelConfirm] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelling, setCancelling] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelError, setCancelError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  // Merged status: SSE takes priority, then DB run status\r\n  const effectiveStatus = sseRunStatus ?? run?.status ?? 'unknown';\r\n\r\n  const isRunning = effectiveStatus === 'active';\r\n  const isCancelled = effectiveStatus === 'cancelled';\r\n  const isTerminal = effectiveStatus === 'done' || effectiveStatus === 'failed' || isCancelled;\r\n\r\n  const handleCancel = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    if (!id) return;\r\n    setCancelling(true);\r\n    setCancelError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      await api.cancelRun(id);\r\n      setShowCancelConfirm(false);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setCancelError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Cancel failed');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setCancelling(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [id]);\r\n\r\n  const handleCopyRunId = useCallback(() => {\r\n    if (run?.id) {\r\n      navigator.clipboard.writeText(run.id).catch((err) => {\r\n        console.warn('[RunDetail] Clipboard write failed:', err);\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }, [run?.id]);\r\n\r\n  if (!id) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400\">No Run ID provided</p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (isLoading) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n        <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Loading Run...</p>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!run) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400 text-lg\">\r\n          {runError ?? 'Run not found'}\r\n        </p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const duration =\r\n    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n      : Date.now() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime();\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Breadcrumb */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400 mb-4\">\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Dashboard</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <Link to=\"/runs\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Runs</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <span className=\"text-slate-200 font-mono\">{run.id.slice(0, 8)}</span>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {(errorBanner || run.lastError || cancelError) && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm flex items-center justify-between\">\r\n          <span>{cancelError ?? run.lastError ?? errorBanner}</span>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => { setErrorBanner(null); setCancelError(null); }}\r\n            className=\"text-red-300 hover:text-red-100 ml-2\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* SSE Error Banner */}\r\n      {sseError && !isTerminal && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-yellow-900/30 border border-yellow-700 rounded-lg text-yellow-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yellow-500 animate-pulse shrink-0\" />\r\n          <span>{sseError}</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Cancelled Banner */}\r\n      {isCancelled && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-amber-900/30 border border-amber-700 rounded-lg text-amber-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"text-amber-400 font-bold\">!</span>\r\n          <span>This run was cancelled. No further actions will be processed.</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Run Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between\">\r\n          <div>\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-2\">\r\n              <h1 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-white font-mono\">\r\n                Run {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n              </h1>\r\n              <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} />\r\n              {/* Status badge */}\r\n              <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full ${\r\n                isRunning ? '');\r\n  const { events, evidence, isConnected, runStatus: sseRunStatus, error: sseError } = useSSE(id ?? null);\r\n  const [errorBanner, setErrorBanner] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [showCancelConfirm, setShowCancelConfirm] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelling, setCancelling] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelError, setCancelError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  // Merged status: SSE takes priority, then DB run status\r\n  const effectiveStatus = sseRunStatus ?? run?.status ?? 'unknown';\r\n\r\n  const isRunning = effectiveStatus === 'active';\r\n  const isCancelled = effectiveStatus === 'cancelled';\r\n  const isTerminal = effectiveStatus === 'done' || effectiveStatus === 'failed' || isCancelled;\r\n\r\n  const handleCancel = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    if (!id) return;\r\n    setCancelling(true);\r\n    setCancelError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      await api.cancelRun(id);\r\n      setShowCancelConfirm(false);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setCancelError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Cancel failed');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setCancelling(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [id]);\r\n\r\n  const handleCopyRunId = useCallback(() => {\r\n    if (run?.id) {\r\n      navigator.clipboard.writeText(run.id).catch((err) => {\r\n        console.warn('[RunDetail] Clipboard write failed:', err);\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }, [run?.id]);\r\n\r\n  if (!id) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400\">No Run ID provided</p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (isLoading) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n        <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Loading Run...</p>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!run) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400 text-lg\">\r\n          {runError ?? 'Run not found'}\r\n        </p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const duration =\r\n    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n      : Date.now() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime();\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Breadcrumb */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400 mb-4\">\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Dashboard</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <Link to=\"/runs\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Runs</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <span className=\"text-slate-200 font-mono\">{run.id.slice(0, 8)}</span>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {(errorBanner || run.lastError || cancelError) && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm flex items-center justify-between\">\r\n          <span>{cancelError ?? run.lastError ?? errorBanner}</span>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => { setErrorBanner(null); setCancelError(null); }}\r\n            className=\"text-red-300 hover:text-red-100 ml-2\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* SSE Error Banner */}\r\n      {sseError && !isTerminal && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-yellow-900/30 border border-yellow-700 rounded-lg text-yellow-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yellow-500 animate-pulse shrink-0\" />\r\n          <span>{sseError}</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Cancelled Banner */}\r\n      {isCancelled && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-amber-900/30 border border-amber-700 rounded-lg text-amber-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"text-amber-400 font-bold\">!</span>\r\n          <span>This run was cancelled. No further actions will be processed.</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Run Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between\">\r\n          <div>\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-2\">\r\n              <h1 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-white font-mono\">\r\n                Run {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n              </h1>\r\n              <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} />\r\n              {/* Status badge */}\r\n              <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full ${\r\n                isRunning ? 'bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400' :\r\n                isCancelled ? 'bg-amber-600/20 text-amber-400' :\r\n                effectiveStatus === 'done' ? 'text-slate-500' : 'text-yellow-400'\r\n              }`}\r\n            >\r\n              <span\r\n                className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${\r\n                  isConnected ? '');\r\n  const { events, evidence, isConnected, runStatus: sseRunStatus, error: sseError } = useSSE(id ?? null);\r\n  const [errorBanner, setErrorBanner] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [showCancelConfirm, setShowCancelConfirm] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelling, setCancelling] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelError, setCancelError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  // Merged status: SSE takes priority, then DB run status\r\n  const effectiveStatus = sseRunStatus ?? run?.status ?? 'unknown';\r\n\r\n  const isRunning = effectiveStatus === 'active';\r\n  const isCancelled = effectiveStatus === 'cancelled';\r\n  const isTerminal = effectiveStatus === 'done' || effectiveStatus === 'failed' || isCancelled;\r\n\r\n  const handleCancel = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    if (!id) return;\r\n    setCancelling(true);\r\n    setCancelError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      await api.cancelRun(id);\r\n      setShowCancelConfirm(false);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setCancelError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Cancel failed');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setCancelling(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [id]);\r\n\r\n  const handleCopyRunId = useCallback(() => {\r\n    if (run?.id) {\r\n      navigator.clipboard.writeText(run.id).catch((err) => {\r\n        console.warn('[RunDetail] Clipboard write failed:', err);\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }, [run?.id]);\r\n\r\n  if (!id) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400\">No Run ID provided</p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (isLoading) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n        <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Loading Run...</p>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!run) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400 text-lg\">\r\n          {runError ?? 'Run not found'}\r\n        </p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const duration =\r\n    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n      : Date.now() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime();\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Breadcrumb */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400 mb-4\">\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Dashboard</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <Link to=\"/runs\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Runs</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <span className=\"text-slate-200 font-mono\">{run.id.slice(0, 8)}</span>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {(errorBanner || run.lastError || cancelError) && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm flex items-center justify-between\">\r\n          <span>{cancelError ?? run.lastError ?? errorBanner}</span>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => { setErrorBanner(null); setCancelError(null); }}\r\n            className=\"text-red-300 hover:text-red-100 ml-2\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* SSE Error Banner */}\r\n      {sseError && !isTerminal && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-yellow-900/30 border border-yellow-700 rounded-lg text-yellow-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yellow-500 animate-pulse shrink-0\" />\r\n          <span>{sseError}</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Cancelled Banner */}\r\n      {isCancelled && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-amber-900/30 border border-amber-700 rounded-lg text-amber-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"text-amber-400 font-bold\">!</span>\r\n          <span>This run was cancelled. No further actions will be processed.</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Run Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between\">\r\n          <div>\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-2\">\r\n              <h1 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-white font-mono\">\r\n                Run {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n              </h1>\r\n              <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} />\r\n              {/* Status badge */}\r\n              <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full ${\r\n                isRunning ? "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"button"},{"elements":[],"content":" element."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":[],"content":"The default "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"type"},{"elements":[],"content":" of a button is "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"submit"},{"elements":[],"content":", which causes the submission of a '');\r\n  const { events, evidence, isConnected, runStatus: sseRunStatus, error: sseError } = useSSE(id ?? null);\r\n  const [errorBanner, setErrorBanner] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [showCancelConfirm, setShowCancelConfirm] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelling, setCancelling] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelError, setCancelError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  // Merged status: SSE takes priority, then DB run status\r\n  const effectiveStatus = sseRunStatus ?? run?.status ?? 'unknown';\r\n\r\n  const isRunning = effectiveStatus === 'active';\r\n  const isCancelled = effectiveStatus === 'cancelled';\r\n  const isTerminal = effectiveStatus === 'done' || effectiveStatus === 'failed' || isCancelled;\r\n\r\n  const handleCancel = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    if (!id) return;\r\n    setCancelling(true);\r\n    setCancelError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      await api.cancelRun(id);\r\n      setShowCancelConfirm(false);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setCancelError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Cancel failed');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setCancelling(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [id]);\r\n\r\n  const handleCopyRunId = useCallback(() => {\r\n    if (run?.id) {\r\n      navigator.clipboard.writeText(run.id).catch((err) => {\r\n        console.warn('[RunDetail] Clipboard write failed:', err);\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }, [run?.id]);\r\n\r\n  if (!id) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400\">No Run ID provided</p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (isLoading) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n        <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Loading Run...</p>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!run) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400 text-lg\">\r\n          {runError ?? 'Run not found'}\r\n        </p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const duration =\r\n    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n      : Date.now() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime();\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Breadcrumb */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400 mb-4\">\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Dashboard</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <Link to=\"/runs\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Runs</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <span className=\"text-slate-200 font-mono\">{run.id.slice(0, 8)}</span>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {(errorBanner || run.lastError || cancelError) && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm flex items-center justify-between\">\r\n          <span>{cancelError ?? run.lastError ?? errorBanner}</span>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => { setErrorBanner(null); setCancelError(null); }}\r\n            className=\"text-red-300 hover:text-red-100 ml-2\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* SSE Error Banner */}\r\n      {sseError && !isTerminal && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-yellow-900/30 border border-yellow-700 rounded-lg text-yellow-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yellow-500 animate-pulse shrink-0\" />\r\n          <span>{sseError}</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Cancelled Banner */}\r\n      {isCancelled && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-amber-900/30 border border-amber-700 rounded-lg text-amber-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"text-amber-400 font-bold\">!</span>\r\n          <span>This run was cancelled. No further actions will be processed.</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Run Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between\">\r\n          <div>\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-2\">\r\n              <h1 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-white font-mono\">\r\n                Run {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n              </h1>\r\n              <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} />\r\n              {/* Status badge */}\r\n              <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full ${\r\n                isRunning ? 'bg-blue-600/20 text-blue-400' :\r\n                isCancelled ? 'bg-amber-600/20 text-amber-400' :\r\n                effectiveStatus === 'done' ? 'bg-red-600/20 text-red-400' :\r\n                'bg-slate-600/20 text-slate-400'\r\n              }`}>\r\n                {effectiveStatus.toUpperCase()}\r\n              </span>\r\n            </div>\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-400\">\r\n              <p>\r\n                <span className=\"text-slate-500\">Repository:</span>{' '}\r\n                {run.repoId}\r\n                <span className=\"mx-2\">┬À</span>\r\n                <span className=\"text-slate-500\">Issue:</span>{' '}\r\n                <span className=\"text-blue-400 font-mono\">#{run.issueNumber}</span>\r\n              </p>\r\n              {run.branch && (\r\n                <p>\r\n                  <span className=\"text-slate-500\">Branch:</span>{' '}\r\n                  <span className=\"font-mono text-xs text-slate-300\">{run.branch}</span>\r\n                </p>\r\n              )}\r\n              <p>\r\n                <span className=\"text-slate-500\">Started:</span>{' '}\r\n                {new Date(run.startedAt).toLocaleString()}\r\n                <span className=\"mx-2\">┬À</span>\r\n                <span className=\"text-slate-500\">Duration:</span>{' '}\r\n                {isRunning ? <span className=\"text-blue-400 animate-pulse\">running ({formatDuration(duration)})</span> : formatDuration(duration)}\r\n              </p>\r\n            </div>\r\n          </div>\r\n\r\n          {/* Actions */}\r\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n            {/* Live Connection Status */}\r\n            <span\r\n              className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs ${\r\n                isConnected ? 'text-slate-500' : 'text-yellow-400'\r\n              }`}\r\n            >\r\n              <span\r\n                className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${\r\n                  isConnected ? '');\r\n  const { events, evidence, isConnected, runStatus: sseRunStatus, error: sseError } = useSSE(id ?? null);\r\n  const [errorBanner, setErrorBanner] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [showCancelConfirm, setShowCancelConfirm] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelling, setCancelling] = useState(false);\r\n  const [cancelError, setCancelError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  // Merged status: SSE takes priority, then DB run status\r\n  const effectiveStatus = sseRunStatus ?? run?.status ?? 'unknown';\r\n\r\n  const isRunning = effectiveStatus === 'active';\r\n  const isCancelled = effectiveStatus === 'cancelled';\r\n  const isTerminal = effectiveStatus === 'done' || effectiveStatus === 'failed' || isCancelled;\r\n\r\n  const handleCancel = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    if (!id) return;\r\n    setCancelling(true);\r\n    setCancelError(null);\r\n    try {\r\n      await api.cancelRun(id);\r\n      setShowCancelConfirm(false);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setCancelError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Cancel failed');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setCancelling(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [id]);\r\n\r\n  const handleCopyRunId = useCallback(() => {\r\n    if (run?.id) {\r\n      navigator.clipboard.writeText(run.id).catch((err) => {\r\n        console.warn('[RunDetail] Clipboard write failed:', err);\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }, [run?.id]);\r\n\r\n  if (!id) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400\">No Run ID provided</p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (isLoading) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <div className=\"animate-spin-slow inline-block w-8 h-8 border-4 border-blue-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full\" />\r\n        <p className=\"text-slate-400 mt-3\">Loading Run...</p>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!run) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n        <p className=\"text-red-400 text-lg\">\r\n          {runError ?? 'Run not found'}\r\n        </p>\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"text-blue-400 hover:underline mt-2 inline-block\">\r\n          Back to Dashboard\r\n        </Link>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const duration =\r\n    run.finishedAt && run.startedAt\r\n      ? new Date(run.finishedAt).getTime() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime()\r\n      : Date.now() - new Date(run.startedAt).getTime();\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      {/* Breadcrumb */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400 mb-4\">\r\n        <Link to=\"/\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Dashboard</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <Link to=\"/runs\" className=\"hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors\">Runs</Link>\r\n        <span>/</span>\r\n        <span className=\"text-slate-200 font-mono\">{run.id.slice(0, 8)}</span>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Error Banner */}\r\n      {(errorBanner || run.lastError || cancelError) && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-900/50 border border-red-700 rounded-lg text-red-200 text-sm flex items-center justify-between\">\r\n          <span>{cancelError ?? run.lastError ?? errorBanner}</span>\r\n          <button\r\n            onClick={() => { setErrorBanner(null); setCancelError(null); }}\r\n            className=\"text-red-300 hover:text-red-100 ml-2\"\r\n          >\r\n            Ô£ò\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* SSE Error Banner */}\r\n      {sseError && !isTerminal && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-yellow-900/30 border border-yellow-700 rounded-lg text-yellow-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yellow-500 animate-pulse shrink-0\" />\r\n          <span>{sseError}</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Cancelled Banner */}\r\n      {isCancelled && (\r\n        <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-amber-900/30 border border-amber-700 rounded-lg text-amber-200 text-sm flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          <span className=\"text-amber-400 font-bold\">!</span>\r\n          <span>This run was cancelled. No further actions will be processed.</span>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Run Header */}\r\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\r\n        <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between\">\r\n          <div>\r\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-2\">\r\n              <h1 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-white font-mono\">\r\n                Run {run.id.slice(0, 8)}\r\n              </h1>\r\n              <PhaseBadge phase={run.phase} />\r\n              {/* Status badge */}\r\n              <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full ${\r\n                isRunning ? Defaults to [envProvider, dockerSecretProvider, fileProvider] */\r\n  providers?: SecretProvider[];\r\n  /** Custom .env file path for FileProvider */\r\n  envFilePath?: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Providers\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Reads secrets from process.env\r\n */\r\nexport class EnvSecretProvider implements SecretProvider {\r\n  readonly name = 'env';\r\n\r\n  getSecret(key: string): string | null {\r\n    return process.env[key] ?? null;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Reads secrets from Docker secrets (/run/secrets/<key>).\r\n * Docker secrets are mounted as files, one per secret, with lowercase names.\r\n */\r\nexport class DockerSecretProvider implements SecretProvider {\r\n  readonly name = 'docker-secret';\r\n  private readonly secretsDir: string;\r\n\r\n  constructor(secretsDir = '/run/secrets') {\r\n    this.secretsDir = secretsDir;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  getSecret(key: string): string | null {\r\n    // Docker secrets use lowercase filenames\r\n    const secretPath = path.join(this.secretsDir, key.toLowerCase());\r\n    try {\r\n      return fs.readFileSync(secretPath, 'utf-8').trim();\r\n    } catch {\r\n      return null;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Reads secrets from a .env-style file.\r\n * Parses KEY=VALUE lines, supports # comments and quoted values.\r\n */\r\nexport class FileSecretProvider implements SecretProvider {\r\n  readonly name = 'file';\r\n  private readonly envPath: string;\r\n  private parsed: Record<string, string> | null = null;\r\n\r\n  constructor(envPath: string) {\r\n    this.envPath = envPath;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  getSecret(key: string): string | null {\r\n    if (!this.parsed) {\r\n      this.parsed = this.parseEnvFile();\r\n    }\r\n    return this.parsed[key] ?? null;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  private parseEnvFile(): Record<string, string> {\r\n    const result: Record<string, string> = {};\r\n    try {\r\n      const content = fs.readFileSync(this.envPath, 'utf-8');\r\n      for (const line of content.split('\\n')) {\r\n        const trimmed = line.trim();\r\n        if (!trimmed || trimmed.startsWith('#')) continue;\r\n        const eqIdx = trimmed.indexOf('=');\r\n        if (eqIdx === -1) continue;\r\n        const key = trimmed.slice(0, eqIdx).trim();\r\n        let value = trimmed.slice(eqIdx + 1).trim();\r\n        // Strip surrounding quotes if present\r\n        if ((value.startsWith('\"') && value.endsWith('\"')) ||\r\n            (value.startsWith(\"'\") && value.endsWith(\"'\"))) {\r\n          value = value.slice(1, -1);\r\n        }\r\n        if (key) result[key] = value;\r\n      }\r\n    } catch {\r\n      // File not found or unreadable ÔÇö return empty\r\n    }\r\n    return result;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// SecretManager\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Centralized secret manager with chained provider resolution.\r\n *\r\n * Default resolution order:\r\n *   1. EnvSecretProvider   ÔÇö process.env\r\n *   2. DockerSecretProvider ÔÇö /run/secrets/<key>\r\n *   3. FileSecretProvider   ÔÇö .env file\r\n *\r\n * Usage:\r\n *   const sm = new SecretManager();\r\n *   const token = sm.getSecret('GITHUB_TOKEN');\r\n *   console.log(sm.mask('GITHUB_TOKEN'));     // \"***-redacted-***\"\r\n *   console.log(sm.maskValue('ghp_xxx...'));  // \"ghp_***REDACTED***\"\r\n */\r\nexport class SecretManager {\r\n  private readonly providers: SecretProvider[];\r\n\r\n  constructor(options: SecretManagerOptions = {}) {\r\n    this.providers = options.providers ?? [\r\n      new EnvSecretProvider(),\r\n      new DockerSecretProvider(),\r\n      new FileSecretProvider(options.envFilePath ?? this.resolveDefaultEnvPath()),\r\n    ];\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Resolves a secret by trying each provider in order.\r\n   * Returns the first non-null value, or null if not found.\r\n   */\r\n  getSecret(key: string): string | null {\r\n    for (const provider of this.providers) {\r\n      const value = provider.getSecret(key);\r\n      if (value !== null && value.length > 0) {\r\n        return value;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    return null;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Returns a masked display name for the given key.\r\n   * Use for log messages: \"GITHUB_TOKEN is set\" ÔåÆ \"GITHUB_TOKEN=***-redacted-***\"\r\n   */\r\n  mask(key: string): string {\r\n    const val = this.getSecret(key);\r\n    if (val === null) return `${key}=<not set>`;\r\n    return `${key}=***-redacted-***`;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Masks secret values in a string using the existing redactSecrets rules.\r\n   */\r\n  maskValue(input: string): string {\r\n    return redactSecrets(input);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Returns true if the given secret is available.\r\n   */\r\n  hasSecret(key: string): boolean {\r\n    return this.getSecret(key) !== null;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  /**\r\n   * Lists all configured provider names.\r\n   */\r\n  getProviderNames(): string[] {\r\n    return this.providers.map(p => p.name);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  private resolveDefaultEnvPath(): string {\r\n    // Try common locations\r\n    const candidates = [\r\n      path.resolve(process.cwd(), '.env'),\r\n      path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'apps/server/.env'),\r\n    ];\r\n    for (const candidate of candidates) {\r\n      if (fs.existsSync(candidate)) return candidate;\r\n    }\r\n    return candidates[0]!;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/a11y/noSvgWithoutTitle","severity":"warning","description":"Alternative text title element cannot be empty","message":[{"elements":[],"content":"Alternative text "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"title"},{"elements":[],"content":" element cannot be React.ReactElement {\r\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\r\n  const [blueprint, setBlueprint] = useState('');\r\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\r\n  const [isFetching, for dynamic blueprint generation\r\n  const [repoId, setRepoId] = useState('');\r\n  const [issueNumber, setIssueNumber] = useState('');\r\n\r\n  /** Fetch blueprint from the API for a given repo + issue */\r\n  const generateBlueprint = async () => {\r\n    const trimmedRepo = repoId.trim();\r\n    const issueNum = Number.parseInt(issueNumber.trim(), 10);\r\n\r\n    if (!trimmedRepo || Number.isNaN(issueNum) || issueNum < 1) {\r\n      setError('Enter a valid repository (owner/repo) and issue number');\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const parts = trimmedRepo.split('/');\r\n instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to generate blueprint');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setIsFetching(false);\r\n    }\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  const startDemoRun = async () => {\r\n type React from 'react';\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { api, setAdminToken, getAdminToken, type AdminStats } from '../../api.js';\r\n\r\ntype AuthStatus = 'idle' | 'connecting' | 'valid' | 'error';\r\n\r\nexport default function AdminPage(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<AdminStats | null>(null);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [actionResult, setActionResult] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [tokenInput, setTokenInput] = useState('');\r\n  const [authStatus, setAuthStatus] = useState<AuthStatus>('idle');\r\n  const [authError, setAuthError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const fetchStats = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getAdminStats();\r\n      setStats(data);\r\n      setAuthStatus('valid');\r\n      setAuthError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      const status = (err as { status?: number }).status;\r\n      if (status === 401 || status === 503) {\r\n        setAuthError((err as Error).message);\r\n        setAuthStatus('error');\r\n        setStats(null);\r\n      }\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  // On mount: read stored token and auto-connect if present\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    const existing = getAdminToken();\r\n    if (existing) {\r\n      setTokenInput(existing);\r\n      setAuthStatus('connecting');\r\n      fetchStats();\r\n    } else {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [fetchStats]);\r\n\r\n  const handleConnect = async () => {\r\n    const trimmed = tokenInput.trim();\r\n    if (!trimmed) return;\r\n    setAuthStatus('connecting');\r\n    setAuthError(null);\r\n    setLoading(true);\r\n    setAdminToken(trimmed);\r\n    // Defer fetch to allow localStorage to persist\r\n    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 0));\r\n    fetchStats();\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  const handleDisconnect = () => {\r\n    setAdminToken('');\r\n    setTokenInput('');\r\n    setAuthStatus('idle');\r\n    setStats(null);\r\n    setAuthError(null);\r\n    setActionResult(null);\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  const bulkAction = async (actionId: 'cancel' | 'retry' | 'cleanup', label: string) => {\r\n    setActionResult(`${label}...`);\r\n    try {\r\n      let data: unknown;\r\n      if (actionId === 'cancel') data = await api.bulkCancelRuns();\r\n      else if (actionId === 'retry') data = await api.bulkRetryRuns();\r\n      else data = await api.cleanupRuns();\r\n      setActionResult(`${label}: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);\r\n      fetchStats();\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setActionResult(`Error: ${(err as Error).message}`);\r\n    }\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      <h1>Admin Dashboard</h1>\r\n      <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-400 mt-1 mb-6\">System operations and database management</p>\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Token Section ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\r\n        <label htmlFor=\"admin-token\" className=\"block text-xs font-medium text-slate-400 mb-2\">\r\n          Admin Token\r\n        </label>\r\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2\">\r\n          <input\r\n            id=\"admin-token\"\r\n            type=\"password\"\r\n            value={tokenInput}\r\n            onChange={e => setTokenInput(e.target.value)}\r\n            onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleConnect(); }}\r\n            placeholder=\"Enter admin token...\"\r\n            autoComplete=\"off\"\r\n            className=\"flex-1 bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-200 placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500 focus:border-sky-500\"\r\n          />\r\n          {authStatus === 'valid' ? (\r\n            <button onClick={handleDisconnect} className=\"btn-ghost text-sm whitespace-nowrap\">\r\n              Disconnect\r\n            </button>\r\n          ) : (\r\n            <button\r\n              onClick={handleConnect}\r\n              disabled={!tokenInput.trim() || authStatus === 'connecting'}\r\n              className=\"btn-primary text-sm whitespace-nowrap\"\r\n            >\r\n              {authStatus === 'connecting' ? 'Connecting...' : 'Connect'}\r\n            </button>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        {/* Status indicator */}\r\n        <div className=\"mt-2 flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          {authStatus === 'valid' && (\r\n            <span className=\"inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-green-400 bg-green-500/10 border border-green-800 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5\">\r\n              <span className=\"w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-green-400 animate-pulse\" />\r\n              Connected\r\n            </span>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Authentication Error ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      {authStatus === 'error' && authError && (\r\n        <div className=\"bg-red-500/10 border border-red-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-xs text-red-400 mb-4\">\r\n          {authError}\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Loading Skeleton (only while connecting) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      {loading && (\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-3 animate-pulse\">\r\n          <div className=\"skeleton h-8 w-32\" />\r\n          <div className=\"skeleton h-24 w-full\" />\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Action Result Toast ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      {actionResult && (\r\n        <div className=\"bg-sky-500/10 border border-sky-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-xs text-sky-400 mb-4\">{actionResult}</div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Dashboard Content (only when authenticated) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      {authStatus === 'valid' && stats && (\r\n        <>\r\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-6\">\r\n            {[\r\n              { label: 'Total Runs', value: stats.runs.total },\r\n              { label: 'Active', value: stats.runs.active, color: 'text-sky-400' },\r\n              { label: 'Failed/Blocked', value: stats.runs.failed, color: 'text-red-400' },\r\n              { label: 'Done', value: stats.runs.done, color: 'text-green-400' },\r\n              { label: 'Repositories', value: stats.repositories },\r\n              { label: 'Events', value: stats.events },\r\n              { label: 'Artifacts', value: stats.artifacts },\r\n              { label: 'DB Size', value: "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"reset"},{"elements":[],"content":""}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\apps\\web\\src\\components\\admin\\AdminPage.tsx"},"span":[3856,4058],"sourceCode":"import type React from 'react';\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { api, setAdminToken, getAdminToken, type AdminStats } from '../../api.js';\r\n\r\ntype AuthStatus = 'idle' | 'connecting' | 'valid' | 'error';\r\n\r\nexport default function AdminPage(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<AdminStats | null>(null);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [actionResult, setActionResult] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [tokenInput, setTokenInput] = useState('');\r\n  const [authStatus, setAuthStatus] = useState<AuthStatus>('idle');\r\n  const [authError, setAuthError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const fetchStats = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getAdminStats();\r\n      setStats(data);\r\n      setAuthStatus('valid');\r\n      setAuthError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      const status = (err as { status?: number }).status;\r\n      if (status === 401 || status === 503) {\r\n        setAuthError((err as Error).message);\r\n        setAuthStatus('error');\r\n        setStats(null);\r\n      }\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  // On mount: read stored token and auto-connect if present\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    const existing = getAdminToken();\r\n    if (existing) {\r\n      setTokenInput(existing);\r\n      setAuthStatus('connecting');\r\n      fetchStats();\r\n    } else {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [fetchStats]);\r\n\r\n  const handleConnect = async () => {\r\n    const trimmed = tokenInput.trim();\r\n    if (!trimmed) return;\r\n    setAuthStatus('connecting');\r\n    setAuthError(null);\r\n    setLoading(true);\r\n    setAdminToken(trimmed);\r\n    // Defer fetch to allow localStorage to persist\r\n    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 0));\r\n    fetchStats();\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  const handleDisconnect = () => {\r\n    setAdminToken('');\r\n    setTokenInput('');\r\n    setAuthStatus('idle');\r\n    setStats(null);\r\n    setAuthError(null);\r\n    setActionResult(null);\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  const bulkAction = async (actionId: 'cancel' | 'retry' | 'cleanup', label: string) => {\r\n    setActionResult(`${label}...`);\r\n    try {\r\n      let data: unknown;\r\n      if (actionId === 'cancel') data = await api.bulkCancelRuns();\r\n      else if (actionId === 'retry') data = await api.bulkRetryRuns();\r\n      else data = await api.cleanupRuns();\r\n      setActionResult(`${label}: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);\r\n      fetchStats();\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setActionResult(`Error: ${(err as Error).message}`);\r\n    }\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      <h1>Admin Dashboard</h1>\r\n      <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-400 mt-1 mb-6\">System operations and database management</p>\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Token Section ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\r\n        <label htmlFor=\"admin-token\" className=\"block text-xs font-medium text-slate-400 mb-2\">\r\n          Admin Token\r\n        </label>\r\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2\">\r\n          <input\r\n            id=\"admin-token\"\r\n            type=\"password\"\r\n            value={tokenInput}\r\n            onChange={e => setTokenInput(e.target.value)}\r\n            onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleConnect(); }}\r\n            placeholder=\"Enter admin token...\"\r\n            autoComplete=\"off\"\r\n            className=\"flex-1 bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-200 placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500 focus:border-sky-500\"\r\n          />\r\n          {authStatus === 'valid' ? (\r\n            <button onClick={handleDisconnect} className=\"btn-ghost text-sm whitespace-nowrap\">\r\n              Disconnect\r\n            </button>\r\n          ) : (\r\n            <button\r\n              onClick={handleConnect}\r\n              disabled={!tokenInput.trim() || authStatus === 'connecting'}\r\n              className=\"btn-primary text-sm whitespace-nowrap\"\r\n            >\r\n              {authStatus === 'connecting' ? 'Connecting...' : 'Connect'}\r\n            </button>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        {/* Status indicator */}\r\n        <div className=\"mt-2 flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          {authStatus === 'valid' && (\r\n            <span className=\"inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-green-400 bg-green-500/10 border border-green-800 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5\">\r\n              <span className=\"w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-green-400 animate-pulse\" />\r\n              Connected\r\n            </span>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Authentication Error ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      {authStatus === 'error' && authError && (\r\n        <div className=\"bg-red-500/10 border border-red-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-xs text-red-400 mb-4\">\r\n          {authError}\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Loading Skeleton (only while connecting) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      {loading && (\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-3 animate-pulse\">\r\n          <div className=\"skeleton h-8 w-32\" />\r\n          <div className=\"skeleton h-24 w-full\" />\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Action Result Toast ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      {actionResult && (\r\n        <div className=\"bg-sky-500/10 border border-sky-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-xs text-sky-400 mb-4\">{actionResult}</div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Dashboard Content (only when authenticated) {[\r\n              { label: 'Total Runs', value: stats.runs.total },\r\n              { label: 'Active', value: stats.runs.active, color: 'text-sky-400' },\r\n              { label: 'Failed/Blocked', stats.repositories },\r\n              { label: 'Events', value: stats.events },\r\n              { label: 'Artifacts', value: stats.artifacts },\r\n              { label: 'DB Size', value: type React from 'react';\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';\r\nimport { api, setAdminToken, getAdminToken, type AdminStats } from '../../api.js';\r\n\r\ntype AuthStatus = 'idle' | 'connecting' | 'valid' | 'error';\r\n\r\nexport default function AdminPage(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<AdminStats | null>(null);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [actionResult, setActionResult] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [tokenInput, setTokenInput] = useState('');\r\n  const [authStatus, setAuthStatus] = useState<AuthStatus>('idle');\r\n  const [authError, setAuthError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const fetchStats = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getAdminStats();\r\n      setStats(data);\r\n      setAuthStatus('valid');\r\n      setAuthError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      const status = (err as { status?: number }).status;\r\n      if (status === 401 || status === 503) {\r\n        setAuthError((err as Error).message);\r\n        setAuthStatus('error');\r\n        setStats(null);\r\n      }\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  // On mount: read stored token and auto-connect if present\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    const existing = getAdminToken();\r\n    if (existing) {\r\n      setTokenInput(existing);\r\n      setAuthStatus('connecting');\r\n      fetchStats();\r\n    } else {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, [fetchStats]);\r\n\r\n  const handleConnect = async () => {\r\n    const trimmed = tokenInput.trim();\r\n    if (!trimmed) return;\r\n    setAuthStatus('connecting');\r\n    setAuthError(null);\r\n    setLoading(true);\r\n    setAdminToken(trimmed);\r\n    // Defer fetch to allow localStorage to persist\r\n    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 0));\r\n    fetchStats();\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  const handleDisconnect = () => {\r\n    setAdminToken('');\r\n    setTokenInput('');\r\n    setAuthStatus('idle');\r\n    setStats(null);\r\n    setAuthError(null);\r\n    setActionResult(null);\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  const bulkAction = async (actionId: 'cancel' | 'retry' | 'cleanup', label: string) => {\r\n    setActionResult(`${label}...`);\r\n    try {\r\n      let data: unknown;\r\n      if (actionId === 'cancel') data = await api.bulkCancelRuns();\r\n      else if (actionId === 'retry') data = await api.bulkRetryRuns();\r\n      else data = await api.cleanupRuns();\r\n      setActionResult(`${label}: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);\r\n      fetchStats();\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setActionResult(`Error: ${(err as Error).message}`);\r\n    }\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      <h1>Admin Dashboard</h1>\r\n      <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-400 mt-1 mb-6\">System operations and database management</p>\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Token Section ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\r\n        <label htmlFor=\"admin-token\" className=\"block text-xs font-medium text-slate-400 mb-2\">\r\n          Admin Token\r\n        </label>\r\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2\">\r\n          <input\r\n            id=\"admin-token\"\r\n            type=\"password\"\r\n            value={tokenInput}\r\n            onChange={e => setTokenInput(e.target.value)}\r\n            onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleConnect(); }}\r\n            placeholder=\"Enter admin token...\"\r\n            autoComplete=\"off\"\r\n            className=\"flex-1 bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-200 placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500 focus:border-sky-500\"\r\n          />\r\n          {authStatus === 'valid' ? (\r\n            <button onClick={handleDisconnect} className=\"btn-ghost text-sm whitespace-nowrap\">\r\n              Disconnect\r\n            </button>\r\n          ) : (\r\n            <button\r\n              onClick={handleConnect}\r\n              disabled={!tokenInput.trim() || authStatus === 'connecting'}\r\n              className=\"btn-primary text-sm whitespace-nowrap\"\r\n            >\r\n              {authStatus === 'connecting' ? 'Connecting...' : 'Connect'}\r\n            </button>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        {/* Status indicator */}\r\n        <div className=\"mt-2 flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n          {authStatus === 'valid' && (\r\n            <span className=\"inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-green-400 bg-green-500/10 border border-green-800 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5\">\r\n              <span className=\"w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-green-400 animate-pulse\" />\r\n              Connected\r\n            </span>\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Authentication Error ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      {authStatus === 'error' && authError && (\r\n        <div className=\"bg-red-500/10 border border-red-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-xs text-red-400 mb-4\">\r\n          {authError}\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Loading Skeleton (only while connecting) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      {loading && (\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-3 animate-pulse\">\r\n          <div className=\"skeleton h-8 w-32\" />\r\n          <div className=\"skeleton h-24 w-full\" />\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Action Result Toast ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n      {actionResult && (\r\n        <div className=\"bg-sky-500/10 border border-sky-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-xs text-sky-400 mb-4\">{actionResult}</div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ Dashboard Content (only when authenticated) || ' #' || ?, 'open', '[]', datetime('now'))\r\n  `);\r\n\tconst upsertRun = database.prepare(`\r\n    INSERT INTO runs (id, repo_id, issue_number, branch, phase, status, autonomy_level, attempt, started_at, finished_at)\r\n    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n    ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET\r\n      repo_id         = excluded.repo_id,\r\n      issue_number    = excluded.issue_number,\r\n      branch          = excluded.branch,\r\n      phase           = excluded.phase,\r\n      status          = excluded.status,\r\n      autonomy_level  = excluded.autonomy_level,\r\n      attempt         = excluded.attempt,\r\n      started_at      = excluded.started_at,\r\n      finished_at     = excluded.finished_at\r\n  `);\r\n\r\n\tconst transaction = database.transaction(() => {\r\n\t\tensureRepo.run(run.repoId, run.repoId);\r\n\t\tensureIssue.run(\r\n\t\t\t`issue-${run.repoId}-${run.issueNumber}`,\r\n\t\t\trun.repoId,\r\n\t\t\trun.issueNumber,\r\n\t\t\t\"Issue\",\r\n\t\t\tString(run.issueNumber),\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t\tupsertRun.run(\r\n\t\t\trun.id,\r\n\t\t\trun.repoId,\r\n\t\t\trun.issueNumber,\r\n\t\t\trun.branch,\r\n\t\t\trun.phase,\r\n\t\t\trun.status,\r\n\t\t\trun.autonomyLevel,\r\n\t\t\trun.attempt,\r\n\t\t\trun.startedAt,\r\n\t\t\trun.finishedAt,\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\ttransaction();\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * L├ñdt einen Run aus der Datenbank.\r\n * lastError und workspacePath werden aus den DB-Spalten last_error / workspace_path gelesen.\r\n */\r\nfunction loadRunFromDb(runId: string): RunState | null {\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst row = getDb().prepare(\"SELECT * FROM runs WHERE id = ?\").get(runId) as\r\n\t\t\t| Record<string, unknown>\r\n\t\t\t| undefined;\r\n\t\tif (!row) return null;\r\n\t\treturn {\r\n\t\t\tid: String(row.id ?? \"\"),\r\n\t\t\trepoId: String(row.repo_id ?? \"\"),\r\n\t\t\tissueNumber: Number(row.issue_number ?? 0),\r\n\t\t\tbranch: row.branch ? String(row.branch) : null,\r\n\t\t\tphase: parsePhase(String(row.phase ?? \"QUEUED\")),\r\n\t\t\tstatus: parseRunStatus(String(row.status ?? \"blocked\")),\r\n\t\t\tautonomyLevel: Number(row.autonomy_level ?? 1),\r\n\t\t\tattempt: Number(row.attempt ?? 0),\r\n\t\t\tstartedAt: String(row.started_at ?? new Date().toISOString()),\r\n\t\t\tfinishedAt: row.finished_at ? String(row.finished_at) : null,\r\n\t\t\tlastError: row.last_error ? String(row.last_error) : null,\r\n\t\t\tworkspacePath: row.workspace_path ? String(row.workspace_path) : null,\r\n\t\t};\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tlog.error(`loadRunFromDb failed for ${runId}`, err);\r\n\t\treturn null;\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** Listet alle Runs aus der Datenbank (neueste zuerst). */\r\nfunction listRunsFromDb(): RunState[] {\r\n\tconst rows = getDb()\r\n\t\t.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM runs ORDER BY started_at DESC\")\r\n\t\t.all() as Array<Record<string, unknown>>;\r\n\treturn rows\r\n\t\t.filter((row) => {\r\n\t\t\t// Filtere ung├╝ltige Eintr├ñge ÔÇö logge Warnung statt Absturz\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tparsePhase(String(row.phase ?? \"\"));\r\n\t\t\t\treturn true;\r\n\t\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\t\tlog.warn(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t`listRunsFromDb: Ung├╝ltige Phase \"${String(row.phase)}\" f├╝r Run ${String(row.id)} ÔÇö wird ├╝bersprungen`,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\treturn false;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t})\r\n\t\t.map((row) => ({\r\n\t\t\tid: String(row.id ?? \"\"),\r\n\t\t\trepoId: String(row.repo_id ?? \"\"),\r\n\t\t\tissueNumber: Number(row.issue_number ?? 0),\r\n\t\t\tbranch: row.branch ? String(row.branch) : null,\r\n\t\t\tphase: parsePhase(String(row.phase ?? \"QUEUED\")),\r\n\t\t\tstatus: parseRunStatus(String(row.status ?? \"blocked\")),\r\n\t\t\tautonomyLevel: Number(row.autonomy_level ?? 1),\r\n\t\t\tattempt: Number(row.attempt ?? 0),\r\n\t\t\tstartedAt: String(row.started_at ?? new Date().toISOString()),\r\n\t\t\tfinishedAt: row.finished_at ? String(row.finished_at) : null,\r\n\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t}));\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** Z├ñhlt alle Runs in der Datenbank. */\r\nfunction countRunsInDb(): number {\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst row = getDb().prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM runs\").get() as\r\n\t\t\t| { cnt: number }\r\n\t\t\t| undefined;\r\n\t\treturn row?.cnt ?? 0;\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tlog.error(\"countRunsInDb failed\", err);\r\n\t\treturn 0;\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** Einfache Dashboard-Metriken (Issue #84) */\r\nfunction getDashboardMetrics() {\r\n\tconst db = getDb();\r\n\tconst total = (\r\n\t\tdb.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM runs\").get() as { c: number }\r\n\t).c;\r\n\tconst active = (\r\n\t\tdb\r\n\t\t\t.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM runs WHERE status = 'active'\")\r\n\t\t\t.get() as { c: number }\r\n\t).c;\r\n\tconst done = (\r\n\t\tdb\r\n\t\t\t.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM runs WHERE status = 'done'\")\r\n\t\t\t.get() as { c: number }\r\n\t).c;\r\n\tconst failed = (\r\n\t\tdb\r\n\t\t\t.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM runs WHERE status = 'failed'\")\r\n\t\t\t.get() as { c: number }\r\n\t).c;\r\n\tconst blocked = (\r\n\t\tdb\r\n\t\t\t.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM runs WHERE status = 'blocked'\")\r\n\t\t\t.get() as { c: number }\r\n\t).c;\r\n\treturn {\r\n\t\ttotalRuns: total,\r\n\t\trunsByStatus: { active, done, failed, blocked },\r\n\t\trunsByPhase: {},\r\n\t};\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** Einfache Evidence-Summary (Issue #84) */\r\nfunction getDashboardEvidence() {\r\n\tconst db = getDb();\r\n\tconst totalArtifacts = (\r\n\t\tdb.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM artifacts\").get() as { c: number }\r\n\t).c;\r\n\tconst testEvents = (\r\n\t\tdb\r\n\t\t\t.prepare(\r\n\t\t\t\t\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM run_events WHERE level = 'INFO' AND phase = 'TEST'\",\r\n\t\t\t)\r\n\t\t\t.get() as { c: number }\r\n\t).c;\r\n\tconst errorEvents = (\r\n\t\tdb\r\n\t\t\t.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM run_events WHERE level = 'ERROR'\")\r\n\t\t\t.get() as { c: number }\r\n\t).c;\r\n\tconst warningEvents = (\r\n\t\tdb\r\n\t\t\t.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM run_events WHERE level = 'WARN'\")\r\n\t\t\t.get() as { c: number }\r\n\t).c;\r\n\treturn { totalArtifacts, testEvents, errorEvents, warningEvents };\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Speichert ein Run-Event in der Datenbank und benachrichtigt SSE-Clients.\r\n * better-sqlite3 ist synchron ÔÇö kein async n├Âtig.\r\n */\r\nfunction storeEvent(event: RunEventData): void {\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst database = getDb();\r\n\t\tdatabase\r\n\t\t\t.prepare(`\r\n      INSERT INTO run_events (id, run_id, phase, level, message, payload_json, created_at)\r\n      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n    `)\r\n\t\t\t.run(\r\n\t\t\t\tevent.id,\r\n\t\t\t\tevent.runId,\r\n\t\t\t\tevent.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\tevent.level,\r\n\t\t\t\tevent.message,\r\n\t\t\t\tevent.payload ? JSON.stringify(event.payload) : \"{}\",\r\n\t\t\t\tevent.createdAt,\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tlog.error(`storeEvent failed for run ${event.runId}`, err);\r\n\t}\r\n\t// Notify SSE clients about new event\r\n\tbroadcastSSE(event.runId, \"run-event\", event);\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** L├ñdt alle Events eines Runs aus der Datenbank (chronologisch). */\r\nfunction getEvents(runId: string): RunEventData[] {\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst rows = getDb()\r\n\t\t\t.prepare(\r\n\t\t\t\t\"SELECT * FROM run_events WHERE run_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC\",\r\n\t\t\t)\r\n\t\t\t.all(runId) as Array<Record<string, unknown>>;\r\n\t\treturn rows.map((row) => ({\r\n\t\t\tid: row.id as string,\r\n\t\t\trunId: row.run_id as string,\r\n\t\t\tphase: row.phase as Phase,\r\n\t\t\tlevel: row.level as EventLevel,\r\n\t\t\tmessage: row.message as string,\r\n\t\t\tpayload: row.payload_json\r\n\t\t\t\t? (JSON.parse(row.payload_json as string) as Record<string, unknown>)\r\n\t\t\t\t: null,\r\n\t\t\tcreatedAt: row.created_at as string,\r\n\t\t}));\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tlog.error(`getEvents failed for run ${runId}`, err);\r\n\t\treturn [];\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function setWorkspaceAdapter(adapter: GitWorkspaceAdapter): void {\r\n\tworkspaceAdapter = adapter;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function setSpecKitAdapter(adapter: SpecKitAdapter): void {\r\n\tspeckitAdapter = adapter;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function setOpenCodeAdapter(adapter: OpenCodeAdapter): void {\r\n\topencodeAdapter = adapter;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction resolveSpecKitAdapter(injected?: SpecKitAdapter): SpecKitAdapter {\r\n\tif (injected) return injected;\r\n\tif (process.env.POSITRON_SPECKIT_MODE === \"real\") {\r\n\t\treturn new RealSpecKitAdapter();\r\n\t}\r\n\treturn speckitAdapter;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction resolveOpenCodeAdapter(injected?: OpenCodeAdapter): OpenCodeAdapter {\r\n\tif (injected) return injected;\r\n\tif (process.env.POSITRON_OPENCODE_MODE === \"real\") {\r\n\t\treturn new RealOpenCodeAdapter();\r\n\t}\r\n\treturn opencodeAdapter;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * QA-011: Creates a metrics-instrumented wrapper around the OpenCode adapter.\r\n * Records command total, duration, and failures without modifying adapter code.\r\n */\r\nfunction createInstrumentedOpenCodeAdapter(\r\n\tbase: OpenCodeAdapter,\r\n): OpenCodeAdapter {\r\n\treturn {\r\n\t\thealthCheck: (wp: string) => base.healthCheck(wp),\r\n\t\trunSlashCommand: async (commandName: string, input: OpenCodeRunInput) => {\r\n\t\t\tconst startTime = Date.now();\r\n\t\t\tconst phaseName = input.phaseName ?? commandName ?? \"unknown\";\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst result = await base.runSlashCommand(commandName, input);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst durationSec = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\r\n\t\t\t\tconst outcome = result.status === \"success\" ? \"success\" : \"error\";\r\n\t\t\t\topencodeCommandTotal.inc({ command_type: phaseName, outcome });\r\n\t\t\t\topencodeCommandDurationSeconds.observe(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t{ command_type: phaseName },\r\n\t\t\t\t\tdurationSec,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tif (outcome === \"error\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst err = new Error(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tresult.blockedReason ?? result.summary ?? \"command failed\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t\topencodeCommandFailuresTotal.inc({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcommand_type: phaseName,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\terror_kind: classifyRuntimeError(err),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\treturn result;\r\n\t\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst durationSec = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\r\n\t\t\t\tconst errorObj = err instanceof Error ? err : new Error(String(err));\r\n\t\t\t\topencodeCommandTotal.inc({ command_type: phaseName, outcome: \"error\" });\r\n\t\t\t\topencodeCommandFailuresTotal.inc({\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcommand_type: phaseName,\r\n\t\t\t\t\terror_kind: classifyRuntimeError(errorObj),\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\topencodeCommandDurationSeconds.observe(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t{ command_type: phaseName },\r\n\t\t\t\t\tdurationSec,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tthrow err;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t},\r\n\t\trunImplement: async (input: OpenCodeRunInput) => {\r\n\t\t\tconst startTime = Date.now();\r\n\t\t\tconst phaseName = input.phaseName ?? \"implement\";\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst result = await base.runImplement(input);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst durationSec = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\r\n\t\t\t\tconst outcome = result.status === \"success\" ? \"success\" : \"error\";\r\n\t\t\t\topencodeCommandTotal.inc({ command_type: phaseName, outcome });\r\n\t\t\t\topencodeCommandDurationSeconds.observe(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t{ command_type: phaseName },\r\n\t\t\t\t\tdurationSec,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tif (outcome === \"error\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst err = new Error(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tresult.blockedReason ?? result.summary ?? \"implementation failed\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t\topencodeCommandFailuresTotal.inc({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcommand_type: phaseName,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\terror_kind: classifyRuntimeError(err),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\treturn result;\r\n\t\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst durationSec = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\r\n\t\t\t\tconst errorObj = err instanceof Error ? err : new Error(String(err));\r\n\t\t\t\topencodeCommandTotal.inc({ command_type: phaseName, outcome: \"error\" });\r\n\t\t\t\topencodeCommandFailuresTotal.inc({\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcommand_type: phaseName,\r\n\t\t\t\t\terror_kind: classifyRuntimeError(errorObj),\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\topencodeCommandDurationSeconds.observe(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t{ command_type: phaseName },\r\n\t\t\t\t\tdurationSec,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tthrow err;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t},\r\n\t};\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Safe GitHub Sync (never crashes the orchestrator)\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n/** Wraps a sync operation so failures are logged but never block the run */\r\nasync function safeSync(\r\n\t_syncService: GitHubStatusSyncService,\r\n\toperation: () => Promise<GitHubStatusSyncResult>,\r\n\trunId: string,\r\n\tcontext: Phase,\r\n): Promise<GitHubStatusSyncResult | null> {\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst result = await operation();\r\n\t\tif (result.status === \"failed\") {\r\n\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\trunId,\r\n\t\t\t\tphase: context,\r\n\t\t\t\tlevel: \"WARN\",\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: `GitHub sync failed: ${result.reason ?? \"unknown\"}`,\r\n\t\t\t\tpayload: null,\r\n\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\treturn result;\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\trunId,\r\n\t\t\tphase: context,\r\n\t\t\tlevel: \"ERROR\",\r\n\t\t\tmessage: `GitHub sync error: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`,\r\n\t\t\tpayload: null,\r\n\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\treturn null;\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Orchestrator\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nasync function executePhase(\r\n\trun: RunState,\r\n\trepository: RepositoryConfig,\r\n\tworkspace: GitWorkspaceAdapter,\r\n\tspeckit: SpecKitAdapter,\r\n\topencode: OpenCodeAdapter,\r\n\tgithub: GitHubAdapter,\r\n\tsyncService?: GitHubStatusSyncService,\r\n): Promise<RunState> {\r\n\tconst current = run;\r\n\tlet result;\r\n\r\n\tswitch (current.phase) {\r\n\t\tcase \"QUEUED\":\r\n\t\t\tresult = transition(current, \"CLAIMED\", \"Issue claimed\", \"INFO\");\r\n\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\tcase \"CLAIMED\":\r\n\t\t\t// Sync: Run Accepted ÔåÆ GitHub comment + labels\r\n\t\t\tif (syncService) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst syncInput: GitHubStatusSyncInput = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\towner: repository.owner,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepo: repository.repo,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: current.issueNumber,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: \"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbranchName: current.branch ?? undefined,\r\n\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\tawait safeSync(\r\n\t\t\t\t\tsyncService,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t() => syncService.syncRunAccepted(syncInput),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrent.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\tresult = transition(current, \"REPO_SYNC\", \"Repo synced\", \"INFO\");\r\n\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\tcase \"REPO_SYNC\":\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst workspaceRepository = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\towner: repository.owner,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepo: repository.repo,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tremoteUrl:\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepository.remoteUrl ??\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbuildRemoteUrl(repository.owner, repository.repo),\r\n\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\tconst ws = await workspace.prepareWorkspace({\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepository: workspaceRepository,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: current.issueNumber,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tissueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbaseBranch: repository.defaultBranch,\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\tcurrent.branch = ws.branchName;\r\n\t\t\t\tcurrent.workspacePath = ws.workspacePath;\r\n\t\t\t\tresult = transition(\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrent,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ISSUE_CONTEXT\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t`Workspace: ${ws.workspacePath}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\t\tresult = markFailed(\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrent,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t`Repo sync failed: ${String(err)}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\tcase \"ISSUE_CONTEXT\":\r\n\t\t\tresult = transition(current, \"WEB_RESEARCH\", \"Research phase\", \"INFO\");\r\n\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\tcase \"WEB_RESEARCH\": {\r\n\t\t\tconst researchDoc = await generateResearchDocument(\r\n\t\t\t\tgithub,\r\n\t\t\t\trepository,\r\n\t\t\t\tcurrent.issueNumber,\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\tsaveArtifact(current.id, \"research\", researchDoc);\r\n\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\tphase: \"WEB_RESEARCH\",\r\n\t\t\t\tlevel: \"INFO\",\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: `Research document generated (${researchDoc.length} chars)`,\r\n\t\t\t\tpayload: { artifactKind: \"research\", size: researchDoc.length },\r\n\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\tresult = transition(\r\n\t\t\t\tcurrent,\r\n\t\t\t\t\"SPECIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\t`Research: ${researchDoc.length} chars research.md generated`,\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tcase \"SPECIFY\": erfassen ÔÇö nutzt git status (erkennt neue + ge├ñnderte Dateien)\r\n\t\t\t\tlet changeSummary = \"\";\r\n\t\t\t\tlet hasChanges = false;\r\n\t\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst status = await workspace.getStatus(commitWsPath);\r\n\t\t\t\t\thasChanges = !status.isClean;\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst staged = status.staged.length;\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst unstaged = status.unstaged.length;\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst untracked = status.untracked.length;\r\n\t\t\t\t\tchangeSummary = `${staged} staged, ${unstaged} unstaged, ${untracked} untracked`;\r\n\t\t\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t/* status optional */\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tif (!hasChanges) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// Keine ├änderungen ÔÇö sauber blocken (Issue #38)\r\n\t\t\t\t\tresult = markFailed(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcurrent,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t`No changes were made during implementation ÔÇö no files changed in workspace ${commitWsPath} (${changeSummary})`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t// Commit nur bei vorhandenem Diff\r\n\t\t\t\tconst commitResult = await workspace.commit(commitWsPath, commitMsg);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t// Push nur mit Allow-Flag\r\n\t\t\t\tlet pushResult = \"\";\r\n\t\t\t\tif (pushAllowed) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tawait workspace.push({ workspacePath: commitWsPath, branch });\r\n\t\t\t\t\tpushResult = \", pushed\";\r\n\t\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tpushResult = \", push skipped (POSITRON_ENABLE_PUSH not set)\";\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tconst summary = `Committed: ${commitResult.sha.slice(0, 7)}${pushResult} (${changeSummary})`;\r\n\t\t\t\tresult = transition(current, \"PR_CREATE\", summary, \"INFO\");\r\n\t\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: \"COMMIT\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"ERROR\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\tmessage: `Commit/Push failed: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tpayload: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\tresult = transition(\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrent,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"PR_CREATE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t`Commit skipped: ${String(err).slice(0, 100)}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"WARN\",\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tcase \"PR_CREATE\": {\r\n\t\t\tconst branch =\r\n\t\t\t\tcurrent.branch ??\r\n\t\t\t\tgenerateBranchName(\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrent.issueNumber,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t`run-${current.id.slice(0, 8)}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\tconst evidence = buildEvidence(current);\r\n\t\t\tconst body = renderPRBody(current, repository, evidence, branch);\r\n\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst pr = await github.createPullRequest({\r\n\t\t\t\t\towner: repository.owner,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepo: \"MERGE\": {\r\n\t\t\t// --- Safety Gates (Issue #21 + #41) ---\r\n\t\t\tconst mergeAllowed = process.env.POSITRON_ENABLE_MERGE === \"true\";\r\n\t\t\tconst mergeDryRun = =\r\n\t\t\t\tnull;\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst prs = await github.listPullRequests({\r\n\t\t\t\t\towner: repository.owner,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepo: repository.repo,\r\n\t\t\t\t\thead: {\r\n\t\t\t\tresult = transition(\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrent,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"Merge skipped (no open PR ---\r\n\t\t\tif (mergeDryRun) {\r\n\t\t\t\t// Fetch PR details with polling for conclusive mergeability (Issue #42)\r\n\t\t\t\tlet mergeableState = \"checking\";\r\n\t\t\t\tconst maxMergeableRetries = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmergeableState = \"conflict\";\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// null/undefined: still computing ÔÇö retry after delay\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (retry < Evaluate ALL gates (no short-circuit in dry-run)\r\n\t\t\t\tconst allGates: Array<{\r\n\t\t\t\t\tgate: string;\r\n\t\t\t\t\tpassed: boolean;\r\n\t\t\t\t\tdetail: string;\r\n\t\t\t\t}> = ${mergeableState}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t];\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tconst allPassed = allGates.every((g) => g.passed);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst decision = allPassed ? \"WOULD_MERGE\" : \"WOULD_BLOCK\";\r\n\t\t\t\tconst blockedGates = allGates.filter((g) => !g.passed);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t// Structured event for Dashboard\r\n\t\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\t\tid: gate-by-gate results\r\n\t\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst gateList = allGates\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t.map(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(g) => `- ${g.passed ? \"Ô£à\" : \"ÔØî\"} **${g.gate}:** ${g.detail}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t.join(\"\\n\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\tawait github.createIssueComment(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\towner: repository.owner,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trepo:
