},\r\n): Promise<RunState> {\r\n\tlet current = run;\r\n\tconst maxSteps = 20;\r\n\tlet attempt = 0;\r\n\r\n\t// Resume-by-State: Phase ├╝berspringen bis zur Ziel-Phase (Aufgabe 5)\r\n\tif (options?.startFromPhase && options.startFromPhase !== run.phase) {\r\n\t\tconst skipEvent = {\r\n\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\trunId: run.id,\r\n\t\t\tphase: run.phase,\r\n\t\t\tlevel: \"GATE\" as EventLevel,\r\n\t\t\tmessage: `Resume: skipping to phase ${options.startFromPhase}`,\r\n\t\t\tpayload: { resumeFrom: run.phase, resumeTo: options.startFromPhase },\r\n\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t};\r\n\t\tstoreEvent(skipEvent);\r\n\t\tcurrent = {\r\n\t\t\t...run,\r\n\t\t\tphase: options.startFromPhase,\r\n\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t};\r\n\t\tsaveRunToDb(current);\r\n\t}\r\n\t// Configurable max retries: env var overrides constant (Issue #31)\r\n\tconst envMaxRetries = process.env.POSITRON_MAX_FIX_LOOPS\r\n\t\t? Number.parseInt(process.env.POSITRON_MAX_FIX_LOOPS, 10)\r\n\t\t: undefined;\r\n\tconst maxAttempts =\r\n\t\tenvMaxRetries && !Number.isNaN(envMaxRetries) ? envMaxRetries : MAX_FIX_LOOPS;\r\n\tconst fixLoopEnabled = process.env.POSITRON_ENABLE_FIX_LOOP === \"true\";\r\n\tlet lastRetryTime = 0;\r\n\r\n\tfor (let i = 0; i < maxSteps; i++) {\r\n\t\t// Check control signals before each phase (Issue #30)\r\n\t\tconst signalCheck = checkRunSignal(current.id, current.phase);\r\n\t\tif (signalCheck?.toLowerCase() === \"abort\") {\r\n\t\t\t// Unify abort ÔåÆ cancelled (Issue #66) ÔÇö both cancel endpoint and control/abort now\r\n\t\t\t// result in 'cancelled' status. Previously this was FAILED_BLOCKED.\r\n\t\t\tconst cancelledRun = {\r\n\t\t\t\t...current,\r\n\t\t\t\tstatus: \"cancelled\" as RunStatus,\r\n\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\tphase: current.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\tlevel: \"HUMAN\" as EventLevel,\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: \"Run aborted by user\",\r\n\t\t\t\tpayload: { action: \"abort\", previousPhase: current.phase },\r\n\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\tsaveRunToDb(cancelledRun as RunState);\r\n\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(current.id, \"run-cancelled\", {\r\n\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\tphase: current.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\tstatus: \"cancelled\",\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: \"Run aborted by user\",\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\treturn cancelledRun as RunState;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tif (signalCheck?.toLowerCase() === \"paused\") {\r\n\t\t\t// Wait for resume or abort\r\n\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\tphase: current.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\tlevel: \"GATE\" as EventLevel,\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: \"Run paused by user ÔÇö waiting for resume or abort\",\r\n\t\t\t\tpayload: null,\r\n\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(current.id, \"run-control\", { action: \"paused\" });\r\n\t\t\twhile (true) {\r\n\t\t\t\tawait new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 500));\r\n\t\t\t\tconst s = checkRunSignal(current.id, current.phase);\r\n\t\t\t\tif (s?.toLowerCase() === \"abort\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// Unify abort ÔåÆ cancelled (Issue #66)\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst cancelledRun = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t...current,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"cancelled\" as RunStatus,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: current.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"HUMAN\" as EventLevel,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: \"Run aborted while paused\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tpayload: { action: \"abort\", previousPhase: current.phase },\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t\tsaveRunToDb(cancelledRun as RunState);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// ÔöÇÔöÇ Metrics: run cancelled ÔöÇÔöÇ\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcancellationsTotal.inc({ cancel_source: \"user\" });\r\n\t\t\t\t\tactiveRuns.dec();\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(current.id, \"run-cancelled\", {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: current.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"cancelled\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: \"Run aborted while paused\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t\treturn cancelledRun as RunState;\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\tif (s?.toLowerCase() === \"proceed\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: current.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"GATE\" as EventLevel,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: \"Run resumed by user\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tpayload: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(current.id, \"run-control\", { action: \"resumed\" });\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tif (signalCheck?.toLowerCase() === \"resume\") {\r\n\t\t\t// Resume-by-State (Aufgabe 5): Phase ├╝berspringen zur Ziel-Phase\r\n\t\t\tconst targetPhase = getResumePhaseTarget(current.id);\r\n\t\t\tif (targetPhase) {\r\n\t\t\t\tclearRunSignal(current.id, \"RESUME\");\r\n\t\t\t\tcurrent = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t...current,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: targetPhase as import(\"@positron/shared\").Phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\tsaveRunToDb(current);\r\n\t\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunId: current.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: current.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"GATE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\tmessage: `Resumed to phase: ${targetPhase}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tpayload: { targetPhase },\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(current.id, \"run-update\", {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: current.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstatus: current.status,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbranch: current.branch,\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tif (signalCheck?.toLowerCase() === \"retry\") {\r\n\t\t\t// Manual retry from FAILED_TRANSIENT\r\n\t\t\tconst retryResult = retry(current);\r\n\t\t\tif (retryResult.ok) {\r\n\t\t\t\tstoreEvent(retryResult.event);\r\n\t\t\t\tsaveRunToDb(retryResult.run);\r\n\t\t\t\tcurrent = retryResult.run;\r\n\t\t\t\tattempt = current.attempt;\r\n\t\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(current.id, \"run-update\", {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: current.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstatus: current.status,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbranch: current.branch,\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\tconst next = await executePhase(\r\n\t\t\tcurrent,\r\n\t\t\trepository,\r\n\t\t\tworkspace,\r\n\t\t\tspeckit,\r\n\t\t\topencode,\r\n\t\t\tgithub,\r\n\t\t\tsyncService,\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t\tif (\r\n\t\t\tnext.phase === current.phase ||\r\n\t\t\tnext.phase === \"DONE\" ||\r\n\t\t\tnext.phase.startsWith(\"FAILED\")\r\n\t\t) {\r\n\t\t\t// --- Fix-Loop (Issue #31 ÔÇö enhanced) ---\r\n\t\t\tif (\r\n\t\t\t\tfixLoopEnabled &&\r\n\t\t\t\tnext.phase === \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" &&\r\n\t\t\t\tattempt < maxAttempts\r\n\t\t\t) {\r\n\t\t\t\tattempt++;\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t// Find the original failed phase from event payload (stored by markFailed)\r\n\t\t\t\tconst allTransient = getEvents(next.id).filter(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t(e: RunEventData) => e.phase === \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst transientEvent = allTransient[allTransient.length - 1];\r\n\t\t\t\tconst failedPhase = (\r\n\t\t\t\t\ttransientEvent?.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null\r\n\t\t\t\t)?.failedPhase as string | undefined;\r\n\t\t\t\tconst retryFromPhase =\r\n\t\t\t\t\tfailedPhase && failedPhase !== \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\"\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t? failedPhase\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t: \"TEST\";\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t// Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s... max 30s\r\n\t\t\t\tconst backoffMs = Math.min(1000 * 2 ** (attempt - 1), 30000);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst now = Date.now();\r\n\t\t\t\tconst timeSinceLastRetry = now - lastRetryTime;\r\n\t\t\t\tif (timeSinceLastRetry < backoffMs) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tawait new Promise((r) =>\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsetTimeout(r, backoffMs - timeSinceLastRetry),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\tlastRetryTime = Date.now();\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunId: next.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: retryFromPhase as Phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"WARN\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\tmessage: `Fix-Loop retry ${attempt}/${maxAttempts} ÔÇö phase: ${retryFromPhase}, backoff: ${backoffMs}ms`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tpayload: { attempt, maxAttempts, retryFromPhase, backoffMs },\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t// ÔöÇÔöÇ Metrics: retry attempt ÔöÇÔöÇ\r\n\t\t\t\tretriesTotal.inc({ attempt: String(attempt) });\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t// Manually set run state (transition validation rejects FAILED_TRANSIENT ÔåÆ *)\r\n\t\t\t\tcurrent = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t...next,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: retryFromPhase as Phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\tattempt,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(current.id, \"run-update\", {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: current.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstatus: current.status,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbranch: current.branch,\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t// Sync terminal state\r\n\t\t\tif (syncService) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst syncInput: GitHubStatusSyncInput = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunId: next.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\towner: repository.owner,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepo: repository.repo,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: next.issueNumber,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: next.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstatus: next.phase === \"DONE\" ? \"done\" : \"failed\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbranchName: next.branch ?? undefined,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tevidence: buildEvidence(next),\r\n\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\tif (next.phase === \"DONE\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tawait safeSync(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsyncService,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t() => syncService.syncDone(syncInput),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnext.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// ÔöÇÔöÇ Metrics: run completed successfully ÔöÇÔöÇ\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst startedMs = next.startedAt\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t? new Date(next.startedAt).getTime()\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t: Date.now();\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst durationSec = (Date.now() - startedMs) / 1000;\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunsTotal.inc({ status: \"done\" });\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunDurationSeconds.observe({ status: \"done\" }, durationSec);\r\n\t\t\t\t\tactiveRuns.dec();\r\n\t\t\t\t} else if (next.phase === \"FAILED_BLOCKED\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tawait safeSync(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsyncService,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t() =>\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsyncService.syncBlocked({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t...syncInput,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\terror: {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"blocked\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: \"Run blocked: max steps or policy violation\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnext.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// ÔöÇÔöÇ Metrics: run failed (blocked) ÔöÇÔöÇ\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunFailuresTotal.inc({ failure_type: \"FAILED_BLOCKED\" });\r\n\t\t\t\t\tactiveRuns.dec();\r\n\t\t\t\t} else if (next.phase.startsWith(\"FAILED\")) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tawait safeSync(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsyncService,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t() =>\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsyncService.syncFailed({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t...syncInput,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\terror: {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"failed\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: `Run failed in phase ${next.phase}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnext.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnext.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// ÔöÇÔöÇ Metrics: run failed ÔöÇÔöÇ\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunFailuresTotal.inc({ failure_type: next.phase });\r\n\t\t\t\t\tactiveRuns.dec();\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\tsaveRunToDb(next);\r\n\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(next.id, \"run-update\", {\r\n\t\t\t\tphase: next.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\tstatus: next.status,\r\n\t\t\t\tbranch: next.branch,\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\treturn next;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tcurrent = next;\r\n\t}\r\n\t// Timeout\r\n\tconst result = markFailed(current, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"Max steps exceeded\");\r\n\tstoreEvent(result.event);\r\n\t// Sync timeout\r\n\tif (syncService) {\r\n\t\tconst syncInput: GitHubStatusSyncInput = {\r\n\t\t\trunId: result.run.id,\r\n\t\t\towner: repository.owner,\r\n\t\t\trepo: repository.repo,\r\n\t\t\tissueNumber: result.run.issueNumber,\r\n\t\t\tphase: \"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\tstatus: \"blocked\",\r\n\t\t\tbranchName: result.run.branch ?? undefined,\r\n\t\t\terror: { type: \"blocked\", message: \"Max steps exceeded (timeout)\" },\r\n\t\t};\r\n\t\tawait safeSync(\r\n\t\t\tsyncService,\r\n\t\t\t() => syncService.syncBlocked(syncInput),\r\n\t\t\tresult.run.id,\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t}\r\n\tsaveRunToDb(result.run);\r\n\tbroadcastSSE(result.run.id, \"run-complete\", {\r\n\t\tphase: result.run.phase,\r\n\t\tstatus: result.run.status,\r\n\t});\r\n\treturn result.run;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Wandelt DB-Zeilen in RunState-Objekte um.\r\n */\r\nfunction mapDbRows(rows: Array<Record<string, unknown>>): RunState[] {\r\n\treturn rows.flatMap((row) => {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\treturn [\r\n\t\t\t\t{\r\n\t\t\t\t\tid: String(row.id ?? \"\"),\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepoId: String(row.repo_id ?? \"\"),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: Number(row.issue_number ?? 0),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tbranch: row.branch ? String(row.branch) : null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase: parsePhase(String(row.phase ?? \"QUEUED\")),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstatus: parseRunStatus(String(row.status ?? \"blocked\")),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: Number(row.autonomy_level ?? 1),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tattempt: Number(row.attempt ?? 0),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: String(row.started_at ?? new Date().toISOString()),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: row.finished_at ? String(row.finished_at) : null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlastError: row.last_error ? String(row.last_error) : null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: row.workspace_path ? String(row.workspace_path) : null,\r\n\t\t\t\t} satisfies RunState,\r\n\t\t\t];\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tlog.warn(\r\n\t\t\t\t`mapDbRows: Ung├╝ltiger DB-Eintrag ├╝bersprungen (ID: ${String(row.id ?? \"unknown\")}): ${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`,\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\treturn [];\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Speichert ein Artefakt (Spec, Plan, Tasks, etc.) in der Datenbank.\r\n */\r\nfunction saveArtifact(\r\n\trunId: string,\r\n\tkind: string,\r\n\tcontent: string | string[],\r\n): void {\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst contentStr = Array.isArray(content) ? content.join(\"\\n\") : content;\r\n\t\tconst artifactId = crypto.randomUUID();\r\n\t\tconst createdAt = new Date().toISOString();\r\n\t\tgetDb()\r\n\t\t\t.prepare(`\r\n      INSERT INTO artifacts (id, run_id, kind, content, created_at)\r\n      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n      ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET\r\n        content = excluded.content\r\n    `)\r\n\t\t\t.run(artifactId, runId, kind, contentStr, createdAt);\r\n\t\t// Broadcast evidence creation to SSE clients (Issue #66)\r\n\t\tbroadcastSSE(runId, \"run-evidence-created\", {\r\n\t\t\tartifactId,\r\n\t\t\tkind,\r\n\t\t\tsummary: `${kind} artifact created (${contentStr.length} chars)`,\r\n\t\t\tcreatedAt,\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tlog.error(`saveArtifact failed for ${kind} / run ${runId}`, err);\r\n\t}\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** Build evidence items from run state for sync comments */\r\nfunction buildEvidence(run: RunState): EvidenceItem[] {\r\n\tconst items: EvidenceItem[] = [\r\n\t\t{ kind: \"run-phase\", status: \"pass\", summary: `Phase: ${run.phase}` },\r\n\t];\r\n\tif (run.branch)\r\n\t\titems.push({\r\n\t\t\tkind: \"branch\",\r\n\t\t\tstatus: \"pass\",\r\n\t\t\tsummary: `Branch: ${run.branch}`,\r\n\t\t});\r\n\treturn items;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Generiert ein strukturiertes Research-Dokument (research.md) gem├ñss Blueprint ┬º10/C.\r\n *\r\n * Im Fake-Mode: Fetcht das tats├ñchliche GitHub Issue und liest README.md + docs.\r\n * Im Real-Mode (POSITRON_RESEARCH_API_KEY gesetzt): Zus├ñtzlich Brave Search API.\r\n * Fabriziert niemals Funde ÔÇö alle Inhalte stammen aus echten Quellen.\r\n */\r\nasync function generateResearchDocument(\r\n\tgithub: GitHubAdapter,\r\n\trepository: RepositoryConfig,\r\n\tissueNumber: number,\r\n): Promise<string> {\r\n\tconst repoSlug = `${repository.owner}/${repository.repo}`;\r\n\tconst issueRef = `#${issueNumber}`;\r\n\tconst now = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);\r\n\r\n\t// 1. GitHub Issue abrufen\r\n\tlet issueBody = \"\";\r\n\tlet issueTitle = \"\";\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst issue = await github.getIssue({\r\n\t\t\towner: repository.owner,\r\n\t\t\trepo: repository.repo,\r\n\t\t\tissueNumber,\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\tissueTitle = issue.title ?? \"\";\r\n\t\tissueBody = issue.body ?? \"\";\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tlog.warn(\r\n\t\t\t`generateResearchDocument: Failed to fetch issue #${issueNumber}: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`,\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 2. README.md und lokale docs lesen\r\n\tlet readmeContent = \"\";\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst readmePath = path.resolve(\r\n\t\t\t__serverDirname,\r\n\t\t\t\"..\",\r\n\t\t\t\"..\",\r\n\t\t\t\"..\",\r\n\t\t\t\"..\",\r\n\t\t\t\"README.md\",\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t\tif (fs.existsSync(readmePath)) {\r\n\t\t\treadmeContent = fs.readFileSync(readmePath, \"utf-8\").slice(0, 5000);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t} catch {\r\n\t\t/* optional */\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 3. Brave Search API (nur wenn API-Key gesetzt)\r\n\tlet searchResults = \"\";\r\n\tconst researchApiKey = process.env.POSITRON_RESEARCH_API_KEY;\r\n\tif (researchApiKey) {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst query = encodeURIComponent(\r\n\t\t\t\t`site:github.com/${repoSlug} issue #${issueNumber}`,\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\tconst response = await fetch(\r\n\t\t\t\t`https://api.search.brave.com/res/v1/web/search?q=${query}&count=5`,\r\n\t\t\t\t{\r\n\t\t\t\t\theaders: {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAccept: \"application/json\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"Accept-Encoding\": \"gzip\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"X-Subscription-Token\": researchApiKey,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\tif (response.ok) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst data = (await response.json()) as Record<string, unknown>;\r\n\t\t\t\tconst results =\r\n\t\t\t\t\t(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdata as {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tweb?: {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tresults?: Array<{\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttitle: string;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\turl: string;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdescription: string;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}>;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t\t).web?.results?.slice(0, 5) ?? [];\r\n\t\t\t\tsearchResults = results\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.map((r) => `- [${r.title}](${r.url}): ${r.description}`)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.join(\"\\n\");\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tlog.warn(\r\n\t\t\t\t`generateResearchDocument: Brave Search failed: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`,\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// 4. Dokument zusammensetzen ÔÇö nur echte Daten, keine Fabrikation\r\n\tconst lines = [\r\n\t\t`# Research Summary ÔÇö Issue ${issueRef}${issueTitle ? `: ${issueTitle}` : \"\"}`,\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t`**Repository:** ${repoSlug}`,\r\n\t\t`**Datum:** ${now}`,\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\"---\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\"## GitHub Issue\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\tissueBody ? issueBody.slice(0, 3000) : \"_Issue body could not be fetched._\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\"## Local Context\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\treadmeContent\r\n\t\t\t? `### README.md (excerpt)\\n\\n\\`\\`\\`\\n${readmeContent.slice(0, 2000)}\\n\\`\\`\\``\r\n\t\t\t: \"_README.md not available._\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t];\r\n\r\n\tif (searchResults) {\r\n\t\tlines.push(\"## Web Search Results (Brave)\", \"\", searchResults, \"\");\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tif (!issueBody && !readmeContent && !searchResults) {\r\n\t\tlines.push(\r\n\t\t\t\"## Note\",\r\n\t\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\t\"_No external data could be fetched. Research is limited to the local workspace._\",\r\n\t\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tlines.push(\r\n\t\t\"---\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t`_Research generated by Positron am ${now} f├╝r Issue ${issueRef}_`,\r\n\t);\r\n\r\n\treturn lines.join(\"\\n\");\r\n}\r\n\r\n/** Generate PR body from run evidence (Issue #17) */\r\nfunction renderPRBody(\r\n\trun: RunState,\r\n\t_repo: RepositoryConfig,\r\n\tevidence: EvidenceItem[],\r\n\tbranch: string,\r\n): string {\r\n\tconst lines: string[] = [\r\n\t\t\"## Positron Automated Changes\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t`**Run ID:** \\`${run.id}\\``,\r\n\t\t`**Issue:** #${run.issueNumber}`,\r\n\t\t`**Branch:** \\`${branch}\\``,\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\"---\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\"## Evidence\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t];\r\n\r\n\tif (evidence.length > 0) {\r\n\t\tlines.push(\"| Kind | Status | Summary |\");\r\n\t\tlines.push(\"|------|--------|---------|\");\r\n\t\tfor (const e of evidence) {\r\n\t\t\tconst emoji =\r\n\t\t\t\te.status === \"pass\"\r\n\t\t\t\t\t? \"Ô£à\"\r\n\t\t\t\t\t: e.status === \"fail\"\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t? \"ÔØî\"\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t: e.status === \"blocked\"\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t? \"­ƒÜ½\"\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t: \"ÔÅ¡\";\r\n\t\t\tlines.push(`| ${e.kind} | ${emoji} ${e.status} | ${e.summary} |`);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tlines.push(\"\");\r\n\tlines.push(\"---\");\r\n\tlines.push(\"\");\r\n\tlines.push(`Closes #${run.issueNumber}`);\r\n\tlines.push(\"\");\r\n\tlines.push(\"_Generated by [Positron](https://github.com/xxammaxx/Positron)_\");\r\n\r\n\treturn lines.join(\"\\n\");\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Generates a dynamic blueprint from a GitHub issue.\r\n * Fetches the issue body via the GitHub adapter and wraps it in\r\n * a structured blueprint document never fabricating content.\r\n */\r\nasync function generateBlueprintFromIssue(\r\n\tgithub: GitHubAdapter,\r\n\trepository: RepositoryConfig,\r\n\tissueNumber: number,\r\n): Promise<string> {\r\n\tlet issueBody = \"\";\r\n\tlet issueTitle = \"\";\r\n\ttry {\r\n\t\tconst issue = await github.getIssue({\r\n\t\t\towner: repository.owner,\r\n\t\t\trepo: repository.repo,\r\n\t\t\tissueNumber,\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t\tissueTitle = issue.title ?? `Issue #${issueNumber}`;\r\n\t\tissueBody = (issue.body ?? \"\").slice(0, 10000);\r\n\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\tlog.warn(\r\n\t\t\t`generateBlueprintFromIssue: Failed to fetch issue #${issueNumber}: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`,\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\treturn [\r\n\t\t`# Blueprint: ${issueTitle}`,\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t`**Repository:** ${repository.owner}/${repository.repo}`,\r\n\t\t`**Issue:** #${issueNumber}`,\r\n\t\t`**Generated:** ${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}`,\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\"---\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\"## Issue Description\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\tissueBody || \"_Issue body could not be fetched. Using default blueprint._\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\"---\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\"## Scope\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t\"- Validate end-to-end pipeline execution\",\r\n\t\t\"- Generate spec, plan, tasks artifacts\",\r\n\t\t\"- Run tests and produce test report\",\r\n\t\t\"\",\r\n\t\t`_Generated by Positron ÔÇö all content from GitHub Issue #${issueNumber}_`,\r\n\t].join(\"\\n\");\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Input-Validierung\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Validiert einen Run-Start-Request-Body.\r\n * @throws {Error} Wenn der Body ung├╝ltig ist.\r\n * @returns {issueNumber: number, autonomyLevel?: number} Validiertes Objekt.\r\n */\r\nfunction validateRunRequest(body: unknown): {\r\n\tissueNumber: number;\r\n\tautonomyLevel?: number;\r\n} {\r\n\tif (!body || typeof body !== \"object\") {\r\n\t\tthrow new Error(\"Request body required\");\r\n\t}\r\n\tconst raw = body as Record<string, unknown>;\r\n\r\n\t// issueNumber: positive Ganzzahl 1-999999\r\n\tif (raw.issueNumber === undefined || raw.issueNumber === null) {\r\n\t\tthrow new Error(\r\n\t\t\t\"issueNumber is required and must be a positive integer (1-999999)\",\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t}\r\n\tconst issueNumber = Number(raw.issueNumber);\r\n\tif (\r\n\t\t!Number.isInteger(issueNumber) ||\r\n\t\tissueNumber < 1 ||\r\n\t\tissueNumber > 999999\r\n\t) {\r\n\t\tthrow new Error(\"issueNumber must be a positive integer (1-999999)\");\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// autonomyLevel: optional, 0-4\r\n\tlet autonomyLevel: number | undefined;\r\n\tif (raw.autonomyLevel !== undefined && raw.autonomyLevel !== null) {\r\n\t\tautonomyLevel = Number(raw.autonomyLevel);\r\n\t\tif (\r\n\t\t\t!Number.isInteger(autonomyLevel) ||\r\n\t\t\tautonomyLevel < 0 ||\r\n\t\t\tautonomyLevel > 4\r\n\t\t) {\r\n\t\t\tthrow new Error(\"autonomyLevel must be an integer between 0 and 4\");\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\treturn { issueNumber, autonomyLevel };\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Validiert einen POST /api/repos Request-Body.\r\n * @throws {Error} Wenn der Body ung├╝ltig ist.\r\n */\r\nfunction validateRepoRegistration(body: unknown): {\r\n\towner: string;\r\n\tname: string;\r\n} {\r\n\tif (!body || typeof body !== \"object\") {\r\n\t\tthrow new Error(\"Request body required\");\r\n\t}\r\n\tconst raw = body as Record<string, unknown>;\r\n\r\n\tconst owner = String(raw.owner ?? \"\").trim();\r\n\tconst name = String(raw.name ?? \"\").trim();\r\n\r\n\tif (!owner || owner.length > 39 || !/^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$/.test(owner)) {\r\n\t\tthrow new Error(\r\n\t\t\t\"owner must be a non-empty GitHub username (max 39 chars, alphanumeric + hyphens)\",\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t}\r\n\tif (!name || name.length > 100 || !/^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$/.test(name)) {\r\n\t\tthrow new Error(\r\n\t\t\t\"name must be a non-empty repo name (max 100 chars, alphanumeric + . _ -)\",\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\treturn { owner, name };\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Secret Manager (centralized secret resolution)\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n/** Globaler SecretManager: env ÔåÆ docker secrets ÔåÆ .env file */\r\nconst secretManager = new SecretManager({\r\n\tenvFilePath: path.resolve(\r\n\t\tpath.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)),\r\n\t\t\"..\",\r\n\t\t\".env\",\r\n\t),\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// REST API\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function createApp(options: ServerOptions = {}) {\r\n\t// SQLite-Datenbank initialisieren\r\n\tdb = openDatabase(options.dbPath);\r\n\tinitSignalsDb(getDb());\r\n\tconst repository = resolveRepositoryConfig(options.repository);\r\n\tconst { adapter: github, mode: githubMode } = resolveAdapter(options.adapter);\r\n\tconst activeWorkspaceAdapter = options.workspaceAdapter ?? workspaceAdapter;\r\n\tconst activeSpecKitAdapter = resolveSpecKitAdapter(options.speckitAdapter);\r\n\tconst activeOpenCodeAdapter = resolveOpenCodeAdapter(options.opencodeAdapter);\r\n\tconst syncService = new GitHubStatusSyncService(github);\r\n\r\n\t// ÔöÇÔöÇ QA-011: Metrics-decorated OpenCode adapter ÔöÇÔöÇ\r\n\t// Wraps the adapter to record telemetry without modifying adapter code.\r\n\tconst instrumentedOpenCodeAdapter = createInstrumentedOpenCodeAdapter(\r\n\t\tactiveOpenCodeAdapter,\r\n\t);\r\n\tconst app = express();\r\n\r\n\t// ÔöÇÔöÇ QA-012: Queue Stats Collector (non-blocking, periodic) ÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇÔöÇ\r\n\t//\r\n\t// Periodically collects BullMQ queue statistics and updates Prometheus gauges.\r\n\t// Runs on an interval so /metrics doesn't hang when Redis is unavailable.\r\n\t//\r\n\t// The metrics exist REGARDLESS of Redis availability ÔÇö they report 0\r\n\t// when the queue is unreachable, so dashboards always show a valid value.\r\n\r\n\tasync function collectQueueStats(): Promise<void> {\r\n\t\t// QA-016: When POSITRON_ALERT_WORKER_DOWN_ENABLED is explicitly \"false\",\r\n\t\t// suppress the WorkerDown alert by reporting worker as UP regardless\r\n\t\t// of actual worker presence. Useful for dev/test environments without\r\n\t\t// a running worker process. In production, this should remain \"true\".\r\n\t\tconst workerDownAlertEnabled =\r\n\t\t\tprocess.env.POSITRON_ALERT_WORKER_DOWN_ENABLED !== \"false\";\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst { Queue } = await import(\"bullmq\");\r\n\t\t\tconst { PIPELINE_QUEUE, resolveRedisUrl } = await import(\r\n\t\t\t\t\"@positron/shared\"\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\tconst pipelineQueue = new Queue(PIPELINE_QUEUE, {\r\n\t\t\t\tconnection: {\r\n\t\t\t\t\turl: resolveRedisUrl(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconnectTimeout: 500,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tmaxRetriesPerRequest: null as unknown as number,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tretryStrategy: () => null,\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst counts = await pipelineQueue.getJobCounts(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"waiting\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"completed\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"failed\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"delayed\",\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tqueueJobsWaiting.set(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t{ queue: \"positron-pipeline\" },\r\n\t\t\t\t\tcounts.waiting ?? 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tqueueJobsActive.set({ queue: \"positron-pipeline\" }, counts.active ?? 0);\r\n\t\t\t\tqueueJobsCompletedTotal.inc({ queue: \"positron-pipeline\" }, 0);\r\n\t\t\t\tqueueJobsFailedTotal.inc({ queue: \"positron-pipeline\" }, 0);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tconst workers = await pipelineQueue.getWorkers();\r\n\t\t\t\tqueueWorkerUp.set(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t{ queue: \"positron-pipeline\" },\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// QA-016: Suppress WorkerDown in dev mode\r\n\t\t\t\t\tworkerDownAlertEnabled ? (workers.length > 0 ? 1 : 0) : 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tqueueRedisUp.set(1);\r\n\t\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\t\tqueueRedisUp.set(0);\r\n\t\t\t\tqueueWorkerUp.set({ queue: \"positron-pipeline\" }, 0);\r\n\t\t\t\tqueueJobsActive.set({ queue: \"positron-pipeline\" }, 0);\r\n\t\t\t\tqueueJobsWaiting.set({ queue: \"positron-pipeline\" }, 0);\r\n\t\t\t} finally {\r\n\t\t\t\tawait pipelineQueue.close().catch(() => {});\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\tqueueRedisUp.set(0);\r\n\t\t\tqueueWorkerUp.set({ queue: \"positron-pipeline\" }, 0);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// Start periodic queue stats collection (every 30 seconds)\r\n\tconst queueStatsInterval = setInterval(collectQueueStats, 30_000);\r\n\tqueueStatsInterval.unref();\r\n\tapp.use(express.json());\r\n\r\n\t// GitHub Watcher starten (nur wenn POSITRON_ENABLE_WATCHER=true)\r\n\tstopWatcher = startWatcher({\r\n\t\tgithub,\r\n\t\trepository,\r\n\t\tdb: getDb(),\r\n\t\tonRunCreated: (runId, issueNumber) => {\r\n\t\t\tlog.info(`Watcher created run ${runId} for issue #${issueNumber}`);\r\n\t\t},\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// CORS ÔÇö production-sicher, dev-kompatibel\r\n\t// In Fake-Mode: Allow-Origin: * (lokale Dev-Server)\r\n\t// In Real-Mode: Allow-Origin aus POSITRON_CORS_ORIGIN (Default: http://localhost:5173)\r\n\tconst corsOrigin =\r\n\t\tprocess.env.POSITRON_CORS_ORIGIN ??\r\n\t\t(githubMode === \"fake\" ? \"*\" : \"http://localhost:5173\");\r\n\tapp.use((_req, res, next) => {\r\n\t\tres.header(\"Access-Control-Allow-Origin\", corsOrigin);\r\n\t\tres.header(\"Access-Control-Allow-Methods\", \"GET,POST,OPTIONS\");\r\n\t\tres.header(\"Access-Control-Allow-Headers\", \"Content-Type\");\r\n\t\tif (_req.method === \"OPTIONS\") {\r\n\t\t\tres.sendStatus(204);\r\n\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tnext();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// Security headers (Issue #93) ÔÇö nur in production\r\n\tif (process.env.NODE_ENV !== \"development\") {\r\n\t\tapp.use((_req, res, next) => {\r\n\t\t\tres.header(\"X-Content-Type-Options\", \"nosniff\");\r\n\t\t\tres.header(\"X-Frame-Options\", \"DENY\");\r\n\t\t\tres.header(\"X-XSS-Protection\", \"1; mode=block\");\r\n\t\t\tres.header(\"Referrer-Policy\", \"strict-origin-when-cross-origin\");\r\n\t\t\tres.header(\r\n\t\t\t\t\"Content-Security-Policy\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com; img-src 'self' data:\",\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\tnext();\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\t// Rate limiting (Issue #93) ÔÇö simple sliding window per IP\r\n\tconst rateLimitMap = new Map<string, number[]>();\r\n\tconst RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 100;\r\n\tconst RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 60_000;\r\n\t// Periodic cleanup of stale IP entries every 5 minutes\r\n\tconst rateLimitCleanup = setInterval(() => {\r\n\t\tconst cutoff = Date.now() - RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW;\r\n\t\tfor (const [ip, timestamps] of rateLimitMap) {\r\n\t\t\tconst filtered = timestamps.filter((t) => t > cutoff);\r\n\t\t\tif (filtered.length === 0) rateLimitMap.delete(ip);\r\n\t\t\telse rateLimitMap.set(ip, filtered);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t}, 300_000);\r\n\trateLimitCleanup.unref();\r\n\tapp.use((req, res, next) => {\r\n\t\t// QA-031: Bypass rate limiting in test environment (E2E tests trigger 100+ requests)\r\n\t\tif (process.env.VITEST === \"true\") {\r\n\t\t\tnext();\r\n\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\t// Exempt SSE streams (per-run and dashboard) from rate limiting\r\n\t\tif (req.path === \"/api/stream\" || req.path.endsWith(\"/events/stream\")) {\r\n\t\t\tnext();\r\n\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tconst ip = req.ip ?? \"unknown\";\r\n\t\tconst now = Date.now();\r\n\t\tconst window = rateLimitMap.get(ip) ?? [];\r\n\t\twhile (window.length > 0 && (window[0] ?? 0) < now - RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW)\r\n\t\t\twindow.shift();\r\n\t\tif (window.length >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(429).json({ error: \"Too many requests\", retryAfter: 60 });\r\n\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\twindow.push(now);\r\n\t\trateLimitMap.set(ip, window);\r\n\t\tnext();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// Repository registrieren\r\n\tapp.post(\"/api/repos\", (req, res) => {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tvalidateRepoRegistration(req.body ?? {});\r\n\t\t\tconst repoId = `${repository.owner}/${repository.repo}`;\r\n\t\t\t// In DB speichern falls noch nicht vorhanden\r\n\t\t\tconst existing = getDb()\r\n\t\t\t\t.prepare(\"SELECT id FROM repositories WHERE id = ?\")\r\n\t\t\t\t.get(repoId) as { id: string } | undefined;\r\n\t\t\tif (!existing) {\r\n\t\t\t\tgetDb()\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.prepare(`\r\n          INSERT OR IGNORE INTO repositories (id, owner, name, url, default_branch, enabled)\r\n          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1)\r\n        `)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.run(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepository.owner,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepository.repo,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t`https://github.com/${repository.owner}/${repository.repo}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepository.defaultBranch,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\tres.json({ id: repoId, status: \"registered\", mode: githubMode });\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(400).json({\r\n\t\t\t\terror: \"VALIDATION_ERROR\",\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Invalid request\",\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// Repository-Liste abrufen\r\n\tapp.get(\"/api/repos\", (_req, res) => {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst repos = getDb()\r\n\t\t\t\t.prepare(`\r\n        SELECT id, owner, name, url, local_path as localPath, default_branch as defaultBranch, enabled, created_at as createdAt\r\n        FROM repositories\r\n        ORDER BY created_at DESC\r\n      `)\r\n\t\t\t\t.all();\r\n\t\t\tres.json({ repos, total: (repos as Array<unknown>).length });\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(500).json({ error: \"Datenbankfehler\", details: String(err) });\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// Issues abrufen (echt via Adapter)\r\n\tapp.get(\"/api/repos/:id/issues\", async (_req, _res, next) => {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst issues = await github.listOpenIssues(\r\n\t\t\t\trepository.owner,\r\n\t\t\t\trepository.repo,\r\n\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t_res.json({ issues });\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tnext(err);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// GET /api/repos/:owner/:repo/issues/:issueNumber/blueprint ÔÇö Dynamic Blueprint\r\n\tapp.get(\r\n\t\t\"/api/repos/:owner/:repo/issues/:issueNumber/blueprint\",\r\n\t\tasync (req, res) => {\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst issueNumber = Number.parseInt(req.params.issueNumber, 10);\r\n\t\t\t\tif (Number.isNaN(issueNumber) || issueNumber < 1) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tres\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t.status(400)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t.json({ error: \"issueNumber must be a positive integer\" });\r\n\t\t\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\tconst repo = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\towner: req.params.owner,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepo: req.params.repo,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tdefaultBranch: \"main\",\r\n\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\tconst blueprint = await generateBlueprintFromIssue(\r\n\t\t\t\t\tgithub,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepo,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\tblueprint,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepo: `${repo.owner}/${repo.repo}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\t\tres.status(500).json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\terror: \"Failed to generate blueprint\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\tdetails: String(err),\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t},\r\n\t);\r\n\r\n\t// POST /api/runs ÔÇö Start a run from a GitHub issue URL\r\n\tapp.post(\"/api/runs\", async (req, res) => {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst { issueUrl } = (req.body as { issueUrl?: string }) ?? {};\r\n\t\t\tif (!issueUrl || typeof issueUrl !== \"string\") {\r\n\t\t\t\tres.status(400).json({ error: \"issueUrl (string) is required\" });\r\n\t\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t// Parse GitHub URL: https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/123\r\n\t\t\tconst match = 2);\r\n\t\t\tsaveRunToDb(run);\r\n\r\n\t\t\tlet queued = false;\r\n\t\t\tlet pipelineQueue: import(\"bullmq\").Queue | null = null;\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst { Queue } = await import(\"bullmq\");\r\n\t\t\t\tconst { PIPELINE_QUEUE, resolveRedisUrl } = await import(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"@positron/shared\"\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tconst redisUrl = resolveRedisUrl();\r\n\t\t\t\tpipelineQueue = new Queue(PIPELINE_QUEUE, {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconnection: {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\turl: redisUrl,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconnectTimeout: 500,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tretryStrategy: () => null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t// Check if at least one worker is listening before enqueuing.\r\n\t\t\t\t// If no workers are available, the run would never execute ÔÇö fall back to inline.\r\n\t\t\t\tconst workers = await pipelineQueue.getWorkers();\r\n\t\t\t\tif (workers.length === 0) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tthrow new Error(\"NO_WORKERS\");\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t// Use run.id as deterministic jobId to prevent double-execution on retry\r\n\t\t\t\tconst job = await pipelineQueue.add(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"pipeline\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t{\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trunId: run.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: repository.repo,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: issueNumber ?? run.issueNumber,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: autonomyLevel ?? run.autonomyLevel ?? 2,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t\t{ jobId: run.id },\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tqueued = true;\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tres.json({ run, runId: run.id, jobId: job.id, message: \"Run queued\" });\r\n\t\t\t} catch (_queueErr: unknown) {\r\n\t\t\t\tif (!queued) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// Queue completely unavailable ÔÇö fall back to inline execution\r\n\t\t\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trun,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trunId: run.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: \"Run started (inline)\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunFullPipeline(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trun,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepository,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tactiveWorkspaceAdapter,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tactiveSpecKitAdapter,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tinstrumentedOpenCodeAdapter,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tgithub,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsyncService,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t.then((finalRun) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsaveRunToDb(finalRun);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(finalRun.id, \"run-update\", {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: finalRun.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: finalRun.status,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: finalRun.branch,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t})\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t.catch((err) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\trunId: run.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: \"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"ERROR\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: `Run failed: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tpayload: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t// If close() threw but job was queued, the job is still in Redis ÔÇö no fallback needed\r\n\t\t\t} finally {\r\n\t\t\t\tawait pipelineQueue?.close().catch(() => {});\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(400).json({\r\n\t\t\t\terror: \"VALIDATION_ERROR\",\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Invalid request\",\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// Run starten\r\n\tapp.post(\"/api/repos/:repoId/runs\", async (req, res) => {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst { issueNumber, autonomyLevel } = validateRunRequest(req.body);\r\n\t\t\tconst run = createRun(repository.repo, issueNumber, autonomyLevel ?? 2);\r\n\t\t\tsaveRunToDb(run); // Sofort persistieren ÔÇö sichtbar noch w├ñhrend Pipeline l├ñuft\r\n\t\t\trunsTotal.inc({ status: \"active\" });\r\n\t\t\tactiveRuns.inc();\r\n\r\n\t\t\t// QA-029: POSITRON_DISABLE_QUEUE=true forces inline execution for tests\r\n\t\t\t// even when Redis and workers are available.\r\n\t\t\tconst disableQueue = process.env.POSITRON_DISABLE_QUEUE === \"true\";\r\n\r\n\t\t\tlet queued = false;\r\n\t\t\tlet pipelineQueue: import(\"bullmq\").Queue | null = null;\r\n\t\t\tif (!disableQueue) {\r\n\t\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst { Queue } = await import(\"bullmq\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst { PIPELINE_QUEUE, resolveRedisUrl } = await import(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"@positron/shared\"\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst redisUrl = resolveRedisUrl();\r\n\t\t\t\t\tpipelineQueue = new Queue(PIPELINE_QUEUE, {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconnection: {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\turl: redisUrl,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconnectTimeout: 500,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tretryStrategy: () => null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// Check if at least one worker is listening before enqueuing.\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// If no workers are available, the run would never execute ÔÇö fall back to inline.\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst workers = await pipelineQueue.getWorkers();\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (workers.length === 0) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthrow new Error(\"NO_WORKERS\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// Use run.id as deterministic jobId to prevent double-execution on retry\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst job = await pipelineQueue.add(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"pipeline\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trunId: run.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: repository.repo,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: autonomyLevel ?? 2,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{ jobId: run.id },\r\n\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t\tqueued = true;\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trun,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trunId: run.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tjobId: job.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: \"Run queued\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t} catch (_queueErr: unknown) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (!queued) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// Queue completely unavailable ÔÇö fall back to inline execution\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst completed = await runFullPipeline(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trun,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trepository,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tactiveWorkspaceAdapter,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tactiveSpecKitAdapter,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tinstrumentedOpenCodeAdapter,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tgithub,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsyncService,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst evts = getEvents(completed.id);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trun: completed,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trunId: completed.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tevents: evts,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\teventCount: evts.length,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// If close() threw but job was queued, the job is still in Redis ÔÇö no fallback needed\r\n\t\t\t\t} finally {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tawait pipelineQueue?.close().catch(() => {});\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t// If queue is disabled, run inline directly\r\n\t\t\tif (disableQueue) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst completed = await runFullPipeline(\r\n\t\t\t\t\trun,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepository,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tactiveWorkspaceAdapter,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tactiveSpecKitAdapter,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tinstrumentedOpenCodeAdapter,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tgithub,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tsyncService,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst evts = getEvents(completed.id);\r\n\t\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\trun: completed,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunId: completed.id,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tevents: evts,\r\n\t\t\t\t\teventCount: evts.length,\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(400).json({\r\n\t\t\t\terror: \"VALIDATION_ERROR\",\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Invalid request\",\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// Runs auflisten (mit Pagination)\r\n\tapp.get(\"/api/runs\", (req, res) => {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst page = Math.max(1, Number.parseInt(req.query.page as string) || 1);\r\n\t\t\tconst limit = Math.min(100, Number.parseInt(req.query.limit as string) || 20);\r\n\t\t\tconst repoId = req.query.repoId as string | undefined;\r\n\t\t\tconst offset = (page - 1) * limit;\r\n\r\n\t\t\tconst database = getDb();\r\n\r\n\t\t\tif (repoId) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst runs = database\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.prepare(`\r\n          SELECT * FROM runs WHERE repo_id = ? ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?\r\n        `)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.all(repoId, limit, offset);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst total = (\r\n\t\t\t\t\tdatabase\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM runs WHERE repo_id = ?\")\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t.get(repoId) as { c: number }\r\n\t\t\t\t).c;\r\n\t\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\truns: mapDbRows(runs as Array<Record<string, unknown>>),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tpagination: { page, limit, total, pages: Math.ceil(total / limit) },\r\n\t\t\t\t\ttotal,\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst runs = database\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.prepare(`\r\n          SELECT * FROM runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?\r\n        `)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.all(limit, offset);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst total = (\r\n\t\t\t\t\tdatabase.prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM runs\").get() as {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tc: number;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t).c;\r\n\t\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\truns: mapDbRows(runs as Array<Record<string, unknown>>),\r\n\t\t\t\t\tpagination: { page, limit, total, pages: Math.ceil(total / limit) },\r\n\t\t\t\t\ttotal,\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(500).json({ error: \"Datenbankfehler\", details: String(err) });\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// Run-Details\r\n\tapp.get(\"/api/runs/:id\", (req, res) => {\r\n\t\tconst run = loadRunFromDb(req.params.id);\r\n\t\tif (!run) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(404).json({ error: \"Not found\" });\r\n\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\tres.json({ run, events: getEvents(run.id) });\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// Test Report ÔÇö aggregated test data from run_events (phase='TEST')\r\n\t// Required by Operator Cockpit (Issue #68)\r\n\tapp.get(\"/api/runs/:id/test-report\", (req, res) => {\r\n\t\tconst run = loadRunFromDb(req.params.id);\r\n\t\tif (!run) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(404).json({ error: \"Not found\" });\r\n\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst database = getDb();\r\n\t\t\tconst rows = database\r\n\t\t\t\t.prepare(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\"SELECT id, run_id, phase, level, message, payload_json, created_at FROM run_events WHERE run_id = ? AND phase = 'TEST' ORDER BY created_at ASC\",\r\n\t\t\t\t)\r\n\t\t\t\t.all(req.params.id) as Array<{\r\n\t\t\t\tid: string;\r\n\t\t\t\trun_id: string;\r\n\t\t\t\tphase: string;\r\n\t\t\t\tlevel: string;\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: string;\r\n\t\t\t\tpayload_json: string;\r\n\t\t\t\tcreated_at: string;\r\n\t\t\t}>;\r\n\t\t\tconst testEvents = rows.map((row) => ({\r\n\t\t\t\tid: row.id,\r\n\t\t\t\trunId: row.run_id,\r\n\t\t\t\tlevel: row.level as EventLevel,\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: row.message,\r\n\t\t\t\tpayload: safeJsonParse(row.payload_json),\r\n\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: row.created_at,\r\n\t\t\t}));\r\n\t\t\tconst passed = testEvents.filter((e) => e.level === \"INFO\").length;\r\n\t\t\tconst warnings = testEvents.filter((e) => e.level === \"WARN\").length;\r\n\t\t\tconst errors = testEvents.filter((e) => e.level === \"ERROR\").length;\r\n\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\trunId: req.params.id,\r\n\t\t\t\tsummary: {\r\n\t\t\t\t\ttotal: testEvents.length,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tpassed,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tfailed: errors,\r\n\t\t\t\t\terrors,\r\n\t\t\t\t\twarnings,\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\ttestEvents,\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(500).json({ error: \"Database error\", details: String(err) });\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// SSE Event Stream (Issue #29)\r\n\tapp.get(\"/api/runs/:id/events/stream\", (req, res) => {\r\n\t\tconst runId = req.params.id;\r\n\t\tconst run = loadRunFromDb(runId);\r\n\t\tif (!run) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(404).json({ error: \"Not found\" });\r\n\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t// SSE headers\r\n\t\tres.writeHead(200, {\r\n\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"text/event-stream\",\r\n\t\t\t\"Cache-Control\": \"no-cache\",\r\n\t\t\tConnection: \"keep-alive\",\r\n\t\t\t\"X-Accel-Buffering\": \"no\",\r\n\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\t// Check for W3C Last-Event-ID reconnection support (Issue #66)\r\n\t\tconst lastEventId = req.headers[\"last-event-id\"];\r\n\t\tconst lastSeq = lastEventId ? Number.parseInt(String(lastEventId), 10) : 0;\r\n\r\n\t\t// Get all events and filter by Last-Event-ID if reconnecting\r\n\t\tconst allEvents = getEvents(runId);\r\n\t\tconst resendFromIdx =\r\n\t\t\tlastSeq > 0 ? allEvents.findIndex((_, i) => i + 1 > lastSeq) : 0;\r\n\t\tconst _resendEvents =\r\n\t\t\tresendFromIdx > 0 ? allEvents.slice(resendFromIdx) : allEvents;\r\n\r\n\t\t// Send initial state with sequence numbers (Issue #66)\r\n\t\tconst eventsWithSequence = allEvents.map((e, idx) => ({\r\n\t\t\t...e,\r\n\t\t\t_sequence: idx + 1,\r\n\t\t}));\r\n\t\tconst initialState = {\r\n\t\t\trun,\r\n\t\t\tevents:\r\n\t\t\t\tresendFromIdx > 0\r\n\t\t\t\t\t? eventsWithSequence.slice(resendFromIdx)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t: eventsWithSequence,\r\n\t\t\treconnected: lastSeq > 0,\r\n\t\t};\r\n\t\tres.write(\r\n\t\t\t`id: ${allEvents.length}\\nevent: initial\\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(initialState)}\\n\\n`,\r\n\t\t);\r\n\r\n\t\t// Prime sequence counter to continue from existing events\r\n\t\tprimeEventSequence(runId, allEvents.length);\r\n\r\n\t\t// Register for live updates\r\n\t\taddSSEClient(runId, res);\r\n\r\n\t\t// Keep alive ÔÇö emit as comment for browsers that support it\r\n\t\tconst keepAlive = setInterval(() => {\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\t// Send heartbeat as an SSE event so it also gets header-based keepalive\r\n\t\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(runId, \"heartbeat\", {\r\n\t\t\t\t\ttimestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\ttype: \"keepalive\",\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t// Also emit raw comment for compatibility\r\n\t\t\t\tres.write(\":keepalive\\n\\n\");\r\n\t\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\t\tclearInterval(keepAlive);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}, 15000);\r\n\r\n\t\t// Cleanup on disconnect\r\n\t\treq.on(\"close\", () => {\r\n\t\t\tclearInterval(keepAlive);\r\n\t\t\tremoveSSEClient(runId, res);\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// Dashboard SSE ÔÇö global stream for dashboard real-time updates (Issue #84)\r\n\tconst dashboardClients = new Set<import(\"express\").Response>();\r\n\tapp.get(\"/api/stream\", (req, res) => {\r\n\t\tres.writeHead(200, {\r\n\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"text/event-stream\",\r\n\t\t\t\"Cache-Control\": \"no-cache\",\r\n\t\t\tConnection: \"keep-alive\",\r\n\t\t\t\"X-Accel-Buffering\": \"no\",\r\n\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\tdashboardClients.add(res);\r\n\r\n\t\t// Send initial metrics\r\n\t\tconst initial = {\r\n\t\t\tmetrics: getDashboardMetrics(),\r\n\t\t\truns: listRunsFromDb().slice(0, 50),\r\n\t\t\tevidence: getDashboardEvidence(),\r\n\t\t};\r\n\t\tres.write(`event: initial\\ndata: ${JSON.stringify(initial)}\\n\\n`);\r\n\r\n\t\t// Periodic metrics push (every 10s)\r\n\t\tconst pushInterval = setInterval(() => {\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst metrics = getDashboardMetrics();\r\n\t\t\t\tconst runs = listRunsFromDb().slice(0, 20);\r\n\t\t\t\tres.write(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t`event: dashboard-update\\ndata: ${JSON.stringify({ metrics, runs, evidence: getDashboardEvidence() })}\\n\\n`,\r\n\t\t\t\t);\r\n\t\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\t\tclearInterval(pushInterval);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}, 10_000);\r\n\r\n\t\t// Keep alive\r\n\t\tconst kaInterval = setInterval(() => {\r\n\t\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\t\tres.write(\":keepalive\\n\\n\");\r\n\t\t\t} catch {\r\n\t\t\t\tclearInterval(kaInterval);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}, 15_000);\r\n\r\n\t\treq.on(\"close\", () => {\r\n\t\t\tclearInterval(pushInterval);\r\n\t\t\tclearInterval(kaInterval);\r\n\t\t\tdashboardClients.delete(res);\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// Health (Issue #22 + HealthIndicator)\r\n\tapp.get(\"/api/health\", async (_req, res) => {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst healthWsPath = process.env.POSITRON_WORKSPACE_ROOT ?? \"/tmp\";\r\n\t\t\tconst speckitHealth =\r\n\t\t\t\tawait activeSpecKitAdapter.healthCheck(healthWsPath);\r\n\t\t\tconst opencodeHealth =\r\n\t\t\t\tawait instrumentedOpenCodeAdapter.healthCheck(healthWsPath);\r\n\t\t\tconst isFakeMode = database\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.prepare(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"SELECT kind, content, created_at as createdAt FROM artifacts WHERE run_id = ? (\"pass\" as const) : (\"fail\" as const),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsummary: e.message,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttimestamp: e.createdAt,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trunPhase: e.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\tevidence: evidenceItems,\r\n\t\t\t\t\ttotal: evidenceItems.length,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunId,\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\t// Aggregated evidence across all runs\r\n\t\t\t\tconst artifactCounts = database\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.prepare(`\r\n          SELECT kind, COUNT(*) as count FROM artifacts GROUP BY kind\r\n        `)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.all() as Array<{ kind: string; count: number }>;\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tconst testEvents = database\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.prepare(`\r\n          SELECT COUNT(*) as testCount FROM run_events WHERE phase = 'TEST'\r\n        `)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.get() as { testCount: number };\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tconst errorEvents = database\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.prepare(`\r\n          SELECT COUNT(*) as errorCount FROM run_events WHERE level = 'ERROR'\r\n        `)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.get() as { errorCount: number };\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tconst warnEvents = database\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.prepare(`\r\n          SELECT COUNT(*) as warnCount FROM run_events WHERE level = 'WARN'\r\n        `)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.get() as { warnCount: number };\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\tsummary: {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttotalArtifacts: artifactCounts.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.count, 0),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tartifactBreakdown: Object.fromEntries(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tartifactCounts.map((a) => [a.kind, a.count]),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttestEvents: testEvents?.testCount ?? 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\terrorEvents: errorEvents?.errorCount ?? 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\twarningEvents: warnEvents?.warnCount ?? 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t} catch (err) {\r\n\t\t\tres.status(500).json({\r\n\t\t\t\terror: \"Evidence konnte nicht geladen werden\",\r\n\t\t\t\tdetails: String(err),\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\t// -----------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\t// Settings API ÔÇö MCP Configuration + Test Modes (Issue #65)\r\n\t// -----------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n\t// MCP Configuration (masked ÔÇö no secrets exposed)\r\n\tapp.get(\"/api/settings/mcp\", (_req, res) => {\r\n\t\ttry {\r\n\t\t\tconst configPath = path.resolve(\".opencode\", \"config.json\");\r\n\t\t\tlet mcpConfig = null;\r\n\t\t\tlet securityPolicy = null;\r\n\t\t\tlet artifactPolicy = null;\r\n\r\n\t\t\tif (fs.existsSync(configPath)) {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst raw = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(configPath, \"utf-8\"));\r\n\t\t\t\tmcpConfig = raw.mcpServers ?? fortsetzen\r\n\t\t\tconst isPaused = checkRunSignal(runId) === \"PAUSE\";\r\n\t\t\tconst isFailed =\r\n\t\t\t\trun.phase === \"FAILED_BLOCKED\" || run.phase === \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\";\r\n\r\n\t\t\tif (!isPaused && !isFailed) {\r\n\t\t\t\tres\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.status(409)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.json({ error: \"Run is not paused or failed ÔÇö cannot resume\" });\r\n\t\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t// Events aus DB laden und n├ñchste Phase berechnen\r\n\t\t\tconst events = getEvents(runId);\r\n\t\t\tconst resumeState = abgeschlossenen)\r\n\t\t\tconst ALL_PHASES_LIST: readonly Phase[] = [\r\n\t\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"REPO_SYNC\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"ISSUE_CONTEXT\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"WEB_RESEARCH\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"SPECIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"CLARIFY_OPTIONAL\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"PLAN\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"TASKS\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"ANALYZE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"REVIEW\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"VERIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"COMMIT\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"PR_CREATE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_PUSH\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"GATE_APPROVE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"GATE_REVISE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"RESUME_PENDING\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t\t];\r\n\t\t\tconst lastIdx = ALL_PHASES_LIST.indexOf(resumeState.phase);\r\n\t\t\tconst nextPhase: Phase =\r\n\t\t\t\tlastIdx >= 0 && lastIdx < ALL_PHASES_LIST.length - 1\r\n\t\t\t\t\t? (ALL_PHASES_LIST[lastIdx + 1] as Phase)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t: \"TEST\";\r\n\r\n\t\t\t// Ziel-Phase speichern und Signal setzen\r\n\t\t\tsetRunSignal(runId, \"RESUME\", nextPhase);\r\n\r\n\t\t\tstoreEvent({\r\n\t\t\t\tid: createRunId(),\r\n\t\t\t\trunId,\r\n\t\t\t\tphase: run.phase,\r\n\t\t\t\tlevel: \"HUMAN\",\r\n\t\t\t\tmessage: `Run resume: continuing from phase ${nextPhase}`,\r\n\t\t\t\tpayload: { action, resumeFromPhase: nextPhase },\r\n\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\t\tbroadcastSSE(runId, \"run-control\", {\r\n\t\t\t\taction: \"resume\",\r\n\t\t\t\tresumeFromPhase: nextPhase,\r\n\t\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\t\tres.json({ ok: true, action, runId, resumeFromPhase: nextPhase });\r\n\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\t\tif (action === \"retry\" && run.phase !== \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\") {\r\n\t\t\t\tres\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.status(409)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.json({ error: \"Can only retry a FAILED_TRANSIENT run\" });\r\n\t\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\tif (action === \"retry\" && run.attempt >= MAX_FIX_LOOPS) {\r\n\t\t\t\tres\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.status(409)\r\n\t\t\t\t\t.json({ error: `Max retries (${MAX_FIX_LOOPS}) reached` });\r\n\t\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t// For abort: unify with cancel endpoint ÔÇö update DB + store event + broadcast (Issue #66)\r\n\t\t\tif (action === \"abort\") {\r\n\t\t\t\tif (run.status === \"cancelled\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tres.json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tok: true,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trunId,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: \"Run already cancelled\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"cancelled\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t});\r\n\t\t\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\tif (run.status !== \"active\" && run.status !== \"blocked\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tres.status(409).json({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\terror: `Cannot abort run with status \"${run.status}\". (evidenceData.evidence) setEvidence(evidenceData.evidence);\r\n      else if (evidenceData.summary) { setSummary(evidenceData.summary); setEvidence([]); }\r\n      setRuns(runsData.runs);\r\n (\r\n      <div>\r\n        <h1>Evidence</h1>\r\n        <ErrorBanner message={error} onRetry={fetchEvidence} />\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const noData = evidence.length === 0 && new Date(finishedAt).getTime() : Date.now();\r\n  const ms = end - start;\r\n  if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;\r\n  if (ms < 60000) return `${Math.floor(ms / 1000)}s`;\r\n  const m = Math.floor(ms / 60000);\r\n  const s = Math.floor((ms % 60000) / 1000);\r\n  return `${m}m ${s}s`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction timeAgo(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const ms = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();\r\n  if (ms < 60000) return 'just now';\r\n  if (ms < 3600000) return `${Math.floor(ms / 60000)}m ago`;\r\n  if (ms < 86400000) return `${Math.floor(ms / 3600000)}h ago`;\r\n  return `${Math.floor(ms / 86400000)}d ago`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function RunsPage(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [runs, setRuns] = useState<Run[]>([]);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState('all');\r\n  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all');\r\n\r\n  const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRuns({ limit: 100 });\r\n      setRuns(data.runs);\r\n      setError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load runs');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRuns();\r\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRuns, 10_000);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\r\n  }, [fetchRuns]);\r\n\r\n  const filtered = useMemo(() => {\r\n    return runs.filter(r => {\r\n      if (statusFilter !== 'all' && r.status !== statusFilter) return false;\r\n      if (phaseFilter !== 'all' && r.phase !== phaseFilter) return false;\r\n      if (searchTerm) {\r\n        const q = searchTerm.toLowerCase();\r\n        if (!r.id.toLowerCase().includes(q) &&\r\n            !(r.issueNumber?.toString() ?? '').includes(q)) return false;\r\n      }\r\n      return true;\r\n    });\r\n  }, [runs, searchTerm, phaseFilter, statusFilter]);\r\n\r\n  const statusCounts = useMemo(() => {\r\n    const counts: Record<string, number> = { active: 0, done: 0, failed: 0, blocked: 0, cancelled: 0 };\r\n    runs.forEach(r => { counts[r.status] = (counts[r.status] ?? 0) + 1; });\r\n    return counts;\r\n  }, [runs]);\r\n\r\n  if (loading) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div>\r\n        <div className=\"skeleton h-8 w-32 mb-2\" />\r\n        <div className=\"skeleton h-4 w-56 mb-6\" />\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\r\n          {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (\r\n            <div key={i} className=\"skeleton h-10 w-full rounded\" />\r\n          ))}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (error) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div>\r\n        <h1>Runs</h1>\r\n        <div className=\"bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 rounded-lg p-4 mt-4\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">{error}</p>\r\n          <button onClick={fetchRuns} className=\"text-xs mt-2 text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 hover:underline\">\r\n            Retry\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\r\n        <h1>Runs</h1>\r\n        <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1\">\r\n          Agent execution runs across all repositories\r\n        </p>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Status Summary */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4 mb-4 text-xs\">\r\n        {Object.entries(statusCounts).map(([status, count]) => (\r\n          <div key={status} className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5\">\r\n            <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${STATUS_BG[status] ?? 'bg-slate-400'}`} />\r\n            <span className=\"text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 capitalize\">{status}</span>\r\n            <span className=\"font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300\">{count}</span>\r\n          </div>\r\n        ))}\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Filters */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 flex-wrap\">\r\n        <input\r\n          type=\"text\"\r\n          placeholder=\"Search by ID, issue, repo...\"\r\n          value={searchTerm}\r\n          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-xs\"\r\n        />\r\n        <select value={phaseFilter} onChange={e => setPhaseFilter(e.target.value)} className=\"input max-w-[140px]\">\r\n          {PHASES.map(p => (\r\n            <option key={p} value={p}>{p === 'all' ? 'All Phases' : p}</option>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </select>\r\n        <select value={statusFilter} onChange={e => setStatusFilter(e.target.value)} className=\"input max-w-[140px]\">\r\n          <option value=\"all\">All Status</option>\r\n          <option value=\"active\">Active</option>\r\n          <option value=\"done\">Done</option>\r\n          <option value=\"failed\">Failed</option>\r\n          <option value=\"blocked\">Blocked</option>\r\n          <option value=\"cancelled\">Cancelled</option>\r\n        </select>\r\n        {runs.length > 0 && (\r\n          <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400\">\r\n            {filtered.length} of {runs.length} runs\r\n          </span>\r\n        )}\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Empty States */}\r\n      {runs.length === 0 && (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒÅâ</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-sm {runs.length > 0 && filtered.length === 0 && (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-8\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-2\">­ƒöÄ</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-sm string | null): string {\r\n  const start = new Date(startedAt).getTime();\r\n  const end = finishedAt ? new Date(finishedAt).getTime() : Date.now();\r\n  const ms = end - start;\r\n  if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;\r\n  if (ms < 60000) return `${Math.floor(ms / 1000)}s`;\r\n  const m = Math.floor(ms / 60000);\r\n  const s = Math.floor((ms % 60000) / 1000);\r\n  return `${m}m ${s}s`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction timeAgo(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const ms = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();\r\n  if (ms < 60000) return 'just now';\r\n  if (ms < 3600000) return `${Math.floor(ms / 60000)}m ago`;\r\n  if (ms < 86400000) return `${Math.floor(ms / 3600000)}h ago`;\r\n  return `${Math.floor(ms / 86400000)}d ago`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function RunsPage(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [runs, setRuns] = useState<Run[]>([]);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState('all');\r\n  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all');\r\n\r\n  const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRuns({ limit: 100 });\r\n      setRuns(data.runs);\r\n      setError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load runs');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRuns();\r\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRuns, 10_000);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\r\n  }, [fetchRuns]);\r\n\r\n  const filtered = useMemo(() => {\r\n    return runs.filter(r => {\r\n      if (statusFilter !== 'all' && r.status !== statusFilter) return false;\r\n      if (phaseFilter !== 'all' && r.phase !== phaseFilter) return false;\r\n      if (searchTerm) {\r\n        const q = searchTerm.toLowerCase();\r\n        if (!r.id.toLowerCase().includes(q) &&\r\n            !(r.issueNumber?.toString() ?? '').includes(q)) return false;\r\n      }\r\n      return true;\r\n    });\r\n  }, [runs, searchTerm, phaseFilter, statusFilter]);\r\n\r\n  const statusCounts = useMemo(() => {\r\n    const counts: Record<string, number> = { active: 0, done: 0, failed: 0, blocked: 0, cancelled: 0 };\r\n    runs.forEach(r => { counts[r.status] = (counts[r.status] ?? 0) + 1; });\r\n    return counts;\r\n  }, [runs]);\r\n\r\n  if (loading) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div>\r\n        <div className=\"skeleton h-8 w-32 mb-2\" />\r\n        <div className=\"skeleton h-4 w-56 mb-6\" />\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\r\n          {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (\r\n            <div key={i} className=\"skeleton h-10 w-full rounded\" />\r\n          ))}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (error) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div>\r\n        <h1>Runs</h1>\r\n        <div className=\"bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 rounded-lg p-4 mt-4\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">{error}</p>\r\n          <button onClick={fetchRuns} className=\"text-xs mt-2 text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 hover:underline\">\r\n            Retry\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\r\n        <h1>Runs</h1>\r\n        <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1\">\r\n          Agent execution runs across all repositories\r\n        </p>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Status Summary */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4 mb-4 text-xs\">\r\n        {Object.entries(statusCounts).map(([status, count]) => (\r\n          <div key={status} className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5\">\r\n            <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${STATUS_BG[status] ?? 'All Phases' : p}</option>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </select>\r\n        <select value={statusFilter} onChange={e => setStatusFilter(e.target.value)} className=\"input max-w-[140px]\">\r\n          <option value=\"all\">All Status</option>\r\n          <option value=\"active\">Active</option>\r\n          <option value=\"done\">Done</option>\r\n          <option {/* Empty States */}\r\n      {runs.length === 0 && (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒÅâ</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-sm "}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\apps\\web\\src\\components\\runs\\RunsPage.tsx"},"span":[3573,3574],"sourceCode":"import type React from 'react';\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';\r\nimport { Link } from 'react-router-dom';\r\nimport { api } from '../../api.js';\r\nimport type { Run } from '../../types.js';\r\n\r\nconst PHASES = [\r\n  'all', 'ingest', 'specify', 'plan', 'tasks', 'implement',\r\n  'review', 'fix', 'done', 'failed', 'cancelled',\r\n] as const;\r\n\r\nconst STATUS_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {\r\n  active: 'text-sky-600 dark:text-sky-400 bg-sky-500/10',\r\n  done: 'text-green-600 dark:text-green-400 bg-green-500/10',\r\n  failed: 'text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 bg-red-500/10',\r\n  blocked: 'text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400 bg-amber-500/10',\r\n  cancelled: 'text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 bg-slate-500/10',\r\n};\r\n\r\nconst STATUS_BG: Record<string, string> = {\r\n  active: 'bg-sky-500',\r\n  done: 'bg-green-500',\r\n  failed: 'bg-red-500',\r\n  blocked: 'bg-amber-500',\r\n  cancelled: 'bg-slate-400',\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction formatDuration(startedAt: string, finishedAt: string | null): string {\r\n  const start = new Date(startedAt).getTime();\r\n  const end = finishedAt ? new Date(finishedAt).getTime() : Date.now();\r\n  const ms = end - start;\r\n  if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;\r\n  if (ms < 60000) return `${Math.floor(ms / 1000)}s`;\r\n  const m = Math.floor(ms / 60000);\r\n  const s = Math.floor((ms % 60000) / 1000);\r\n  return `${m}m ${s}s`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction timeAgo(dateStr: string): string {\r\n  const ms = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();\r\n  if (ms < 60000) return 'just now';\r\n  if (ms < 3600000) return `${Math.floor(ms / 60000)}m ago`;\r\n  if (ms < 86400000) return `${Math.floor(ms / 3600000)}h ago`;\r\n  return `${Math.floor(ms / 86400000)}d ago`;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport default function RunsPage(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [runs, setRuns] = useState<Run[]>([]);\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');\r\n  const [phaseFilter, setPhaseFilter] = useState('all');\r\n  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all');\r\n\r\n  const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getRuns({ limit: 100 });\r\n      setRuns(data.runs);\r\n      setError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load runs');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchRuns();\r\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRuns, 10_000);\r\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\r\n  }, [fetchRuns]);\r\n\r\n  const filtered = useMemo(() => {\r\n    return runs.filter(r => {\r\n      if (statusFilter !== 'all' && r.status !== statusFilter) return false;\r\n      if (phaseFilter !== 'all' && r.phase !== phaseFilter) return false;\r\n      if (searchTerm) {\r\n        const q = searchTerm.toLowerCase();\r\n        if (!r.id.toLowerCase().includes(q) &&\r\n            !(r.issueNumber?.toString() ?? '').includes(q)) return false;\r\n      }\r\n      return true;\r\n    });\r\n  }, [runs, searchTerm, phaseFilter, statusFilter]);\r\n\r\n  const statusCounts = useMemo(() => {\r\n    const counts: Record<string, number> = { active: 0, done: 0, failed: 0, blocked: 0, cancelled: 0 };\r\n    runs.forEach(r => { counts[r.status] = (counts[r.status] ?? 0) + 1; });\r\n    return counts;\r\n  }, [runs]);\r\n\r\n  if (loading) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div>\r\n        <div className=\"skeleton h-8 w-32 mb-2\" />\r\n        <div className=\"skeleton h-4 w-56 mb-6\" />\r\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\r\n          {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (\r\n            <div key={i} className=\"skeleton h-10 w-full rounded\" />\r\n          ))}\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (error) {\r\n    return (\r\n      <div>\r\n        <h1>Runs</h1>\r\n        <div className=\"bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 rounded-lg p-4 mt-4\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">{error}</p>\r\n          <button onClick={fetchRuns} className=\"text-xs mt-2 text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 hover:underline\">\r\n            Retry\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </div>\r\n    );\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\r\n        <h1>Runs</h1>\r\n        <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1\">\r\n          Agent execution runs across all repositories\r\n        </p>\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Status Summary */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4 mb-4 text-xs\">\r\n        {Object.entries(statusCounts).map(([status, count]) => (\r\n          <div key={status} className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5\">\r\n            <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${STATUS_BG[status] ?? 'bg-slate-400'}`} />\r\n            <span className=\"text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 capitalize\">{status}</span>\r\n            <span className=\"font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300\">{count}</span>\r\n          </div>\r\n        ))}\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Filters */}\r\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 flex-wrap\">\r\n        <input\r\n          type=\"text\"\r\n          placeholder=\"Search by ID, issue, repo...\"\r\n          value={searchTerm}\r\n          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}\r\n          className=\"input max-w-xs\"\r\n        />\r\n        <select value={phaseFilter} onChange={e => setPhaseFilter(e.target.value)} className=\"input max-w-[140px]\">\r\n          {PHASES.map(p => (\r\n            <option key={p} value={p}>{p === 'all' ? 'All Phases' : p}</option>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </select>\r\n        <select value={statusFilter} onChange={e => setStatusFilter(e.target.value)} className=\"input max-w-[140px]\">\r\n          <option value=\"all\">All Status</option>\r\n          <option value=\"active\">Active</option>\r\n          <option value=\"done\">Done</option>\r\n          <option value=\"failed\">Failed</option>\r\n          <option value=\"blocked\">Blocked</option>\r\n          <option value=\"cancelled\">Cancelled</option>\r\n        </select>\r\n        {runs.length > 0 && (\r\n          <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400\">\r\n            {filtered.length} of {runs.length} runs\r\n          </span>\r\n        )}\r\n      </div>\r\n\r\n      {/* Empty States */}\r\n      {runs.length === 0 && (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-12\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-3\">­ƒÅâ</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-300 font-medium mb-1\">No Runs Yet</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 mb-4\">\r\n            Start a run from the dashboard to see it here.\r\n          </p>\r\n          <Link to=\"/\" className=\"btn-primary text-sm\">\r\n            Go to Dashboard\r\n          </Link>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {runs.length > 0 && filtered.length === 0 && (\r\n        <div className=\"card text-center py-8\">\r\n          <p className=\"text-4xl mb-2\">­ƒöÄ</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-300 font-medium mb-1\">No matching runs</p>\r\n          <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400\">Try adjusting your filters.</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n\r\n      {/* Runs Table */}\r\n      {filtered.length > 0 && (\r\n        <div className=\"card p-0 overflow-hidden\">\r\n          <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\r\n            <table className=\"w-full text-sm\">\r\n              <thead>\r\n                <tr className=\"border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider\">\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-2 font-medium\">Run ID</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-2 font-medium\">Phase</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-2 font-medium\">Status</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-2 font-medium\">Issue</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-2 font-medium\">Duration</th>\r\n                  <th className=\"text-left px-4 py-2 font-medium\">Started</th>\r\n                </tr>\r\n              </thead>\r\n              <tbody className=\"divide-y divide-slate-200/50 dark:divide-slate-800/50\">\r\n                {filtered.map(run => (\r\n                  <tr\r\n                    key={run.id}\r\n                    onClick={() => window.location.href = `/runs/${run.id}`}\r\n                    className=\"hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/30 transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\r\n                  >\r\n                    <td className=\"px-4 py-2.5\">\r\n                      <span className=\"text-xs font-mono text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400\">\r\n                        {run.id.slice(0, 12)}\r\n                      </span>\r\n                    </td>\r\n                    <td className=\"px-4 py-2.5\">\r\n                      <span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded\">\r\n                        {run.phase ?? '-'}\r\n                      </span>\r\n                    </td>\r\n                    <td className=\"px-4 py-2.5\">\r\n                      <span className={`text-[10px] font-medium px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${STATUS_COLORS[run.status] ?? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-slate-600 dark:bg-slate-600'\r\n      }`}\r\n    >\r\n      <span className={`pointer-events-none inline-block h-4 w-4 rounded-full bg-white shadow transform ring-0 transition duration-200 ${\r\n        enabled ? 'translate-x-4' : 'translate-x-0'\r\n      }`} />\r\n    </button>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst SAFETY_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {\r\n  enableMerge: 'Enable Merge',\r\n  mergeDryRun: 'Merge Dry Run',\r\n  enablePush: 'Enable Push',\r\n  killSwitch: 'Kill Switch',\r\n  enableFixLoop: 'Fix Loop',\r\n};\r\n\r\nconst SAFETY_DESCRIPTIONS: Record<string, string> = {\r\n  enableMerge: 'Allow [mcpLoading, setMcpLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [mcpError, setMcpError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const [modes, setModes] = useState<TestMode[]>([]);\r\n  const setSavingSafety] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [safetyError, setSafetyError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const fetchMcp = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getMcpSettings();\r\n      setMcpServers(data.servers);\r\n      setPolicy(data.policy);\r\n      setRedactCount(data.redactPatternCount);\r\n      setMcpError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setMcpError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load MCP settings');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setMcpLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const
