setSecurityNotes(data.securityNotes);\r\n      setModesError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setModesError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load test modes');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setModesLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const fetchSafety = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getSafety();\r\n      setSafety(data as unknown as Record<string, boolean>);\r\n    } catch { /* non-critical */ }\r\n    finally { setSafetyLoading(false); }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const toggleSafety = useCallback(async (key: string) => {\r\n    if (!safety) return;\r\n    setSavingSafety(key);\r\n    setSafetyError(null);\r\n    const newValue = !safety[key];\r\n    // Optimistic update\r\n    setSafety(prev => prev ? { ...prev, [key]: newValue } : prev);\r\n    try {\r\n      const result = await api.updateSafety(key, newValue);\r\n      // Sync all flags from server response (Issue #25)\r\n      if (result.all) {\r\n        setSafety(result.all);\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      // Revert on failure and show error\r\n      setSafety(prev => prev ? { ...prev, [key]: !newValue } : prev);\r\n      setSafetyError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to update safety setting');\r\n      // Clear error after 5s\r\n      setTimeout(() => setSafetyError(null), 5000);\r\n    } finally { setSavingSafety(null); }\r\n  }, [safety]);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchMcp();\r\n    fetchModes();\r\n    fetchSafety();\r\n  }, [fetchMcp, fetchModes, fetchSafety]);\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n  Safety Gates\r\n            </h3>\r\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-500 mb-4\">\r\n              Toggle safety mechanisms. Changes take effect immediately.\r\n            </p>\r\n            {safetyError && (\r\n              <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 border border-red-200 dark:border-red-800\">\r\n                <p className=\"text-xs text-red-700 dark:text-red-400\">{safetyError}</p>\r\n              </div>\r\n            )}\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\r\n              {Object.entries(safety).map(([key, value]) => (\r\n                <div key={key} className=\"flex items-center justify-between py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/30 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800\">\r\n                  <div className=\"flex-1\">\r\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n                      <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${value ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-red-500'}`} />\r\n                      <span className=\"text-xs font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300\">\r\n                        {SAFETY_LABELS[key] ?? key}\r\n                      </span>\r\n                      <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold ${value ? 'text-green-600 dark:text-green-400' : 'text-red-600 dark:text-red-400'}`}>\r\n                        {value ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}\r\n                      </span>\r\n                    </div>\r\n                    <p className=\"text-[10px] text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-500 mt-0.5 ml-4\">\r\n                      {SAFETY_DESCRIPTIONS[key] ?? ''}\r\n                    </p>\r\n                  </div>\r\n                  <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0\">\r\n                    {savingSafety === key && <span className=\"w-3 h-3 rounded-full border-2 border-sky-400 border-t-transparent animate-spin\" />}\r\n                    <ToggleSwitch\r\n                      enabled={value}\r\n                      onChange={() => toggleSafety(key)}\r\n                      label={SAFETY_LABELS[key] ?? key}\r\n                    />\r\n                  </div>\r\n                </div>\r\n              ))}\r\n            </div>\r\n          </div>\r\n        )}\r\n\r\n        {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ MCP Configuration ÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <h3 className=\"text-sm font-medium text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-300 mb-1 flex items-center gap-2 font-['Space_Grotesk']\">\r\n            <svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"2\" className=\"text-sky-400\"><rect x=\"2\" y=\"2\" width=\"20\" height=\"8\" rx=\"2\" ry=\"2\" /><rect x=\"2\" y=\"14\" width=\"20\" height=\"8\" rx=\"2\" ry=\"2\" /><line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6.01\" y2=\"6\" /><line x1=\"6\" y1=\"18\" x2=\"6.01\" y2=\"18\" /></svg>\r\n            MCP Servers\r\n          </h3>\r\n          <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-500 mb-4\">\r\n            Model Context Protocol servers. 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-slate-600 dark:bg-slate-600'\r\n      }`}\r\n    >\r\n      <span className={`pointer-events-none inline-block h-4 w-4 rounded-full bg-white shadow transform ring-0 transition duration-200 ${\r\n        enabled ? 'translate-x-4' : 'translate-x-0'\r\n      }`} />\r\n    </button>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst SAFETY_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {\r\n  enableMerge: 'Enable Merge',\r\n  mergeDryRun: 'Merge Dry Run',\r\n  enablePush: 'Enable Push',\r\n  killSwitch: 'Kill Switch',\r\n  enableFixLoop: 'Fix Loop',\r\n};\r\n\r\nconst SAFETY_DESCRIPTIONS: Record<string, string> = {\r\n  enableMerge: 'Allow automated merging of pull requests',\r\n  mergeDryRun: 'Run merge validation without actually merging',\r\n  enablePush: 'Allow pushing to remote repositories',\r\n  killSwitch: 'Emergency stop ÔÇö blocks all automated actions',\r\n  enableFixLoop: 'Allow automatic retry of failed pipeline phases',\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport default function SettingsPage(): React.ReactElement {\r\n  const [mcpServers, setMcpServers] = useState<McpServer[]>([]);\r\n  const [policy, setPolicy] = useState<Record<string, unknown> | null>(null);\r\n  const [redactCount, setRedactCount] = useState(0);\r\n  const [mcpLoading, setMcpLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [mcpError, setMcpError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const [modes, setModes] = useState<TestMode[]>([]);\r\n  const [securityNotes, setSecurityNotes] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});\r\n  const [modesLoading, setModesLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [modesError, setModesError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const [safety, setSafety] = useState<Record<string, boolean> | null>(null);\r\n  const [safetyLoading, setSafetyLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [savingSafety, setSavingSafety] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [safetyError, setSafetyError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const fetchMcp = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getMcpSettings();\r\n      setMcpServers(data.servers);\r\n      setPolicy(data.policy);\r\n      setRedactCount(data.redactPatternCount);\r\n      setMcpError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setMcpError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load MCP settings');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setMcpLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const fetchModes = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getTestModes();\r\n      setModes(data.modes.filter(m => m.visible));\r\n      setSecurityNotes(data.securityNotes);\r\n      setModesError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setModesError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load test modes');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setModesLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const fetchSafety = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getSafety();\r\n      setSafety(data as unknown as Record<string, boolean>);\r\n    } catch { /* non-critical */ }\r\n    finally { setSafetyLoading(false); }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const toggleSafety = useCallback(async (key: string) => {\r\n    if (!safety) return;\r\n    setSavingSafety(key);\r\n    setSafetyError(null);\r\n    const newValue = !safety[key];\r\n    // Optimistic update\r\n    setSafety(prev => prev ? { ...prev, [key]: newValue } : prev);\r\n    try {\r\n      const result = await api.updateSafety(key, newValue);\r\n      // Sync all flags from server response (Issue #25)\r\n      if (result.all) {\r\n        setSafety(result.all);\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      // Revert on failure and show error\r\n      setSafety(prev => prev ? { ...prev, [key]: !newValue } : prev);\r\n      setSafetyError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to update safety setting');\r\n      // Clear error after 5s\r\n      setTimeout(() => setSafetyError(null), 5000);\r\n    } finally { setSavingSafety(null); }\r\n  }, [safety]);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchMcp();\r\n    fetchModes();\r\n    fetchSafety();\r\n  }, [fetchMcp, fetchModes, fetchSafety]);\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div>\r\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\r\n        <h1>Settings</h1>\r\n        <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 mt-1\">\r\n          MCP configuration, test modes, and  Safety Gates\r\n            </h3>\r\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-500 mb-4\">\r\n              Toggle safety mechanisms. Changes take effect immediately.\r\n            </p>\r\n            {safetyError && (\r\n              <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 border border-red-200 dark:border-red-800\">\r\n                <p className=\"text-xs text-red-700 dark:text-red-400\">{safetyError}</p>\r\n              </div>\r\n            )}\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\r\n              {Object.entries(safety).map(([key, value]) => (\r\n                <div key={key} className=\"flex items-center justify-between py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/30 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800\">\r\n                  <div className=\"flex-1\">\r\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n                      <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${value ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-red-500'}`} />\r\n                      <span className=\"text-xs font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300\">\r\n                        {SAFETY_LABELS[key] ?? key}\r\n                      </span>\r\n                      <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold ${value ? 'text-green-600 dark:text-green-400' : 'text-red-600 dark:text-red-400'}`}>\r\n                        {value ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-slate-600 dark:bg-slate-600'\r\n      }`}\r\n    >\r\n      <span className={`pointer-events-none inline-block h-4 w-4 rounded-full bg-white shadow transform ring-0 transition duration-200 ${\r\n        enabled ? 'translate-x-4' : 'translate-x-0'\r\n      }`} />\r\n    </button>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst SAFETY_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {\r\n  enableMerge: 'Enable Merge',\r\n  mergeDryRun: 'Merge Dry null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const [safety, setSafety] = useState<Record<string, boolean> | null>(null);\r\n  const [safetyLoading, setSafetyLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [savingSafety, setSavingSafety] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const [safetyError, setSafetyError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n\r\n  const fetchMcp = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getMcpSettings();\r\n      setMcpServers(data.servers);\r\n      setPolicy(data.policy);\r\n      setRedactCount(data.redactPatternCount);\r\n      setMcpError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setMcpError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load MCP settings');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setMcpLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const fetchModes = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getTestModes();\r\n      setModes(data.modes.filter(m => m.visible));\r\n      setSecurityNotes(data.securityNotes);\r\n      setModesError(null);\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      setModesError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load test modes');\r\n    } finally {\r\n      setModesLoading(false);\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const fetchSafety = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    try {\r\n      const data = await api.getSafety();\r\n      setSafety(data as unknown as Record<string, boolean>);\r\n    } catch { /* non-critical */ }\r\n    finally { setSafetyLoading(false); }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const toggleSafety = useCallback(async (key: string) => {\r\n    if (!safety) return;\r\n    setSavingSafety(key);\r\n    setSafetyError(null);\r\n    const newValue = !safety[key];\r\n    // Optimistic update\r\n    setSafety(prev => prev ? { ...prev, [key]: newValue } : prev);\r\n    try {\r\n      const result = await api.updateSafety(key, newValue);\r\n      // Sync all flags from server response (Issue #25)\r\n      if (result.all) {\r\n        setSafety(result.all);\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      // Revert on failure and show error\r\n      setSafety(prev => prev ? { ...prev, [key]: !newValue } : prev);\r\n      setSafetyError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to update safety setting');\r\n      // Clear error after 5s\r\n      setTimeout(() => setSafetyError(null), 5000);\r\n    } finally { setSavingSafety(null); }\r\n  }, [safety]);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    fetchMcp();\r\n    fetchModes();\r\n    fetchSafety();\r\n  }, [fetchMcp, fetchModes, fetchSafety]);\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n  Safety Gates\r\n            </h3>\r\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-500 mb-4\">\r\n              Toggle safety mechanisms. Changes take effect immediately.\r\n            </p>\r\n            {safetyError && (\r\n              <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 border border-red-200 dark:border-red-800\">\r\n                <p className=\"text-xs text-red-700 dark:text-red-400\">{safetyError}</p>\r\n              </div>\r\n            )}\r\n            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\r\n              {Object.entries(safety).map(([key, value]) => (\r\n                <div key={key} className=\"flex items-center justify-between py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/30 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800\">\r\n                  <div className=\"flex-1\">\r\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\r\n                      <span className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full ${value ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-red-500'}`} />\r\n                      <span className=\"text-xs font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300\">\r\n                        {SAFETY_LABELS[key] ?? key}\r\n                      </span>\r\n                      <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold ${value ? 'text-green-600 dark:text-green-400' : 'text-red-600 dark:text-red-400'}`}>\r\n                        {value ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}\r\n                      </span>\r\n                    </div>\r\n                    <p className=\"text-[10px] text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-500 mt-0.5 ml-4\">\r\n                      {SAFETY_DESCRIPTIONS[key] ?? ''}\r\n                    </p>\r\n                  </div>\r\n                  <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0\">\r\n                    {savingSafety === key && <span className=\"w-3 h-3 rounded-full border-2 border-sky-400 border-t-transparent animate-spin\" />}\r\n                    <ToggleSwitch\r\n                      enabled={value}\r\n                      onChange={() => toggleSafety(key)}\r\n                      label={SAFETY_LABELS[key] ?? key}\r\n                    />\r\n                  </div>\r\n                </div>\r\n              ))}\r\n            </div>\r\n          </div>\r\n        )}\r\n\r\n        {/* ÔöÇÔöÇ MCP Configuration ÔöÇÔöÇ */}\r\n        <div className=\"card\">\r\n          <h3 className=\"text-sm font-medium text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-300 mb-1 flex items-center gap-2 font-['Space_Grotesk']\">\r\n            <svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"2\" className=\"text-sky-400\"><rect x=\"2\" y=\"2\" width=\"20\" height=\"8\" rx=\"2\" ry=\"2\" /><rect x=\"2\" y=\"14\" width=\"20\" height=\"8\" rx=\"2\" ry=\"2\" /><line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6.01\" y2=\"6\" /><line x1=\"6\" y1=\"18\" x2=\"6.01\" y2=\"18\" /></svg>\r\n            MCP Servers\r\n          </h3>\r\n          <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-500 mb-4\">\r\n            Model Context Protocol servers. unknown as Record<string, boolean>);\r\n    } catch { /* non-critical */ }\r\n    finally { setSafetyLoading(false); }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  const toggleSafety = useCallback(async (key: string) => setSafety(result.all);\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      // Revert on failure and show error\r\n      setSafety(prev => prev ? { ...prev, [key]: !newValue } : prev);\r\n      setSafetyError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to update safety setting');\r\n      // Clear error after 5s\r\n      setTimeout(() => setSafetyError(null), 5000);\r\n    } finally {  Safety Gates\r\n            </h3>\r\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-500 mb-4\">\r\n              Toggle safety mechanisms. (currentEventSource) {\r\n        currentEventSource.close();\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const es = new EventSource(`/api/runs/${runId}/events/stream`);\r\n      currentEventSource = es;\r\n      eventSourceRef.current = es;\r\n\r\n      es.onopen = () => {\r\n        setIsConnected(true);\r\n        setError(null);\r\n        retryCountRef.current = 0;\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      // Named Events via addEventListener\r\n      const handleInitial = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const data = JSON.parse(e.data) as { run: Run; events: RunEvent[] };\r\n          setState(prev } catch (err) {\r\n          if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') console.warn('[SSE] Failed to parse initial event:', err);\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      const handleRunEvent = (e: console.warn('[SSE] Failed to parse run-event data');\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      const handleRunUpdate = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const data = JSON.parse(e.data) as Partial<Run>;\r\n          setState(prev => ({\r\n            ...prev,\r\n            run: prev.run ? { ...prev.run, ...data } : prev.run,\r\n            // Extract runStatus from run-update if status field present\r\n            runStatus: (data.status as RunStatus) ?? prev.runStatus,\r\n          }));\r\n        } catch {\r\n          if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') console.warn('[SSE] Failed to parse run-update data');\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      const handleRunControl = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const _data = handleRunComplete = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const data = JSON.parse(e.data) as { phase: string; status: string };\r\n          setState(prev => {\r\n            if (!prev.run) return prev;\r\n            const updated: Record<string, unknown> = {};\r\n            if (typeof data.phase === 'string' && data.phase.length > 0) updated.phase = data.phase;\r\n RunStatus;\r\n            }\r\n            return {\r\n              ...prev,\r\n              run: { ...prev.run, ...updated } as Run,\r\n              runStatus: (data.status as RunStatus) ?? prev.runStatus,\r\n            };\r\n          });\r\n        } catch {\r\n          // ignore\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      // Issue #66 ÔÇö Live evidence updates\r\n      const (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') \r\n        } catch {\r\n          // ignore\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      // Add all event listeners\r\n      es.addEventListener('initial', es.addEventListener('run-cancelled', handleRunCancelled);\r\n\r\n      cleanupHandlers.push(\r\n        () => es.removeEventListener('initial', handleInitial),\r\n        () => 1;\r\n\r\n        setError(\r\n          `Connection lost. setIsConnected(false);\r\n    };\r\n  }, [runId]);\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    events: state.events,\r\n    evidence: state.evidence,\r\n    isConnected,\r\n    runStatus: state.runStatus,\r\n {\r\n  id: string;\r\n  kind: string;\r\n  summary: string;\r\n  createdAt: string;\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst MAX_EVENTS = 500;\r\nconst RECONNECT_BASE_MS = 500;\r\nconst RECONNECT_MAX_MS = 30000;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Vom Server gesendete SSE-Event-Typen:\r\n * - initial: Initialer Run-State beim Verbinden\r\n * - run-event: Neues Run-Event (Log-Eintrag)\r\n * - run-update: Run-Phase/Status-Update\r\n * - run-control: Control-Aktion (pause/resume/abort)\r\n * - run-complete: Run abgeschlossen\r\n * - run-evidence-created: Neues Evidence-Artefakt (Issue #66)\r\n * - run-cancelled: Run abgebrochen (Issue #66)\r\n * - heartbeats als SSE-Kommentare (:keepalive)\r\n */\r\nconst EVENT_TYPES = [\r\n  'initial', 'run-event', 'run-update', 'run-control', 'run-complete',\r\n  'run-evidence-created', 'run-cancelled',\r\n] as const;\r\n\r\ntype SSEEventType = (typeof EVENT_TYPES)[number];\r\n\r\ninterface SSEState {\r\n  run: Run | null;\r\n  events: RunEvent[];\r\n  evidence: EvidenceItem[];\r\n  runStatus: RunStatus | null;\r\n}\r\n\r\ninterface UseSSEResult {\r\n  events: RunEvent[];\r\n  evidence: EvidenceItem[];\r\n  isConnected: boolean;\r\n  runStatus: RunStatus | null;\r\n  error: string | null;\r\n  clearEvents: () => void;\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function useSSE(runId: string | null): UseSSEResult {\r\n  const [state, setState] = useState<SSEState>({\r\n    run: null, events: [], evidence: [], runStatus: null,\r\n  });\r\n  const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\r\n  const eventSourceRef = useRef<EventSource | null>(null);\r\n  const retryCountRef = useRef(0);\r\n\r\n  const clearEvents = useCallback(() => {\r\n    setState({ run: null, events: [], evidence: [], runStatus: null });\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    if (!runId) {\r\n      setIsConnected(false);\r\n      setState({ run: null, events: [], evidence: [], runStatus: null });\r\n      setError(null);\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    let reconnectTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>;\r\n    let currentEventSource: EventSource | null = null;\r\n    const cleanupHandlers: Array<() => void> = [];\r\n\r\n    function connect(): void {\r\n      if (currentEventSource) {\r\n        currentEventSource.close();\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const es = new EventSource(`/api/runs/${runId}/events/stream`);\r\n      currentEventSource = es;\r\n      eventSourceRef.current = es;\r\n\r\n      es.onopen = () => {\r\n        setIsConnected(true);\r\n        setError(null);\r\n        retryCountRef.current = 0;\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      // Named Events via addEventListener\r\n      const handleInitial = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const data = JSON.parse(e.data) as { run: Run; events: RunEvent[] };\r\n          setState(prev => ({\r\n            ...prev,\r\n            run: data.run,\r\n            events: data.events.slice(-MAX_EVENTS),\r\n            runStatus: data.run.status as RunStatus,\r\n          }));\r\n        } catch (err) {\r\n          if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') console.warn('[SSE] Failed to parse initial event:', err);\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      const handleRunEvent = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const data = JSON.parse(e.data) as RunEvent;\r\n          setState(prev => {\r\n            const next = [...prev.events, data];\r\n            return {\r\n              ...prev,\r\n              events: next.length > MAX_EVENTS\r\n                ? next.slice(next.length - MAX_EVENTS)\r\n                : next,\r\n            };\r\n          });\r\n          // Voice Output: fire-and-forget, non-blocking, handled internally\r\n          speakEvent(data);\r\n        } catch {\r\n          if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') console.warn('[SSE] Failed to parse run-event data');\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      const handleRunUpdate = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const data = JSON.parse(e.data) as Partial<Run>;\r\n          setState(prev => ({\r\n            ...prev,\r\n            run: prev.run ? { ...prev.run, ...data } : prev.run,\r\n            // Extract runStatus from run-update if status field present\r\n            runStatus: (data.status as RunStatus) ?? prev.runStatus,\r\n          }));\r\n        } catch {\r\n          if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') console.warn('[SSE] Failed to parse run-update data');\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      const handleRunControl = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const _data = JSON.parse(e.data) as { action: string };\r\n          if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') \r\n        } catch {\r\n          // ignore\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      const handleRunComplete = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const data = JSON.parse(e.data) as { phase: string; status: string };\r\n          setState(prev => {\r\n            if (!prev.run) return prev;\r\n            const updated: Record<string, unknown> = {};\r\n            if (typeof data.phase === 'string' && data.phase.length > 0) updated.phase = data.phase;\r\n            if (typeof data.status === 'string' && data.status.length > 0) {\r\n              updated.status = data.status;\r\n              (updated as { runStatus: RunStatus }).runStatus = data.status as RunStatus;\r\n            }\r\n            return {\r\n              ...prev,\r\n              run: { ...prev.run, ...updated } as Run,\r\n              runStatus: (data.status as RunStatus) ?? prev.runStatus,\r\n            };\r\n          });\r\n        } catch {\r\n          // ignore\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      // Issue #66 ÔÇö Live evidence updates\r\n      const handleEvidenceCreated = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const data = JSON.parse(e.data) as { runId: string; kind: string; summary: string; createdAt: string };\r\n          const item: EvidenceItem = {\r\n            id: `${data.runId}-${data.kind}-${Date.now()}`,\r\n            kind: data.kind,\r\n            summary: data.summary,\r\n            createdAt: data.createdAt,\r\n          };\r\n          setState(prev => ({\r\n            ...prev,\r\n            evidence: [...prev.evidence, item],\r\n          }));\r\n        } catch {\r\n          if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') console.warn('[SSE] Failed to parse evidence-created event');\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      // Issue #66 ÔÇö Run cancelled\r\n      const handleRunCancelled = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const _data = JSON.parse(e.data) as { runId: string; status: string; message?: string };\r\n          setState(prev => ({\r\n            ...prev,\r\n            runStatus: 'cancelled' as RunStatus,\r\n            run: prev.run ? { ...prev.run, status: 'cancelled' as RunStatus } : prev.run,\r\n          }));\r\n          if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') \r\n        } catch {\r\n          // ignore\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      // Add all event listeners\r\n      es.addEventListener('initial', handleInitial);\r\n      es.addEventListener('run-event', handleRunEvent);\r\n      es.addEventListener('run-update', handleRunUpdate);\r\n      es.addEventListener('run-control', handleRunControl);\r\n      es.addEventListener('run-complete', handleRunComplete);\r\n      es.addEventListener('run-evidence-created', handleEvidenceCreated);\r\n      es.addEventListener('run-cancelled', handleRunCancelled);\r\n\r\n      cleanupHandlers.push(\r\n        () => es.removeEventListener('initial', handleInitial),\r\n        () => es.removeEventListener('run-event', handleRunEvent),\r\n        () => es.removeEventListener('run-update', handleRunUpdate),\r\n        () => es.removeEventListener('run-control', handleRunControl),\r\n        () => es.removeEventListener('run-complete', handleRunComplete),\r\n        () => es.removeEventListener('run-evidence-created', handleEvidenceCreated),\r\n        () => es.removeEventListener('run-cancelled', handleRunCancelled),\r\n      );\r\n\r\n      es.onerror = () => {\r\n        setIsConnected(false);\r\n        es.close();\r\n\r\n        // Exponential backoff reconnect\r\n        const delay = Math.min(\r\n          RECONNECT_BASE_MS * 2 ** retryCountRef.current,\r\n          RECONNECT_MAX_MS,\r\n        );\r\n        retryCountRef.current += 1;\r\n\r\n        setError(\r\n          `Connection lost. Reconnecting in ${Math.round(delay / 1000)}s...`,\r\n        );\r\n\r\n        reconnectTimer = setTimeout(connect, delay);\r\n      };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    connect();\r\n\r\n    return () => {\r\n      if (reconnectTimer) clearTimeout(reconnectTimer);\r\n      cleanupHandlers.forEach(fn => fn());\r\n      if (currentEventSource) {\r\n        currentEventSource.close();\r\n      }\r\n      setIsConnected(false);\r\n    };\r\n  }, [runId]);\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    events: state.events,\r\n    evidence: state.evidence,\r\n    isConnected,\r\n    runStatus: state.runStatus,\r\n JSON.parse(e.data) as { phase: string; status: string };\r\n          setState(prev => {\r\n            if (!prev.run) return prev;\r\n            const updated: Record<string, unknown> = {};\r\n            if (typeof data.phase === 'string' && data.phase.length > 0) updated.phase = data.phase;\r\n            if (typeof data.status === 'string' && data.status.length > 0) {\r\n       run: { ...prev.run, ...updated } as Run,\r\n              runStatus: (data.status as RunStatus) ?? prev.runStatus,\r\n            };\r\n          });\r\n        } catch {\r\n          // ignore\r\n        }\r\n      };\r\n\r\n      // Issue #66 ÔÇö Live evidence updates\r\n      const handleEvidenceCreated = (e: MessageEvent) => {\r\n        try {\r\n          const data =  if (reconnectTimer) clearTimeout(reconnectTimer);\r\n      cleanupHandlers.forEach(fn => fn());\r\n      if (currentEventSource) {\r\n        currentEventSource.close();\r\n      }\r\n      setIsConnected(false);\r\n    };\r\n  }, [runId]);\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    events: state.events,\r\n    evidence: state.evidence,\r\n    isConnected,\r\n    runStatus: state.runStatus,\r\n    error,\r\n    clearEvents,\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/suspicious/noArrayIndexKey","severity":"warning","description":"Avoid using the index of an array as key BullMQ Pipeline Processor\r\n// Decouples pipeline execution from the HTTP API.\r\n// Connects to Redis (BullMQ), opens SQLite DB, creates adapters,\r\n// and processes pipeline jobs from the queue.\r\n\r\nimport { Queue, Worker, type Job } from 'bullmq';\r\nimport { openDatabase } from '@positron/run-state';\r\nimport { resolveRedisUrl, PIPELINE_QUEUE, type PipelineJobData, type PipelineJobResult, loadRepositoryConfig, normalizeRepositoryConfig, buildRemoteUrl } from '@positron/shared';\r\nimport { FakeGitHubAdapter, createRealGitHubAdapter, GitHubStatusSyncService } from '@positron/github-adapter';\r\nimport { RealSpecKitAdapter, FakeSpecKitAdapter } from '@positron/speckit-adapter';\r\nimport { RealOpenCodeAdapter, FakeOpenCodeAdapter } from '@positron/opencode-adapter';\r\nimport { FakeGitWorkspaceAdapter, RealGitWorkspaceAdapter } from '@positron/sandbox';\r\nimport { runPipeline, type PipelineDeps } from './pipeline-runner.js';\r\nimport type { RepositoryConfig } from '@positron/shared';\r\nimport type { SpecKitAdapter, OpenCodeAdapter } from '@positron/shared';\r\nimport type { GitWorkspaceAdapter } 'fake') as 'fake' | 'real';\r\n  if (mode === 'real') {\r\n    return createRealGitHubAdapter();\r\n  }\r\n  return new FakeGitHubAdapter();\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction resolveWorkspaceAdapter(): GitWorkspaceAdapter {\r\n  if (process.env.POSITRON_WORKSPACE_ROOT) {\r\n    return new RealGitWorkspaceAdapter();\r\n  }\r\n  return new FakeGitWorkspaceAdapter();\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction resolveSpeckitAdapter(): SpecKitAdapter {\r\n  const mode = process.env.POSITRON_SPECKIT_MODE ?? 'fake';\r\n  if (mode === 'real') {\r\n    return new RealSpecKitAdapter();\r\n  }\r\n  return new FakeSpecKitAdapter();\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction resolveOpencodeAdapter(): OpenCodeAdapter {\r\n  const mode = process.env.POSITRON_OPENCODE_MODE ?? 'fake';\r\n  if (mode === 'real') {\r\n    return new RealOpenCodeAdapter();\r\n  }\r\n  return new FakeOpenCodeAdapter();\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction resolveRepositoryConfig(): RepositoryConfig {\r\n  const loaded = loadRepositoryConfig(process.env);\r\n  if (!loaded) {\r\n    throw new Error('POSITRON_REPO_OWNER and POSITRON_REPO_NAME must be configured');\r\n  }\r\n  return normalizeRepositoryConfig(loaded);\r\n}\r\n\r\nconst github = resolveGitHubAdapter();\r\nconst workspace = resolveWorkspaceAdapter();\r\nconst speckit = resolveSpeckitAdapter();\r\nconst opencode = resolveOpencodeAdapter();\r\nconst repository = resolveRepositoryConfig();\r\nconst syncService = new GitHubStatusSyncService(github);\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// BullMQ Worker\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nconst worker = new Worker<PipelineJobData, PipelineJobResult>(\r\n  PIPELINE_QUEUE,\r\n  async (job: Job<PipelineJobData, PipelineJobResult>) => {\r\n    const { runId, repoId, issueNumber, autonomyLevel } = job.data;\r\n\r\n    // Load run from DB\r\n    const row = db.prepare('SELECT * FROM runs WHERE id = ?').get(runId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\r\n    if (!row) throw new Error(`Run ${runId} not found in database`);\r\n\r\n    const { parsePhase, parseRunStatus } = await import('@positron/shared');\r\n    const run: RunState = {\r\n      id: String(row.id ?? String(row.branch) : null,\r\n      phase: parsePhase(String(row.phase ?? 'QUEUED')),\r\n      status: parseRunStatus(String(row.status ?? 'blocked')),\r\n      autonomyLevel: Number(row.autonomy_level ?? autonomyLevel),\r\n      attempt: Number(row.attempt ?? 0),\r\n      startedAt: String(row.started_at ?? new Date().toISOString()),\r\n      finishedAt: row.finished_at ? String(row.finished_at) : null,\r\n      lastError: row.last_error ? String(row.last_error) : null,\r\n      workspacePath: row.workspace_path ? String(row.workspace_path) : null,\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // Build pipeline dependencies\r\n    const deps: PipelineDeps = {\r\n      db,\r\n      repository,\r\n      workspace,\r\n      speckit,\r\n      opencode,\r\n      github,\r\n      syncService,\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // Run the pipeline\r\n    try {\r\n      const completed = await runPipeline(run, deps);\r\n\r\n      return {\r\n        status: completed.status,\r\n        phase: completed.phase,\r\n        lastError: completed.lastError ?? null,\r\n      };\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      // Pipeline threw ÔÇö persist failure state to DB so the run isn't stale\r\n      const errMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);\r\n      console.error(`[Worker] Pipeline failed for run ${runId}: ${errMsg}`);\r\n      try {\r\n        db.prepare(`\r\n          UPDATE runs SET phase = ?, status = ?, last_error = ?, finished_at = ?\r\n          WHERE id = ?\r\n        `).run('FAILED_BLOCKED', 'blocked', errMsg, new Date().toISOString(), runId);\r\n      } catch (dbErr) {\r\n        console.error(`[Worker] Failed to save error state for run ${runId}:`, dbErr);\r\n      }\r\n      throw err; // Re-throw so BullMQ marks the job as failed\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  {\r\n    connection: { url: redisUrl },\r\n    concurrency: 2,\r\n    lockDuration: 600_000, // 10 min lock ÔÇö long enough for full pipeline\r\n  },\r\n);\r\n\r\nworker.on('completed', (_job: Job<PipelineJobData, PipelineJobResult>) => {\r\n});\r\n\r\nworker.on('failed', (job: Job<PipelineJobData, PipelineJobResult> | undefined, err: Error) => {\r\n  console.error(`[Worker] Job ${job?.id ?? 'unknown'} failed:`, err?.message ?? err);\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Graceful Shutdown\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nasync function shutdown(): Promise<void> {\r\n  try {\r\n    await worker.close();\r\n  } catch (err) {\r\n    console.error('[Worker] Error during worker close:', err);\r\n  }\r\n  process.exit(0);\r\n}\r\n\r\nprocess.on('SIGTERM', shutdown);\r\nprocess.on('SIGINT', shutdown);\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/suspicious/noImplicitAnyLet","severity":"warning","description":"This variable implicitly has the any type.","message":[{"elements":[],"content":"This variable implicitly has the "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"any"},{"elements":[],"content":" type."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":[],"content":"Variable declarations without type annotation and initialization implicitly have the "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"any"},{"elements":[],"content":" type. Declare a type or initialize the variable with some value."}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\apps\\worker\\src\\pipeline-runner.ts"},"span":[11429,11435],"sourceCode":"// Positron Worker ÔÇö Pipeline Runner\r\n// Self-contained pipeline logic for BullMQ worker processes.\r\n// Accepts all dependencies via DI (PipelineDeps interface) for clean separation from the server.\r\n\r\nimport fs from 'node:fs';\r\nimport path from 'node:path';\r\nimport crypto from 'node:crypto';\r\nimport { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';\r\nimport type Database from 'better-sqlite3';\r\nimport { createRunId, buildRemoteUrl, MAX_FIX_LOOPS, generateBranchName, parsePhase, parseRunStatus } from '@positron/shared';\r\nimport { createRun, transition, markFailed } from '@positron/run-state';\r\nimport { TestCommandDetector, TestRunner } from '@positron/sandbox';\r\nimport type { GitHubStatusSyncService } from '@positron/github-adapter';\r\nimport type {\r\n  Phase, EventLevel, RepositoryConfig,\r\n  SpecKitAdapter, OpenCodeAdapter,\r\n} from '@positron/shared';\r\nimport type { RunState, RunEventData } from '@positron/run-state';\r\nimport type { GitHubAdapter, GitHubStatusSyncInput, GitHubStatusSyncResult, EvidenceItem } from '@positron/github-adapter';\r\nimport type { GitWorkspaceAdapter } from '@positron/sandbox';\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Dependency Injection Interface\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport interface PipelineDeps {\r\n  db: Database.Database;\r\n  repository: RepositoryConfig;\r\n  workspace: GitWorkspaceAdapter;\r\n  speckit: SpecKitAdapter;\r\n  opencode: OpenCodeAdapter;\r\n  github: GitHubAdapter;\r\n  syncService?: GitHubStatusSyncService;\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// DB Helpers (self-contained, uses deps.db)\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction getDb(deps: PipelineDeps): Database.Database {\r\n  return deps.db;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction saveRunToDb(run: RunState, deps: PipelineDeps): void {\r\n  const database = getDb(deps);\r\n  const ensureRepo = database.prepare(`\r\n    INSERT OR IGNORE INTO repositories (id, owner, name, url, local_path, enabled, created_at)\r\n    VALUES (?, 'positron', ?, '', '', 1, datetime('now'))\r\n  `);\r\n  const ensureIssue = database.prepare(`\r\n    INSERT OR IGNORE INTO issues (id, repo_id, number, title, state, labels_json, last_seen_at)\r\n    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ? || ' #' || ?, 'open', '[]', datetime('now'))\r\n  `);\r\n  const upsertRun = database.prepare(`\r\n    INSERT INTO runs (id, repo_id, issue_number, branch, phase, status, autonomy_level, attempt, started_at, finished_at)\r\n    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n    ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET\r\n      repo_id         = excluded.repo_id,\r\n      issue_number    = excluded.issue_number,\r\n      branch          = excluded.branch,\r\n      phase           = excluded.phase,\r\n      status          = excluded.status,\r\n      autonomy_level  = excluded.autonomy_level,\r\n      attempt         = excluded.attempt,\r\n      started_at      = excluded.started_at,\r\n      finished_at     = excluded.finished_at\r\n  `);\r\n\r\n  const transaction = database.transaction(() => {\r\n    ensureRepo.run(run.repoId, run.repoId);\r\n    ensureIssue.run(`issue-${run.repoId}-${run.issueNumber}`, run.repoId, run.issueNumber, 'Issue', String(run.issueNumber));\r\n    upsertRun.run(\r\n      run.id, run.repoId, run.issueNumber,\r\n      run.branch, run.phase, run.status,\r\n      run.autonomyLevel, run.attempt,\r\n      run.startedAt, run.finishedAt,\r\n    );\r\n  });\r\n  transaction();\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction loadRunFromDb(runId: string, deps: PipelineDeps): RunState | null {\r\n  try {\r\n    const row = getDb(deps).prepare('SELECT * FROM runs WHERE id = ?').get(runId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\r\n    if (!row) return null;\r\n    return {\r\n      id: String(row.id ?? ''),\r\n      repoId: String(row.repo_id ?? ''),\r\n      issueNumber: Number(row.issue_number ?? 0),\r\n      branch: row.branch ? String(row.branch) : null,\r\n      phase: parsePhase(String(row.phase ?? 'QUEUED')),\r\n      status: parseRunStatus(String(row.status ?? 'blocked')),\r\n      autonomyLevel: Number(row.autonomy_level ?? 1),\r\n      attempt: Number(row.attempt ?? 0),\r\n      startedAt: String(row.started_at ?? new Date().toISOString()),\r\n      finishedAt: row.finished_at ? String(row.finished_at) : null,\r\n      lastError: row.last_error ? String(row.last_error) : null,\r\n      workspacePath: row.workspace_path ? String(row.workspace_path) : null,\r\n    };\r\n  } catch (err) {\r\n    console.error(`[Worker] loadRunFromDb failed for ${runId}`, err);\r\n    return null;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction storeEvent(event: RunEventData, deps: PipelineDeps): void {\r\n  try {\r\n    const database = getDb(deps);\r\n    database.prepare(`\r\n      INSERT INTO run_events (id, run_id, phase, level, message, payload_json, created_at)\r\n      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n    `).run(\r\n      event.id, event.runId, event.phase, event.level, event.message,\r\n      event.payload ? JSON.stringify(event.payload) : '{}',\r\n      event.createdAt,\r\n    );\r\n  } catch (err) {\r\n    console.error(`[Worker] storeEvent failed for run ${event.runId}`, err);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getEvents(runId: string, deps: PipelineDeps): RunEventData[] {\r\n  try {\r\n    const rows = getDb(deps).prepare(\r\n      'SELECT * FROM run_events WHERE run_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC',\r\n    ).all(runId) as Array<Record<string, unknown>>;\r\n    return rows.map(row => ({\r\n      id: row.id as string,\r\n      runId: row.run_id as string,\r\n      phase: row.phase as Phase,\r\n      level: row.level as EventLevel,\r\n      message: row.message as string,\r\n      payload: row.payload_json ? JSON.parse(row.payload_json as string) as Record<string, unknown> : null,\r\n      createdAt: row.created_at as string,\r\n    }));\r\n  } catch (err) {\r\n    console.error(`[Worker] getEvents failed for run ${runId}`, err);\r\n    return [];\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction saveArtifact(runId: string, kind: string, content: string | string[], deps: PipelineDeps): void {\r\n  try {\r\n    const contentStr = Array.isArray(content) ? content.join('\\n') : content;\r\n    const artifactId = crypto.randomUUID();\r\n    const createdAt = new Date().toISOString();\r\n    getDb(deps).prepare(`\r\n      INSERT INTO artifacts (id, run_id, kind, content, created_at)\r\n      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\r\n      ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET\r\n        content = excluded.content\r\n    `).run(\r\n      artifactId,\r\n      runId,\r\n      kind,\r\n      contentStr,\r\n      createdAt,\r\n    );\r\n  } catch (err) {\r\n    console.error(`[Worker] saveArtifact failed for ${kind} / run ${runId}`, err);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction buildEvidence(run: RunState): EvidenceItem[] {\r\n  const items: EvidenceItem[] = [{ kind: 'run-phase', status: 'pass', summary: `Phase: ${run.phase}` }];\r\n  if (run.branch) items.push({ kind: 'branch', status: 'pass', summary: `Branch: ${run.branch}` });\r\n  return items;\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Safe GitHub Sync (never crashes the pipeline)\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nasync function safeSync(\r\n  _syncService: GitHubStatusSyncService,\r\n  operation: () => Promise<GitHubStatusSyncResult>,\r\n  runId: string,\r\n  context: Phase,\r\n  deps: PipelineDeps,\r\n): Promise<GitHubStatusSyncResult | null> {\r\n  try {\r\n    const result = await operation();\r\n    if (result.status === 'failed') {\r\n      storeEvent({\r\n        id: createRunId(),\r\n        runId,\r\n        phase: context,\r\n        level: 'WARN' as EventLevel,\r\n        message: `GitHub sync failed: ${result.reason ?? 'unknown'}`,\r\n        payload: null,\r\n        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n      }, deps);\r\n    }\r\n    return result;\r\n  } catch (err) {\r\n    storeEvent({\r\n      id: createRunId(),\r\n      runId,\r\n      phase: context,\r\n      level: 'ERROR' as EventLevel,\r\n      message: `GitHub sync error: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`,\r\n      payload: null,\r\n      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    }, deps);\r\n    return null;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Research Document Generator\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nconst __workerDirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));\r\n\r\nasync function generateResearchDocument(\r\n  github: GitHubAdapter,\r\n  repository: RepositoryConfig,\r\n  issueNumber: number,\r\n): Promise<string> {\r\n  const repoSlug = `${repository.owner}/${repository.repo}`;\r\n  const issueRef = `#${issueNumber}`;\r\n  const now = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);\r\n\r\n  let issueBody = '';\r\n  let issueTitle = '';\r\n  try {\r\n    const issue = await github.getIssue({ owner: repository.owner, repo: repository.repo, issueNumber });\r\n    issueTitle = issue.title ?? '';\r\n    issueBody = issue.body ?? '';\r\n  } catch (err) {\r\n    console.warn(`[Worker] generateResearchDocument: Failed to fetch issue #${issueNumber}: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  let readmeContent = '';\r\n  try {\r\n    const readmePath = path.resolve(__workerDirname, '..', '..', '..', '..', 'README.md');\r\n    if (fs.existsSync(readmePath)) {\r\n      readmeContent = fs.readFileSync(readmePath, 'utf-8').slice(0, 5000);\r\n    }\r\n  } catch { /* optional */ }\r\n\r\n  let searchResults = '';\r\n  const researchApiKey = process.env.POSITRON_RESEARCH_API_KEY;\r\n  if (researchApiKey) {\r\n    try {\r\n      const query = encodeURIComponent(`site:github.com/${repoSlug} issue #${issueNumber}`);\r\n      const response = await fetch(`https://api.search.brave.com/res/v1/web/search?q=${query}&count=5`, {\r\n        headers: {\r\n          'Accept': 'application/json',\r\n          'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip',\r\n          'X-Subscription-Token': researchApiKey,\r\n        },\r\n      });\r\n      if (response.ok) {\r\n        const data = await response.json() as Record<string, unknown>;\r\n        const results = (data as { web?: { results?: Array<{ title: string; url: string; description: string }> } }).web?.results?.slice(0, 5) ?? [];\r\n        searchResults = results.map(r => `- [${r.title}](${r.url}): ${r.description}`).join('\\n');\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (err) {\r\n      console.warn(`[Worker] generateResearchDocument: Brave Search failed: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const lines = [\r\n    `# Research Summary ÔÇö Issue ${issueRef}${issueTitle ? `: ${issueTitle}` : ''}`,\r\n    '',\r\n    `**Repository:** ${repoSlug}`,\r\n    `**Datum:** ${now}`,\r\n    '',\r\n    '---',\r\n    '',\r\n    '## GitHub Issue',\r\n    '',\r\n    issueBody ? issueBody.slice(0, 3000) : '_Issue body could not be fetched._',\r\n    '',\r\n    '## Local Context',\r\n    '',\r\n    readmeContent ? `### README.md (excerpt)\\n\\n\\`\\`\\`\\n${readmeContent.slice(0, 2000)}\\n\\`\\`\\`` : '_README.md not available._',\r\n    '',\r\n  ];\r\n\r\n  if (searchResults) {\r\n    lines.push('## Web Search Results (Brave)', '', searchResults, '');\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!issueBody && !readmeContent && !searchResults) {\r\n    lines.push('## Note', '', '_No external data could be fetched. Research is limited to the local workspace._', '');\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  lines.push('---', '', `_Research generated by Positron am ${now} f├╝r Issue ${issueRef}_`);\r\n  return lines.join('\\n');\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Phase Executor\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nasync function executePhase(\r\n  run: RunState,\r\n  deps: PipelineDeps,\r\n): Promise<RunState> {\r\n  const current = run;\r\n  let result;\r\n\r\n  switch (current.phase) {\r\n    case 'QUEUED':\r\n      result = transition(current, 'CLAIMED', 'Issue claimed', 'INFO');\r\n      break;\r\n    case 'CLAIMED':\r\n      if (deps.syncService) {\r\n        const syncInput: GitHubStatusSyncInput = {\r\n          runId: current.id, owner: deps.repository.owner, repo: deps.repository.repo,\r\n          issueNumber: current.issueNumber, phase: 'CLAIMED', status: 'active',\r\n          branchName: current.branch ?? undefined,\r\n        };\r\n        await safeSync(deps.syncService, () => deps.syncService?.syncRunAccepted(syncInput), current.id, 'CLAIMED', deps);\r\n      }\r\n      result = transition(current, 'REPO_SYNC', 'Repo synced', 'INFO');\r\n      break;\r\n    case 'REPO_SYNC':\r\n      try {\r\n        const workspaceRepository = {\r\n          owner: deps.repository.owner,\r\n          repo: deps.repository.repo,\r\n          remoteUrl: deps.repository.remoteUrl ?? buildRemoteUrl(deps.repository.owner, deps.repository.repo),\r\n        };\r\n        const ws = await deps.workspace.prepareWorkspace({\r\n          repository: workspaceRepository,\r\n          issueNumber: current.issueNumber,\r\n          issueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`,\r\n          runId: current.id,\r\n          baseBranch: deps.repository.defaultBranch,\r\n        });\r\n        current.branch = ws.branchName;\r\n        current.workspacePath = ws.workspacePath;\r\n        result = transition(current, 'ISSUE_CONTEXT', `Workspace: ${ws.workspacePath}`);\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        result = markFailed(current, 'FAILED_TRANSIENT', `Repo sync failed: ${String(err)}`);\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    case 'ISSUE_CONTEXT':\r\n      result = transition(current, 'WEB_RESEARCH', 'Research phase', 'INFO');\r\n      break;\r\n    case 'WEB_RESEARCH': {\r\n      const researchDoc = await generateResearchDocument(deps.github, deps.repository, current.issueNumber);\r\n      saveArtifact(current.id, 'research', researchDoc, deps);\r\n      storeEvent({\r\n        id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'WEB_RESEARCH',\r\n        level: 'INFO', message: `Research document generated (${researchDoc.length} chars)`,\r\n        payload: { artifactKind: 'research', size: researchDoc.length },\r\n        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n      }, deps);\r\n      result = transition(current, 'SPECIFY', `Research: ${researchDoc.length} chars research.md generated`);\r\n      break;\r\n    }\r\n    case 'SPECIFY': {\r\n      const wsPath = current.workspacePath ?? current.branch ?? '/tmp';\r\n      const realSpeckit = process.env.POSITRON_ENABLE_REAL_SPECKIT === 'true';\r\n\r\n      if (realSpeckit) {\r\n        try {\r\n          const initResult = await deps.speckit.initialize({\r\n            runId: current.id, workspacePath: wsPath,\r\n            issueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`, issueNumber: current.issueNumber,\r\n            mode: 'safe-cli', aiAgent: 'opencode',\r\n          });\r\n          if (initResult.status === 'success') {\r\n            storeEvent({ id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'SPECIFY', level: 'INFO', message: `Spec Kit initialized: ${initResult.summary}`, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, deps);\r\n            const specResult = await deps.opencode.runSlashCommand('speckit.specify', {\r\n              runId: current.id, workspacePath: wsPath,\r\n              issueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`, issueNumber: current.issueNumber,\r\n              mode: 'safe-cli',\r\n            });\r\n            result = transition(current, 'PLAN', `Real Spec Kit: ${specResult.summary}`, specResult.status === 'success' ? 'INFO' : 'WARN');\r\n            break;\r\n          }\r\n        } catch (err) {\r\n          storeEvent({ id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'SPECIFY', level: 'WARN', message: `Real Spec Kit error: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, deps);\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const input = { runId: current.id, workspacePath: wsPath, issueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`, issueNumber: current.issueNumber, mode: 'artifact-only' as const };\r\n      try {\r\n        const sr = await deps.speckit.runSpecify(input);\r\n        if (sr.status === 'success' || sr.status === 'skipped') {\r\n          saveArtifact(current.id, 'spec', sr.summary, deps);\r\n        }\r\n        result = transition(current, 'PLAN', sr.summary, sr.status === 'success' ? 'INFO' : 'WARN');\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        const errMsg = `Specify error: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`;\r\n        result = markFailed(current, 'FAILED_TRANSIENT', errMsg);\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    }\r\n    case 'PLAN': {\r\n      const wsPath = current.workspacePath ?? current.branch ?? '/tmp';\r\n      const realSpeckit = process.env.POSITRON_ENABLE_REAL_SPECKIT === 'true';\r\n\r\n      if (realSpeckit) {\r\n        try {\r\n          const planResult = await deps.opencode.runSlashCommand('speckit.plan', {\r\n            runId: current.id, workspacePath: wsPath,\r\n            issueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`, issueNumber: current.issueNumber,\r\n            mode: 'safe-cli',\r\n          });\r\n          result = transition(current, 'TASKS', `Real Spec Kit: ${planResult.summary}`, planResult.status === 'success' ? 'INFO' : 'WARN');\r\n          break;\r\n        } catch (err) {\r\n          storeEvent({ id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'PLAN', level: 'WARN', message: `Real Spec Kit error: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, deps);\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const input = { runId: current.id, workspacePath: wsPath, issueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`, issueNumber: current.issueNumber, mode: 'artifact-only' as const };\r\n      try {\r\n        const pr = await deps.speckit.runPlan(input);\r\n        if (pr.status === 'success' || pr.status === 'skipped') {\r\n          saveArtifact(current.id, 'plan', pr.summary, deps);\r\n        }\r\n        result = transition(current, 'TASKS', pr.summary, pr.status === 'success' || pr.status === 'skipped' ? 'INFO' : 'WARN');\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        const planErrMsg = `Plan error: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`;\r\n        result = markFailed(current, 'FAILED_TRANSIENT', planErrMsg);\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    }\r\n    case 'TASKS': {\r\n      const wsPath = current.workspacePath ?? current.branch ?? '/tmp';\r\n      const realSpeckit = process.env.POSITRON_ENABLE_REAL_SPECKIT === 'true';\r\n\r\n      if (realSpeckit) {\r\n        try {\r\n          const tasksResult = await deps.opencode.runSlashCommand('speckit.tasks', {\r\n            runId: current.id, workspacePath: wsPath,\r\n            issueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`, issueNumber: current.issueNumber,\r\n            mode: 'safe-cli',\r\n          });\r\n          result = transition(current, 'ANALYZE', `Real Spec Kit: ${tasksResult.summary}`, tasksResult.status === 'success' ? 'INFO' : 'WARN');\r\n          break;\r\n        } catch (err) {\r\n          storeEvent({ id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'TASKS', level: 'WARN', message: `Real Spec Kit error: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, deps);\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const input = { runId: current.id, workspacePath: wsPath, issueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`, issueNumber: current.issueNumber, mode: 'artifact-only' as const };\r\n      try {\r\n        const tr = await deps.speckit.runTasks(input);\r\n        if (tr.status === 'success' || tr.status === 'skipped') {\r\n          saveArtifact(current.id, 'tasks', tr.summary, deps);\r\n        }\r\n        result = transition(current, 'ANALYZE', tr.summary, tr.status === 'success' || tr.status === 'skipped' ? 'INFO' : 'WARN');\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        const tasksErrMsg = `Tasks error: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`;\r\n        result = markFailed(current, 'FAILED_TRANSIENT', tasksErrMsg);\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    }\r\n    case 'ANALYZE': {\r\n      const wsPath = current.workspacePath ?? current.branch ?? '/tmp';\r\n      const input = { runId: current.id, workspacePath: wsPath, issueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`, issueNumber: current.issueNumber, mode: 'artifact-only' as const };\r\n      try {\r\n        const ar = await deps.speckit.runAnalyze(input);\r\n        result = transition(current, 'REVIEW', ar.summary, 'INFO');\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        storeEvent({ id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'ANALYZE', level: 'WARN', message: `Analyze error: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, deps);\r\n        result = transition(current, 'REVIEW', 'Analysis complete', 'INFO');\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    }\r\n    case 'REVIEW': {\r\n      const requiredArtifacts = ['spec', 'plan', 'tasks'];\r\n      const existingKinds = new Set(\r\n        (getDb(deps).prepare('SELECT DISTINCT kind FROM artifacts WHERE run_id = ?').all(current.id) as Array<{ kind: string }>)\r\n          .map(r => r.kind),\r\n      );\r\n      const missing = requiredArtifacts.filter(k => !existingKinds.has(k));\r\n      if (missing.length > 0) {\r\n        const msg = `Review failed: missing artifacts: ${missing.join(', ')}`;\r\n        result = markFailed(current, 'FAILED_BLOCKED', msg);\r\n      } else {\r\n        result = transition(current, 'IMPLEMENT', `Review passed: ${requiredArtifacts.length}/${requiredArtifacts.length} artifacts present`);\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    }\r\n    case 'IMPLEMENT': {\r\n      const wsPath = current.workspacePath ?? current.branch ?? '/tmp';\r\n      const input = { runId: current.id, workspacePath: wsPath, issueTitle: `Issue #${current.issueNumber}`, issueNumber: current.issueNumber, mode: 'safe-cli' as const, autonomyLevel: current.autonomyLevel };\r\n\r\n      try {\r\n        const ir = await deps.opencode.runImplement(input);\r\n        if (ir.status === 'blocked') {\r\n          storeEvent({ id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'IMPLEMENT', level: 'WARN', message: `Implement blocked: ${ir.blockedReason ?? 'policy'}`, payload: { result: ir }, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, deps);\r\n        }\r\n        result = transition(current, 'TEST', ir.summary, ir.status === 'success' ? 'INFO' : 'WARN');\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        const implErrMsg = `Implement error: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`;\r\n        result = markFailed(current, 'FAILED_TRANSIENT', implErrMsg);\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    }\r\n    case 'TEST':\r\n      try {\r\n        const wsPath = current.workspacePath ?? current.branch ?? '/tmp';\r\n        const detector = new TestCommandDetector();\r\n        const detection = await detector.detect(wsPath);\r\n        if (detection.commands.length === 0) {\r\n          const strictMode = process.env.POSITRON_STRICT_TEST_MODE === 'true';\r\n          if (strictMode) {\r\n            result = markFailed(current, 'FAILED_BLOCKED', 'No test commands configured. Set up tests or disable strict mode.');\r\n          } else {\r\n            result = transition(current, 'VERIFY', 'No test commands configured ÔÇö tests skipped', 'WARN');\r\n          }\r\n        } else {\r\n          const runner = new TestRunner();\r\n          const report = await runner.runDetectedCommands({\r\n            runId: current.id, workspacePath: wsPath,\r\n            commands: detection.commands, mode: 'standard',\r\n          });\r\n          if (deps.syncService && report) {\r\n            const syncInput: GitHubStatusSyncInput = {\r\n              runId: current.id, owner: deps.repository.owner, repo: deps.repository.repo,\r\n              issueNumber: current.issueNumber, phase: 'TEST', status: report.status,\r\n              branchName: current.branch ?? undefined, workspacePath: wsPath, testReport: report,\r\n            };\r\n            if (report.status === 'blocked') {\r\n              await safeSync(deps.syncService, () => deps.syncService?.syncBlocked({\r\n                ...syncInput, error: { type: 'blocked', message: report.summary },\r\n              }), current.id, 'TEST', deps);\r\n            } else if (report.status === 'failed') {\r\n              await safeSync(deps.syncService, () => deps.syncService?.syncTestReport(syncInput), current.id, 'TEST', deps);\r\n            } else {\r\n              await safeSync(deps.syncService, () => deps.syncService?.syncTestReport(syncInput), current.id, 'TEST', deps);\r\n            }\r\n          }\r\n          result = transition(current, 'VERIFY', `Tests ${report.status}`, report.status === 'passed' ? 'INFO' : 'ERROR');\r\n        }\r\n      } catch {\r\n        result = transition(current, 'VERIFY', 'Test-Ausf├╝hrung fehlgeschlagen (MVP)', 'WARN');\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    case 'VERIFY':\r\n      current.branch = current.branch ?? generateBranchName(current.issueNumber, `run-${current.id.slice(0, 8)}`);\r\n      result = transition(current, 'COMMIT', 'Verified, commit ready');\r\n      break;\r\n    case 'COMMIT': {\r\n      const branch = current.branch ?? generateBranchName(current.issueNumber, `run-${current.id.slice(0, 8)}`);\r\n      const pushAllowed = process.env.POSITRON_ENABLE_PUSH === 'true';\r\n      const commitMsg = `fix(issue-${current.issueNumber}): Positron automated changes [Run: ${current.id.slice(0, 8)}]`;\r\n      const commitWsPath = current.workspacePath ?? `/tmp/positron-ws-${current.id.slice(0, 8)}`;\r\n\r\n      try {\r\n        let changeSummary = '';\r\n        let hasChanges = false;\r\n        try {\r\n          const status = await deps.workspace.getStatus(commitWsPath);\r\n          hasChanges = !status.isClean;\r\n          const staged = status.staged.length;\r\n          const unstaged = status.unstaged.length;\r\n          const untracked = status.untracked.length;\r\n          changeSummary = `${staged} staged, ${unstaged} unstaged, ${untracked} untracked`;\r\n        } catch { /* status optional */ }\r\n\r\n        if (!hasChanges) {\r\n          result = markFailed(current, 'FAILED_BLOCKED',\r\n            `No changes were made during implementation ÔÇö no files changed in workspace ${commitWsPath} (${changeSummary})`);\r\n          break;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const commitResult = await deps.workspace.commit(commitWsPath, commitMsg);\r\n\r\n        let pushResult = '';\r\n        if (pushAllowed) {\r\n          await deps.workspace.push({ workspacePath: commitWsPath, branch });\r\n          pushResult = ', pushed';\r\n        } else {\r\n          pushResult = ', push skipped (POSITRON_ENABLE_PUSH not set)';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const summary = `Committed: ${commitResult.sha.slice(0, 7)}${pushResult} (${changeSummary})`;\r\n        result = transition(current, 'PR_CREATE', summary, 'INFO');\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        storeEvent({\r\n          id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'COMMIT',\r\n          level: 'ERROR', message: `Commit/Push failed: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`,\r\n          payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n        }, deps);\r\n        result = transition(current, 'PR_CREATE', `Commit skipped: ${String(err).slice(0, 100)}`, 'WARN');\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    }\r\n    case 'PR_CREATE': {\r\n      const branch = current.branch ?? generateBranchName(current.issueNumber, `run-${current.id.slice(0, 8)}`);\r\n      const evidence = buildEvidence(current);\r\n      const body = `## Positron Automated Changes\\n\\n**Run ID:** \\`${current.id}\\`\\n**Issue:** #${current.issueNumber}\\n**Branch:** \\`${branch}\\`\\n\\n---\\n\\nCloses #${current.issueNumber}\\n\\n_Generated by [Positron](https://github.com/xxammaxx/Positron)_`;\r\n\r\n      try {\r\n        const pr = await deps.github.createPullRequest({\r\n          owner: deps.repository.owner, repo: deps.repository.repo,\r\n          title: `Positron: ${current.issueNumber ? `Issue #${current.issueNumber} ÔÇö ` : ''}Automated changes`,\r\n          head: branch,\r\n          base: deps.repository.defaultBranch ?? 'main',\r\n          body,\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        if (deps.syncService) {\r\n          const syncInput: GitHubStatusSyncInput = {\r\n            runId: current.id, owner: deps.repository.owner, repo: deps.repository.repo,\r\n            issueNumber: current.issueNumber, phase: 'PR_CREATE', status: 'success',\r\n            branchName: branch,\r\n            prNumber: pr.number, prUrl: pr.htmlUrl,\r\n            evidence,\r\n          };\r\n          await safeSync(deps.syncService, () => deps.syncService?.syncPrCreated(syncInput), current.id, 'PR_CREATE', deps);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const prReviewers = process.env.POSITRON_PR_REVIEWERS?.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);\r\n        const prTeamReviewers = process.env.POSITRON_PR_TEAM_REVIEWERS?.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);\r\n        if (prReviewers?.length || prTeamReviewers?.length) {\r\n          try {\r\n            await deps.github.requestReviewers({\r\n              owner: deps.repository.owner, repo: deps.repository.repo,\r\n              prNumber: pr.number,\r\n              reviewers: prReviewers,\r\n              teamReviewers: prTeamReviewers,\r\n            });\r\n          } catch { /* best-effort */ }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        result = transition(current, 'MERGE', `PR #${pr.number} created: ${pr.htmlUrl}`, 'INFO');\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        storeEvent({\r\n          id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'PR_CREATE',\r\n          level: 'ERROR',\r\n          message: `PR creation failed: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`,\r\n          payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n        }, deps);\r\n        result = markFailed(current, 'FAILED_BLOCKED', `PR creation failed: ${String(err).slice(0, 100)}`);\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    }\r\n    case 'MERGE': {\r\n      const mergeAllowed = process.env.POSITRON_ENABLE_MERGE === 'true';\r\n      const mergeDryRun = process.env.POSITRON_MERGE_DRY_RUN === 'true';\r\n      const mergeKillSwitch = process.env.POSITRON_MERGE_KILL_SWITCH !== 'false';\r\n      const branch = current.branch;\r\n      if (!branch) {\r\n        result = transition(current, 'DONE', 'Merge skipped (no branch)', 'INFO');\r\n        break;\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      let pr: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof deps.github.listPullRequests>>[0] | null = null;\r\n      try {\r\n        const prs = await deps.github.listPullRequests({\r\n          owner: deps.repository.owner, repo: deps.repository.repo,\r\n          head: `${deps.repository.owner}:${branch}`, state: 'open',\r\n        });\r\n        pr = prs[0] ?? null;\r\n      } catch { /* PR lookup optional */ }\r\n\r\n      if (!pr) {\r\n        result = transition(current, 'DONE', 'Merge skipped (no open PR found)', 'INFO');\r\n        break;\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      if (pr.state !== 'open') {\r\n        result = transition(current, 'DONE', `PR #${pr.number} ist ${pr.state} ÔÇö Merge ├╝bersprungen`, 'WARN');\r\n        break;\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      if (mergeDryRun) {\r\n        let mergeableState = 'checking';\r\n        const maxMergeableRetries = 3;\r\n        const mergeableRetryDelay = 5000;\r\n\r\n        for (let retry = 0; retry <= maxMergeableRetries; retry++) {\r\n          try {\r\n            const prDetail = await deps.github.getPullRequest(deps.repository.owner, deps.repository.repo, pr.number);\r\n            const raw = prDetail.mergeable;\r\n            if (raw === true) { mergeableState = 'clean'; break; }\r\n            if (raw === false) { mergeableState = 'conflict'; break; }\r\n            if (retry < maxMergeableRetries) {\r\n              await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, mergeableRetryDelay));\r\n            }\r\n          } catch { break; }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const testEvent = getEvents(current.id, deps).find(e => e.phase === 'TEST' && e.level === 'INFO');\r\n        const allGates: Array<{ gate: string; passed: boolean; detail: string }> = [\r\n          { gate: 'Auto-Merge Enabled', passed: mergeAllowed, detail: mergeAllowed ? 'POSITRON_ENABLE_MERGE=true' : 'POSITRON_ENABLE_MERGE not set' },\r\n          { gate: 'Kill-Switch', passed: !mergeKillSwitch, detail: mergeKillSwitch ? 'POSITRON_MERGE_KILL_SWITCH=true ÔÇö blocked' : 'Kill-Switch not active' },\r\n          { gate: 'Run Status Active', passed: current.status === 'active', detail: `Run status is \"${current.status}\"` },\r\n          { gate: 'Test Evidence', passed: !!testEvent, detail: testEvent ? 'Test phase completed with INFO' : 'No passing test evidence' },\r\n          { gate: 'Branch', passed: !!current.branch, detail: `Branch: ${current.branch}` },\r\n          { gate: 'PR Open', passed: pr.state === 'open', detail: `PR state: ${pr.state}` },\r\n          { gate: 'Mergeable', passed: mergeableState === 'clean', detail: `GitHub mergeable: ${mergeableState}` },\r\n        ];\r\n\r\n        const allPassed = allGates.every(g => g.passed);\r\n        const decision = allPassed ? 'WOULD_MERGE' : 'WOULD_BLOCK';\r\n        const blockedGates = allGates.filter(g => !g.passed);\r\n\r\n        storeEvent({\r\n          id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'MERGE', level: 'GATE' as EventLevel,\r\n          message: `[DRY-RUN] ${decision}: ${allGates.filter(g => g.passed).length}/${allGates.length} gates pass`,\r\n          payload: { decision, allPassed, mergeable: mergeableState, gates: allGates, prNumber: pr.number, prUrl: pr.htmlUrl },\r\n          createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n        }, deps);\r\n\r\n        try {\r\n          const gateList = allGates.map(g => `- ${g.passed ? 'Ô£à' : 'ÔØî'} **${g.gate}:** ${g.detail}`).join('\\n');\r\n          await deps.github.createIssueComment(\r\n            { owner: deps.repository.owner, repo: deps.repository.repo, issueNumber: current.issueNumber },\r\n            `## ­ƒöì Auto-Merge Dry-Run Result\\n\\n**Decision:** ${decision}\\n**PR:** #${pr.number}\\n**Mergeable:** ${mergeableState}\\n\\n### Gates (${allGates.filter(g => g.passed).length}/${allGates.length})\\n\\n${gateList}\\n\\n> ­ƒøí **No merge executed** ÔÇö Dry-Run only.`,\r\n          );\r\n        } catch { /* comment is best-effort */ }\r\n\r\n        result = transition(current, 'DONE',\r\n          `[DRY-RUN] ${decision}: ${allPassed ? 'All gates pass' : `${blockedGates.length} gates fail ÔÇö ${blockedGates.map(g => g.gate).join(', ')}`}`,\r\n          allPassed ? 'INFO' : 'WARN');\r\n        break;\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      if (mergeKillSwitch) {\r\n        result = transition(current, 'DONE', 'Merge BLOCKED: Kill-Switch (POSITRON_MERGE_KILL_SWITCH=true)', 'WARN');\r\n        break;\r\n      }\r\n      if (!mergeAllowed) {\r\n        result = transition(current, 'DONE', 'Merge skipped (POSITRON_ENABLE_MERGE not set)', 'INFO');\r\n        break;\r\n      }\r\n      if (current.status !== 'active') {\r\n        result = transition(current, 'DONE', `Merge blocked: Run status is ${current.status}`, 'WARN');\r\n        break;\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      try {\r\n        const mergeResult = await deps.github.mergePullRequest({\r\n          owner: deps.repository.owner, repo: deps.repository.repo,\r\n          prNumber: pr.number, strategy: 'squash',\r\n          commitTitle: `Positron: Issue #${current.issueNumber} ÔÇö Automated changes`,\r\n          commitMessage: `Run: ${current.id.slice(0, 8)}`,\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        if (mergeResult.merged) {\r\n          if (deps.syncService) {\r\n            const syncInput: GitHubStatusSyncInput = {\r\n              runId: current.id, owner: deps.repository.owner, repo: deps.repository.repo,\r\n              issueNumber: current.issueNumber, phase: 'MERGE', status: 'success',\r\n              branchName: mergeResult.sha, prNumber: pr.number, prUrl: pr.htmlUrl,\r\n            };\r\n            await safeSync(deps.syncService, () => deps.syncService?.syncMerged(syncInput), current.id, 'MERGE', deps);\r\n          }\r\n          try {\r\n            await deps.github.closeIssue(deps.repository.owner, deps.repository.repo, current.issueNumber);\r\n          } catch { /* best-effort */ }\r\n          result = transition(current, 'DONE', `PR #${pr.number} merged: ${mergeResult.sha?.slice(0, 7)}`, 'INFO');\r\n        } else {\r\n          result = transition(current, 'DONE', `PR #${pr.number} not mergeable: ${mergeResult.message ?? 'unknown'}`, 'WARN');\r\n        }\r\n      } catch (err) {\r\n        storeEvent({\r\n          id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: 'MERGE',\r\n          level: 'WARN', message: `Merge failed: ${String(err).slice(0, 200)}`,\r\n          payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n        }, deps);\r\n        result = transition(current, 'DONE', `Merge failed: ${String(err).slice(0, 100)}`, 'WARN');\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n    }\r\n    default:\r\n      return current;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (result.ok) {\r\n    storeEvent(result.event, deps);\r\n    return result.run;\r\n  }\r\n    storeEvent(result.event, deps);\r\n    return current;\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Main Pipeline Loop (Worker Version)\r\n//\r\n// NOTE: SSE live-streaming is NOT available for worker-processed runs.\r\n// The worker persists run state to the DB after each phase transition,\r\n// so GET /api/runs/:id and polling-based UIs always see current state.\r\n// Real-time SSE updates are only available for inline-executed runs\r\n// (when Redis is unavailable and the fallback is used).\r\n//\r\n// Signal checking (PAUSE/ABORT/RESUME/RETRY) reads from the `run_signals`\r\n// DB table, shared with the server process.\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Check for an active run-control signal from the shared `run_signals` table.\r\n * Returns the signal name or null. Inline to avoid importing from apps/server.\r\n */\r\nfunction checkSignal(db: Database.Database, runId: string, phase?: string): string | null {\r\n  try {\r\n    let row: { signal: string } | undefined;\r\n    if (phase) {\r\n      row = db.prepare(`\r\n        SELECT signal FROM run_signals\r\n        WHERE run_id = ? AND (target_phase = ? OR target_phase IS NULL)\r\n        ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1\r\n      `).get(runId, phase) as { signal: string } | undefined;\r\n    } else {\r\n      row = db.prepare(`\r\n        SELECT signal FROM run_signals\r\n        WHERE run_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1\r\n      `).get(runId) as { signal: string } | undefined;\r\n    }\r\n    return row?.signal ?? null;\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null; // table may not exist yet\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function runPipeline(\r\n  run: RunState,\r\n  deps: PipelineDeps,\r\n): Promise<RunState> {\r\n  let current = run;\r\n  const maxSteps = 20;\r\n  let attempt = 0;\r\n\r\n  const envMaxRetries = process.env.POSITRON_MAX_FIX_LOOPS\r\n    ? Number.parseInt(process.env.POSITRON_MAX_FIX_LOOPS, 10)\r\n    : undefined;\r\n  const maxAttempts = envMaxRetries && !Number.isNaN(envMaxRetries) ? envMaxRetries : MAX_FIX_LOOPS;\r\n  const fixLoopEnabled = process.env.POSITRON_ENABLE_FIX_LOOP === 'true';\r\n  let lastRetryTime = 0;\r\n\r\n  for (let i = 0; i < maxSteps; i++) {\r\n    // Check control signals (shared with server via run_signals DB table)\r\n    const sig = checkSignal(deps.db, current.id, current.phase);\r\n    if (sig?.toLowerCase() === 'abort') {\r\n      const cancelled = { ...current, status: 'cancelled' as RunState['status'], finishedAt: new Date().toISOString() };\r\n      storeEvent({ id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: current.phase, level: 'INFO', message: 'Run aborted by user (worker)', payload: { action: 'abort' }, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, deps);\r\n      saveRunToDb(cancelled, deps);\r\n      return cancelled;\r\n    }\r\n    if (sig?.toLowerCase() === 'pause') {\r\n      // Worker pause: wait and re-check signal\r\n      storeEvent({ id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: current.phase, level: 'INFO', message: 'Run paused by user (worker ÔÇö waiting)', payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, deps);\r\n      while (true) {\r\n        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000));\r\n        const s = checkSignal(deps.db, current.id, current.phase);\r\n        if (s?.toLowerCase() === 'abort') {\r\n          const cancelled = { ...current, status: 'cancelled' as RunState['status'], finishedAt: new Date().toISOString() };\r\n          storeEvent({ id: createRunId(), runId: current.id, phase: current.phase, level: 'INFO', message: 'Run aborted while paused (worker)', payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() }, deps);\r\n          saveRunToDb(cancelled, deps);\r\n          return cancelled;\r\n        }\r\n        if (s?.toLowerCase() === 'resume' || s === null) break;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const next = await executePhase(current, deps);\r\n    if (next.phase === current.phase || next.phase === 'DONE' || next.phase.startsWith('FAILED')) {\r\n      // --- Fix-Loop ---\r\n      if (fixLoopEnabled && next.phase === 'FAILED_TRANSIENT' && attempt < maxAttempts) {\r\n        attempt++;\r\n\r\n        const allTransient = getEvents(next.id, deps).filter((e: RunEventData) => e.phase === 'FAILED_TRANSIENT');\r\n        const transientEvent = allTransient[allTransient.length - 1];\r\n        const failedPhase = (transientEvent?.payload as Record<string, unknown> | null)?.failedPhase as string | undefined;\r\n        const retryFromPhase = failedPhase && failedPhase !== 'FAILED_TRANSIENT' ? failedPhase : 'TEST';\r\n\r\n        const backoffMs = Math.min(1000 * 2 ** (attempt - 1), 30000);\r\n        const now = Date.now();\r\n        const timeSinceLastRetry = now - lastRetryTime;\r\n        if (timeSinceLastRetry < backoffMs) {\r\n          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, backoffMs - timeSinceLastRetry));\r\n        }\r\n        lastRetryTime = Date.now();\r\n\r\n        storeEvent({\r\n          id: createRunId(), runId: next.id, phase: retryFromPhase as Phase,\r\n          level: 'WARN',\r\n          message: `Fix-Loop retry ${attempt}/${maxAttempts} ÔÇö phase: ${retryFromPhase}, backoff: ${backoffMs}ms`,\r\n          payload: { attempt, maxAttempts, retryFromPhase, backoffMs },\r\n          createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n        }, deps);\r\n\r\n        current = {\r\n          ...next,\r\n          phase:
