{\r\n\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase as any)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for non-failure phases\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst nonFailures = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t\t\"MERGE\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of nonFailures) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for blocked/approval phases\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_PUSH\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_MERGE\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"GATE_APPROVE\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"GATE_REVISE\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny","severity":"warning","description":"Unexpected any. Specify a different type.","message":[{"elements":[],"content":"Unexpected "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"any"},{"elements":[],"content":". Specify a different type."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"any"},{"elements":[],"content":" disables many type checking rules. Its use should be avoided."}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\packages\\run-state\\src\\__tests__\\state-machine.contract.test.ts"},"span":[16554,16557],"sourceCode":"/**\r\n * State Machine Contract Tests (QA-023)\r\n *\r\n * Verifies the PUBLIC API contract of @positron/run-state's state machine.\r\n * Tests exported behavior guarantees, NOT internal implementation details.\r\n *\r\n * Contract guarantees:\r\n * - createRun() produces a well-formed RunState with expected shape\r\n * - transition() accepts valid transitions and rejects invalid ones\r\n * - markFailed() produces defined failure states\r\n * - retry() only works from FAILED_TRANSIENT\r\n * - isTerminalPhase() identifies phases with no outgoing transitions\r\n * - isFailurePhase() identifies error phases\r\n * - VALID_TRANSITIONS is a complete map with all 28 phases\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { describe, it, expect } from \"vitest\";\r\nimport {\r\n\tcreateRun,\r\n\tcanTransition,\r\n\ttransition,\r\n\tmarkFailed,\r\n\tretry,\r\n\tisTerminalPhase,\r\n\tisFailurePhase,\r\n\tVALID_TRANSITIONS,\r\n} from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\nimport type { RunState } from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Helper\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction makeRun(overrides: Partial<RunState> = {}): RunState {\r\n\treturn {\r\n\t\tid: \"test-run-id\",\r\n\t\trepoId: \"test-owner/test-repo\",\r\n\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\tphase: \"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t...overrides,\r\n\t};\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: createRun()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"createRun() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns a RunState with all required fields\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"owner/repo\", 42, 0);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(run).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(typeof run.id).toBe(\"string\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.id.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);\r\n\t\texpect(run.repoId).toBe(\"owner/repo\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.issueNumber).toBe(42);\r\n\t\texpect(run.autonomyLevel).toBe(0);\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.attempt).toBe(1);\r\n\t\texpect(run.branch).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.lastError).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.workspacePath).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(typeof run.startedAt).toBe(\"string\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates unique IDs for each run\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run1 = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, 0);\r\n\t\tconst run2 = createRun(\"a/b\", 2, 0);\r\n\t\texpect(run1.id).not.toBe(run2.id);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"always starts in QUEUED phase with active status\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, 2);\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"accepts autonomyLevel values 0 through 4\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (let level = 0; level <= 4; level++) {\r\n\t\t\tconst run = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, level);\r\n\t\t\texpect(run.autonomyLevel).toBe(level);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: VALID_TRANSITIONS\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"VALID_TRANSITIONS contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"contains entries for all 28 phases\", () => {\r\n\t\t// All 28 phases must be present as keys\r\n\t\tconst phases = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"REPO_SYNC\",\r\n\t\t\t\"ISSUE_CONTEXT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"WEB_RESEARCH\",\r\n\t\t\t\"SPECIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLARIFY_OPTIONAL\",\r\n\t\t\t\"PLAN\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TASKS\",\r\n\t\t\t\"ANALYZE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"REVIEW\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t\t\"VERIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\"COMMIT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"PR_CREATE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_PUSH\",\r\n\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"GATE_APPROVE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"GATE_REVISE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"RESUME_PENDING\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of phases) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(VALID_TRANSITIONS).toHaveProperty(phase);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"is readonly (type-level enforcement)\", () => {\r\n\t\t// VALID_TRANSITIONS is declared as Readonly<Record<...>>\r\n\t\t// This is a compile-time contract: we verify it exists and has entries\r\n\t\texpect(Object.keys(VALID_TRANSITIONS).length).toBe(28);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"contains no duplicate targets in any transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (const [_phase, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tconst unique = new Set(targets);\r\n\t\t\texpect(unique.size).toBe(targets.length);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: canTransition()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"canTransition() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for valid transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"QUEUED\", \"CLAIMED\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"CLAIMED\", \"REPO_SYNC\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"TEST\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"MERGE\", \"DONE\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for invalid transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"QUEUED\", \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"DONE\", \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"CLAIMED\", \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for terminal phases as source\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst terminalPhases = [\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t] as const;\r\n\t\tfor (const terminal of terminalPhases) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(canTransition(terminal, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for unknown phase\", () => {\r\n\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"UNKNOWN_PHASE\" as any, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"is consistent with VALID_TRANSITIONS map\", () => {\r\n\t\t// Every entry in the map must return true from canTransition\r\n\t\tfor (const [from, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tfor (const to of targets) {\r\n\t\t\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(from as any, to as any)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: transition()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"transition() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:true on valid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"moving to claimed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(\"moving to claimed\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:false on invalid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"cannot jump\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\"); // unchanged\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on valid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"move\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on invalid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"nope\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to done on DONE transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"MERGE\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"completed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to failed on FAILED transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"CLAIMED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"blocked by merge\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(\"blocked by merge\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to active on non-terminal transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"claimed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates an event with stable shape\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"claiming\", \"INFO\", {\r\n\t\t\tkey: \"val\",\r\n\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.id).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.runId).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"INFO\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(\"claiming\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toEqual({ key: \"val\" });\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.createdAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"applies full transition chain from QUEUED to DONE\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst chain: Array<{ from: string; to: string }> = [\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"QUEUED\", to: \"CLAIMED\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"CLAIMED\", to: \"REPO_SYNC\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"REPO_SYNC\", to: \"ISSUE_CONTEXT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"ISSUE_CONTEXT\", to: \"WEB_RESEARCH\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"WEB_RESEARCH\", to: \"SPECIFY\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"SPECIFY\", to: \"PLAN\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"PLAN\", to: \"TASKS\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"TASKS\", to: \"ANALYZE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"ANALYZE\", to: \"REVIEW\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"REVIEW\", to: \"IMPLEMENT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"IMPLEMENT\", to: \"TEST\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"TEST\", to: \"VERIFY\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"VERIFY\", to: \"COMMIT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"COMMIT\", to: \"PR_CREATE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"PR_CREATE\", to: \"MERGE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"MERGE\", to: \"DONE\" },\r\n\t\t];\r\n\r\n\t\tlet run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tfor (const step of chain) {\r\n\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, step.to as any, `step: ${step.to}`);\r\n\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\trun = result.run;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"DONE\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: markFailed()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"markFailed() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"always returns ok:true\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", \"test failure\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets phase to the specified failure kind\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst kinds = [\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t] as const;\r\n\t\tfor (const kind of kinds) {\r\n\t\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, \"reason\");\r\n\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(kind);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status based on failure kind\", () => {\r\n\t\t// FAILED and FAILED_BLOCKED ÔåÆ blocked\r\n\t\tconst run1 = makeRun();\r\n\t\texpect(markFailed(run1, \"FAILED\", \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"blocked\");\r\n\t\texpect(markFailed(run1, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"blocked\");\r\n\r\n\t\t// FAILED_TRANSIENT and FAILED_UNSAFE ÔåÆ failed\r\n\t\tconst run2 = makeRun();\r\n\t\texpect(markFailed(run2, \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\", \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t\texpect(markFailed(run2, \"FAILED_UNSAFE\", \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets finishedAt to current time\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", \"reason\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(new Date(result.run.finishedAt!).getTime()).toBeGreaterThan(0);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets lastError to the provided reason\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", \"disk full\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(\"disk full\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates an event with failure metadata in payload\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"IMPLEMENT\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, conflict\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"FAILED_BLOCKED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toEqual({\r\n\t\t\tfailedPhase: \"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\treason: \"merge conflict\",\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", \"reason\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: retry()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"retry() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:true from FAILED_TRANSIENT\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\r\n\t\tfor \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\", attempt: 3 });\r\n\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.attempt).toBe(4);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates event with retry metadata\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst });\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"Retry attempt 2\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on retry\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"gives same result for multiple retries (idempotent state)\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\", attempt: 1 });\r\n\t\tconst result1 = retry(run);\r\n\t\tconst result2 = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\t// Both retries from the same input should produce same attempt increment\r\n\t\texpect(result1.run.attempt).toBe(2);\r\n\t\texpect(result2.run.attempt).toBe(2);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isTerminalPhase() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for phases with no outgoing transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst terminal = [\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of terminal) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(isTerminalPhase(phase as any)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for active phases\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst active = [\"QUEUED\", \"CLAIMED\", \"IMPLEMENT\", \"TEST\", \"MERGE\"];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of active) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(isTerminalPhase(phase as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"is consistent with VALID_TRANSITIONS\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (const [phase, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tconst isTerminal = targets.length === 0;\r\n\t\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\t\texpect(isTerminalPhase(phase as any)).toBe(isTerminal);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isFailurePhase() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for all failure phases\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst {\r\n\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase as any)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for non-failure phases\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst nonFailures = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t\t\"MERGE\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of nonFailures) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for blocked/approval phases\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_PUSH\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_MERGE\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"GATE_APPROVE\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"GATE_REVISE\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny","severity":"warning","description":"Unexpected any. Specify a different type.","message":[{"elements":[],"content":"Unexpected "},{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"any"},{"elements":[],"content":". Specify a different type."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"any"},{"elements":[],"content":" disables many type checking rules. Its use should be avoided."}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\packages\\run-state\\src\\__tests__\\state-machine.contract.test.ts"},"span":[16687,16690],"sourceCode":"/**\r\n * State Machine Contract Tests (QA-023)\r\n *\r\n * Verifies the PUBLIC API contract of @positron/run-state's state machine.\r\n * Tests exported behavior guarantees, NOT internal implementation details.\r\n *\r\n * Contract guarantees:\r\n * - createRun() produces a well-formed RunState with expected shape\r\n * - transition() accepts valid transitions and rejects invalid ones\r\n * - markFailed() produces defined failure states\r\n * - retry() only works from FAILED_TRANSIENT\r\n * - isTerminalPhase() identifies phases with no outgoing transitions\r\n * - isFailurePhase() identifies error phases\r\n * - VALID_TRANSITIONS is a complete map with all 28 phases\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { describe, it, expect } from \"vitest\";\r\nimport {\r\n\tcreateRun,\r\n\tcanTransition,\r\n\ttransition,\r\n\tmarkFailed,\r\n\tretry,\r\n\tisTerminalPhase,\r\n\tisFailurePhase,\r\n\tVALID_TRANSITIONS,\r\n} from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\nimport type { RunState } from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Helper\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction makeRun(overrides: Partial<RunState> = {}): RunState {\r\n\treturn {\r\n\t\tid: \"test-run-id\",\r\n\t\trepoId: \"test-owner/test-repo\",\r\n\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\tphase: \"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t...overrides,\r\n\t};\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: createRun()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"createRun() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns a RunState with all required fields\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"owner/repo\", 42, 0);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(run).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(typeof run.id).toBe(\"string\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.id.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);\r\n\t\texpect(run.repoId).toBe(\"owner/repo\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.issueNumber).toBe(42);\r\n\t\texpect(run.autonomyLevel).toBe(0);\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.attempt).toBe(1);\r\n\t\texpect(run.branch).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.lastError).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.workspacePath).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(typeof run.startedAt).toBe(\"string\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates unique IDs for each run\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run1 = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, 0);\r\n\t\tconst run2 = createRun(\"a/b\", 2, 0);\r\n\t\texpect(run1.id).not.toBe(run2.id);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"always starts in QUEUED phase with active status\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, 2);\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"accepts autonomyLevel values 0 through 4\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (let level = 0; level <= 4; level++) {\r\n\t\t\tconst run = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, level);\r\n\t\t\texpect(run.autonomyLevel).toBe(level);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: VALID_TRANSITIONS\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"VALID_TRANSITIONS contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"contains entries for all 28 phases\", () => {\r\n\t\t// All 28 phases must be present as keys\r\n\t\tconst phases = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"REPO_SYNC\",\r\n\t\t\t\"ISSUE_CONTEXT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"WEB_RESEARCH\",\r\n\t\t\t\"SPECIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLARIFY_OPTIONAL\",\r\n\t\t\t\"PLAN\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TASKS\",\r\n\t\t\t\"ANALYZE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"REVIEW\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t\t\"VERIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\"COMMIT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"PR_CREATE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_PUSH\",\r\n\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"GATE_APPROVE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"GATE_REVISE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"RESUME_PENDING\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of phases) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(VALID_TRANSITIONS).toHaveProperty(phase);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"is readonly (type-level enforcement)\", () => {\r\n\t\t// VALID_TRANSITIONS is declared as Readonly<Record<...>>\r\n\t\t// This is a compile-time contract: we verify it exists and has entries\r\n\t\texpect(Object.keys(VALID_TRANSITIONS).length).toBe(28);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"contains no duplicate targets in any transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (const [_phase, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tconst unique = new Set(targets);\r\n\t\t\texpect(unique.size).toBe(targets.length);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: canTransition()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"canTransition() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for valid transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"QUEUED\", \"CLAIMED\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"CLAIMED\", \"REPO_SYNC\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"TEST\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"MERGE\", \"DONE\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for invalid transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"QUEUED\", \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"DONE\", \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"CLAIMED\", \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for terminal phases as source\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst terminalPhases = [\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t] as const;\r\n\t\tfor (const terminal of terminalPhases) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(canTransition(terminal, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for unknown phase\", () => {\r\n\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"UNKNOWN_PHASE\" as any, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"is consistent with VALID_TRANSITIONS map\", () => {\r\n\t\t// Every entry in the map must return true from canTransition\r\n\t\tfor (const [from, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tfor (const to of targets) {\r\n\t\t\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(from as any, to as any)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: transition()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"transition() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:true on valid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"moving to claimed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(\"moving to claimed\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:false on invalid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"cannot jump\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\"); // unchanged\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on valid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"move\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on invalid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"nope\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to done on DONE transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"MERGE\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"completed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to failed on FAILED transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"CLAIMED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"blocked by merge\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(\"blocked by merge\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to active on non-terminal transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"claimed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates an event with stable shape\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"claiming\", \"INFO\", {\r\n\t\t\tkey: \"val\",\r\n\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.id).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.runId).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"INFO\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(\"claiming\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toEqual({ key: \"val\" });\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.createdAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"applies full transition chain from QUEUED to DONE\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst chain: Array<{ from: string; to: string }> = [\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"QUEUED\", to: \"CLAIMED\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"CLAIMED\", to: \"REPO_SYNC\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"REPO_SYNC\", to: \"ISSUE_CONTEXT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"ISSUE_CONTEXT\", to: \"WEB_RESEARCH\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"WEB_RESEARCH\", to: \"SPECIFY\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"SPECIFY\", to: \"PLAN\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"PLAN\", to: \"TASKS\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"TASKS\", to: \"ANALYZE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"ANALYZE\", to: \"REVIEW\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"REVIEW\", to: \"IMPLEMENT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"IMPLEMENT\", to: \"TEST\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"TEST\", to: \"VERIFY\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"VERIFY\", to: \"COMMIT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"COMMIT\", to: \"PR_CREATE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"PR_CREATE\", to: \"MERGE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"MERGE\", to: \"DONE\" },\r\n\t\t];\r\n\r\n\t\tlet run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tfor (const step of chain) {\r\n\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, step.to as any, `step: ${step.to}`);\r\n\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\trun = result.run;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"DONE\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: markFailed()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"markFailed() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"always returns ok:true\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", \"test failure\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets phase to the specified failure kind\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst kinds = [\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t] as const;\r\n\t\tfor (const kind of kinds) \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets finishedAt to current time\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", full\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates an event with failure metadata in payload\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"IMPLEMENT\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"reason\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\r\n\t\tfor });\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"Retry attempt 2\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on retry\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"gives same result for multiple retries from the same input should produce same attempt increment\r\n\t\texpect(result1.run.attempt).toBe(2);\r\n\t\texpect(result2.run.attempt).toBe(2);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// {\r\n\t\tfor (const [phase, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tconst isTerminal = targets.length === 0;\r\n\t\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\t\texpect(isTerminalPhase(phase as any)).toBe(isTerminal);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isFailurePhase() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for all failure phases\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst {\r\n\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for blocked/approval phases\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_PUSH\" as as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny","severity":"warning","description":"Unexpected any. Specify a different type."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"any"},{"elements":[],"content":" disables many type checking rules. Its use should be avoided."}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\packages\\run-state\\src\\__tests__\\state-machine.contract.test.ts"},"span":[16750,16753],"sourceCode":"/**\r\n * State Machine Contract Tests (QA-023)\r\n *\r\n * Verifies the PUBLIC API contract of @positron/run-state's state machine.\r\n * Tests exported behavior guarantees, NOT internal implementation details.\r\n *\r\n * Contract guarantees:\r\n * - createRun() produces a well-formed RunState with expected shape\r\n * - transition() accepts valid transitions and rejects invalid ones\r\n * - markFailed() produces defined failure states\r\n * - retry() only works from FAILED_TRANSIENT\r\n * - isTerminalPhase() identifies phases with no outgoing transitions\r\n * - isFailurePhase() identifies error phases\r\n * - VALID_TRANSITIONS is a complete map with all 28 phases\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { describe, it, expect } from \"vitest\";\r\nimport {\r\n\tcreateRun,\r\n\tcanTransition,\r\n\ttransition,\r\n\tmarkFailed,\r\n\tretry,\r\n\tisTerminalPhase,\r\n\tisFailurePhase,\r\n\tVALID_TRANSITIONS,\r\n} from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\nimport type { RunState } from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Helper\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction makeRun(overrides: Partial<RunState> = {}): RunState {\r\n\treturn {\r\n\t\tid: \"test-run-id\",\r\n\t\trepoId: \"test-owner/test-repo\",\r\n\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\tphase: \"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t...overrides,\r\n\t};\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: createRun()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"createRun() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns a RunState with all required fields\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"owner/repo\", 42, 0);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(run).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(typeof run.id).toBe(\"string\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.id.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);\r\n\t\texpect(run.repoId).toBe(\"owner/repo\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.issueNumber).toBe(42);\r\n\t\texpect(run.autonomyLevel).toBe(0);\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.attempt).toBe(1);\r\n\t\texpect(run.branch).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.lastError).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.workspacePath).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(typeof run.startedAt).toBe(\"string\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates unique IDs for each run\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run1 = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, 0);\r\n\t\tconst run2 = createRun(\"a/b\", 2, 0);\r\n\t\texpect(run1.id).not.toBe(run2.id);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"always starts in QUEUED phase with active status\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, 2);\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"accepts autonomyLevel values 0 through 4\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (let level = 0; level <= 4; level++) {\r\n\t\t\tconst run = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, level);\r\n\t\t\texpect(run.autonomyLevel).toBe(level);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: VALID_TRANSITIONS\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"VALID_TRANSITIONS contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"contains entries for all 28 phases\", () => {\r\n\t\t// All 28 phases must be present as keys\r\n\t\tconst phases = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"REPO_SYNC\",\r\n\t\t\t\"ISSUE_CONTEXT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"WEB_RESEARCH\",\r\n\t\t\t\"SPECIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLARIFY_OPTIONAL\",\r\n\t\t\t\"PLAN\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TASKS\",\r\n\t\t\t\"ANALYZE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"REVIEW\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t\t\"VERIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\"COMMIT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"PR_CREATE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_PUSH\",\r\n\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"GATE_APPROVE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"GATE_REVISE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"RESUME_PENDING\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of phases) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(VALID_TRANSITIONS).toHaveProperty(phase);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"is readonly (type-level enforcement)\", () => {\r\n\t\t// VALID_TRANSITIONS is declared as Readonly<Record<...>>\r\n\t\t// This is a compile-time contract: we verify it exists and has entries\r\n\t\texpect(Object.keys(VALID_TRANSITIONS).length).toBe(28);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"contains no duplicate targets in any transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (const [_phase, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tconst unique = new Set(targets);\r\n\t\t\texpect(unique.size).toBe(targets.length);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: canTransition()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"canTransition() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for valid transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"QUEUED\", \"CLAIMED\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"CLAIMED\", \"REPO_SYNC\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"TEST\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"MERGE\", \"DONE\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for invalid transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"QUEUED\", \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"DONE\", \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"CLAIMED\", \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for terminal phases as source\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst terminalPhases = [\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t] as const;\r\n\t\tfor (const terminal of terminalPhases) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(canTransition(terminal, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for unknown phase\", () => {\r\n\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"UNKNOWN_PHASE\" as any, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"is consistent with VALID_TRANSITIONS map\", () => {\r\n\t\t// Every entry in the map must return true from canTransition\r\n\t\tfor (const [from, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tfor (const to of targets) {\r\n\t\t\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(from as any, to as any)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: transition()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"transition() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:true on valid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"moving to claimed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(\"moving to claimed\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:false on invalid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"cannot jump\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\"); // unchanged\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on valid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"move\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on invalid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"nope\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to done on DONE transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"MERGE\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"completed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to failed on FAILED transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"CLAIMED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"blocked by merge\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(\"blocked by merge\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to active on non-terminal transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"claimed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates an event with stable shape\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"claiming\", \"INFO\", {\r\n\t\t\tkey: \"val\",\r\n\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.id).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.runId).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"INFO\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(\"claiming\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toEqual({ key: \"val\" });\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.createdAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"applies full transition chain from QUEUED to DONE\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst chain: Array<{ from: string; to: string }> = [\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"QUEUED\", to: \"CLAIMED\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"CLAIMED\", to: \"REPO_SYNC\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"REPO_SYNC\", to: \"ISSUE_CONTEXT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"ISSUE_CONTEXT\", to: \"WEB_RESEARCH\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"WEB_RESEARCH\", to: \"SPECIFY\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"SPECIFY\", to: \"PLAN\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"PLAN\", to: \"TASKS\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"TASKS\", to: \"ANALYZE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"ANALYZE\", to: \"REVIEW\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"REVIEW\", to: \"IMPLEMENT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"IMPLEMENT\", to: \"TEST\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"TEST\", to: \"VERIFY\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"VERIFY\", to: \"COMMIT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"COMMIT\", to: \"PR_CREATE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"PR_CREATE\", to: \"MERGE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"MERGE\", to: \"DONE\" },\r\n\t\t];\r\n\r\n\t\tlet run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tfor (const step of chain) {\r\n\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, step.to as any, `step: ${step.to}`);\r\n\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\trun = result.run;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"DONE\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: markFailed()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"markFailed() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"always returns ok:true\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ {\r\n\t\tconst kinds = [\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t] as const;\r\n\t\tfor (const kind of kinds) {\r\n\t\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, \"reason\");\r\n\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(kind);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status based on failure \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"blocked\");\r\n\t\texpect(markFailed(run1, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"blocked\");\r\n\r\n\t\t// FAILED_TRANSIENT and FAILED_UNSAFE ÔåÆ failed\r\n\t\tconst \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets finishedAt to current time\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", full\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates an event with failure metadata in payload\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"IMPLEMENT\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"reason\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"retry() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:true from FAILED_TRANSIENT\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\r\n\t\tfor });\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"Retry attempt 2\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on retry\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"gives same result for multiple retries from the same input should produce same attempt increment\r\n\t\texpect(result1.run.attempt).toBe(2);\r\n\t\texpect(result2.run.attempt).toBe(2);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isTerminalPhase() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for phases with no outgoing transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst terminal = [\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of terminal) {\r\n\t\tfor (const [phase, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tconst isTerminal = targets.length === 0;\r\n\t\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\t\texpect(isTerminalPhase(phase as any)).toBe(isTerminal);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isFailurePhase() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for all failure phases\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst {\r\n\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase as any)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for non-failure phases\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst nonFailures = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t\t\"MERGE\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of nonFailures) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for blocked/approval phases\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_PUSH\" as as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny","severity":"warning","description":"Unexpected any. Specify a different type."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"any"},{"elements":[],"content":" disables many type checking rules. Machine Contract Tests (QA-023)\r\n *\r\n * Verifies the PUBLIC API contract of @positron/run-state's state machine.\r\n * Tests exported behavior guarantees, NOT internal implementation details.\r\n *\r\n * Contract guarantees:\r\n * - createRun() produces a well-formed RunState with expected shape\r\n * - transition() accepts valid transitions and rejects invalid ones\r\n * - markFailed() produces defined failure states\r\n * - retry() only works from FAILED_TRANSIENT\r\n * - isTerminalPhase() identifies phases with no outgoing transitions\r\n * - isFailurePhase() identifies error phases\r\n * - VALID_TRANSITIONS is a complete map with all 28 phases\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { describe, it, expect } from \"vitest\";\r\nimport {\r\n\tcreateRun,\r\n\tcanTransition,\r\n\ttransition,\r\n\tmarkFailed,\r\n\tretry,\r\n\tisTerminalPhase,\r\n\tisFailurePhase,\r\n\tVALID_TRANSITIONS,\r\n} from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\nimport type { RunState } from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Helper\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction makeRun(overrides: Partial<RunState> = {}): RunState {\r\n\treturn {\r\n\t\tid: \"test-run-id\",\r\n\t\trepoId: \"test-owner/test-repo\",\r\n\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\tphase: \"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t...overrides,\r\n\t};\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: createRun()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"createRun() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns a RunState with all required fields\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"owner/repo\", 42, 0);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(run).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(typeof run.id).toBe(\"string\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.id.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);\r\n\t\texpect(run.repoId).toBe(\"owner/repo\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.issueNumber).toBe(42);\r\n\t\texpect(run.autonomyLevel).toBe(0);\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.attempt).toBe(1);\r\n\t\texpect(run.branch).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.lastError).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.workspacePath).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(typeof run.startedAt).toBe(\"string\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates unique IDs for each run\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run1 = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, 0);\r\n\t\tconst run2 = createRun(\"a/b\", 2, 0);\r\n\t\texpect(run1.id).not.toBe(run2.id);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"always starts in QUEUED phase with active status\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, 2);\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"accepts autonomyLevel values 0 through 4\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (let level = 0; level <= 4; level++) {\r\n\t\t\tconst run = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, level);\r\n\t\t\texpect(run.autonomyLevel).toBe(level);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: VALID_TRANSITIONS\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"VALID_TRANSITIONS contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"contains entries for all 28 phases\", () => {\r\n\t\t// All 28 phases must be present as keys\r\n\t\tconst phases = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"REPO_SYNC\",\r\n\t\t\t\"ISSUE_CONTEXT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"WEB_RESEARCH\",\r\n\t\t\t\"SPECIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLARIFY_OPTIONAL\",\r\n\t\t\t\"PLAN\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TASKS\",\r\n\t\t\t\"ANALYZE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"REVIEW\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t\t\"VERIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\"COMMIT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"PR_CREATE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_PUSH\",\r\n\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"GATE_APPROVE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"GATE_REVISE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"RESUME_PENDING\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of phases) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(VALID_TRANSITIONS).toHaveProperty(phase);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"is readonly (type-level enforcement)\", () => {\r\n\t\t// VALID_TRANSITIONS is declared as Readonly<Record<...>>\r\n\t\t// This is a compile-time contract: we verify it exists and has entries\r\n\t\texpect(Object.keys(VALID_TRANSITIONS).length).toBe(28);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"contains no duplicate targets in any transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (const [_phase, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tconst unique = new Set(targets);\r\n\t\t\texpect(unique.size).toBe(targets.length);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: canTransition()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"canTransition() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for valid transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"QUEUED\", \"CLAIMED\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"CLAIMED\", \"REPO_SYNC\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"TEST\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"MERGE\", \"DONE\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for invalid transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"QUEUED\", \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"DONE\", \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"CLAIMED\", \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for terminal phases as source\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst terminalPhases = [\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t] as const;\r\n\t\tfor (const terminal of terminalPhases) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(canTransition(terminal, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for unknown phase\", () => {\r\n\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"UNKNOWN_PHASE\" as any, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"is consistent with VALID_TRANSITIONS map\", () => {\r\n\t\t// Every entry in the map must return true from canTransition\r\n\t\tfor (const [from, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tfor (const to of targets) {\r\n\t\t\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(from as any, to as any)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: transition()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"transition() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:true on valid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"moving to claimed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(\"moving to claimed\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:false on invalid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"cannot jump\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\"); // unchanged\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on valid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"move\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on invalid transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"nope\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to done on DONE transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"MERGE\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"completed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to failed on FAILED transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"CLAIMED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"blocked by merge\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(\"blocked by merge\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status to active on non-terminal transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"claimed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates an event with stable shape\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"claiming\", \"INFO\", {\r\n\t\t\tkey: \"val\",\r\n\t\t});\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.id).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.runId).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"CLAIMED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"INFO\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(\"claiming\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toEqual({ key: \"val\" });\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.createdAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"applies full transition chain from QUEUED to DONE\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst chain: Array<{ from: string; to: string }> = [\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"QUEUED\", to: \"CLAIMED\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"CLAIMED\", to: \"REPO_SYNC\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"REPO_SYNC\", to: \"ISSUE_CONTEXT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"ISSUE_CONTEXT\", to: \"WEB_RESEARCH\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"WEB_RESEARCH\", to: \"SPECIFY\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"SPECIFY\", to: \"PLAN\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"PLAN\", to: \"TASKS\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"TASKS\", to: \"ANALYZE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"ANALYZE\", to: \"REVIEW\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"REVIEW\", to: \"IMPLEMENT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"IMPLEMENT\", to: \"TEST\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"TEST\", to: \"VERIFY\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"VERIFY\", to: \"COMMIT\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"COMMIT\", to: \"PR_CREATE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"PR_CREATE\", to: \"MERGE\" },\r\n\t\t\t{ from: \"MERGE\", to: \"DONE\" },\r\n\t\t];\r\n\r\n\t\tlet run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tfor (const step of chain) {\r\n\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, step.to as any, `step: ${step.to}`);\r\n\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\trun = result.run;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"DONE\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: markFailed()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"markFailed() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"always returns ok:true\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"QUEUED\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", \"test failure\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets phase to the specified failure kind\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst kinds = [\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t] as const;\r\n\t\tfor (const kind of kinds) {\r\n\t\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, \"reason\");\r\n\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(kind);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets status based on failure kind\", () => {\r\n\t\t// FAILED and FAILED_BLOCKED ÔåÆ blocked\r\n\t\tconst run1 = makeRun();\r\n\t\texpect(markFailed(run1, \"FAILED\", \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"blocked\");\r\n\t\texpect(markFailed(run1, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"blocked\");\r\n\r\n\t\t// FAILED_TRANSIENT and FAILED_UNSAFE ÔåÆ failed\r\n\t\tconst run2 = makeRun();\r\n\t\texpect(markFailed(run2, \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\", \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t\texpect(markFailed(run2, \"FAILED_UNSAFE\", \"x\").run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets finishedAt to current time\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", \"reason\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(new Date(result.run.finishedAt!).getTime()).toBeGreaterThan(0);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"sets lastError to the provided reason\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", \"disk full\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(\"disk full\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates an event with failure metadata in payload\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"IMPLEMENT\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, conflict\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"FAILED_BLOCKED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toEqual({\r\n\t\t\tfailedPhase: \"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\treason: \"merge conflict\",\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun();\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED\", \"reason\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: retry()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"retry() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns ok:true from FAILED_TRANSIENT\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\r\n\t\tfor \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\", attempt: 3 });\r\n\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.attempt).toBe(4);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates event with retry metadata\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst });\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"Retry attempt 2\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"preserves run identity on retry\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" });\r\n\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"gives same result for multiple retries (idempotent state)\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = makeRun({ phase: \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\", attempt: 1 });\r\n\t\tconst result1 = retry(run);\r\n\t\tconst result2 = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\t// Both retries from the same input should produce same attempt increment\r\n\t\texpect(result1.run.attempt).toBe(2);\r\n\t\texpect(result2.run.attempt).toBe(2);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: isTerminalPhase()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isTerminalPhase() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for phases with no outgoing transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (const [phase, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tconst isTerminal = targets.length === 0;\r\n\t\t\t// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any\r\n\t\t\texpect(isTerminalPhase(phase as any)).toBe(isTerminal);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isFailurePhase() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for all failure phases\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst {\r\n\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase as any)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for non-failure phases\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst nonFailures = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t\t\"MERGE\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of nonFailures) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for blocked/approval phases\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_PUSH\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_MERGE\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"GATE_APPROVE\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"GATE_REVISE\" as any)).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny","severity":"warning","description":"Unexpected any. Specify a different type."}],"advices":{"advices":[{"log":["info",[{"elements":["Emphasis"],"content":"any"},{"elements":[],"content":" disables many type checking rules. Its use should be avoided."}]]}]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\packages\\run-state\\src\\__tests__\\state-machine.contract.test.ts"},"span":[16873,16876],"sourceCode":"/**\r\n * State Machine Contract Tests (QA-023)\r\n *\r\n * Verifies the PUBLIC API contract of @positron/run-state's state machine.\r\n * Tests exported behavior guarantees, NOT internal implementation details.\r\n *\r\n * Contract guarantees:\r\n * - createRun() produces a well-formed RunState with expected shape\r\n * - transition() accepts valid transitions and rejects invalid ones\r\n * - markFailed() produces defined failure states\r\n * - retry() only works from FAILED_TRANSIENT\r\n * - isTerminalPhase() identifies phases with no outgoing transitions\r\n * - isFailurePhase() identifies error phases\r\n * - VALID_TRANSITIONS is a complete map with all 28 phases\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { describe, it, expect } from \"vitest\";\r\nimport {\r\n\tcreateRun,\r\n\tcanTransition,\r\n\ttransition,\r\n\tmarkFailed,\r\n\tretry,\r\n\tisTerminalPhase,\r\n\tisFailurePhase,\r\n\tVALID_TRANSITIONS,\r\n} from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\nimport type { RunState } from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Helper\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction makeRun(overrides: Partial<RunState> = {}): RunState {\r\n\treturn {\r\n\t\tid: \"test-run-id\",\r\n\t\trepoId: \"test-owner/test-repo\",\r\n\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\tphase: \"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t...overrides,\r\n\t};\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: createRun()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"createRun() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns a RunState with all required fields\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"owner/repo\", 42, 0);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(run).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\texpect(typeof run.id).toBe(\"string\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.id.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);\r\n\t\texpect(run.repoId).toBe(\"owner/repo\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.issueNumber).toBe(42);\r\n\t\texpect(run.autonomyLevel).toBe(0);\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.attempt).toBe(1);\r\n\t\texpect(run.branch).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.lastError).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(run.workspacePath).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(typeof run.startedAt).toBe(\"string\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates unique IDs for each run\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run1 = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, 0);\r\n\t\tconst run2 = createRun(\"a/b\", 2, 0);\r\n\t\texpect(run1.id).not.toBe(run2.id);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"always starts in QUEUED phase with active status\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, 2);\r\n\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"accepts autonomyLevel values 0 through 4\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (let level = 0; level <= 4; level++) {\r\n\t\t\tconst run = createRun(\"a/b\", 1, level);\r\n\t\t\texpect(run.autonomyLevel).toBe(level);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: VALID_TRANSITIONS\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"VALID_TRANSITIONS contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"contains entries for all 28 phases\", () => {\r\n\t\t// All 28 phases must be present as keys\r\n\t\tconst phases = [\r\n\t\t\t\"QUEUED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"REPO_SYNC\",\r\n\t\t\t\"ISSUE_CONTEXT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"WEB_RESEARCH\",\r\n\t\t\t\"SPECIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLARIFY_OPTIONAL\",\r\n\t\t\t\"PLAN\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TASKS\",\r\n\t\t\t\"ANALYZE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"REVIEW\",\r\n\t\t\t\"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"TEST\",\r\n\t\t\t\"VERIFY\",\r\n\t\t\t\"COMMIT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"PR_CREATE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_PUSH\",\r\n\t\t\t\"BLOCKED_MERGE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"GATE_APPROVE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"GATE_REVISE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"RESUME_PENDING\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t];\r\n\t\tfor (const phase of phases) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(VALID_TRANSITIONS).toHaveProperty(phase);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"is readonly (type-level enforcement)\", () => {\r\n\t\t// VALID_TRANSITIONS is declared as Readonly<Record<...>>\r\n\t\t// This is a compile-time contract: we verify it exists and has entries\r\n\t\texpect(Object.keys(VALID_TRANSITIONS).length).toBe(28);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"contains no duplicate targets in any transition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfor (const [_phase, targets] of Object.entries(VALID_TRANSITIONS)) {\r\n\t\t\tconst unique = new Set(targets);\r\n\t\t\texpect(unique.size).toBe(targets.length);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Contract: canTransition()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"canTransition() contract\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"returns true for valid transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"QUEUED\", \"CLAIMED\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"CLAIMED\", \"REPO_SYNC\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"TEST\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"MERGE\", \"DONE\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for invalid transitions\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"QUEUED\", \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"DONE\", \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(canTransition(\"CLAIMED\", \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for terminal phases as source\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst terminalPhases = [\r\n\t\t\t\"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\t\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n\t\t\t\"CLEANUP\",\r\n\t\t] as const;\r\n\t\tfor (const terminal of terminalPhases) {\r\n\t\t\texpect(canTransition(terminal, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"returns false for unknown phase\", () => transitions\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"IMPLEMENT\", \"try to resume blocked\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toContain(\"Invalid // MERGE ÔåÆ DONE is valid\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"Completed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"DONE\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).not.toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"valid: transition to FAILED_TRANSIENT sets status=failed, lastError, finishedAt\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"REPO_SYNC\"; // REPO_SYNC ÔåÆ FAILED_TRANSIENT is valid\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\", \"network timeout\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(\"network timeout\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).not.toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"valid: transition to FAILED_BLOCKED sets status=failed\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"IMPLEMENT\"; // IMPLEMENT ÔåÆ FAILED_BLOCKED is valid\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"blocked reason\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"FAILED_BLOCKED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"failed\"); // 'failed' because FAILED_BLOCKED starts with 'FAILED'\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(\"blocked reason\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"invalid: DONE ÔåÆ QUEUED returns ok=false\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"DONE\";\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"QUEUED\", \"should not work\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"DONE\"); // unchanged\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toContain(\"Invalid transition\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"invalid: CANCELLED status does not affect phase transition logic\", () => {\r\n\t\t// Note: CANCELLED is a RunStatus, not a Phase. Testing that status\r\n\t\t// alone does not affect canTransition behavior.\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"FAILED_BLOCKED\"; // terminal ÔÇö no valid transitions\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"IMPLEMENT\", \"try to resume blocked\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toContain(\"Invalid transition\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"transition preserves custom payload\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\tconst payload = { attempt: 1, source: \"manual\" };\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"claimed\", \"INFO\", payload);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toEqual(payload);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"transition accepts custom level\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = \"WARN\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"WARN\");\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// markFailed()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"markFailed\", () => {\r\n\ttest(\"FAILED_BLOCKED sets status=blocked and preserves reason\", () => \"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\treason: \"test failure\",\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"original run fields are preserved\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.branch = error event references the current phase in message\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"DONE\";\r\n\r\n\t\tconst result = ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isFailurePhase\", () => {\r\n\ttest(\"FAILED is a failure phase\", () =>
