{\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_PUSH\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"BLOCKED_MERGE is not a failure phase (it is a blocked phase, not failure)\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_MERGE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n  test(\"RESUME_PENDING is not a failure phase\", () => {\r\n    expect(isFailurePhase(\"RESUME_PENDING\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// isTerminalPhase\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isTerminalPhase\", () => {\r\n  test(\"DONE is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"DONE\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED_BLOCKED is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED_BLOCKED\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED_UNSAFE is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED_UNSAFE\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"CLEANUP is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"CLEANUP\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"QUEUED is not terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"IMPLEMENT is not terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"IMPLEMENT\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// canTransition ÔÇö branch coverage: unknown from-phase\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"canTransition edge cases\", () => {\r\n  test(\"returns false for unknown from-phase\", () => {\r\n    // TypeScript enforces Phase type, but runtime must handle invalid values\r\n    expect(canTransition(\"INVALID\" as any, \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"returns false for unknown from-phase (empty string)\", () => {\r\n    expect(canTransition(\"\" as any, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// resumeFromEvents ÔÇö branch coverage for GATE and non-INFO/GATE levels\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"resumeFromEvents\", () => {\r\n  test(\"resumes from empty events (QUEUED)\", () => {\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, []);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n    expect(result.id).toBe(\"run-1\");\r\n    expect(result.repoId).toBe(\"repo-1\");\r\n    expect(result.issueNumber).toBe(42);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"resumes with only INFO events\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: string, msg: string): RunEventData => ({\r\n      id: `evt-${phase}`, runId: \"run-1\", phase: phase as any, level: level as any,\r\n      message: msg, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    });\r\n    const events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n      makeEvent(\"CLAIMED\", \"INFO\", \"started\"),\r\n      makeEvent(\"REPO_SYNC\", \"INFO\", \"synced\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"REPO_SYNC\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"resumes with GATE events (covers GATE branch of ||)\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: string, msg: string): RunEventData => ({\r\n      id: `evt-${phase}`, runId: \"run-1\", phase: phase as any, level: level as any,\r\n      message: msg, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    });\r\n    const events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n      makeEvent(\"QUEUED\", \"GATE\", \"gate passed\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"ignores WARN events (does not advance phase)\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: string, msg: string): RunEventData => ({\r\n      id: `evt-${phase}`, runId: \"run-1\", phase: phase as any, level: level as any,\r\n      message: msg, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    });\r\n    const events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n      makeEvent(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"WARN\", \"warning\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"ignores ERROR events (does not advance phase)\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: string, msg: string): RunEventData => ({\r\n      id: `evt-${phase}`, runId: \"run-1\", phase: phase as any, level: level as any,\r\n      message: msg, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    });\r\n    const events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n      makeEvent(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"ERROR\", \"error\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"mixes INFO and GATE events with WARN/ERROR\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: string, msg: string): RunEventData => ({\r\n      id: `evt-${phase}`, runId: \"run-1\", phase: phase as any, level: level as any,\r\n      message: msg, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    });\r\n    const events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n      makeEvent(\"CLAIMED\", \"INFO\", \"ok\"),\r\n      makeEvent(\"REPO_SYNC\", \"WARN\", \"warn\"),\r\n      makeEvent(\"ISSUE_CONTEXT\", \"GATE\", \"gate ok\"),\r\n      makeEvent(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"ERROR\", \"err\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n expect(isTerminalPhase(\"DONE\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED_BLOCKED is expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED_UNSAFE\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"CLEANUP is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"CLEANUP\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"QUEUED network issue\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).not.toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"FAILED_UNSAFE sets status=failed\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, // MERGE ÔåÆ DONE is valid\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", \"Completed\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"DONE\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).not.toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"valid: transition to FAILED_TRANSIENT sets status=failed, lastError, finishedAt\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"REPO_SYNC\"; // REPO_SYNC ÔåÆ FAILED_TRANSIENT is valid\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\", \"network timeout\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(\"network timeout\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).not.toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"valid: transition to FAILED_BLOCKED sets status=failed\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"IMPLEMENT\"; // IMPLEMENT ÔåÆ FAILED_BLOCKED is valid\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"blocked reason\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"FAILED_BLOCKED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"failed\"); // 'failed' because FAILED_BLOCKED starts with 'FAILED'\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(\"blocked reason\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"invalid: DONE ÔåÆ QUEUED returns ok=false\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"DONE\";\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"QUEUED\", \"should not work\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"DONE\"); // unchanged\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toContain(\"Invalid transition\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"invalid: CANCELLED status does not affect phase transition logic\", () => {\r\n\t\t// Note: CANCELLED is a RunStatus, not a Phase. Testing that status\r\n\t\t// alone does not affect canTransition behavior.\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"FAILED_BLOCKED\"; // terminal ÔÇö no valid transitions\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"IMPLEMENT\", \"try to resume blocked\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toContain(\"Invalid transition\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"transition preserves custom payload\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\tconst payload = { attempt: 1, source: \"manual\" };\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"claimed\", \"INFO\", payload);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toEqual(payload);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"transition accepts custom level\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"CLAIMED\", \"custom level\", \"WARN\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"WARN\");\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// markFailed()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"markFailed\", () => {\r\n\ttest(\"FAILED_BLOCKED sets status=blocked and preserves reason\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"merge conflict\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).not.toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"FAILED sets status=blocked (blocked due to permanent network issue\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).not.toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"FAILED_UNSAFE sets status=failed\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, operation detected\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).not.toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"event payload contains failedPhase and reason\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", failure\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(\"test failure\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toEqual({\r\n\t\t\tfailedPhase: \"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\treason: \"test failure\",\r\n\t\t});\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"original run fields are preserved\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.branch = \"error\");\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(\"repo-1\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(42);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.branch).toBe(\"positron/issue-42-test\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.workspacePath).toBe(\"/tmp/workspace\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.autonomyLevel).toBe(2);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// retry()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"retry\", () => {\r\n\ttest(\"successful retry from FAILED_TRANSIENT\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\";\r\n\t\trun.lastError = \"previous retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"TEST\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.attempt).toBe(4);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBeNull();\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"retry event contains correct phase and attempt info\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\";\r\n\t\trun.attempt = 1;\r\n\r\n\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(\"TEST\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"INFO\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"Retry attempt 2\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toEqual({ previousAttempt: 1 });\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"retry from FAILED returns ok=false\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"FAILED\"; // only FAILED_TRANSIENT can retry\r\n\r\n\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"FAILED\"); // unchanged\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"Cannot retry\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"retry from FAILED_BLOCKED returns ok=false\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", from active phase returns ok=false\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"IMPLEMENT\";\r\n\r\n\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"Cannot retry\");\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"retry error event references the current phase in message\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst run = createRun(\"repo-1\", 42, 2);\r\n\t\trun.phase = \"DONE\";\r\n\r\n\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\r\n\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"DONE\");\r\n\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\");\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// isFailurePhase()\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isFailurePhase\", () => {\r\n\ttest(\"FAILED is a failure phase\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"FAILED\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"FAILED_TRANSIENT is a failure phase\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_PUSH\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\ttest(\"BLOCKED_MERGE is not a failure phase (it is a blocked phase, not failure)\", () => {\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_MERGE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n  test(\"RESUME_PENDING is not a failure phase\", () => {\r\n    expect(isFailurePhase(\"RESUME_PENDING\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// isTerminalPhase\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isTerminalPhase\", () => {\r\n  test(\"DONE is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"DONE\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED_BLOCKED is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED_BLOCKED\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED_UNSAFE is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED_UNSAFE\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"CLEANUP is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"CLEANUP\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"QUEUED is not terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"IMPLEMENT is not terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"IMPLEMENT\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// canTransition ÔÇö branch coverage: unknown from-phase\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"canTransition edge cases\", () => {\r\n  test(\"returns false for unknown from-phase\", () => {\r\n    // TypeScript enforces Phase type, but runtime must handle invalid values\r\n    expect(canTransition(\"INVALID\" as any, \"DONE\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"returns false for unknown from-phase (empty string)\", () => {\r\n    expect(canTransition(\"\" as any, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// resumeFromEvents ÔÇö branch coverage for GATE and non-INFO/GATE levels\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"resumeFromEvents\", () => {\r\n  test(\"resumes from empty events (QUEUED)\", () => {\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, []);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n    expect(result.id).toBe(\"run-1\");\r\n    expect(result.repoId).toBe(\"repo-1\");\r\n    expect(result.issueNumber).toBe(42);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"resumes with only INFO events\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: string, msg: string): RunEventData => ({\r\n      id: `evt-${phase}`, runId: \"run-1\", phase: phase as any, level: level as any,\r\n      message: msg, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    });\r\n    const events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n      makeEvent(\"CLAIMED\", \"INFO\", \"started\"),\r\n      makeEvent(\"REPO_SYNC\", \"INFO\", \"synced\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"REPO_SYNC\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"resumes with GATE events (covers GATE branch of ||)\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: string, msg: string): RunEventData => ({\r\n      id: `evt-${phase}`, runId: \"run-1\", phase: phase as any, level: level as any,\r\n      message: msg, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    });\r\n    const events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n      makeEvent(\"QUEUED\", \"GATE\", \"gate passed\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"ignores WARN events (does not advance phase)\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: string, msg: string): RunEventData => ({\r\n      id: `evt-${phase}`, runId: \"run-1\", phase: phase as any, level: level as any,\r\n      message: msg, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    });\r\n    const events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n      makeEvent(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"WARN\", \"warning\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"ignores ERROR events (does not advance phase)\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: string, msg: string): RunEventData => ({\r\n      id: `evt-${phase}`, runId: \"run-1\", phase: phase as any, level: level as any,\r\n      message: msg, payload: null, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n    });\r\n    const events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n      makeEvent(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"ERROR\", \"error\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"mixes INFO and GATE events with WARN/ERROR\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: {\r\n\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(\"BLOCKED_MERGE\")).toBe(false);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n  test(\"RESUME_PENDING is not a failure phase\", () => {\r\n ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"isTerminalPhase\", () => {\r\n  test(\"DONE is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"DONE\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED_BLOCKED is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED_BLOCKED\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED_UNSAFE is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED_UNSAFE\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"CLEANUP is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"CLEANUP\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"QUEUED is not terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"IMPLEMENT is not terminal\", () => {\r\n expect(isFailurePhase(\"RESUME_PENDING\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// isTerminalPhase\r\n// terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED_BLOCKED\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"FAILED_UNSAFE is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"FAILED_UNSAFE\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"CLEANUP is terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"CLEANUP\")).toBe(true);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"QUEUED is not terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"IMPLEMENT is not terminal\", () => {\r\n    expect(isTerminalPhase(\"IMPLEMENT\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// canTransition ÔÇö branch coverage: unknown from-phase\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\ndescribe(\"canTransition edge cases\", () => {\r\n  test(\"returns false for unknown test(\"returns false for unknown from-phase (empty string)\", () => {\r\n    expect(canTransition(\"\" as any, \"QUEUED\")).toBe(false);\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// expect(result.issueNumber).toBe(42);\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"resumes with only INFO events\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: string, msg: string): RunEventData => ({\r\n \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"REPO_SYNC\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"resumes with GATE events (covers GATE branch of ||)\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: Date().toISOString(),\r\n    });\r\n    const events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n      makeEvent(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"ERROR\", \"error\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n    expect(result.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  test(\"mixes INFO and GATE events with WARN/ERROR\", () => {\r\n    const makeEvent = (phase: string, level: makeEvent(\"ISSUE_CONTEXT\", \"GATE\", \"gate ok\"),\r\n      makeEvent(\"IMPLEMENT\", \"ERROR\", \"err\"),\r\n    ];\r\n    const result = resumeFromEvents(\"run-1\", \"repo-1\", 42, events);\r\n non-null assertion."}],"advices":{"advices":[]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\packages\\run-state\\src\\__tests__\\state-machine.property.test.ts"},"span":[11723,11744],"sourceCode":"/**\r\n * State Machine Property-Based Tests (QA-024)\r\n *\r\n * Systematically verifies central invariants of the Positron state machine\r\n * against randomly generated inputs using fast-check.\r\n *\r\n * Invariants tested:\r\n *  1. VALID_TRANSITIONS consistency with canTransition/transition\r\n *  2. Terminal phases are truly terminal\r\n *  3. Failure phase classification is correct\r\n *  4. Invalid transitions don't silently corrupt run state\r\n *  5. Valid transitions set target phase correctly\r\n *  6. Retry only works from FAILED_TRANSIENT\r\n *  7. markFailed always produces a failure phase\r\n *  8. No transition chain skips forbidden edges\r\n *\r\n * Generators produce no real secrets. All values are synthetic fakes.\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { describe, it, expect } from \"vitest\";\r\nimport fc from \"fast-check\";\r\nimport {\r\n\tcreateRun,\r\n\tcanTransition,\r\n\ttransition,\r\n\tmarkFailed,\r\n\tretry,\r\n\tresumeFromEvents,\r\n\tisTerminalPhase,\r\n\tisFailurePhase,\r\n\tVALID_TRANSITIONS,\r\n} from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\nimport type { RunState, RunEventData } from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\nimport type { Phase } from \"@positron/shared\";\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Generators (Phase 4)\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n\r\n/** All 28 phases as a constant array for generators */\r\nconst ALL_PHASES: Phase[] = Object.keys(VALID_TRANSITIONS) as Phase[];\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: any valid phase */\r\nconst phaseArb = fc.constantFrom(...ALL_PHASES);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: non-terminal phase (has at least one outgoing transition) */\r\nconst nonTerminalPhaseArb = fc.constantFrom(\r\n\t...ALL_PHASES.filter(\r\n\t\t(p) => (VALID_TRANSITIONS[p] as readonly Phase[]).length > 0,\r\n\t),\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: terminal phase (no outgoing transitions) */\r\nconst terminalPhaseArb = fc.constantFrom(\r\n\t...ALL_PHASES.filter(\r\n\t\t(p) => (VALID_TRANSITIONS[p] as readonly Phase[]).length === 0,\r\n\t),\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: failure phase */\r\nconst failurePhaseArb = fc.constantFrom<\r\n\t\"FAILED\" | \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" | \"FAILED_BLOCKED\" | \"FAILED_UNSAFE\"\r\n>(\"FAILED\", \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\", \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"FAILED_UNSAFE\");\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a valid (from, to) pair */\r\nconst validTransitionArb = fc\r\n\t.constantFrom(...ALL_PHASES)\r\n\t.chain((from) => {\r\n\t\tconst targets = VALID_TRANSITIONS[from] as readonly Phase[];\r\n\t\tif (targets.length === 0) return fc.constant(null);\r\n\t\treturn fc.tuple(fc.constant(from), fc.constantFrom(...targets));\r\n\t})\r\n\t.filter((t): t is [Phase, Phase] => t !== null);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: an invalid (from, to) pair */\r\nconst invalidTransitionArb = fc\r\n\t.constantFrom(...ALL_PHASES)\r\n\t.chain((from) => {\r\n\t\tconst allowed = new Set(VALID_TRANSITIONS[from] as readonly Phase[]);\r\n\t\tconst forbidden = ALL_PHASES.filter((p) => !allowed.has(p));\r\n\t\tif (forbidden.length === 0) return fc.constant(null);\r\n\t\treturn fc.tuple(fc.constant(from), fc.constantFrom(...forbidden));\r\n\t})\r\n\t.filter((t): t is [Phase, Phase] => t !== null);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a complete RunState with random phase */\r\nconst runStateArb: fc.Arbitrary<RunState> = fc.record({\r\n\tid: fc.uuid({ version: 4 }),\r\n\trepoId: fc.constant(\"test-owner/test-repo\"),\r\n\tissueNumber: fc.integer({ min: 1, max: 99999 }),\r\n\tbranch: fc.constant(null),\r\n\tphase: phaseArb,\r\n\tstatus: fc.constantFrom(\r\n\t\t\"active\" as const,\r\n\t\t\"blocked\" as const,\r\n\t\t\"done\" as const,\r\n\t\t\"failed\" as const,\r\n\t),\r\n\tautonomyLevel: fc.integer({ min: 0, max: 4 }),\r\n\tattempt: fc.integer({ min: 1, max: 10 }),\r\n\tstartedAt: fc.constant(new Date().toISOString()),\r\n\tfinishedAt: fc.constant(null),\r\n\tlastError: fc.constant(null),\r\n\tworkspacePath: fc.constant(null),\r\n});\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a run in FAILED_TRANSIENT */\r\nconst failedTransientRunArb: fc.Arbitrary<RunState> = runStateArb.map(\r\n\t(run) => ({\r\n\t\t...run,\r\n\t\tphase: \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" as Phase,\r\n\t\tstatus: \"failed\" as const,\r\n\t\tfinishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\tlastError: \"previous transient failure\",\r\n\t}),\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a failure kind */\r\ntype FailureKind =\r\n\t| \"FAILED\"\r\n\t| \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\"\r\n\t| \"FAILED_BLOCKED\"\r\n\t| \"FAILED_UNSAFE\";\r\nconst failureKindArb = fc.constantFrom<FailureKind>(\r\n\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a safe message (no real secrets) */\r\nconst safeMessageArb = fc.oneof(\r\n\tfc.constant(\"test failure\"),\r\n\tfc.constant(\"network timeout\"),\r\n\tfc.constant(\"disk full\"),\r\n\tfc.constant(\"merge conflict detected\"),\r\n\tfc.string({ minLength: 4, maxLength: 20 }).map((s) => `error-${s}`),\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a safe payload (no real secrets) */\r\nconst safePayloadArb = fc.oneof(\r\n\tfc.constant(null),\r\n\tfc.record({\r\n\t\tfakeToken: fc.constant(\"ghp_fake_1234567890\"),\r\n\t\tkey: fc.constant(\"test-key\"),\r\n\t}),\r\n\tfc.dictionary(\r\n\t\tfc.constantFrom(\"source\", \"code\", \"context\"),\r\n\t\tfc.constant(\"fake-value\"),\r\n\t),\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a valid event level */\r\nconst eventLevelArb = fc.constantFrom<\r\n\t\"INFO\" | \"WARN\" | \"ERROR\" | \"GATE\" | \"HUMAN\"\r\n>(\"INFO\", \"WARN\", \"ERROR\", \"GATE\", \"HUMAN\");\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a transition chain of valid transitions (length 2-20) */\r\nconst transitionChainArb = fc\r\n\t.array(validTransitionArb, { minLength: 2, maxLength: 20 })\r\n\t.filter((chain) => {\r\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < chain.length - 1; i++) {\r\n\t\t\tif (chain[i]?.[1] !== chain[i + 1]?.[0]) return false;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\treturn true;\r\n\t})\r\n\t.map((chain) => chain) as fc.Arbitrary<[Phase, Phase][]>;\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 1: VALID_TRANSITIONS consistency\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 1: VALID_TRANSITIONS <-> canTransition/transition\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"every valid pair returns true from canTransition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(validTransitionArb, ([from, to]) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(from, to)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"every invalid pair returns false from canTransition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(invalidTransitionArb, ([from, to]) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(from, to)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"valid transitions succeed via transition()\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tvalidTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\teventLevelArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafePayloadArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t([from, to], msg, level, payload) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run: RunState = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"test-id\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: \"owner/repo\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: from,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, to, msg, level, payload);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(to);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"no phase transitions to itself (reflexive check)\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(phaseArb, (phase: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(phase, phase)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 2: Terminal phases remain terminal\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 2: Terminal phases\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"terminal phases have isTerminalPhase() = true\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(terminalPhaseArb, (phase: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isTerminalPhase(phase)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"non-terminal phases have isTerminalPhase() = false\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(nonTerminalPhaseArb, (phase: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isTerminalPhase(phase)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"terminal phases cannot transition to any phase via canTransition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tterminalPhaseArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tphaseArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(terminal: Phase, target: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(terminal, target)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"terminal phases block transition() calls\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tterminalPhaseArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tnonTerminalPhaseArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(terminal: Phase, target: Phase, msg: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (terminal === target) return;\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run: RunState = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"test-id\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: \"owner/repo\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: terminal,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, target, msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(terminal);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 3: Failure phase classification\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 3: Failure phase classification\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"all failure phases return isFailurePhase() = true\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(failurePhaseArb, (phase: FailureKind) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"non-failure phases return isFailurePhase() = false\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(phaseArb, (phase: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\tif (\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase === \"FAILED\" ||\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase === \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" ||\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase === \"FAILED_BLOCKED\" ||\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase === \"FAILED_UNSAFE\"\r\n\t\t\t\t) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit('all failure phases start with \"FAILED\"', () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(failurePhaseArb, (phase: FailureKind) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(phase.startsWith(\"FAILED\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit('isFailurePhase is equivalent to phase.startsWith(\"FAILED\")', () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(phaseArb, (phase: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst isFailure = isFailurePhase(phase);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst startsWithFailed = phase.startsWith(\"FAILED\");\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isFailure).toBe(startsWithFailed);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 4: Invalid transitions don't corrupt run state\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 4: Invalid transitions preserve run integrity\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"invalid transition preserves run phase\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tinvalidTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t([from, to]: [Phase, Phase], run: RunState, msg: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst input = { ...run, phase: from };\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(input, to, msg);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(from);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(input.id);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(input.repoId);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(input.issueNumber);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"invalid transition sets lastError\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tinvalidTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t([from, to]: [Phase, Phase], run: RunState, msg: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst input = { ...run, phase: from };\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(input, to, msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError!).toContain(\"Invalid transition\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError!).toContain(from);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError!).toContain(to);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 5: Valid transitions set target phase correctly\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 5: Valid transition correctness\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"valid transition preserves run identity\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tvalidTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\teventLevelArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t[from, to]: [Phase, Phase],\r\n\t\t\t\t\tmsg: string,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"INFO\" | \"WARN\" | \"ERROR\" | \"GATE\" | \"HUMAN\",\r\n\t\t\t\t) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run: RunState = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"test-id\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: \"owner/repo\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: \"positron/issue-42-test\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: from,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: 2,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: \"2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: \"/tmp/test\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, to, msg, level);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(to);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.runId).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(to);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(level);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"transition to DONE sets correct status and finishedAt\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst doneTransitionArb = validTransitionArb.filter(\r\n\t\t\t([_, to]: [Phase, Phase]) => to === \"DONE\",\r\n\t\t);\r\n\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tdoneTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t([from, _to]: [Phase, Phase], msg: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run: RunState = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"test-id\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: \"owner/repo\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: from,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 6: Retry only from FAILED_TRANSIENT\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 6: Retry restrictions\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"retry from FAILED_TRANSIENT always succeeds\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(failedTransientRunArb, (run: RunState) => {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"TEST\");\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.attempt).toBe(run.attempt + 1);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"retry from any other phase fails\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(phaseArb, runStateArb, (phase: Phase, baseRun: RunState) => {\r\n\t\t\t\tif (phase === \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\") return;\r\n\t\t\t\tconst run = { ...baseRun, phase };\r\n\t\t\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(phase);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"Cannot retry\");\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"TEST is a valid target from FAILED_TRANSIENT\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst targets = VALID_TRANSITIONS.FAILED_TRANSIENT;\r\n\t\texpect(targets).toContain(\"TEST\");\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 7: markFailed produces a failure phase\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 7: markFailed guarantees\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"markFailed always returns ok:true\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"markFailed result phase is always a failure phase\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(result.run.phase)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(kind);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"markFailed preserves run identity\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"markFailed sets finishedAt and lastError\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(new Date(result.run.finishedAt!).getTime()).toBeGreaterThan(0);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"markFailed includes failedPhase and reason in event payload\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.payload?.failedPhase).toBe(run.phase);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.payload?.reason).toBe(reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"markFailed status mapping is correct\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (kind === \"FAILED_BLOCKED\" || kind === \"FAILED\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"blocked\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 8: No transition chain skips forbidden edges\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 8: Transition chain integrity\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"every edge in a valid chain satisfies canTransition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\ttransitionChainArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(chain: [Phase, Phase][], msg: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (chain.length === 0) return;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// Start at the chain's first phase\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst first = chain[0]?.[0];\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlet run: RunState = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"chain-test\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: \"owner/repo\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: first,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const [from, to] of chain) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(from).toBe(run.phase);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(run.phase, to)).toBe(true);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, to, msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trun = result.run;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(ALL_PHASES).toContain(run.phase);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"transition chain never silently skips an invalid edge\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.array(validTransitionArb, { minLength: 1, maxLength: 5 }),\r\n\t\t\t\tinvalidTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(\r\n\t\t\t\t\tprefix: [Phase, Phase][],\r\n\t\t\t\t\t[badFrom, badTo]: [Phase, Phase],\r\n\t\t\t\t\tmsg: string,\r\n\t\t\t\t) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlet run = createRun(\"owner/repo\", 42, 0);\r\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const [_, to] of prefix) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (!canTransition(run.phase, to)) continue;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, to, msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trun = result.run;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (run.phase === badFrom) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, badTo, msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(run.phase);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Additional: createRun invariant\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"createRun invariants\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"always returns a run in QUEUED phase\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.constant(\"owner/repo\"),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.integer({ min: 1, max: 99999 }),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.integer({ min: 0, max: 4 }),\r\n\t\t\t\t(repoId: string, issueNumber: number, autonomyLevel: number) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run = createRun(repoId, issueNumber, autonomyLevel);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.attempt).toBe(1);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.branch).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.lastError).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.workspacePath).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates unique IDs\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(fc.constant(null), () => {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst ids = new Set<string>();\r\n\t\t\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tids.add(createRun(\"owner/repo\", 1, 0).id);\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(ids.size).toBe(100);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 100 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"startedAt is a valid ISO date string within the last minute\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(fc.constant(null), () => {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst run = createRun(\"owner/repo\", 1, 0);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst startedTime = new Date(run.startedAt).getTime();\r\n\t\t\t\tconst now = Date.now();\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(startedTime).toBeGreaterThan(now - 60000);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(startedTime).toBeLessThanOrEqual(now + 1000);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 100 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Additional: resumeFromEvents invariants\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"resumeFromEvents invariants\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"preserves runId in output\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.uuid({ version: 4 }),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.constant(\"owner/repo\"),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.integer({ min: 1, max: 99999 }),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.array(\r\n\t\t\t\t\tfc.record<RunEventData>({\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: fc.uuid({ version: 4 }),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trunId: fc.uuid({ version: 4 }),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: phaseArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlevel: fc.constantFrom(\"INFO\" as const, \"ERROR\" as const),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: fc.constant(\"event\"),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tpayload: fc.constant(null),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: fc.constant(new Date().toISOString()),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t{ minLength: 0, maxLength: 10 },\r\n\t\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t\t(\r\n\t\t\t\t\trunId: string,\r\n\t\t\t\t\trepoId: string,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: number,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tevents: RunEventData[],\r\n\t\t\t\t) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst fixedEvents = events.map((e) => ({ ...e, runId }));\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run = resumeFromEvents(runId, repoId, issueNumber, fixedEvents);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.id).toBe(runId);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.repoId).toBe(repoId);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.attempt).toBe(1);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"empty events result in QUEUED phase\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.uuid({ version: 4 }),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.constant(\"owner/repo\"),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.integer({ min: 1, max: 99999 }),\r\n\t\t\t\t(runId: string, repoId: string, issueNumber: number) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run = resumeFromEvents(runId, repoId, issueNumber, []);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 100 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"only INFO and GATE level events advance the phase\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.uuid({ version: 4 }),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.constant(\"owner/repo\"),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.integer({ min: 1, max: 99999 }),\r\n\t\t\t\t(runId: string, repoId: string, issueNumber: number) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst events: RunEventData[] = [\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"e1\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trunId,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: \"CLAIMED\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"ERROR\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: \"error\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tpayload: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"e2\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trunId,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: \"IMPLEMENT\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"WARN\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: \"warn\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tpayload: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"e3\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trunId,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: \"DONE\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"HUMAN\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmessage: \"human\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tpayload: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcreatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t\t\t];\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run = resumeFromEvents(runId, repoId, issueNumber, events);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 100 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Negative Assurance (Phase 7)\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Negative Assurance: generator coverage\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"invalidTransitionArb actually produces invalid pairs\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(invalidTransitionArb, ([from, to]: [Phase, Phase]) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(from, to)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"validTransitionArb produces pairs that exist in VALID_TRANSITIONS\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(validTransitionArb, ([from, to]: [Phase, Phase]) => {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst allowed = VALID_TRANSITIONS[from] as readonly Phase[];\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(allowed).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(allowed.includes(to)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"failurePhaseArb never produces a non-failure phase\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(failurePhaseArb, (phase: FailureKind) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"transitionChainArb produces connected chains\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(transitionChainArb, (chain: [Phase, Phase][]) => {\r\n\t\t\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < chain.length - 1; i++) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(chain[i]?.[1]).toBe(chain[i + 1]?.[0]);\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 200 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n"},"tags":[],"source":null},{"category":"lint/style/noNonNullAssertion","severity":"warning","description":"Forbidden non-null assertion.","message":[{"elements":[],"content":"Forbidden non-null assertion."}],"advices":{"advices":[]},"verboseAdvices":{"advices":[]},"location":{"path":{"file":".\\packages\\run-state\\src\\__tests__\\state-machine.property.test.ts"},"span":[11792,11813],"sourceCode":"/**\r\n * State Machine Property-Based Tests (QA-024)\r\n *\r\n * Systematically verifies central invariants of the Positron state machine\r\n * against randomly generated inputs using fast-check.\r\n *\r\n * Invariants tested:\r\n *  1. VALID_TRANSITIONS consistency with canTransition/transition\r\n *  2. Terminal phases are truly terminal\r\n *  3. Failure phase classification is correct\r\n *  4. Invalid transitions don't silently corrupt run state\r\n *  5. Valid transitions set target phase correctly\r\n *  6. Retry only works from FAILED_TRANSIENT\r\n *  7. markFailed always produces a failure phase\r\n *  8. No transition chain skips forbidden edges\r\n *\r\n * Generators produce no real secrets. All values are synthetic fakes.\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { describe, it, expect } from \"vitest\";\r\nimport fc from \"fast-check\";\r\nimport {\r\n\tcreateRun,\r\n\tcanTransition,\r\n\ttransition,\r\n\tmarkFailed,\r\n\tretry,\r\n\tresumeFromEvents,\r\n\tisTerminalPhase,\r\n\tisFailurePhase,\r\n\tVALID_TRANSITIONS,\r\n} from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\nimport type { RunState, RunEventData } from \"@positron/run-state\";\r\nimport type { Phase } from \"@positron/shared\";\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Generators (Phase 4)\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n\r\n/** All 28 phases as a constant array for generators */\r\nconst ALL_PHASES: Phase[] = Object.keys(VALID_TRANSITIONS) as Phase[];\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: any valid phase */\r\nconst phaseArb = fc.constantFrom(...ALL_PHASES);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: non-terminal phase (has at least one outgoing transition) */\r\nconst nonTerminalPhaseArb = fc.constantFrom(\r\n\t...ALL_PHASES.filter(\r\n\t\t(p) => (VALID_TRANSITIONS[p] as readonly Phase[]).length > 0,\r\n\t),\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: terminal phase (no outgoing transitions) */\r\nconst terminalPhaseArb = fc.constantFrom(\r\n\t...ALL_PHASES.filter(\r\n\t\t(p) => (VALID_TRANSITIONS[p] as readonly Phase[]).length === 0,\r\n\t),\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: failure phase */\r\nconst failurePhaseArb = fc.constantFrom<\r\n\t\"FAILED\" | \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" | \"FAILED_BLOCKED\" | \"FAILED_UNSAFE\"\r\n>(\"FAILED\", \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\", \"FAILED_BLOCKED\", \"FAILED_UNSAFE\");\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a valid (from, to) pair */\r\nconst validTransitionArb = fc\r\n\t.constantFrom(...ALL_PHASES)\r\n\t.chain((from) => {\r\n\t\tconst targets = VALID_TRANSITIONS[from] as readonly Phase[];\r\n\t\tif (targets.length === 0) return fc.constant(null);\r\n\t\treturn fc.tuple(fc.constant(from), fc.constantFrom(...targets));\r\n\t})\r\n\t.filter((t): t is [Phase, Phase] => t !== null);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: an invalid (from, to) pair */\r\nconst invalidTransitionArb = fc\r\n\t.constantFrom(...ALL_PHASES)\r\n\t.chain((from) => {\r\n\t\tconst allowed = new Set(VALID_TRANSITIONS[from] as readonly Phase[]);\r\n\t\tconst forbidden = ALL_PHASES.filter((p) => !allowed.has(p));\r\n\t\tif (forbidden.length === 0) return fc.constant(null);\r\n\t\treturn fc.tuple(fc.constant(from), fc.constantFrom(...forbidden));\r\n\t})\r\n\t.filter((t): t is [Phase, Phase] => t !== null);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a complete RunState with random phase */\r\nconst runStateArb: fc.Arbitrary<RunState> = fc.record({\r\n\tid: fc.uuid({ version: 4 }),\r\n\trepoId: fc.constant(\"test-owner/test-repo\"),\r\n\tissueNumber: fc.integer({ min: 1, max: 99999 }),\r\n\tbranch: fc.constant(null),\r\n\tphase: phaseArb,\r\n\tstatus: fc.constantFrom(\r\n\t\t\"active\" as const,\r\n\t\t\"blocked\" as const,\r\n\t\t\"done\" as const,\r\n\t\t\"failed\" as const,\r\n\t),\r\n\tautonomyLevel: fc.integer({ min: 0, max: 4 }),\r\n\tattempt: fc.integer({ min: 1, max: 10 }),\r\n\tstartedAt: fc.constant(new Date().toISOString()),\r\n\tfinishedAt: fc.constant(null),\r\n\tlastError: fc.constant(null),\r\n\tworkspacePath: fc.constant(null),\r\n});\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a run in FAILED_TRANSIENT */\r\nconst failedTransientRunArb: fc.Arbitrary<RunState> = runStateArb.map(\r\n\t(run) => ({\r\n\t\t...run,\r\n\t\tphase: \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" as Phase,\r\n\t\tstatus: \"failed\" as const,\r\n\t\tfinishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\tlastError: \"previous transient failure\",\r\n\t}),\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a failure kind */\r\ntype FailureKind =\r\n\t| \"FAILED\"\r\n\t| \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\"\r\n\t| \"FAILED_BLOCKED\"\r\n\t| \"FAILED_UNSAFE\";\r\nconst failureKindArb = fc.constantFrom<FailureKind>(\r\n\t\"FAILED\",\r\n\t\"FAILED_TRANSIENT\",\r\n\t\"FAILED_BLOCKED\",\r\n\t\"FAILED_UNSAFE\",\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a safe message (no real secrets) */\r\nconst safeMessageArb = fc.oneof(\r\n\tfc.constant(\"test failure\"),\r\n\tfc.constant(\"network timeout\"),\r\n\tfc.constant(\"disk full\"),\r\n\tfc.constant(\"merge conflict detected\"),\r\n\tfc.string({ minLength: 4, maxLength: 20 }).map((s) => `error-${s}`),\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a safe payload (no real secrets) */\r\nconst safePayloadArb = fc.oneof(\r\n\tfc.constant(null),\r\n\tfc.record({\r\n\t\tfakeToken: fc.constant(\"ghp_fake_1234567890\"),\r\n\t\tkey: fc.constant(\"test-key\"),\r\n\t}),\r\n\tfc.dictionary(\r\n\t\tfc.constantFrom(\"source\", \"code\", \"context\"),\r\n\t\tfc.constant(\"fake-value\"),\r\n\t),\r\n);\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a valid event level */\r\nconst eventLevelArb = fc.constantFrom<\r\n\t\"INFO\" | \"WARN\" | \"ERROR\" | \"GATE\" | \"HUMAN\"\r\n>(\"INFO\", \"WARN\", \"ERROR\", \"GATE\", \"HUMAN\");\r\n\r\n/** Arbitrary: a transition chain of valid transitions (length 2-20) */\r\nconst transitionChainArb = fc\r\n\t.array(validTransitionArb, { minLength: 2, maxLength: 20 })\r\n\t.filter((chain) => {\r\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < chain.length - 1; i++) {\r\n\t\t\tif (chain[i]?.[1] !== chain[i + 1]?.[0]) return false;\r\n\t\t}\r\n\t\treturn true;\r\n\t})\r\n\t.map((chain) => chain) as fc.Arbitrary<[Phase, Phase][]>;\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 1: VALID_TRANSITIONS consistency\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 1: VALID_TRANSITIONS <-> canTransition/transition\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"every valid pair returns true from canTransition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(validTransitionArb, ([from, to]) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(from, to)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"every invalid pair returns false from canTransition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(invalidTransitionArb, ([from, to]) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(from, to)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"valid transitions succeed via transition()\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tvalidTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\teventLevelArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafePayloadArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t([from, to], msg, level, payload) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run: RunState = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"test-id\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: \"owner/repo\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: from,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, to, msg, level, payload);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(to);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"no phase transitions to itself (reflexive check)\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(phaseArb, (phase: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(phase, phase)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 2: Terminal phases remain terminal\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 2: Terminal phases\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"terminal phases have isTerminalPhase() = true\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(terminalPhaseArb, (phase: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isTerminalPhase(phase)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"non-terminal phases have isTerminalPhase() = false\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(nonTerminalPhaseArb, (phase: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isTerminalPhase(phase)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"terminal phases cannot transition to any phase via canTransition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tterminalPhaseArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tphaseArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(terminal: Phase, target: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(terminal, target)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"terminal phases block transition() calls\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tterminalPhaseArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tnonTerminalPhaseArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(terminal: Phase, target: Phase, msg: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (terminal === target) return;\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run: RunState = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"test-id\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: \"owner/repo\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: terminal,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, target, msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(terminal);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 3: Failure phase classification\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 3: Failure phase classification\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"all failure phases return isFailurePhase() = true\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(failurePhaseArb, (phase: FailureKind) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"non-failure phases return isFailurePhase() = false\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(phaseArb, (phase: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\tif (\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase === \"FAILED\" ||\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase === \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\" ||\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase === \"FAILED_BLOCKED\" ||\r\n\t\t\t\t\tphase === \"FAILED_UNSAFE\"\r\n\t\t\t\t) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\treturn;\r\n\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(phase)).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit('all failure phases start with \"FAILED\"', () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(failurePhaseArb, (phase: FailureKind) => {\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(phase.startsWith(\"FAILED\")).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit('isFailurePhase is equivalent to phase.startsWith(\"FAILED\")', () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(phaseArb, (phase: Phase) => {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst isFailure = isFailurePhase(phase);\r\n\t\t\t\tconst startsWithFailed = phase.startsWith(\"FAILED\");\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(isFailure).toBe(startsWithFailed);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 4: Invalid transitions don't corrupt run state\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 4: Invalid transitions preserve run integrity\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"invalid transition preserves run phase\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tinvalidTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t([from, to]: [Phase, Phase], run: RunState, msg: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst input = { ...run, phase: from };\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(input, to, msg);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(from);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(input.id);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(input.repoId);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(input.issueNumber);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"invalid transition sets lastError\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tinvalidTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t([from, to]: [Phase, Phase], run: RunState, msg: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst input = { ...run, phase: from };\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(input, to, msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError!).toContain(\"Invalid transition\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError!).toContain(from);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError!).toContain(to);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 5: Valid transitions set target phase correctly\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 5: Valid transition correctness\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"valid transition preserves run identity\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tvalidTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\teventLevelArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(\r\n\t\t\t\t\t[from, to]: [Phase, Phase],\r\n\t\t\t\t\tmsg: string,\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlevel: \"INFO\" | \"WARN\" | \"ERROR\" | \"GATE\" | \"HUMAN\",\r\n\t\t\t\t) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run: RunState = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"test-id\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: \"owner/repo\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: \"positron/issue-42-test\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: from,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: 2,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: \"2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: \"/tmp/test\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, to, msg, level);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(to);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.runId).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.phase).toBe(to);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.message).toBe(msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(level);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"transition to DONE sets correct status and finishedAt\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst doneTransitionArb = validTransitionArb.filter(\r\n\t\t\t([_, to]: [Phase, Phase]) => to === \"DONE\",\r\n\t\t);\r\n\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tdoneTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t([from, _to]: [Phase, Phase], msg: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run: RunState = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"test-id\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: \"owner/repo\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: from,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, \"DONE\", msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"done\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 6: Retry only from FAILED_TRANSIENT\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 6: Retry restrictions\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"retry from FAILED_TRANSIENT always succeeds\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(failedTransientRunArb, (run: RunState) => {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(\"TEST\");\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.attempt).toBe(run.attempt + 1);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"retry from any other phase fails\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(phaseArb, runStateArb, (phase: Phase, baseRun: RunState) => {\r\n\t\t\t\tif (phase === \"FAILED_TRANSIENT\") return;\r\n\t\t\t\tconst run = { ...baseRun, phase };\r\n\t\t\t\tconst result = retry(run);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(phase);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.message).toContain(\"Cannot retry\");\r\n\t\t\t}),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"TEST is a valid target from FAILED_TRANSIENT\", () => {\r\n\t\tconst targets = VALID_TRANSITIONS.FAILED_TRANSIENT;\r\n\t\texpect(targets).toContain(\"TEST\");\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 7: markFailed produces a failure phase\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 7: markFailed guarantees\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"markFailed always returns ok:true\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"markFailed result phase is always a failure phase\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(isFailurePhase(result.run.phase)).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(kind);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"markFailed preserves run identity\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.id).toBe(run.id);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.repoId).toBe(run.repoId);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.issueNumber).toBe(run.issueNumber);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"markFailed sets finishedAt and lastError\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.finishedAt).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(new Date(result.run.finishedAt!).getTime()).toBeGreaterThan(0);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.lastError).toBe(reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"markFailed includes failedPhase and reason in event payload\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.level).toBe(\"ERROR\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.payload).toBeDefined();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.payload?.failedPhase).toBe(run.phase);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.event.payload?.reason).toBe(reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"markFailed status mapping is correct\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\trunStateArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tfailureKindArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(run: RunState, kind: FailureKind, reason: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst result = markFailed(run, kind, reason);\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (kind === \"FAILED_BLOCKED\" || kind === \"FAILED\") {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"blocked\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.status).toBe(\"failed\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Invariant 8: No transition chain skips forbidden edges\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"Invariant 8: Transition chain integrity\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"every edge in a valid chain satisfies canTransition\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\ttransitionChainArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(chain: [Phase, Phase][], msg: string) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (chain.length === 0) return;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t// Start at the chain's first phase\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst first = chain[0]?.[0];\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlet run: RunState = {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: \"chain-test\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trepoId: \"owner/repo\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tissueNumber: 42,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbranch: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tphase: first,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstatus: \"active\",\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tautonomyLevel: 0,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tattempt: 1,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstartedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfinishedAt: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlastError: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tworkspacePath: null,\r\n\t\t\t\t\t};\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const [from, to] of chain) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(from).toBe(run.phase);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(canTransition(run.phase, to)).toBe(true);\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, to, msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(true);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trun = result.run;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(ALL_PHASES).toContain(run.phase);\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"transition chain never silently skips an invalid edge\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.array(validTransitionArb, { minLength: 1, maxLength: 5 }),\r\n\t\t\t\tinvalidTransitionArb,\r\n\t\t\t\tsafeMessageArb,\r\n\t\t\t\t(\r\n\t\t\t\t\tprefix: [Phase, Phase][],\r\n\t\t\t\t\t[badFrom, badTo]: [Phase, Phase],\r\n\t\t\t\t\tmsg: string,\r\n\t\t\t\t) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tlet run = createRun(\"owner/repo\", 42, 0);\r\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const [_, to] of prefix) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (!canTransition(run.phase, to)) continue;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, to, msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\trun = result.run;\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\r\n\t\t\t\t\tif (run.phase === badFrom) {\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst result = transition(run, badTo, msg);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.ok).toBe(false);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t\texpect(result.run.phase).toBe(run.phase);\r\n\t\t\t\t\t}\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 500 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n});\r\n\r\n// =========================================================================\r\n// Additional: createRun invariant\r\n// =========================================================================\r\ndescribe(\"createRun invariants\", () => {\r\n\tit(\"always returns a run in QUEUED phase\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.constant(\"owner/repo\"),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.integer({ min: 1, max: 99999 }),\r\n\t\t\t\tfc.integer({ min: 0, max: 4 }),\r\n\t\t\t\t(repoId: string, issueNumber: number, autonomyLevel: number) => {\r\n\t\t\t\t\tconst run = createRun(repoId, issueNumber, autonomyLevel);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.phase).toBe(\"QUEUED\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.status).toBe(\"active\");\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.attempt).toBe(1);\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.branch).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.finishedAt).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.lastError).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\t\texpect(run.workspacePath).toBeNull();\r\n\t\t\t\t},\r\n\t\t\t),\r\n\t\t\t{ numRuns: 1000 },\r\n\t\t);\r\n\t});\r\n\r\n\tit(\"generates unique IDs\", () => {\r\n\t\tfc.assert(\r\n\t\t\tfc.property(fc.constant(null), () => {\r\n\t\t\t\tconst ids = new
